name: No Kings TOMORROW (via VPP)
subject: Your LAST chance to RSVP! >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Take the pledge to stand up to Trump
| **LAST CHANCE FOR YOU!**

Your local No Kings protest is TOMORROW and we still haven’t received your RSVP...

[**This is a HUGE opportunity to show Trump that we won’t stand for a MAGA monarchy! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/no-kings-protest-pledge?source=VPP_20251017_EMPET_E4_T0_NS&t=6&akid=21533%2E878179%2E-bgxHF) | [ADD MY NAME: I PLEDGE TO ATTEND MY NO KINGS PROTEST »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/no-kings-protest-pledge?source=VPP_20251017_EMPET_E4_T0_NS&t=7&akid=21533%2E878179%2E-bgxHF)
---
This is a five-alarm fire for our Democracy. We hope you’ll step up.

Thank you,
_The Voter Protection Project_
**—BEGIN FORWARDED MESSAGE—**
**No Kings organizers just SLAMMED Trump:
_“America belongs to its people, NOT KINGS. We’ll see everyone on October 18th.”_** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/no-kings-protest-pledge?source=VPP_20251017_EMPET_E4_T0_NS&t=8&akid=21533%2E878179%2E-bgxHF) | [YOUR ATTENDANCE UNCONFIRMED: SIGN NOW TO PLEDGE TO ATTEND YOUR NO KINGS PROTEST »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/no-kings-protest-pledge?source=VPP_20251017_EMPET_E4_T0_NS&t=9&akid=21533%2E878179%2E-bgxHF)
---
IF every Democrat reading this shows up, we can STAND UP to Trump and show him that the American people DO NOT TOLERATE a MAGA dictator!

**BUT IF ATTENDANCE IS LOW, Trump and his minions will laugh in our faces...** and our grassroots momentum will plummet when we need it most.

[**We REFUSE to stand idly by while Donald Trump plots to turn the presidency into a monarchy. Confirm your attendance at your local No Kings protest by taking the pledge NOW »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/no-kings-protest-pledge?source=VPP_20251017_EMPET_E4_T0_NS&t=10&akid=21533%2E878179%2E-bgxHF)
***THIS PETITION CLOSES AT 12AM***
[2,000 SIGNATURE GOAL: ADD YOUR NAME »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/no-kings-protest-pledge?source=VPP_20251017_EMPET_E4_T0_NS&t=11&akid=21533%2E878179%2E-bgxHF)
---
_Team Voter Protection Project_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=21533%2E878179%2E-bgxHF). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=21533%2E878179%2E-bgxHF).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=21533%2E878179%2E-bgxHF) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=21533%2E878179%2E-bgxHF). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=21533%2E878179%2E-bgxHF)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=21533%2E878179%2E-bgxHF)

name: The Democratic National Committee
subject: Radically transparent:
body:
---
Derek, Here’s the deal: Virginia is the only state where we can flip a governor’s seat from red to blue this year. Early voting is well underway, and we are running out of time to reach voters who may still be undecided. **We cannot take a single vote for granted this year.** To be radically transparent with you, a new poll shows the governor’s race tightening, and thousands of voters are still undecided. So if you’ve been waiting for the right time to get involved, _this is it_. We’re running out of time to reach voters who may still be on the fence and make sure they’re hearing Democrats’ message — especially as Trump and his allies spend millions on attack ads across the state. **Organizing and mobilizing voters takes a _huge_ number of resources, and Virginia’s Coordinated Campaign and the DNC are all-hands-on-deck to activate volunteers and reach as many Virginians as we can to win up and down the ballot.** [**So, Derek, we’re asking you to split a $20 donation between the Virginia Democratic Party’s Coordinated Campaign and the DNC to help power our work:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-vadcc-split?amount=20&refcode=em_20251017_4914_fr&refcode2=4940_22930333_0E6n1K&akid=4940%2E22930333%2E0E6n1K) _If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your split contribution between the Virginia Democratic Party's Coordinated Campaign and the Democratic National Committee instantly:_ | | | **[Donate $20](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-vadcc-split?express_lane=true&amount=20&refcode=em_20251017_4914_fr&refcode2=4940_22930333_0E6n1K&akid=4940%2E22930333%2E0E6n1K)**
---

Thank you,
The Democrats

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

name: Josh Harder
subject: Part 1 of my bill
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117494141/576675226/-1860252395?refcode=-footer-&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmVhOWE0NWItYjhhYi1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=XHzJOnwC_expyPfdcScTCJg5iw6-FlfNcC7Ask0T2lw=) | Peter, **It’s no secret: Washington is infested with corruption, and it’s become open season with Donald Trump back in the White House.** That’s why I just introduced a new landmark bill to fight back. It’s called the "_No Bribes for Politicians Act,"_ and it’s one of the most aggressive anti-corruption proposals Congress has seen in years. Let me tell you about the first part: banning politicians from profiting off the presidency. Donald Trump and his family have made over $3.4 billion while he’s been in office. That is INSANE. From shady meme coins to accepting private jets from Qatar, Trump has turned the presidency into a personal ATM. Here’s what my bill would do:
* **Ban sitting presidents from using the office for personal gain,** including shady business deals and self-promotional investments like Trump’s Truth Social stock.

* **Crack down on foreign gifts and influence,** preventing politicians from accepting luxury trips, private planes, and secret perks.

* **Ban politicians and their families from launching financial schemes tied to public office** — including meme coins, influencer deals, and hush-money payments disguised as “consulting.”

[_**If we don’t act now, this kind of corruption will only get worse. That’s why I’m asking: Become a citizen co-sponsor of my No Bribes for Politicians Act today.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117494142/576675227/571893256?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmVhOWE0NWItYjhhYi1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=XHzJOnwC_expyPfdcScTCJg5iw6-FlfNcC7Ask0T2lw=&emci=ec81eaca-1ba6-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=bea9a45b-b8ab-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=6455652) [Add Your Name »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117494143/576675228/571893256?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmVhOWE0NWItYjhhYi1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=XHzJOnwC_expyPfdcScTCJg5iw6-FlfNcC7Ask0T2lw=&emci=ec81eaca-1ba6-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=bea9a45b-b8ab-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=6455652) This isn’t just about Trump. It’s about protecting our democracy from those who would sell it off to the highest bidder. Thank you for standing with me. — Josh
---
* * *
You are receiving this email because Congressman Josh Harder is one of our last lines of defense to protect our democracy against MAGA extremists like Donald Trump and Marjorie Taylor Greene. [**Josh doesn't take a dime of corporate PAC money, so please chip in now to our campaign!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117494144/576675229/1618730853?refcode=E15661-20251013-CorruptionBill-footer-Corruption&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmVhOWE0NWItYjhhYi1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=XHzJOnwC_expyPfdcScTCJg5iw6-FlfNcC7Ask0T2lw=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117494145/576675230/-1860252395?refcode=E15661-20251013-CorruptionBill-footer-Corruption&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmVhOWE0NWItYjhhYi1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=XHzJOnwC_expyPfdcScTCJg5iw6-FlfNcC7Ask0T2lw=) [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117494146/576675231/1618730853?refcode=E15661-20251013-CorruptionBill-footer-Corruption&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmVhOWE0NWItYjhhYi1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=XHzJOnwC_expyPfdcScTCJg5iw6-FlfNcC7Ask0T2lw=) If you would like to receive fewer emails, we understand. [Click here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117494147/576675232/-1814317133?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmVhOWE0NWItYjhhYi1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=XHzJOnwC_expyPfdcScTCJg5iw6-FlfNcC7Ask0T2lw=&emci=ec81eaca-1ba6-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=bea9a45b-b8ab-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=6455652) to sign up for only the most important updates, or you can [unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/7te8sxLvVUSDWs_e-jVleA2?unsubscribedata=ctUfbvcTN8x3mOcFQCaH0kXJRsz%2FTPOy3nPaYogIZMyaPa125H%2FePn9bUXAOHHaoLJ0dFALTsR%2FaXBZT76RNO4OkSnzH15QNu9Yaj2Yh5LnP9BCYx6J82hyxu0XtwnHLS0opz%2BvXYGK80NnmiSsp6xoRVxC5baaVwPbGdQbNC3epExbn3LH4ZZgKnMOZjfPBilZngwguni6wUE2FVlj2jC1ld63thIOVqoSAVettEmsijw4wTs7sCgJbDx5YqNeL8B3PhS5dLtGsu3Atsl137eVer22c0aehhYIyQ2%2FflaATa7rQyR%2BM9eJlc%2FHq7SJ7nc%2BpjPtlo77L%2Fpaq7DuJHS0qOCJwqlOztYgGo1xzco8LeCHzpBI6DFfHw2d%2FzEaRaQX9ynyeC2DGJ7svq7YTWXXtn3P%2By3yXq9a%2B1s1Mhj1JafgoDvdrnaw49MtqLZmW). body:
It's probably not what you think.
#

_"America is not the project of any one person.**The single most powerful word in our democracy is the word 'We.'**_
_'We The People.' 'We Shall Overcome.' 'Yes We Can.'"_
— Former President Barack Obama | July 2025

**So right now, we're asking you to make a choice:** Will you sit back while the Trump administration continues to wreak absolute havoc on our country? Or will you join our movement to defeat the MAGA agenda + save our country?

name: Haley S.
subject: people I love are afraid
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
This fear, uncertainty, and chaos is unacceptable.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=1112%2E49239%2EYGmqUM)
I’m ready to fight for the people that I love in the state that I love
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/7098?t=2&akid=1112%2E49239%2EYGmqUM)
---
[](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/7099?t=3&akid=1112%2E49239%2EYGmqUM)
null – see that little girl in the photo? That’s me! Way before I had the honor of serving Michiganders in Congress and launching this battleground campaign to be Michigan’s next U.S. senator. I was about 12 or 13 years old there.
But don’t be fooled by school picture day (_and my trendy beaded necklace_). Growing up as the daughter of small-business owners – Mom and Dad had their own landscaping business – I was always around a lot of dirt, grease, grime, and heavy machinery. **I wouldn’t have had it any other way.**
My parents taught me the value of hard work – a value that binds all of us in Michigan together. After all, we’re the state that built America. The state that built the middle class.
In fact, do you know what one of my favorite memories is from growing up? When I got the keys to my first car, a used Oldsmobile Cutlass Supreme. That car represented the newfound freedom of teenage years. **But it was more to me than just that – it also meant I had a piece of Michigan.**
[](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/7099?t=4&akid=1112%2E49239%2EYGmqUM)
I love Michigan. I love the people here. And I love that I’ve been able to fight for my state in Congress. But as I’ve traveled our state recently, it’s clear that the people I love are afraid. They’re afraid because of the chaos and uncertainty that Donald Trump and the GOP are inflicting upon our nation.
All across our state, I hear concerns about rising costs, fear of uncertainty in our auto industry, and worries about the future of Social Security and Medicare. And you better believe people are outright disturbed by Trump’s attacks on our democracy and personal freedoms. **This fear, uncertainty, and chaos – all of it is**** _unacceptable._**
That’s why I’m running for U.S. Senate. I’m ready to fight for the people I love and help block Trump’s dangerous agenda. But the path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan – and this battleground race is being called a “Toss Up” by elections experts.
**null, I need****your support to continue reaching out to voters and win in Michigan. [ _Will you chip in $5, $25, or whatever you can to my grassroots campaign?_](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/7099?t=5&akid=1112%2E49239%2EYGmqUM)**
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._ | | | [Donate $5](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/7100?t=6&akid=1112%2E49239%2EYGmqUM)
---
| | [Donate $25](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/7101?t=7&akid=1112%2E49239%2EYGmqUM)
---
| | [Donate $50](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/7102?t=8&akid=1112%2E49239%2EYGmqUM)
---
| | [Donate Another Amount](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/7099?t=9&akid=1112%2E49239%2EYGmqUM)
---
Thank you,

Haley Stevens
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/7103?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=10&akid=1112%2E49239%2EYGmqUM) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/7098?t=11&akid=1112%2E49239%2EYGmqUM)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=12&akid=1112%2E49239%2EYGmqUM)
Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate.
33717 Woodward Ave #539
Birmingham, MI 48009

subject: This is why I got off the sidelines

body:
I got off the sidelines to fight for America

| | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zb7t33vft70pv1k39vjuq0skeif73jf79bva85bo_rp22sh2s8i6eor0ctge8or2cth2bs)
---
| | Friend,
Minnesota is a warning for the nation: far-Left leaders like Tim Walz choose radical policies over the safety and prosperity of everyday Americans.
Higher taxes, reckless spending, and extreme social policies are hurting families, small businesses, and communities across the state.
**We can’t let this continue.** That’s why Kendall Qualls is running for governor: to restore conservative leadership and put Minnesota back on the path to safety, opportunity, and growth.
Even a donation of just $1 helps build a grassroots movement that can stand up to the Democrats’ agenda. **_[Will you support Kendall’s fight to FIRE Tim Walz by chipping in today?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z36dd81dd9d400r25entk9rpgn2p6grm30tl5870_rp22sh2s8i6eor0ctge8or2cth2bs)_**

| | Tim Walz has turned his back on the people he’s supposed to serve. And to make matters worse, the national Democratic machine is backing him for a THIRD term as governor. We can’t allow things to continue like this.
**This fight isn’t just about Minnesota, it’s about protecting America from policies that threaten our economy, our freedoms, and our communities.**
**_[Will you chip in now to help Kendall Qualls fight back against Walz and the radical Left, defend conservative values, and take Minnesota back?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zek5qvh473717t689igq4daiuh4qh4f25sjsmp7g_rp22sh2s8i6eor0ctge8or2cth2bs)_**

---
[CHIP IN $1](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhapp45que2vk66v7e2fp21593jicqbn44l3r01o_rp22sh2s8i6eor0ctge8or2cth2bs)
| | Your support makes all the difference. With conservatives across the country standing together, we can stop Tim Walz and his allies from spreading their dangerous agenda any further.
Thank you for taking action today to defend Minnesota and America’s future.
Sincerely,Team Qualls
---
[RUSH IN $1](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z77mqo0ivtfq12tcstgf854bsr99ot403f4ht6rg_rp22sh2s8i6eor0ctge8or2cth2bs)

---

---

My name is Kendall Qualls. I wasn’t born into privilege or power. I was raised in Harlem, New York, in the 1960s; a child of divorce and one of several siblings living in public housing. Before I reached middle school, I moved to a trailer park in Oklahoma to live with my father. Neither of my parents finished high school.
I didn’t take shortcuts. I worked full-time to put myself through college. I used student loans and paid them back in full. I served as an officer in the United States Army. I earned an MBA from the University of Michigan. Then, I spent 30 years leading teams and driving innovation in the healthcare industry — rising to become Global Vice President of an $850 million business unit.
Now, I’m running for Governor of Minnesota to make sure that the principles that lifted me - hard work, faith, family, personal responsibility, and the free enterprise system - are preserved, defended, and passed on to the next generation.
We don’t need more government. We need more opportunities.
That’s what I’m fighting for, and I need your help. [Can I count on your support today?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zatu583k72vg96pojumv0ao51caql8jac7nc83s0_rp22sh2s8i6eor0ctge8or2cth2bs)
With gratitude,Kendall Qualls

[DONATE](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zijo0khiccpu89mr5vefa4n8ijjlrv7recltvje8_rp22sh2s8i6eor0ctge8or2cth2bs)
|

---
| | **The fight to take back Minnesota is on, and every day counts.**
[Shop the official Kendall Qualls Store today and wear your support with pride.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zccdut15180viibc6solsuv8ghnt732q3168a9v8_rp22sh2s8i6eor0ctge8or2cth2bs)
When you get your gear, you’re making a statement that goes far beyond what you wear. It’s a message to Tim Walz that Minnesotans are ready for new leadership, safer communities, and a restored American Dream. Your support helps fuel Kendall’s campaign and spreads his vision of conservative leadership everywhere you go.
Join the movement. Show your pride. Let’s win this together.
---

Then, I spent 30 years leading teams and driving innovation in the healthcare industry — rising to become Global Vice President of an $850 million business unit.
Now, I’m running for Governor of Minnesota to make sure that the principles that lifted me - hard work, faith, family, personal responsibility, and the free enterprise system - are preserved, defended, and passed on to the next generation.
We don’t need more government. We need more opportunities.
That’s what I’m fighting for, and I need your help. [Can I count on your support today?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqi85hf6i89225t8terc9it5ukf889u54b8bq1o8_rp22sh2s8i6eor0ctge8or2cth2bs)

name: Kendall Qualls
subject: This is why I got off the sidelines
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Kendall Qualls for Governor Committee | PO Box 235, Stillwater, MN 55082
body:
I got off the sidelines to fight for America

| | | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zf3q3n7slt99m6b7ls6p6q3a0dr1saeojvqdiafg_rp22sh2s8i6eor0ctge4pb2cjh2bs)
---
| | Friend,
Minnesota is a warning for the nation: far-Left leaders like Tim Walz choose radical policies over the safety and prosperity of everyday Americans.
Higher taxes, reckless spending, and extreme social policies are hurting families, small businesses, and communities across the state.
**We can’t let this continue.** That’s why Kendall Qualls is running for governor: to restore conservative leadership and put Minnesota back on the path to safety, opportunity, and growth.
Even a donation of just $1 helps build a grassroots movement that can stand up to the Democrats’ agenda. **_[Will you support Kendall’s fight to FIRE Tim Walz by chipping in today?](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z955u5qq4lp073dhugve102ua9v4g41es99ffguo_rp22sh2s8i6eor0ctge4pb2cjh2bs)_**

| | Tim Walz has turned his back on the people he’s supposed to serve. And to make matters worse, the national Democratic machine is backing him for a THIRD term as governor. We can’t allow things to continue like this.
**This fight isn’t just about Minnesota, it’s about protecting America from policies that threaten our economy, our freedoms, and our communities.**
**_[Will you chip in now to help Kendall Qualls fight back against Walz and the radical Left, defend conservative values, and take Minnesota back?](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zsk0vgvslvgn4nrba71qp1da23mhpmae46smhs48_rp22sh2s8i6eor0ctge4pb2cjh2bs)_**

| | Your support makes all the difference. With conservatives across the country standing together, we can stop Tim Walz and his allies from spreading their dangerous agenda any further.
Thank you for taking action today to defend Minnesota and America’s future.
Sincerely,Team Qualls

[RUSH IN $1](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zet6rgbsmm75uuadin8m1ngsuskak1qhvbtseu8o_rp22sh2s8i6eor0ctge4pb2cjh2bs)

---

My name is Kendall Qualls. I wasn’t born into privilege or power. I was raised in Harlem, New York, in the 1960s; a child of divorce and one of several siblings living in public housing. Before I reached middle school, I moved to a trailer park in Oklahoma to live with my father. Neither of my parents finished high school.
I didn’t take shortcuts. I worked full-time to put myself through college. I used student loans and paid them back in full. I served as an officer in the United States Army. I earned an MBA from the University of Michigan. Then, I spent 30 years leading teams and driving innovation in the healthcare industry — rising to become Global Vice President of an $850 million business unit.
Now, I’m running for Governor of Minnesota to make sure that the principles that lifted me - hard work, faith, family, personal responsibility, and the free enterprise system - are preserved, defended, and passed on to the next generation.
We don’t need more government. We need more opportunities.
That’s what I’m fighting for, and I need your help. [Can I count on your support today?](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zdf82seer4t0e33bve5k3hvu30ghvg04gvlohl2g_rp22sh2s8i6eor0ctge4pb2cjh2bs)
With gratitude,Kendall Qualls

name: Elise Stefanik
subject: The Democrats were hoping this would never get out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
This poll changes everything...

Friend,
Ever since the Democrats' government shutdown began on October 1, I placed a pause on our campaign's fundraising.
With the Radical Left holding our government hostage to try and benefit illegal immigrants all at the expense of hardworking Americans like you, honestly, the last thing I wanted to do was bother my supporters with political emails and texts.
In fact, I believe now more than ever, the American people need to see that YOU are our ONLY priority, which is why I've had my own salary withheld during the Democrats' senseless shutdown.
[But today, I have to at least break my silence because I just received information that will UPEND the 2026 elections. ](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zg606tee0mlh43s913i4mc9e9gsep8fr2ctl9ne0_rp22sh2s8i6eor0ctge4pb6cth2bs)
[A BRAND NEW POLL in New York just dropped, showing that once voters are aware of our positions, I would BEAT Democrat governor Kathy Hochul by 1 POINT!](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjgqqme31m7kfelnck6hgul8p5cubd2kurm0tgeo_rp22sh2s8i6eor0ctge4pb6cth2bs)
Hochul and the Democrats were desperately hoping that I would continue to pause my messaging during the shutdown so that they could bury this news and prevent us from seizing the momentum.
There's no two ways about it; this poll is devastating for Hochul. She's even being labeled the MOST VULNERABLE Democrat governor in the country.
And this new poll shows us our clear path to victory.
[So long as we reach every last voter, so long as our message isn't drowned out by the Democrats' multimillion-dollar ad buys, and so long as I have YOU in my corner, we can SAVE New York!](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zid5rqae62hf66fcli0ourf1v51b8hk21vmsk8r8_rp22sh2s8i6eor0ctge4pb6cth2bs)
...But all this depends on having the resources necessary to get the job done.
[That is why I've made the calls to secure a 5oo% MATCH for the next 24 hours to ensure we capitalize on this moment.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpfu0dons2h6m4vmhmm2m2jlam7dsv8dptb46as0_rp22sh2s8i6eor0ctge4pb6cth2bs)
Now that our path to save New York is clearer than ever, now that we have all the momentum, will you stand with me in our fight to FIRE Hochul?
[Please make a contribution now that we can take the LEAD in the fight to FIRE Hochul and SAVE New York - and I'll ensure it goes 5 TIMES AS FAR.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ze2fn07s9utfgpbae9o04cl9qm9c59mjahpt7gl8_rp22sh2s8i6eor0ctge4pb6cth2bs)[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbval1sljrea3m7hk6118j0b2kc2ml915r69sobo_rp22sh2s8i6eor0ctge4pb6cth2bs)[$5=$25
](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zf2pr6s71copalrthviqvoajrndhu7mqfb07s2no_rp22sh2s8i6eor0ctge4pb6cth2bs)[$10=$50
](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zf744nqii77h82qof3kpucoqbgpd3s656crpa4s8_rp22sh2s8i6eor0ctge4pb6cth2bs)[$20=$100
](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zok9a96le585ltg96qlfpmhvklle4ectc03pagk8_rp22sh2s8i6eor0ctge4pb6cth2bs)[$35=$175
](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zs6nkdcpe5reb2pchnv8a9on15rojlqa9bjf93h0_rp22sh2s8i6eor0ctge4pb6cth2bs)[DONATE ANY AMOUNT

name: Larry Klayman, Freedom Watch Founder
subject: I am fighting to get this terrorist sympathizer expelled from Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Freedom Watch USA, Inc
body:
DEFEND the America-First agenda.

| | | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zn2pi279vkq07pq4eah1kllf0t4h183rn46v2os8_rp22sh2s8i6eor0ctge4pb1c9h2bs)
---
**Dear Patriot,**

Will you rush back $35 or more to help me **DEPORT ILHAN OMAR?**

Sorry to be so blunt with you...

But Americans like you and me **CANNOT** wait on the **GUTLESS RINOs** in Washington to deport her.

She is a **TERRORIST SOMALI SYMPATHIZER** who **COMMITTED IMMIGRATION FRAUD** to infiltrate our government.

How do I know?

Because I've been **INVESTIGATING** and **PROSECUTING** Radical Democrats like Ilhan Omar for **DECADES.**

And with your support today, I will pull **EVERY** legal lever possible to get her **DENATURALIZED** and **DEPORTED.**

[**DEPORT ILHAN OMAR**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zoda528ke4cans65unr779scgsillc0okdtunkb8_rp22sh2s8i6eor0ctge4pb1c9h2bs)
---

**This is Larry Klayman. **

I am the **ONLY** person who has filed a legal complaint to **DHS** to have Ilhan Omar **PROSECUTED** and **DEPORTED** back to Somalia before she can do more damage in Congress.

You may know me as the conservative lawyer who **THROWS LEGAL BOMBS** at the heart of the Democrat Deep State: Obama, Soros, the Clintons, you name it.

My nonprofit, Freedom Watch USA, is the **PRIVATE JUSTICE DEPARTMENT** of The People, by The People, for The People.

I've spent my whole life exposing and prosecuting leftist corruption, but I've **NEVER** seen such blatant **HATRED FOR AMERICA** go completely unpunished.

Here are the hard facts:

1\. Ilhan Omar **MARRIED HER BROTHER** to commit immigration **FRAUD.**

2\. She is a **TERRORIST-SYMPATHIZER** who openly hates and incites against God and America.

3\. Both of these things give us the **LEGAL RIGHT to DEPORT HER!**

If we can't muster the political will to **DEPORT** an **ILLEGAL SOMALI JIHADIST** from America, then we will be **CONQUERED** from within.

I've already begun the fight with the Deep State...

I've already briefed my team on the battle ahead...

But now **LEFTIST JUDICIAL INSURRECTIONISTS** are obstructing me at every turn, and I'm relying on patriots like YOU to provide me with the financial firepower to plow through their attacks.

1. Will you sign your petition to **DEPORT ILHAN OMAR?**

2. Will you chip in $35 so I can **WIN** this fight in court?

Thank you in advance for your time and support.

But when you see **SOMALI TERRORIST ILHAN OMAR** deported out of America, you'll have nobody to thank but yourself.

God Save Our Sacred Republic,
Larry Klayman Founder, Freedom Watch

name: Troy Downing
subject: After reaching out 3 times and hearing nothing, I'm deeply concerned about what will happen if this doesn't work.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
I'm sending you this email today in hopes of a miracle.

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)Hide & seek with the Grim Reaper.
I'm sending you this email today in hopes of a miracle.
**After reaching out 3 times and hearing nothing, I'm deeply concerned about what will happen if this doesn't work.**
I've had my back against the wall before - I know how to stay calm under pressure.
My name is Troy Downing. Just a guy from Montana who is taking a huge leap of faith.
Peter, I'm also a U.S. Air Force combat veteran, a God-fearing Christian, a husband, and a proud dad.
**I'm fighting against the Deep State in Congress and advancing President Trump's MAGA agenda.**
But I've just learned that Democrats in key battleground districts have amassed a staggering war chest, each with an average of over $1 million in cash.
The Democrat Political Machine is take this pro-Trump House seat & remove every other red-blooded American who opposes their radical agenda so they can take over the House Majority.
They're putting my campaign on the chopping block.
[I hate to do this, but could I humbly ask you to help me out by chipping in just a few bucks today?](https://trk.emails.troydowning._ZXhfdGlkPTIwMjUxMDE4X0VXLU4zLjExMDExN190MTczMDk2My0yODk5JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI1MTAxOF9FVy1OMy4xMTAxMTdfdDE3MzA5NjMtMjg5OSJ9/FzrMDOhn9KDFNxwF_8xwyA)[SEND HELP ASAP
](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)I'll be upfront with you - this is a Hail Mary pass, but I believe God led me to this moment for a reason.

I give you my word as a veteran and as an American: **I'll never let you down.**
My candidacy is in your hands. Will you help out an old combat vet?
Thank you,
Troy Downing _Conservative Veteran in Congress_| |

Josh Brecheen of Oklahoma, a member of the Republican Study Committee, urged Attorney General Pam Bondi to open a criminal investigation into Smith for his apparent involvement with Operation Arctic Frost, according to a letter obtained by Blaze News. During former President Joe Biden's administration, the FBI obtained private cellphone information from nine Republican lawmakers, an Two Ohio lawmakers want a local judge removed from office for making public statements about the death of Charlie Kirk. State Rep. Adam Mathews called Judge Ted Berry’s comments egregious and inflammatory, and the second-term Republican has called for the judge’s resignation. With no movement, Mathews introduced a concurrent resolution to start removal proceedings against [...]...Click to read more P.O. name: INGOP
subject: ICYMI: State Revenues Again Outpace Projections In September
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE
body:
For the fifth consecutive month, Indiana revenue collections exceeded the most recent estimates in September. No images? [Click here](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-e-qhkihlt-hhlljjcji-u/) **IN CASE YOU MISSED IT** **State Revenues Again Outpace Projections In September** Alex Brown
October 13, 2025
[https://www.insideindianabusiness.com/articles/state-revenues-again-outpace-projections-in-september](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qhkihlt-hhlljjcji-r/)

For the fifth consecutive month, Indiana revenue collections exceeded the most recent estimates in September. The Indiana State Budget Agency reports that General Fund revenues last month totaled $2.3 billion, which was $107 million higher than the April 2025 forecast, or 4.9%.September's collections were also 15.6% higher than the same month in 2024.The agency noted that higher-than-expected collections from sales tax, individual income tax, and insurance revenues were the primary drivers of the September report.Corporate tax collections also beat estimates last month, totaling $205 million. However, cigarette tax collections and interest revenue collections both fell short of projections.**" Our state's monthly revenue report once again exceeds expectations--proof that the strong, pro-growth foundation built under President Trump continues to fuel our economy," Indiana Gov. Mike Braun said in a news release. "We'll keep building on that momentum to deliver results for Hoosiers through fiscal responsibility and conservative leadership."**Year-to-date, General Fund revenues have totaled just under $5.5 billion, which is $185 million above the April 2025 forecast and 10.7% higher than the same period in the last fiscal year.You can connect to the full September 2025 revenue report by clicking [here](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qhkihlt-hhlljjcji-y/).###_During the budget session, our legislative leaders took action to prepare for challenging budget forecasts based on ongoing trade negotiations. Thanks to this prudence, we did not overextend ourselves in the interim, and our state is now predicted to enter a time of stronger economic growth._
_-INGOP Team_ [](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qhkihlt-hhlljjcji-j/)[](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qhkihlt-hhlljjcji-t/)[](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qhkihlt-hhlljjcji-i/)[](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qhkihlt-hhlljjcji-d/)[](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qhkihlt-hhlljjcji-h/)[](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qhkihlt-hhlljjcji-k/) ** PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE. ****NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. ****WWW.INDIANA.GOP.** | Indiana Republican State Committee 101 W. OHIO ST., SUITE 2200 INDIANAPOLIS, IN 46204 This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com [Preferences](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.updatemyprofile.com/y-qhkihlt-293A8D27-hhlljjcji-p) | [Unsubscribe](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-u-qhkihlt-hhlljjcji-x/)

| |
# **Upcoming Town Hall**
---
|
---
I cannot wait to see you at my upcoming town hall!

Whether it is the current gerrymandering push, rising utility bills, grocery trips getting more and more expensive, inaccessible child care or housing instability -- **we know there are a whole lot of problems that need fixing. **

It is an honor to work alongside our District 46 community in an effort to create an idea that works for all, and I am confident that the way we do that is **together. **

Thank you in advance for your time, your energy and for using your voice to create change.
* * *
---
| | |
# **JD Vance Stopped by the Statehouse... Again**
---
| | | [ ](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=376e2c1c27a4e783135490e1e890c8230ef91eba58809e70d23a211111bcb2eac3d66a2624f2279e15c51aed03f9f87a82f2f0d7284a192a)
---
The Vice President was back in town recently to put pressure on the Indiana Statehouse Republicans to fall in line with the mid-decade map-rigging scheme.

And just yesterday, the President called Indiana State Senators directly to dial up the pressure.

They are taking these steps because your calls are working. Your emails are working. You showing up, time and time again, is working.

Even still, we continue to stare down a real threat of a special session to rig our maps and rob Hoosiers of the right to a fair election--**we can't let up the pressure.**

**Hoosiers won't be bullied, and we won't be cheated. **
**Gov. Mike Braun: 317-232-4567

Speaker of the House Todd Huston: 317-232-9677

President Pro Tempore Rodric Bray: 317-232-9400**
* * *
---
| | |
# **The Impact of SEA 1 on Our Public Schools**
---
| | One of the most significant bills of the 2025 Legislative Session and a key priority for Senate Republicans was Senate Enrolled Act (SEA) 1: Local Government Finance. I strongly support finding responsible ways to lower property taxes. Working families deserve relief from rising costs, especially when it comes to keeping a roof over their heads. But it is important that we do it the right way, without shifting the burden onto our local communities. While SEA 1 may offer up to $300 in property tax savings for some homeowners, it also results in millions of dollars in lost revenue for our local governments. That reduction will likely mean fewer resources for road maintenance, emergency services, local operations, public schools, and libraries. These challenges with property taxes did not appear overnight. They have been building for years. My caucus has long advocated for sustainable, balanced solutions that protect both homeowners and the essential services our communities rely on. Unfortunately, SEA 1 moves us in the wrong direction. **Now, let 's take a closer look at what SEA 1 means for Senate District 46.** **Check out the graphic below to see how your school district is affected by SEA 1**. Stay tuned for our next update on how this legislation impacts other units of government in our district.
---
|
---
| | |
* * *
# **Supporting Our Unions**
---
| | |
---
Our Teamsters Local 135 are not just demanding fair pay--they are demanding basic respect.

Union employees at Brulin Holding Company haven't received a pay increase in three years, despite the company continuing to see profits.

Families all around our state want the same thing: a fair shot to make a living and put food on the table.

These folks aren't being treated fairly, and we won't accept that.

I'm honored to join these Hoosiers in standing firm for workers' rights.
* * *
---
# **Give the Indiana Department of Education your feedback on School Accountability Plan**
**Did you know that Indiana has until the end of this year to redo the way it assesses a school's success?

Public comment is**** ****now open on proposed changes. **

Read the [second draft of the accountability framework for schools here](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=376e2c1c27a4e783a254c6e2477fafa49a2045db34446503692dffb77fe085421c629f82dc1dd2e30ffeabfca656a7175b4b9fabc433c071). Give your [feedback online here](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=376e2c1c27a4e783f7750056b45c4222ef972d14e3441b9f1e919c023a23f7341b5d3307b986ebc9e4ab46730a3ea2da6b6b9edd39f4b91a) by Nov. 17 or in person at 11 a.m. Nov. 17 in the history reference room at the Indiana State Library, 315 W. Ohio St. in Indianapolis.
---
* * *
# **Updates From Interim Committees**
---
|
---

**Fall means Interim Study Committees. **

I have the privilege of representing District 46 on 14 different committees, boards and commissions.

As we approach our next legislative session, these groups have been meeting more frequently as legislators from both chambers work alongside area experts to inform potential future legislation.

In the **[Interim Study Committee on Commerce and Economic Development](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=376e2c1c27a4e7838158de50d460b3de20a0c97f6e4471eeff0ef37800633b9e76e78589823b43eb41c97785446fb642fcab70e26145f20c "Interim Study Committee on Commerce and Economic Development")** , we heard from pharmacists, physician assistants and our state's Professional Licensing Agency regarding potential changes to the licensing processes in Indiana's medical field.

As we move forward, it is critical to strike a balance between recruiting and retaining talent in Indiana by not having unnecessarily burdensome credentialing practices, while still maintaining and ensuring a much-needed level of patient safety in Indiana.
* * *

---
### **Full List of Interim Committee Assignments**
---
|
---
* * *
---
| | |
# **Visit From Center for Inquiry Students**
---
| | |
---
I was so glad to have some time with students from Center for Inquiry School 2.

**Fun Fact: These were my kindergarten students the year I got elected! **

Instilling passion about our government and its processes into our young people is so important, and I am always inspired to see their inquisitiveness in the People's House.

Thank you for stopping by!
---
| | |
* * *

Whether it is the current gerrymandering push, rising utility bills, grocery trips getting more and more expensive, inaccessible child care or housing instability -- we know there are a whole lot of problems that need fixing. It is an honor to work alongside our District 46 community in an effort to create an idea that works for all, and I am confident that the way we do that is together. Thank you in advance for your time, your energy and for using your voice to create change. | | | JD Vance Stopped by the Statehouse... Again | | | The Vice President was back in town recently to put pressure on the Indiana Statehouse Republicans to fall in line with the mid-decade map-rigging scheme. And just yesterday, the President called Indiana State Senators directly to dial up the pressure. They are taking these steps because your calls are working. Your emails are working. You showing up, time and time again, is working. Even still, we continue to stare down a real threat of a special session to rig our maps and rob Hoosiers of the right to a fair election--we can't let up the pressure. Hoosiers won't be bullied, and we won't be cheated. Gov. I strongly support finding responsible ways to lower property taxes. Working families deserve relief from rising costs, especially when it comes to keeping a roof over their heads. But it is important that we do it the right way, without shifting the burden onto our local communities. While SEA 1 may offer up to $300 in property tax savings for some homeowners, it also results in millions of dollars in lost revenue for our local governments. That reduction will likely mean fewer resources for road maintenance, emergency services, local operations, public schools, and libraries. body:
It’ll only take a moment

Friend,

Don Jr. here

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9itv6sh1o33gci2kjhll92evpc9urosmbqneno0_rp22sh2s8i6eor0ctge1p71c1h2bs)

I wanted to personally reach out and thank you for taking the time to complete my father's new census. Your commitment to our cause is what drives us forward, and we're grateful for your support.

We reviewed your questionnaire, and we noticed _you left _Question 5 blank__. I know it was an honest oversight, but I want to make sure your voice is fully heard. That's why I'm asking if you could review and re-submit your responses by 11:59PM tonight.

**[Review here: NationwideCensusValuedAllies/dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5lrf53u4pk5br3e69neglqn2i1cf220ackfu210_rp22sh2s8i6eor0ctge1p71c1h2bs)**

You're one of our most valued allies in the fight to protect fair elections, and your input is crucial to our success. By taking a minute to revisit your census, you'll be helping us build a stronger, more just America.

[Click this link to finish your census now >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zaeil3udr83d38sp9qk4qp8ais3uqo3fpth0frfo_rp22sh2s8i6eor0ctge1p71c1h2bs)

name: Johnny =?UTF-8?B?4oCcSm9leeKAnQ==?= Jones
subject: This is never an easy conversation
body:
First responders go by a lot of names... But you and I know them by the one name they won’t call themselves: hero.

|
---
| | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zoknrbuu84t5p1u3nnvu2eg6j16ce78adkfnudr8_rp22sh2s8i6eor0ctge9pr4cph2bs)
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zn9uf9h83097fsva1c78kt8234lff2s2tthtvbno_rp22sh2s8i6eor0ctge9pr4cph2bs)

Friend,

First responders go by a lot of names...

... firefighter.
... paramedic.
... police officer.
... disaster response technician.
... border patrol agent.

**But you and I know them by the one name they won’t call themselves: hero.**

First responders are the hometown heroes who keep us safe. They go to work every day, even though that means confronting the worst situations imaginable. It’s what makes these men and women heroes. They know what they signed up for and do it anyway.

However, their service and sacrifice are almost always overlooked by the Radical Left.

It’s time to restore trust and honor to our first responders.

That’s why I wrote my latest book, _Behind the Badge_ , dedicated to telling their story.
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zrqi7jtsvs07n6oqialhm4k8ogtkg4pvcavhsma8_rp22sh2s8i6eor0ctge9pr4cph2bs)
I am also teaming up with **the Kash Foundation** to support our first responders and veterans.

While activists take cheap shots at our first responders, the Kash Foundation is restoring faith in their service, defending their dignity, and standing up for them when attacked by the media and activists.

[I believe in the mission of the Kash Foundation, and I am helping them raise money to support our veterans and first responders by raising $20,000 before the end of the month.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z4a0le1sc94gmb791k1vdph4ee9k3k0fv0oetuto_rp22sh2s8i6eor0ctge9pr4cph2bs)
[DONATE](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zko8vj97d5998i0j9f8fj6a9anoa0j3lklht403o_rp22sh2s8i6eor0ctge9pr4cph2bs)
I know these men and women. I grew up with them, and I served with them. I know the trauma they endure and the victories that they get to save lives every day.

**And it’s a shame the little thanks first responders get sometimes.**

The one thing they all have in common is that each one of them felt compelled to help their fellow citizens, regardless of the risk.

Too often, government officials are setting up our first responders to fail and being used as political punching bags for the Radical Left.

It’s time for you and me to protect them.

The Kash Foundation has been able to:
* Provide financial support and care for families of those who fall in the line of duty. They help cover funeral expenses and provide direct support to the spouse and children left behind.
* Provide scholarships to the children of those who gave everything. They provide scholarships that help those kids, so their parents’ sacrifice doesn’t define their future.
* Fund legal defenses for service members falsely accused and abandoned by the system. When they are caught up in a political firestorm that costs them their job, they help them and their family make do while they are in the eye of the storm.

**Let’s let our first responders know that we have their backs!**

[Please show first responders that they have your support by donating any amount you can spare today.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z4o2pe2t1iliis1h0la5ue09jp4rpt11llihbb00_rp22sh2s8i6eor0ctge9pr4cph2bs)
[DONATE $10](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zcbeuom26iltg3t5rllgqtsj9h5b472c6sb2pia8_rp22sh2s8i6eor0ctge9pr4cph2bs)

[DONATE $35](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z2sgntv1f5fv93o0nhb3omfje1fo7ur2duh87kh8_rp22sh2s8i6eor0ctge9pr4cph2bs)

[DONATE $50](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z7oi244mmtvf1eudqrrmssikp8v1tnmtfaasegvo_rp22sh2s8i6eor0ctge9pr4cph2bs)

[DONATE $100](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zhss59to45rt9isfo48s28e1qclvkn2chell0ntg_rp22sh2s8i6eor0ctge9pr4cph2bs)

[DONATE $250](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zakg5adbhvcjs5o80l7484pf3jerj4qq9ni10lko_rp22sh2s8i6eor0ctge9pr4cph2bs)

[DONATE $1,000](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zsmre3dm8g75399k2mgtr7pg7vp44k4oas2att10_rp22sh2s8i6eor0ctge9pr4cph2bs)

[DONATE ANY AMOUNT](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zv521q67rvptli0hpd61iuul61d83tg9dj7j3lsg_rp22sh2s8i6eor0ctge9pr4cph2bs)
You and I owe everything to our first responders. It’s time to make sure we have their backs, because they will always be there when we need them.

God Bless America,

Johnny “Joey” Jones

name: Team WisGOP
subject: WisGOP Update 10.17.2025
body:
No images? [Click here](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-e-qhhvjk-didthutlhu-yu/) [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qhhvjk-didthutlhu-r/) Patriot,Democrats in the Senate continue their government shutdown as they refuse to pass a funding measure at the expense of all Americans, especially our most vulnerable citizens. The numbers don't lie - we cannot afford to be played as pawns in the Democrats' political game any longer. While the Democrats work to keep the government closed, President Trump has been hard at work securing peace in the Middle East. His peace plan has already taken effect, and a ceasefire is now in place, garnering praise from across the world!We can see a stark contrast in what each party stands for in the lead-up to 2026. The Democrats will play political games to the detriment of Americans, while Republicans will be hard at work delivering positive results and a more peaceful world. Please consider joining our efforts below!-Team WisGOP **Damages of the Democratic Shutdown** Democrats in the Senate have refused to support a Continuing Resolution (CR) to fund the government and end the shutdown in order to gain political leverage against Republicans. This is despite the fact that Democrats and Republicans were able to pass 13 bipartisan CRs during Biden's term in office. The Democrats' political gamesmanship has already proven devastating to many of our nation's and state's most vulnerable citizens.**Economic Impact **
* Both Goldman Sachs and the Federal Reserve estimate that the U.S. economy will lose [$15 billion](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qhhvjk-didthutlhu-y/) per week during the shutdown. In Wisconsin, this translates to $234 million lost every week and $1 billion per month.
* The shutdown leads to greater economic uncertainty, leading to lower business investment and high volatility in financial markets. Both of those factors contribute to losses for Americans who have money in stocks, 401(k)s, and pension funds.
* Small businesses are now unable to secure SBA loans, which cost them about [$2 billion](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qhhvjk-didthutlhu-j/) during the last shutdown. They are also losing out on [$3 billion](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qhhvjk-didthutlhu-t/) of federal contracts per week that go to small businesses, leading to potential layoffs.

**Delays in Benefits **
* [Social Security, Medicare, and VA](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qhhvjk-didthutlhu-i/) benefits will all face delays and cuts to the services they provide.
* SNAP and WIC programs are set to run out of funding at the end of October. WIC provides nutritional and healthcare support for over 7 million women and young children. SNAP provides nutritional support for 40 million Americans, including [689,000 Wisconsinites](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qhhvjk-didthutlhu-d/), of whom 267,000 are children.

**Disruptions in the Federal Workforce**
* Over [1.9 million](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qhhvjk-didthutlhu-h/) federal civilian employees now face being furloughed or working without timely pay. Wisconsin currently employs about [30,000](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qhhvjk-didthutlhu-k/) federal workers.
* CBP officers, Border Patrol, and TSA agents all continue to work without timely pay. During past shutdowns, this has meant up to 10% of TSA workers calling in sick to work, resulting in widespread airport delays.
* Federal contractors are not entitled to backpay, and the total losses in consumer spending as a result of the shutdown is about [$30 billion](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qhhvjk-didthutlhu-u/) per month due to the lost wages of federal workers and contractors. This will mean less revenue for Main Street small businesses.

**Peace in the Middle East** While Senate Democrats have been hard at work to keep the government shut down, President Trump has been at work securing peace in Gaza. Hostages have been released by HAMAS and Israel forces have withdrawn as part of President Trump's [20-point peace plan](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qhhvjk-didthutlhu-o/), as it starts to take effect. The ceasefire has already begun, and leaders from across the world have praised President Trump's efforts. Foreign Ministers within the Arab world from Qatar, Jordan, UAE, Indonesia, Pakistan, Turkiye, Saudi Arabia, and Egypt have all signed [a statement](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qhhvjk-didthutlhu-b/) welcoming President Trump's plan. Within the US, even Democratic politicians like Hillary Clinton, Anthony Blinken, and Kamala Harris have [commended President Trump](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qhhvjk-didthutlhu-n/) on his effort for peace. **Take Action!****We need Letter to the Editor Signers!**
Become a Letter to the Editor (LTE) signer and help get the Republican message out to every community across the state. LTE volunteers are critical to continuing to advance our Republican values. Our goal is to have groups in every county who submit LTEs regularly. These groups will have resources provided from our team, including talking points, draft LTEs, and submission instructions. If you have any questions, please reach out to our Communications Director, Anika Rickard, at [arickard@wisgop.org](mailto:arickard@wisgop.org). [BECOME A LTE SIGNER!](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qhhvjk-didthutlhu-a/) **Become a Poll Worker!**
Every two years, the Republican Party of Wisconsin submits poll workers to municipalities across the state. These 2 year appointments will be critical to keeping the 2026 elections safe and secure. Learn more about being a poll worker by signing up for a training below! [BECOME A POLL WORKER!](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qhhvjk-didthutlhu-f/)
# **Worth the Read**
[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qhhvjk-didthutlhu-z/) [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qhhvjk-didthutlhu-v/)
# **Top Shareable Content**
[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qhhvjk-didthutlhu-e/) [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qhhvjk-didthutlhu-g/) [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qhhvjk-didthutlhu-w/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qhhvjk-didthutlhu-yd/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qhhvjk-didthutlhu-yh/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qhhvjk-didthutlhu-yk/) | [ Share ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-fb-qhhvjk-didthutlhu-jl/) | [ Tweet ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-tw-qhhvjk-didthutlhu-jr/) | [ Forward ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.forwardtomyfriend.com/y-didthutlhu-931243C5-qhhvjk-l-jy)
---|---|---
**PAID FOR BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF WISCONSIN** NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE Republican Party of Wisconsin | 148 E. Johnson Street | Madison, WI 53703 [Preferences](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.updatemyprofile.com/y-qhhvjk-931243C5-didthutlhu-jj) | [Unsubscribe](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-u-qhhvjk-didthutlhu-jt/)
---

name: Mike Senatore
subject: You have the power to save animals today
body:
Spring into action to protect the animals you love – speaking up takes only moments! Defender,

Somewhere there’s an animal who needs your help.

It could be a gray wolf in the forests of the Northern Rockies, chased down and hunted with cruel tactics by hostile hunters and trappers.

Or maybe a Florida panther , struggling to avoid being struck and killed by vehicles as panther habitat is carved up by developers.

Maybe it’s even a species in your own backyard. They all have one thing in
common – they’re vulnerable, and they can’t protect themselves from these
human-made threats.

But you can. As a Wildlife Defender, you’ll be able to make a greater difference than ever
before – from honing your advocacy with exclusive trainings and issue briefings,
to opportunities to meet with elected officials and lend your voice to animals
with no voice of their own.

Defenders has plenty of ways you can take steps to protect the wildlife you love
every day:

* Visit our Action Page
[https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10063/3922552?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=U7jHqDhqVXcqJI2ZMf1z3w==] , updated with the latest actions you can take to speak up for animals and
their habitat!
* Explore our Wildlife Defenders Hub
[https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10063/3922553?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=U7jHqDhqVXcqJI2ZMf1z3w==] , complete with a toolkit to make you a powerful advocate for wildlife!
* Check out our Wildlife in Politics page
[https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10063/3922554?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=U7jHqDhqVXcqJI2ZMf1z3w==] to learn how our elected leaders make decisions that impact the animals you
love!

Defender, I know you love wildlife like I do. It can be
heartbreaking to see animals threatened by special interests, extremist
legislators and other anti-wildlife groups.

But the good news is that we can take action to make a meaningful, lasting
difference. When others put wildlife in danger, we can be there as champions to
stand up for them and demand that these animals are protected for future
generations.

On behalf of all of us at Defenders, thank you for using your voice and your
power to protect the wildlife who need us most.

Sincerely,

Mike Senatore

SVP, Conservation Programs
Defenders of Wildlife

[http://www.facebook.com/DefendersofWildlife] [http://twitter.com/defenders] [https://www.instagram.com/defendersofwildlife/?hl=en] [http://www.youtube.com/defendersofwildlife] [https://www.tiktok.com/@defendersofwildlife]

Defenders of Wildlife 1130 17th Street NW • Washington, DC 20036 defenders.org [https://defenders.org]

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Photo credit: Orca Whales © Christopher Michel

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com [dpwillis67@gmail.com]

Please do not respond to this email. Click here to unsubscribe.
[https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/subscribe?campaignpageurl=https%3A%2F%2Fsupport.defenders.org%2Fpage%2F18130%2Fsubscriptions%2F1%3FtriggerId%3D14720%26templateId%3D14676&ea.campaigner.email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC]

body:
News, events, and action items to keep Nebraska red and growing strong.
| | | | |
---
| Letter from the Chair
---
As we enter Day 18 of the government shutdown, the American people are feeling the squeeze -- federal workers remain unpaid, essential services are disrupted, and economic uncertainty looms. Yet instead of focusing on resolving this crisis, Democrats have chosen to stage a theatrical "No Kings" rally -- a blatant attempt to divert attention from their refusal to negotiate in good faith. Their true aim? To nullify the will of the American people as expressed in the 2024 election, pushing an agenda that prioritizes illegal immigrants over hardworking citizens.
This isn't democracy -- it's political sabotage. Democrats are holding the nation hostage, willing to inflict as much misery as necessary to pressure President Trump into caving to their radical demands, such as providing healthcare for illegal immigrants. At a time when Americans are struggling, this obsession with rewarding lawbreakers is not just misguided -- it's an insult to every citizen who values fairness and the rule of law.
President Trump stands firm -- alongside the House and Senate -- defending the mandate given to him by voters. The Democrats' tactics reek of desperation, not leadership. We can only hope their reckless posturing doesn't escalate into violence, as these divisive stunts risk inflaming an already tense situation. It's time for Democrats to stop the theatrics, end the shutdown, and put America first.
Mary Jane Truemper Chairman, Nebraska Republican Party

body:
This poll changes everything...

Friend,
Ever since the Democrats' government shutdown began on October 1, I placed a pause on our campaign's fundraising.
With the Radical Left holding our government hostage to try and benefit illegal immigrants all at the expense of hardworking Americans like you, honestly, the last thing I wanted to do was bother my supporters with political emails and texts.
In fact, I believe now more than ever, the American people need to see that YOU are our ONLY priority, which is why I've had my own salary withheld during the Democrats' senseless shutdown.

And this new poll shows us our clear path to victory.

clean_body: This poll changes everything... Friend, Ever since the Democrats' government shutdown began on October 1, I placed a pause on our campaign's fundraising. With the Radical Left holding our government hostage to try and benefit illegal immigrants all at the expense of hardworking Americans like you, honestly, the last thing I wanted to do was bother my supporters with political emails and texts. In fact, I believe now more than ever, the American people need to see that YOU are our ONLY priority, which is why I've had my own salary withheld during the Democrats' senseless shutdown. Hochul and the Democrats were desperately hoping that I would continue to pause my messaging during the shutdown so that they could bury this news and prevent us from seizing the momentum. There's no two ways about it; this poll is devastating for Hochul. She's even being labeled the MOST VULNERABLE Democrat governor in the country. And this new poll shows us our clear path to victory. ...But all this depends on having the resources necessary to get the job done. Now that our path to save New York is clearer than ever, now that we have all the momentum, will you stand with me in our fight to FIRE Hochul? Thank you, Rep. name: Ted Cruz
subject: We cannot lose again in Iowa
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate
body:
This summer, we lost a special election in Iowa. We cannot let that happen again next year.

| | | [](https://trk.email.tedcruz.)
---
| | Fellow Conservative, This summer, Democrats stunned us in Iowa. _If they keep this up, we 're toast. _ But let me introduce you to Ashley Hinson. She's running for Senate in Iowa to replace retiring Senator Joni Ernst. She's our best hope to prevent another stunner in Iowa next year. **Fellow Conservative, I am reaching out to you, as one of my best supporters, to ask you to do two things.**
1. In Iowa, Democrats turned out more voters. Democrats are turning out a higher number of their own voters than we are. If they keep this up, they will beat us in the midterms. **_Will you complete your Voter Verification to confirm your status_?**
2. After you've submitted your _**Voter Verification Profile**_ , make a split donation to help support Ashley Hinson with critical voter outreach.

If Democrats can beat us in ruby red Iowa, they can beat us anywhere. We cannot allow them to outwork us - or be more motivated. Don't allow our wins last year to lead to losses in 2026. ** [[VERIFY YOUR RECORD >>]](https://trk.email.tedcruz.)** I know with your support and activism, we won't allow history to repeat itself. We'll help activate voters and help Ashley Hinson win this open Senate seat! For America, Ted Cruz

subject: What defines a hero
body:
First responders go by a lot of names... But you and I know them by the one name they won't call themselves: hero.

|
---
| | [](https://email.alert.conservativelibertywire.com/c/eJyUkL2unDAUhJ_GdCD_YDCFiyiIKjftLdFZ-wDea2xkG1DePtpoU6RMOd9Io5n5_Jg_wHkX1p-wozb-nlOe7w2KxcUFzLBhijOnXNaM1kzNR4r5QFNmWVktFcehq1CzvqO9alshqk1TvjBGB9mpASyjQ8uYYdgPdOCPTklVOf0KZJQpRlvJedPTXqFl5tFLaxAYaSl4TKUxMWRMFxR3oXcPTOXX7RI2Ju6V11spRybiG-ET4VPZsP6CvNVLPIOF4mJoEl5XYyLh0wH18_kkYjrLPhvYD3BrIGL8WrikHaeEdy9nR-vOnYgx4ZU3SPjmxRAxfv_xWf9t_g-f3irHMxkkYjzgTUwMBUMhYvRxjVXS9rid9y53PWnpuoPzf8aU__z-0vx3AAAA__9jAI_o)
[](https://email.alert.conservativelibertywire.com/c/eJyU0L2OnDAUBeCnMR3IP2B7CxdR0FTZtFuii31n8Kx_kG1Aeftoo8kDbPtd6eqc8_G-vIMPPj1-Q0Rjw7WUulwbNId3n7DChiUvnPKpZ7RnetlLrjvatkydM5Pm-CY7NExJqvQ4CtFthkn5JjSqSUmrceRMsVXfqaMrrJI62Xnz9ZBRphkdJ84HRZVGx-yqJmcRGBkpBCxtsDlVLCc0f2LwK5b25_IFB5tjF8zW2l6J-EH4jfBb27D_hLr193wkB83nNBQ8z8Fmwm879M_nk4jb0eJiIe7gH4mI-fPOJyo5JVx-XSI6f0Qi5oJn3aDgy5slYv7566P_n_zlNR_FIhHzDi-xOTVMjYjZR3gg64px--VD8FUqMtJHBB_-FWjf3Ps0_G8AAAD__-lljO8)

Friend,

First responders go by a lot of names...

... firefighter.
... paramedic.
... police officer.
... disaster response technician.
... border patrol agent.

**But you and I know them by the one name they won 't call themselves: hero.**

First responders are the hometown heroes who keep us safe. They go to work every day, even though that means confronting the worst situations imaginable. It's what makes these men and women heroes. They know what they signed up for and do it anyway.

However, their service and sacrifice are almost always overlooked by the Radical Left.

It's time to restore trust and honor to our first responders.

That's why I wrote my latest book, _Behind the Badge_ , dedicated to telling their story.
[](https://email.alert.conservativelibertywire.com/c/eJyU0L2OnDAUBeCnMR3Iv8AULqKgqbJpt0R37At41j_INqC8fTTR5AG2_a50dc75_Jg_wHkX198QUBt_zbnM1wbV4uIiFtgwp5lTrlpGWzbOe05lR1Nn1VitRo63vkHNhp4Oo5RCNJtmI2UCuRoUXWRPkbFF3rixcqGP2wNY4_TrIaNsZFQqzruBDiNaZh6DsgaBEUnBY66dSbFgPqG6E717YK5_LpexMyk0Xm-17oWIH4TfCb_XDdsvKFu7pCNaqC7FLuN5diYRft-hfT6fRNyPGmYDYQe3RiKmr4Ur2nNKeP-6BLTuCERMGc-yQca3V0PE9PPXZ_s_-dtLOrJBIqYd3mJSrBgrEZMLsCJvsrb75bx3pR-IpGsA5_8VqN_c-9T8bwAAAP__y16M2g)
I am also teaming up with **the Kash Foundation** to support our first responders and veterans.

While activists take cheap shots at our first responders, the Kash Foundation is restoring faith in their service, defending their dignity, and standing up for them when attacked by the media and activists.

[I believe in the mission of the Kash Foundation, and I am helping them raise money to support our veterans and first responders by raising $20,000 before the end of the month.](https://email.alert.conservativelibertywire.com/c/eJyU0M2u2yAQBeCnwTtb_BhDFiyqWln1dnuXCMMkJsFgwcRu3766VfoA3X4jjc45nx_2w8UU8_2n28D4dNra7Lk6DHCLGZpboRbLKZc9oz3Tdq-l7eDRyi4YqTlcpg4MUxNVehyF6FYzslFLyRcfFqkvWk_AxU1dYPFUUzVOXTRfDxllmtFRcj4oqjQE5hclgwfHyEhdgoqDL7lBPRzGA1JcoOLvM1YYfNm6ZFbEvRHxjfAr4VdcoX-6tva38srBYSx5qHAcgy-EX3fXPx4PIq4v3Kx32-7iPRMxP29c0olTwqevywYhvjYi5gpHW12Ft6MnYv7-47P_l_ztrbyqByLm3b3Fl4yQkYgZ4RfaFPOTddWE_YwpxTYpMtL75mL6WwL_c_PD8D8BAAD__yBcjp4)
[DONATE](https://email.alert.conservativelibertywire.com/c/eJyU0E2O3CAQBeDT4J0tfvw3CxZRrF5lsp0lKkPRpgeDBWW3cvtoos4BZvuVVHrvfbybdwgxpPtv2FHb-DSlmucG5NCHhBU2LNlILodW8FbM5ii5HmjJDI3TwyzxbWxQi2nk09z3SjWbdl74lc_rm18nhFE47rjHfvW9kEqibYL-eii4mAXvBym7iU8zOmHXaXAWQbCeQ8RCnc2pYrmAwoUxrFjozzMU7Gzem6g3oqMy9YPJG5M32rD9hLq1Pp_JAYWcuoLX1dnM5O2A9vF4MHU7aTcW9gPCPTG1fHo58FFyJsevy44unDtTS8GrblDw5WSZWn7--mj_J395zWexyNRywEtsToSJmFpcTkBo1pMoJ9EU7Y5niDHUcWI9v-8Q4r8i9M3dLy3_BgAA__9HypGg)
I know these men and women. I grew up with them, and I served with them. I know the trauma they endure and the victories that they get to save lives every day.

**And it 's a shame the little thanks first responders get sometimes.**

The one thing they all have in common is that each one of them felt compelled to help their fellow citizens, regardless of the risk.

Too often, government officials are setting up our first responders to fail and being used as political punching bags for the Radical Left.

It's time for you and me to protect them.

The Kash Foundation has been able to:
* Provide financial support and care for families of those who fall in the line of duty. They help cover funeral expenses and provide direct support to the spouse and children left behind.
* Provide scholarships to the children of those who gave everything. They provide scholarships that help those kids, so their parents' sacrifice doesn't define their future.
* Fund legal defenses for service members falsely accused and abandoned by the system. When they are caught up in a political firestorm that costs them their job, they help them and their family make do while they are in the eye of the storm.

**Let 's let our first responders know that we have their backs!**

clean_body: First responders go by a lot of names... But you and I know them by the one name they won't call themselves: hero. | | | Friend, First responders go by a lot of names... ... firefighter. ... paramedic. ... police officer. ... disaster response technician. ... border patrol agent. But you and I know them by the one name they won 't call themselves: hero. First responders are the hometown heroes who keep us safe. They go to work every day, even though that means confronting the worst situations imaginable. It's what makes these men and women heroes. They know what they signed up for and do it anyway. However, their service and sacrifice are almost always overlooked by the Radical Left. It's time to restore trust and honor to our first responders. That's why I wrote my latest book, Behind the Badge , dedicated to telling their story. I am also teaming up with the Kash Foundation to support our first responders and veterans. While activists take cheap shots at our first responders, the Kash Foundation is restoring faith in their service, defending their dignity, and standing up for them when attacked by the media and activists. I know these men and women. I grew up with them, and I served with them. I know the trauma they endure and the victories that they get to save lives every day. And it 's a shame the little thanks first responders get sometimes. The one thing they all have in common is that each one of them felt compelled to help their fellow citizens, regardless of the risk. Too often, government officials are setting up our first responders to fail and being used as political punching bags for the Radical Left. It's time for you and me to protect them. The Kash Foundation has been able to: Provide financial support and care for families of those who fall in the line of duty. They help cover funeral expenses and provide direct support to the spouse and children left behind. Provide scholarships to the children of those who gave everything. They provide scholarships that help those kids, so their parents' sacrifice doesn't define their future. Fund legal defenses for service members falsely accused and abandoned by the system. When they are caught up in a political firestorm that costs them their job, they help them and their family make do while they are in the eye of the storm. Let 's let our first responders know that we have their backs!** You and I owe everything to our first responders. It's time to make sure we have their backs, because they will always be there when we need them. God Bless America, Johnny "Joey" Jones Disclaimer: Kash Patel founded the Kash Foundation but is no longer affiliated in any capacity. name: hear.com
subject: Hearing aids just got their biggest upgrade
body:
Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts

| [ ](https://email.editor.conservativebroadcast.net/c/eJyUkTuP3DAMhH-N3NnQw68tXGzWcHdBigNSCpRE2wzkByxpF_fvAyF36VJE5egDOTP8-abfgDzty3fYcLBGX0GvCBftC5ALv1KIyxHjinQZ0pLLphS8FH3mROEGe0NZm7rAQXQt7_paNbdiHUzX9pJblCiMMq3pbF0rEKqfO1Rubgoa8izBRS943TR9BSDw1rm5EY0FQMNqjo7icVX22ANeT4j0RHMd4CyEWO0YCz-sMZ6BqTuTE5PT6_WqsvnKHhuTk2NyMhjiVyCdE2mYZy4yryawkanx_njn-bVctPz-eGeyTXHT4UiXRaZG8-E-pQ0dpY2pEeaZPEHEzw8L2wm07EyNKWjcNfi8VP_ltPlwWSk9LWs0yZvSHcl41Odxgo2g_-HiTMZTWPHS5Jgafxzn3UZgsg3J_JEe38qvKotrcOeLvKfQdqzmywbkcxlF_O_TPgf5OwAA__9GGrJg)
---

| Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts
---
[ ](https://email.editor.conservativebroadcast.net/c/eJyUkTuP3DAMhH-N3NnQw68tXGzWcHdBigNSCpRE2wzkByxpF_fvAyF36VJE5egDOTP8-abfgDzty3fYcLBGX0GvCBftC5ALv1KIyxHjinQZ0pLLphS8FH3mROEGe0NZm7rAQXQt7_paNbdiHUzX9pJblCiMMq3pbF0rEKqfO1Rubgoa8izBRS943TR9BSDw1rm5EY0FQMNqjo7icVX22ANeT4j0RHMd4CyEWO0YCz-sMZ6BqTuTE5PT6_WqsvnKHhuTk2NyMhjiVyCdE2mYZy4yryawkanx_njn-bVctPz-eGeyTXHT4UiXRaZG8-E-pQ0dpY2pEeaZPEHEzw8L2wm07EyNKWjcNfi8VP_ltPlwWSk9LWs0yZvSHcl41Odxgo2g_-HiTMZTWPHS5Jgafxzn3UZgsg3J_JEe38qvKotrcOeLvKfQdqzmywbkcxlF_O_TPgf5OwAA__9GGrJg)
**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does.

But now, **a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry,** and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's hear.com's **new IX hearing aid.**

And it's the perfect solution at the perfect time--when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It's no wonder **hear.com's IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year** offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[ Check if you qualify ](https://email.editor.conservativebroadcast.net/c/eJyUkTuP3DAMhH-N3NnQw68tXGzWcHdBigNSCpRE2wzkByxpF_fvAyF36VJE5egDOTP8-abfgDzty3fYcLBGX0GvCBftC5ALv1KIyxHjinQZ0pLLphS8FH3mROEGe0NZm7rAQXQt7_paNbdiHUzX9pJblCiMMq3pbF0rEKqfO1Rubgoa8izBRS943TR9BSDw1rm5EY0FQMNqjo7icVX22ANeT4j0RHMd4CyEWO0YCz-sMZ6BqTuTE5PT6_WqsvnKHhuTk2NyMhjiVyCdE2mYZy4yryawkanx_njn-bVctPz-eGeyTXHT4UiXRaZG8-E-pQ0dpY2pEeaZPEHEzw8L2wm07EyNKWjcNfi8VP_ltPlwWSk9LWs0yZvSHcl41Odxgo2g_-HiTMZTWPHS5Jgafxzn3UZgsg3J_JEe38qvKotrcOeLvKfQdqzmywbkcxlF_O_TPgf5OwAA__9GGrJg)
[ ](https://email.editor.conservativebroadcast.net/c/eJyUkTuP3DAMhH-N3NnQw68tXGzWcHdBigNSCpRE2wzkByxpF_fvAyF36VJE5egDOTP8-abfgDzty3fYcLBGX0GvCBftC5ALv1KIyxHjinQZ0pLLphS8FH3mROEGe0NZm7rAQXQt7_paNbdiHUzX9pJblCiMMq3pbF0rEKqfO1Rubgoa8izBRS943TR9BSDw1rm5EY0FQMNqjo7icVX22ANeT4j0RHMd4CyEWO0YCz-sMZ6BqTuTE5PT6_WqsvnKHhuTk2NyMhjiVyCdE2mYZy4yryawkanx_njn-bVctPz-eGeyTXHT4UiXRaZG8-E-pQ0dpY2pEeaZPEHEzw8L2wm07EyNKWjcNfi8VP_ltPlwWSk9LWs0yZvSHcl41Odxgo2g_-HiTMZTWPHS5Jgafxzn3UZgsg3J_JEe38qvKotrcOeLvKfQdqzmywbkcxlF_O_TPgf5OwAA__9GGrJg)
What makes hear.com's IX hearing aid so special?

It's one of **the world 's first hearing aids with dual processing.**

This is special because it's the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small.

The result? **An unprecedented amount of power and clarity.**

This means that hear.com's IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids--from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming--with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

"It's not just about volume," explains hear.com founder Paul Crusius. "It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize."

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity --and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

Limited no-risk trials now available

Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don't wait. **Get started today.**
[ Check if you qualify ](https://email.editor.conservativebroadcast.net/c/eJyUkTuP3DAMhH-N3NnQw68tXGzWcHdBigNSCpRE2wzkByxpF_fvAyF36VJE5egDOTP8-abfgDzty3fYcLBGX0GvCBftC5ALv1KIyxHjinQZ0pLLphS8FH3mROEGe0NZm7rAQXQt7_paNbdiHUzX9pJblCiMMq3pbF0rEKqfO1Rubgoa8izBRS943TR9BSDw1rm5EY0FQMNqjo7icVX22ANeT4j0RHMd4CyEWO0YCz-sMZ6BqTuTE5PT6_WqsvnKHhuTk2NyMhjiVyCdE2mYZy4yryawkanx_njn-bVctPz-eGeyTXHT4UiXRaZG8-E-pQ0dpY2pEeaZPEHEzw8L2wm07EyNKWjcNfi8VP_ltPlwWSk9LWs0yZvSHcl41Odxgo2g_-HiTMZTWPHS5Jgafxzn3UZgsg3J_JEe38qvKotrcOeLvKfQdqzmywbkcxlF_O_TPgf5OwAA__9GGrJg)

**🚨 THE COUNTDOWN IS ON 🚨** _**
**_Friend, the countdown is on.

_Do you know why?_

If not, you’re already behind – but I’m here to fill you in. Here’s the situation...

**The Republican House Majority is razor-thin and extremely vulnerable.**

The loss of just a few seats will put the gavel in the hands of The Squad – **and in Tennessee's 7th District, they just got their newest recruit.**

**Now it's up to me,_in the December 2nd House Special Election_ , to stop them cold.**

**[My name is Matt Van Epps. Proudly running with President Trump's COMPLETE AND TOTAL ENDORSEMENT, I am a West Point graduate, combat veteran, public servant and America First true believer.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bmmx/?__vbtrk=MzI3NzQyOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzI3NzQyOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**

[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bmmx/?__vbtrk=MzI3NzQyOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzI3NzQyOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

_And here's the thing – I'm not running against some phony "moderate" Democrat._

**I'm up against an _unapologetic AOC acolyte_ so radical that she even posted a video of herself bragging and laughing about her bullying ICE agents and state troopers while bravely carrying out an operation.**

It’s disgusting and disqualifying and I am committed to keeping her far from the halls of Congress.

**But we don't have much time.**

This election is not in 2026.

**We don't have a year._We have weeks._**

The Radical Left is dumping big money into this race to try and catch us off-guard.

[**So I'm coming to you for your immediate support. Even just a few dollars will help,_but time is of the essence._**](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bmmx/?__vbtrk=MzI3NzQyOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzI3NzQyOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

When he endorsed my campaign, President Trump said, "He will never let you down."

**He's exactly right – _but I need you on board now._**

Thanks, and may God bless this great country.

Sincerely,
Matt Van EppsTrump-endorsed candidate for TN-7

subject: Toxic Water Warning
body:
