**SHOCKING REPORT:** **CHINA ATTACKS U.S. WATER SUPPLY** [](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e45860/VaHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazE1LmNvbS9jbGljaw/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTEwMTg/LbmNseDFLY2xybA/qP3RydmlkPTE0MTMyJkFGSUQ9MTA5NSZhZmZfc3ViPVVXRi1GTE8tMjAxOC0yMDI1MTAxOCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249VVdGLUZMTy0yMDE4LTIwMjUxMDE4/gaPN4TA/s8re36aadb4) **_FBI's Urgent Warning Has Been All Over The News_** Chinese hackers are coming for the water supply in your hometown. Attacking city water systems, biding their time and waiting for China's signal to strike. Experts warn that Russia and Iran are also targeting attacks on our city water systems. Overflowing, damaging and poisoning the lifegiving systems that we trust to keep us safe. Like it or not, your local tap water may be our country's weakest link. Deteriorating infrastructure. Systems years beyond their expiration dates. Negligent corporations. And God-knows-what in the water we drink. We're up against arsenic, plastics, chlorine, forever chemicals, hormone-altering drug residue and a host of other contaminants. Listen, I'm not trying to be the messenger of doom... **But protecting the water supply in your home is more important than ever.** If you don't take steps to be prepared, you and your family could end up vulnerable. Forced to choose between drinking poisoned, toxic or dirty water, or going without water altogether. It sounds harsh... But the truth is that even good people with good intentions can make serious mistakes. Mistakes like... **Getting filters that claim to purify your water, but don't prove it.** If a company doesn't have certifications from a third-party lab, show lab tests or reveal how many gallons were tested... that's a bad sign. After a couple gallons, most water filters on the market stop working for scary contaminants and start passing them into your water. **Getting bottled water with a 2-year shelf life and risking plastic leaching into your supply.** Not to mention all the money you'll waste, and the work required to carry cases of water. Plus with bottled water, you never really know what's been filtered out. **Or simply using a pitcher in the fridge... with slapshot filtration power and limited capacity.** Most pitchers hold a couple cups of water at a time. Not nearly enough to drink, cook and clean in an emergency. You'll run out in no time, just when your life depends on it. Well we have great news to share... Folks have been calling... Folks have been emailing... Folks have been leaving Facebook messages asking about our just-released... **NEW AND IMPROVED...** [**NEW Ultra-Fast MegaFlow Ultimate Water Filtration System!**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e45860/VaHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazE1LmNvbS9jbGljaw/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTEwMTg/LbmNseDFLY2xybA/qP3RydmlkPTE0MTMyJkFGSUQ9MTA5NSZhZmZfc3ViPVVXRi1GTE8tMjAxOC0yMDI1MTAxOCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249VVdGLUZMTy0yMDE4LTIwMjUxMDE4/gaPN4TA/s8re36aadb4) **4X Faster Flow Rate for Perfect, Delicious Drinking Water** [](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e45860/VaHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazE1LmNvbS9jbGljaw/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTEwMTg/LbmNseDFLY2xybA/qP3RydmlkPTE0MTMyJkFGSUQ9MTA5NSZhZmZfc3ViPVVXRi1GTE8tMjAxOC0yMDI1MTAxOCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249VVdGLUZMTy0yMDE4LTIwMjUxMDE4/gaPN4TA/s8re36aadb4) **But hurry – we have limited stock, and this MegaFlow Ultimate Water Filtration System is first-come first-served. We only have a small number of units to go around.** [**Get Your MegaFlow Ultimate Water Filtration System Rushed To You At This Special Pricing Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e45860/VaHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazE1LmNvbS9jbGljaw/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTEwMTg/LbmNseDFLY2xybA/qP3RydmlkPTE0MTMyJkFGSUQ9MTA5NSZhZmZfc3ViPVVXRi1GTE8tMjAxOC0yMDI1MTAxOCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249VVdGLUZMTy0yMDE4LTIwMjUxMDE4/gaPN4TA/s8re36aadb4) The best part is... **_This advanced filtration technology filters the nastiest, filthiest, bacteria-riddled and parasite infested water using no chemicals, no electricity and no moving parts!_** It's powered by the same technology that the U.S. Military and NASA trust to filter their water. But now available for you in your home. You're among the first to get access to these advanced, carbon-block water filters designed to filter water on your countertop at a sub-micron level without power or water hookup. **So you can reduce...** Harmful Bacteria – up to 99.9999%
Life-Threatening Viruses – up to 99.99%
Disease-Carrying Cysts – up to 99.9% Plus, this table-top unit targets 140+ dangerous contaminants from your tap water, including bacteria, viruses, toxic chemicals, arsenic, heavy metals, pharmaceuticals, VOCs and more. All in the same, best-selling system thousands of Americans trust in their homes. **The NEW & improved Filtration System may look the same...** But on the inside, these proprietary filters pack an even bigger punch than before. They're MORE reliable and easier to replace, too. So you get safer, cleaner water for you and your family. **But we have very limited stock, and we've been sold out of this filtration powerhouse for a while.** In fact, it's been a very long while. Months and months, actually. [**Now we've just got a fresh batch in.**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e45860/VaHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazE1LmNvbS9jbGljaw/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTEwMTg/LbmNseDFLY2xybA/qP3RydmlkPTE0MTMyJkFGSUQ9MTA5NSZhZmZfc3ViPVVXRi1GTE8tMjAxOC0yMDI1MTAxOCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249VVdGLUZMTy0yMDE4LTIwMjUxMDE4/gaPN4TA/s8re36aadb4) And if you need to take it with you? No problem. You're not tied to it like a whole-house filtration system. That kind of thing won't do you any good if you need to bug out. **And YES there's an interest-FREE payment plan!** Yes, right now, you can get your MegaFlow Ultimate Water Filtration System on a convenient, no-credit-check, interest-FREE payment plan. We know you're good for it. You'll have the **peace of mind** knowing that you're doing everything you can to keep your family safer, by securing your MegaFlow Ultimate Water Filtration System today for fresher, cleaner water for years to come. [**Get Your MegaFlow Ultimate Water Filtration System Rushed To You At This Special Pricing Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e45860/VaHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazE1LmNvbS9jbGljaw/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTEwMTg/LbmNseDFLY2xybA/qP3RydmlkPTE0MTMyJkFGSUQ9MTA5NSZhZmZfc3ViPVVXRi1GTE8tMjAxOC0yMDI1MTAxOCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249VVdGLUZMTy0yMDE4LTIwMjUxMDE4/gaPN4TA/s8re36aadb4) To your survival, Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters P.S. Derrick loves the convenience of his MegaFlow Ultimate Water Filtration System: _"It was so easy to install. Within minutes we had water that tasted so good, we couldn't believe it. We don't like the chlorine in tap water and we got tired of lugging around cases of bottled water."_ **Customers Love Their Ultimate
Water Filtration System!** [](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e45860/VaHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazE1LmNvbS9jbGljaw/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTEwMTg/LbmNseDFLY2xybA/qP3RydmlkPTE0MTMyJkFGSUQ9MTA5NSZhZmZfc3ViPVVXRi1GTE8tMjAxOC0yMDI1MTAxOCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249VVdGLUZMTy0yMDE4LTIwMjUxMDE4/gaPN4TA/s8re36aadb4) **_Cyndi L._**_
"No question... beats the competition. After reviewing several other companies and seeing that I was not the only one thinking this way, as everyone was sold out of products, I decided to go with 4Patriots. They seem to be good people who are very helpful and their products seemed above average to others."_ _**Michael B.**
"Saves me a ton of money and grocery-store headaches. During the pandemic, water wasn't always available. Not so with the Purifier. We love it and I have 5 gallons of water on hand all the time."_ _**Faith P.**
"Water you can actually trust. This is so much better than storing gallons and gallons of bottled water. This enables us to make existing, natural water sources drinkable. I feel really good knowing that in an emergency situation, we'd be able to filter our water."_ _**Carol B.**
"Stop worrying about what's in the water! We use our system for drinking and cooking but you can use it almost anywhere. It's easy to use and it doesn't take long to filter. The water tastes pure and delicious."_ _**Rick O.**
"Easiest way to upgrade your drinking water. We chose this one because it handles everything and it's affordable. You never know when things will go out on you."_ _**Thomas P.**
"Finally, I don't have to keep refilling my pitcher all day. I'm very happy with my water filter. Not only does our water now taste good (it tasted dirty from the tap) but the large capacity tank means I'm not refilling small pitchers repeatedly during the day."_ [**Get Your MegaFlow Ultimate Water Filtration System Rushed To You At This Special Pricing Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e45860/VaHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazE1LmNvbS9jbGljaw/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTEwMTg/LbmNseDFLY2xybA/qP3RydmlkPTE0MTMyJkFGSUQ9MTA5NSZhZmZfc3ViPVVXRi1GTE8tMjAxOC0yMDI1MTAxOCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249VVdGLUZMTy0yMDE4LTIwMjUxMDE4/gaPN4TA/s8re36aadb4)

Friend,
In case you missed it, Fox News just reported my Q3 fundraising total, and thanks to your support, we raised $1.2M to flip New Hampshire RED.
When I launched this campaign, I knew we’d be up against entrenched special interests and an army of liberal donors from across the country. But you stepped up, and thanks to you, we proved that this team has the grassroots strength to win.
I’ll never forget the outpouring of support we saw in these first critical months. Every single donation, large or small, helped us send a powerful message: our campaign is strong, and we’re ready for the fight ahead.

name: The Turning Point USA Family
subject: Charlie always believed this day would come
body:
[unsubscribe](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xul=o5pvyewrzrxe8xiau9slbgewyr8ff6wv6twaish7nsoobxaginvx47iumck3rnezrth275wexd1qur53s67bzazbglgvw5ijsrr0v14&__stmp=t4bs8k&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
---
Please read the message below from Turning Point USA.
* * *
| | | | [](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4bs8k&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, Even now... it still doesn't feel real that we lost Charlie. His voice, his courage, his conviction — it shaped all of us. And his vision — **to build the most faithful and the most patriotic generation in American history** — is why Turning Point USA exists today. Friend, that's why we have an inspiring update for you... In just the first seven days since Charlie was taken from all of us, Turning Point USA has received more than 54,000 requests from students who want to start or join a chapter:
---
[](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4bs8k&__onlt=h)
---
**God is so good.** ✝️🙏🕊️ To give you perspective, Friend... Coming into this school year, Turning Point USA had roughly 900+ college chapters and 1,200+ high school chapters. It took us years to build those chapters... over a decade in fact... _But now?_ These students who signed up? They weren't asked to... They weren't recruited... **They felt it was their time to stand up for this country and honor Charlie.** Because of the life he lived. The faith he had. The love he showed God, his family, and others. The courage he had to speak truth. And his vision of a better America for us all.
---
[](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4bs8k&__onlt=h)
---
He always believed this day would come. He used to talk about it all the time — how the momentum would shift, how young people would rise up with courage, and how a Turning Point USA chapter would be in every college and high school in America. And now... _It's happening._ Faster than he could have imagined. Bigger than we thought possible. And more beautiful than we can even describe. **Again, Friend, God is so good.** Since we lost Charlie, we've also felt SO MUCH love... Prayers. Emails. Messages. Stories about how Charlie's voice changed lives... or your children's or grandchildren's lives. And so many supporters have asked, _"What can I do?"_ As you read this, our team is working around the clock to follow up with every chapter request. And we're going to need help equipping them with our activism kits. **Every new chapter receives these kits from Turning Point USA with everything they need to get started — including:** ✅ Leadership materials
✅ Pocket Constitutions
✅ Chapter training tools
✅ American flags & patriotic gear Friend, I'm sure you'd believe it when we say it... _this won't be a small task._ But we're going to do it. Whatever it takes. **_For Charlie._** _And here's how YOU can help with this..._ **Every $25 you give today helps stock another activism kit — ready to deploy into a new Turning Point USA student chapter...** How many of these activism kits can you help provide to the wave of new student chapters that are just getting started?
---
[ **1 KIT = $25**](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4bs8k&__onlt=h)
---
[ **2 KITS = $50**](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4bs8k&__onlt=h)
---
[ **10 KITS = $250**](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4bs8k&__onlt=h)
---
[ **100 KITS = $2,500**](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4bs8k&__onlt=h)
---
[ **1,000 KITS = $25,000**](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4bs8k&__onlt=h)
---
[ **Sponsor Activism Kits**](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4bs8k&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, if there was ever a more immediate way you could help make Charlie's vision a reality... **This is it****.**
---
[](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4bs8k&__onlt=h)
---
Also... **Here's one more powerful thing you can do:** 📩 If you have a son, daughter, grandchild, niece, nephew — or any young person in your life — who wants to get involved... who wants to join or start a chapter... **Please send them this link:** **[TPUSAStudents.com/StartaChapter](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=edb8w7bac24ujot2qxvx1svdtddk2wqcbixdqfkbvtr73yyma1zih48aji9axrmicshlpdxsfbg174nocxfcxqrynihs2dwfbs152am2h7c4qzc2izkhxezbd7catl7q2eol93lt6&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4bs8k&__onlt=h)** Friend, if you've already given... If you've already donated... If you've already been a voice of encouragement and strength in this painful week... If you've prayed, been praying, and continue to pray... **Thank you.** We can never say it enough. If you've read this far, we want you to know this... **You're the reason Charlie's mission and vision will grow for generations to come.** God is so good.
---
**For Charlie,** -The Turning Point USA Family **P.S.** Please know, Friend, if you can't afford to help right now, all we ask for are your prayers. Charlie would have wanted you to pray first — and if that's all you can give today, _we're grateful._ But if you're able to help... if you're overjoyed to hear that students are flocking to Charlie's message and mission... Your gift today helps sustain this wave of student inspiration and gets new student chapters off the ground floor... And ensures Charlie's vision is realized faster than we all thought possible. **Every $25 you give today helps us stock another activism kit ready to deploy to a new student chapter.**
---
[ **Sponsor an Activism Kit**
**Make Your Gift Here**](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4bs8k&__onlt=h)
---
Thank you for your help and for your prayers, Friend. **God is so good.** 🙏
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

[Unsubscribe](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xul=o5pvyewrzrxe8xiau9slbgewyr8ff6wv6twaish7nsoobxaginvx47iumck3rnezrth275wexd1qur53s67bzazbglgvw5ijsrr0v14&__stmp=t4bs8k&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh) / [Privacy Policy](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=qwikcdu20aapkn9aa549rixodb49jgegyejuwin8d8regn6qqrnzl6a5vw85w6tz0i900y8ozy4ltuu5p5pucdyxty1a2m11pmt091xdym626xqt5rs17e0njwi2jtbkqxj&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4bs8k&__onlt=h) / [Contact us](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=cyfvpmfkldxetpe46ml8qyfrfw8uki58fi37dp61tsar0dr6q9pda3gmexfbggqkutez6an2vdruc1zg033x2qku3wu1uzhh8965hy05x2ij4lbgr53wjh1t&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4bs8k&__onlt=h)

name: Red wedding
subject: In 17 days, MAGA plot in PA will crown Trump King
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEFEND OUR COURTS, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE
body:
Today’s no Kings Day Protests matter because MAGA just launched a brutal political power grab reminiscent of a Game of Thrones plot.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FqGnJ_vmiHFuiLk_zd2qlUnUTYMMyKUoWBh0ev6PsFSPMp2ir2NWf2ASC9KLAmSuZe7hiF2Tz3et0xXId2_HQA5341kEK_W1gtoCWv1RHyFhJQp81FYNOzXgEcSvvh7cg6wNGSpZ-MwjHnOUWNbWoPJb6Zm_ZwfUxWEWyO8rWpVBM4kpdYD7-_OlQ3ejqNNpqNJu5Zl3P5Xw1bnDc1VmtblZB_Wop1BI&c=e4H-pugyGxUogexSk5Ukmp02-JjRN3ABJvelBYmJ0blpnZsLm1QWLA==&ch=DwklT5f0v8pln2AYn_EkPSsCR2QMsEqTJfYA9Jx2icPaLKkFYCIzIA==)
---
| Peter,
MAGA just launched a brutal political power grab reminiscent of a Game of Thrones plot.
Pennsylvania's Supreme Court retention races are usually sleepy affairs. Rare elections that happen only once every 10 years, Justices up for retention hardly ever lose, and both Democrats and Republicans have strayed from spending big in these elections.
But this November's PA Supreme Court retention race is different. Lulled into a false sense of safety assuming that the 3 Democrats on PA's Supreme Court up for retention would face no danger, Democrats let their guard down--unaware that MAGA was plotting a sinister "Red Wedding" style ambush behind their backs:
---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FqGnJ_vmiHFuiLk_zd2qlUnUTYMMyKUoWBh0ev6PsFSPMp2ir2NWf2ASC9KLAmSuZe7hiF2Tz3et0xXId2_HQA5341kEK_W1gtoCWv1RHyFhJQp81FYNOzXgEcSvvh7cg6wNGSpZ-MwjHnOUWNbWoPJb6Zm_ZwfUxWEWyO8rWpVBM4kpdYD7-_OlQ3ejqNNpqNJu5Zl3P5Xw1bnDc1VmtSmATqSm7ecx&c=e4H-pugyGxUogexSk5Ukmp02-JjRN3ABJvelBYmJ0blpnZsLm1QWLA==&ch=DwklT5f0v8pln2AYn_EkPSsCR2QMsEqTJfYA9Jx2icPaLKkFYCIzIA==)
---
| | | | In the dead of the night, billionaires under MAGA's banner launched a full out assault, spending millions of dollars in advertisements to convince PA voters to boot the Democratic justices off the court.
It's all part of Trump's plot to consolidate power and name himself king.
If Trump eliminates the three Democrats off of PA's Supreme Court, he can install puppets loyal to him on the court responsible for overseeing elections in the most crucial swing state in America. This would allow him to rig the upcoming '26 and '28 elections--suppressing Democrat votes, decreeing mail-in ballots illegal, and even prevent Democrats from appearing on ballots altogether.
Having heard rumor of this plot from our "little birds" in the capital, Defend Our Courts has been rallying Democrats from across the nation to join in this battle since early summer. Having since raised over 3 million dollars, we are one of the most powerful Democrat-aligned forces in this election.
But we need reinforcements from across the realm, MAGA's numbers are overwhelming and we can't hold out for much longer. If the election were held today, MAGA would win. But with 17 days left until the election, there is still hope we can turn the tide.
[Can you rush $50, $25, or whatever you can spare to stop MAGA's plot to install Trump as King?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FqGnJ_vmiHFuiLk_zd2qlUnUTYMMyKUoWBh0ev6PsFSPMp2ir2NWf2ASC9KLAmSu6Bti9S3QWU7-emN_v-h97sZjCDH_9xK-0Yvi2mSIujjOij4TFDzVrTcjSPyWre2QE6RYfQ_jeW4WlBL9wbQugXipqseJKLb98PCVVOoxdTDnvohZHPCCeOi8Fg4rwSd04GTQDg_h0jQWzLO2jYv68MpTTW-sQLeGq94j0ZU-RbU=&c=e4H-pugyGxUogexSk5Ukmp02-JjRN3ABJvelBYmJ0blpnZsLm1QWLA==&ch=DwklT5f0v8pln2AYn_EkPSsCR2QMsEqTJfYA9Jx2icPaLKkFYCIzIA==)

clean_body: Today’s no Kings Day Protests matter because MAGA just launched a brutal political power grab reminiscent of a Game of Thrones plot. | | | | | == | Peter, MAGA just launched a brutal political power grab reminiscent of a Game of Thrones plot. Pennsylvania's Supreme Court retention races are usually sleepy affairs. Rare elections that happen only once every 10 years, Justices up for retention hardly ever lose, and both Democrats and Republicans have strayed from spending big in these elections. But this November's PA Supreme Court retention race is different. Lulled into a false sense of safety assuming that the 3 Democrats on PA's Supreme Court up for retention would face no danger, Democrats let their guard down--unaware that MAGA was plotting a sinister "Red Wedding" style ambush behind their backs: | == | | | | In the dead of the night, billionaires under MAGA's banner launched a full out assault, spending millions of dollars in advertisements to convince PA voters to boot the Democratic justices off the court. It's all part of Trump's plot to consolidate power and name himself king. If Trump eliminates the three Democrats off of PA's Supreme Court, he can install puppets loyal to him on the court responsible for overseeing elections in the most crucial swing state in America. This would allow him to rig the upcoming '26 and '28 elections--suppressing Democrat votes, decreeing mail-in ballots illegal, and even prevent Democrats from appearing on ballots altogether. Having heard rumor of this plot from our "little birds" in the capital, Defend Our Courts has been rallying Democrats from across the nation to join in this battle since early summer. Having since raised over 3 million dollars, we are one of the most powerful Democrat-aligned forces in this election. But we need reinforcements from across the realm, MAGA's numbers are overwhelming and we can't hold out for much longer. If the election were held today, MAGA would win. But with 17 days left until the election, there is still hope we can turn the tide. == | | | | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | | | | == Democrats must rally together before PA falls and Trump declares himself King. name: Douglas Carswell
subject: It’s Time to Celebrate Mississippi Success!
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/mssuccesses?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| _**If you're not in front of our Saturday email, you're behind.**_
---
| Dear Friend,
**Mississippi has had some impressive results recently** – and I’m not just talking about football.

**Our state has seen more economic growth in the past five years than in the previous fifteen years combined.**
---
|
---
| **Last year, Mississippi household income rose rapidly.** In fact, our state saw the second fastest increase in household income of any state in the Union.
---
|
---
| If that wasn’t good enough, we have seen over $40 BILLION private outside investment pouring into our state since 2020.
---
|
---
| Not all that long ago the Mississippi model was all about asking for federal handouts in Washington DC. Today, there’s private capital coming in, invested by businesses and entrepreneurs.

**There was a time when Mississippi has seen as a laggard. Today, our state is seen as a policy leader.** In 2013, the Literacy-Based Promotion Act began to raise reading standards. In 2021, a law was passed that has helped de-regulate the labor market.

Then in 2022 came flat tax reform, followed by school funding reform and then this year a law to eliminate the income tax. Throughout that time, we have applied pragmatic policies to keep energy costs low.

**At MCPP, we want to not only celebrate pro-growth policies. We want to celebrate those state leaders, lawmakers and partner organizations that made it happen. **That’s what we will be doing this Thursday evening at our Gala to “Celebrate Mississippi Success”!

Rich Lowry, Editor of the National Review, will be our keynote speaker. Governor Tate Reeves will be on stage talking about Mississippi’s success story.

**Pro-growth policies have elevated our state, and there are still many more pro-growth polices we need to implement.** But this week we will be celebrating what has been achieved – and celebrating those that have helped make it happen!

Have a wonderful weekend!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=afd24e298d&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warmest regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
|
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mcpp-c58f.mailchimpsites.com/manage/preferences?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=717dd7b288) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&t=b&e=5703353baa&c=717dd7b288).

body:
You still haven’t submitted your MAGA Survey. Maybe you overlooked question #2? | | [](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/s/c/AuEqsCUyNfHXsQqz0F8XGy58UP7EyXQIKC_yPJ13nQ2X4zHUIdlw6kbQPufsS5LrNaLjHrriBAzgx-kk7Bf6pff6E_OQD2FhlrkiMLdV0RJExco5vx3hksb3j_9BTbF04joql7Aea4TH1hqLtQSwO5e7aVfBwpdqqZtmknieG7rIRH5AG78iHfHE9vZQqsq2KCiWCucMQ4rLmle_0brI4oDBD0MPHz5lDlO-kBlvBeRcRjpKwnzwD0lyyp-LkFKjl4SmkQ0Y1qWurhDFI6R4aa4TmeZtB2wuAWu6UQ6CUFjzNyMxM9ikWrSL65EFyeoYH9q97pmd0d_vhO-z2pukE4t7kDMdE2tJjXS48Qfn1zGJhUnNZelBYxP_sdq6TNnNKTSerxQgODEx76Hu0_ip6XTgFSduEiOk_mhuJPrIP39IUhVEDdi2Ed3F9lNnBcM6dblf-7Z01bSboKjnTDk-D0RZKqabZpzv3Mrwuh0w9_CEghU5tCXtiw4NPMIsKSzuSwojx6LlvaKbPv9alWdvbD7vbDGJClOCWZBjrEIjTMRyupLIK_PgvWc5Rud4Gva-/4_S1Ff9CHNIC2uVlPueseWt0sig4XUCy/14)
Top MAGA Patriot, I know you usually respond right away - that's why I was surprised not to see your October MAGA Survey yet.

**Maybe you overlooked Question #2?**
[](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/s/c/yN0ObTsyJvzydca64nTiQKiia7fH2-xpbukA8aj1LCOIcbUzfKXrUp4a9k9yvJJMsaPuLP8uD7omjEek2BN3E0Eags3whkbctbZQxJ3wpu18TVXhoMpB-jWxCIWteXa3MdEt-O0tGXoeBx8mkrUMb-PnsOk9_CXmTay1nJyqWFGSqADWQG_ONXA1Cf0UQTcwVVMYEBx06fnopKElZ4XSwyK3VyDQJsvhclsl8rdpwChwHyonT9Fmh4jyyM0jvn2_21nelpXk0Apf2OmuHEpyJAp87SHDmQvy2h2N4d10PwveN5FNJkGKt0ZlWywcQOhmx0GhVb6MVIfgXWDRfA5ZI5BdqCL8nhls-opuhCAIWoVY-qRYjBkssPi-l-vj2zpuc1o668lNjJMt4Lqth6cQFD3RlacDrLLawFkfw0CKDsoCrr_8bWdvT8XIXnFHXU3V8zhCG-76rMuHjQtkyOLEzLBpe4E5k4JUpums7vCem_JQbaDxR3yDBtiYoUeML9MUlR-lxvpPB6ARV1yCuRn7KgS18JekcJ4EQbfl8JitW_MwtiT7YCXpjOPpj0yD3TK5/y2AlhSAlmw0OpOGpk_vBJytj2Y0z-nsk/14)
Question #2 is the ONLY required question because it's critical.

clean_body: Across the country, millions of people will rise up and declare there are No Kings in America. | | | Friend, Today, let’s rise up together and in one voice declare: No Kings in America! Billionaires bought Donald Trump his presidency. Now, Trump and his enablers are dismantling our democracy brick by brick. But we will not be silenced. Today, millions of people across the country will come together in an act of peaceful resistance to hold the fascist-in-chief accountable. | During Trump’s first term in office, I proudly led the fight to impeach him―twice. While congressional Republicans will continue to allow this administration to break the law with impunity, we must not stay on the sidelines. We cannot allow Trump to normalize his fascist takeover of our government and our communities. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | With every executive action, Trump’s cruelty is on full display. We will not stay silent. We will hold the billionaire bullies to account. In solidarity, Rashida \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Rashida Tlaib** Date: Fri, Oct 17, 2025 Subject: RSVP: No Kings, this Saturday To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, Every day, we see new attacks on our communities. Trump is using his government shutdown to fire federal workers and erode government agencies. Last weekend he fired Dept. of Education staff who oversee special education services for students with disabilities. He has masked ICE agents terrorizing immigrant communities, disappearing people, violating our human rights, and illegally violating our right to due process. This fascist administration is trying to normalize the military in our streets―attacking civilians and silencing dissent. He’s eroding voting rights and taking away our healthcare while handing tax breaks to billionaires. This Saturday is our chance to speak out and make our voices heard. In June, 5 million people from across the country spoke out against Trump’s fascism. But since then, Trump has continued to shred our Constitution and terrorize our communities. I will never stop standing up to billionaire bullies and speaking truth to power. I’ll continue speaking out for our rights and our humanity, even if my voice shakes. Please, use the link above to find a No Kings rally near you. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | In love and solidarity, Rashida * Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . name: The Turning Point USA Family
subject: God is so good
body:
[unsubscribe](https://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xul=65a6x69jow166jo1opkmvmi0s01axu6fioit1u4prulb7zs4i1fty8tvnktvaleheu2swogtfvr5b4r6rq5bweebt5btxmipo&__stmp=t4bwpu&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
---
Please read the message below from Turning Point USA.
* * *
| | | | [](https://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4bwpu&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, Even now... it still doesn't feel real that we lost Charlie. His voice, his courage, his conviction — it shaped all of us. And his vision — **to build the most faithful and the most patriotic generation in American history** — is why Turning Point USA exists today. Friend, that's why we have an inspiring update for you... In just the first seven days since Charlie was taken from all of us, Turning Point USA has received more than 54,000 requests from students who want to start or join a chapter:
---
[](https://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4bwpu&__onlt=h)
---
**God is so good.** ✝️🙏🕊️ To give you perspective, Friend... Coming into this school year, Turning Point USA had roughly 900+ college chapters and 1,200+ high school chapters. It took us years to build those chapters... over a decade in fact... _But now?_ These students who signed up? They weren't asked to... They weren't recruited... **They felt it was their time to stand up for this country and honor Charlie.** Because of the life he lived. The faith he had. The love he showed God, his family, and others. The courage he had to speak truth. And his vision of a better America for us all.
---
[](https://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4bwpu&__onlt=h)
---
He always believed this day would come. He used to talk about it all the time — how the momentum would shift, how young people would rise up with courage, and how a Turning Point USA chapter would be in every college and high school in America. And now... _It's happening._ Faster than he could have imagined. Bigger than we thought possible. And more beautiful than we can even describe. **Again, Friend, God is so good.** Since we lost Charlie, we've also felt SO MUCH love... Prayers. Emails. Messages. Stories about how Charlie's voice changed lives... or your children's or grandchildren's lives. And so many supporters have asked, _"What can I do?"_ As you read this, our team is working around the clock to follow up with every chapter request. And we're going to need help equipping them with our activism kits. **Every new chapter receives these kits from Turning Point USA with everything they need to get started — including:** ✅ Leadership materials
✅ Pocket Constitutions
✅ Chapter training tools
✅ American flags & patriotic gear Friend, I'm sure you'd believe it when we say it... _this won't be a small task._ But we're going to do it. Whatever it takes. **_For Charlie._** _And here's how YOU can help with this..._ **Every $25 you give today helps stock another activism kit — ready to deploy into a new Turning Point USA student chapter...** How many of these activism kits can you help provide to the wave of new student chapters that are just getting started?
---
[ **1 KIT = $25**](https://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4bwpu&__onlt=h)
---
[ **2 KITS = $50**](https://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4bwpu&__onlt=h)
---
[ **10 KITS = $250**](https://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4bwpu&__onlt=h)
---
[ **100 KITS = $2,500**](https://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4bwpu&__onlt=h)
---
[ **1,000 KITS = $25,000**](https://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4bwpu&__onlt=h)
---
[ **Sponsor Activism Kits**](https://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4bwpu&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, if there was ever a more immediate way you could help make Charlie's vision a reality... **This is it****.**
---
[](https://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4bwpu&__onlt=h)
---
Also... **Here's one more powerful thing you can do:** 📩 If you have a son, daughter, grandchild, niece, nephew — or any young person in your life — who wants to get involved... who wants to join or start a chapter... **Please send them this link:** **[TPUSAStudents.com/StartaChapter](https://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=qwikcdl711u7yv4pohgu71tjoiyxb8i2gow7m6wqfp2rhnsam0wu4fw7v6eadv8j5w2c430dpewcir5jv8qki3jd9fg57rfgjza3sdsbc841n2fw462b14lrxl6r68nqd1p&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4bwpu&__onlt=h)** Friend, if you've already given... If you've already donated... If you've already been a voice of encouragement and strength in this painful week... If you've prayed, been praying, and continue to pray... **Thank you.** We can never say it enough. If you've read this far, we want you to know this... **You're the reason Charlie's mission and vision will grow for generations to come.** God is so good.
---
**For Charlie,** -The Turning Point USA Family **P.S.** Please know, Friend, if you can't afford to help right now, all we ask for are your prayers. Charlie would have wanted you to pray first — and if that's all you can give today, _we're grateful._ But if you're able to help... if you're overjoyed to hear that students are flocking to Charlie's message and mission... Your gift today helps sustain this wave of student inspiration and gets new student chapters off the ground floor... And ensures Charlie's vision is realized faster than we all thought possible. **Every $25 you give today helps us stock another activism kit ready to deploy to a new student chapter.**
---
[ **Sponsor an Activism Kit**
**Make Your Gift Here**](https://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4bwpu&__onlt=h)
---
Thank you for your help and for your prayers, Friend. **God is so good.** 🙏
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

[Unsubscribe](https://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xul=65a6x69jow166jo1opkmvmi0s01axu6fioit1u4prulb7zs4i1fty8tvnktvaleheu2swogtfvr5b4r6rq5bweebt5btxmipo&__stmp=t4bwpu&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh) / [Privacy Policy](https://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=11qfvsq9v6w2jqkqnd1gkp8ob5h2u5voxbsnzx5g6rgy7a9emd3pqpaggtb4ge2dgm5yyt859tl3897xq4zb8f5kacbovawd36xamask0bqdeqfqtoqbgse7zz14&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4bwpu&__onlt=h) / [Contact us](https://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=ukxuchlat4kkf73culw4yvdpy191stztoussh26zevlva8eqfa9gru6gunt85eqe8fadjiezdw9kfjw1c7l68nuzz0enkefwrts93qajera1rei5baj9u&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4bwpu&__onlt=h)

name: The Flyover
subject: Drug Boat Survivors, a Historic Prayer and Formula 1 to Apple
body:
The U.S. military has taken [two survivors into custody](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L1uhDAMwPGngS0oH0ByQ4Yut13XjsgQA24DQUmAXp--4oa-QBcvliz_fx-P7gHkaZ3eYUGbx9CteCaPOWPsXNynPkBOezzoCDHBTCmHSJ3ksmGCM2E6B-SfXV06OyJKVCVaoVuub0oZXs5W91wq0AqEghFc27dghOl7Uw_DbcSmJHtdE1wYoUQrdMUN6FsDCltRm0E3Rc3RUQ6x-gy05hlH_wwHxmoIS-ntnPOWCvVWyHsh7-d5VmP4viqufSHve3oNtpCnDPHJEtIPOvZXxWDMGNkAkfoeYWUuhhVZypG-kKU9bThkdOziYGnZp-kCY5cMi7iFmMto3XaS95RaXdR8WoD86738L9PDyt8AAAD__5vAkMU) following a Thursday military strike on an alleged drug-smuggling boat in the Caribbean, authorities said.

## Navy Rescues Survivors of Drug Boat Strike
The U.S. military has taken [two survivors into custody](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L1uhDAMwPGngS0oH0ByQ4Yut13XjsgQA24DQUmAXp--4oa-QBcvliz_fx-P7gHkaZ3eYUGbx9CteCaPOWPsXNynPkBOezzoCDHBTCmHSJ3ksmGCM2E6B-SfXV06OyJKVCVaoVuub0oZXs5W91wq0AqEghFc27dghOl7Uw_DbcSmJHtdE1wYoUQrdMUN6FsDCltRm0E3Rc3RUQ6x-gy05hlH_wwHxmoIS-ntnPOWCvVWyHsh7-d5VmP4viqufSHve3oNtpCnDPHJEtIPOvZXxWDMGNkAkfoeYWUuhhVZypG-kKU9bThkdOziYGnZp-kCY5cMi7iFmMto3XaS95RaXdR8WoD86738L9PDyt8AAAD__5vAkMU) following a Thursday military strike on an alleged drug-smuggling boat in the Caribbean, authorities said. U.S. Navy helicopters were dispatched as part of the search and rescue team [after overhead video showed people](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL1urDAQRp8GOiP_APYWLm5Dt7dNicb2AE689so2oM3TR6RIHiDdkUYafee83ec7-ODj-h8eqOuS5ohnCVgr5tnlfTUJatnz4Y-UC2y-1JT9zCkfCKOEqdmBD6-5b51eEDmKFjWTI5U3IRRtN22FEQM1OForpVnEYmQPjqEzUrEBltbr6xujTDHBRiY7qkDeBhA4sl5ZOTQ9Redryt178rFuuIRXOjB3Nj3aoLdan6UR_xo-NXw6z7OLxl4W173h04UNn_ZCfomTHydi91KTe5FSs_9AAiHgio4cGPFzxwCRWMgVA7lSkGwjcKF437dZu-fpQ_BllE1P1wf48L2p_inkoflXAAAA___ZTIrO) who seemed to have survived the initial strike. The individuals were picked up and transferred to a U.S. Navy ship. Two U.S. officials said the strike was the sixth carried out under the Trump administration as it continues targeting smuggling vessels operated by drug cartels. The vessel involved was a submersible, long associated with the drug trade, which sits just below the water line. Meanwhile, Adm. ## King Charles, Pope Meet for Historic Prayer
King Charles III is set to join Pope Leo XIV in prayer inside the Sistine Chapel on Oct. 23, marking [the first time since the Protestant Reformation](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLvOnDAQhZ8Guln5wrVwkYZu06ZEE3sWJjE2MrOQffuIKG_wt0dHR-f7fjznJ3LktHzHjZy88pzoOiKJUJlDeS8_M8rxLiefuRy48iG58GyUaUEr0MMckONnburgXkSGbE1O953qR2sHVa9Ot6EbLAZLo_avvrPWaxXQBtUEO7Zjze5e00oP2upO9w81YD-2aKnTzeD7tmoUBZZcHr8yJ1npFT_5pPLweaujW0X2o7LfKjNVZrqu6-FR1hzZ3yi4UPKfu1qZ6Q4qM5muN7qtzPSb0wJ-xRLpAEwB9rwTRMrwh0-QDHvBD0heSFYqwAn-C_BA_r1RYo8RtrxREkCBE4U9prq4sF8cIx9dXzVq2ZDjv7fyJcWnM38DAAD___TLk2k) that a reigning British monarch and a pope will pray together publicly. The Catholic Church and Church of England, [long divided by doctrine](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD2OpDAUhE9jMiP_0NgEDjYh6003RAY_w9txY2S_BvXtR8wVJiupPlWp6t9zenpMuK9__QscxTztcNUERFCmUN7rnD3VdznxzKX6DSvlgpMS6sGl4NJOwWP6TF0TXARQoBtw0vTCDFpb0Wyu87PwJlqvIUpr-kHEEGywWplZmzg06O40KaSVWvbStMJ6Mzy8hl52djEP1gkISLm0_zPutEFMn3xCaZf8apLbiI7K9B-mRqbG67raZa73ittnarwlU-MX7itfNl8SVH7kA3iCzC9MiR_FfzjlFWiDwitWwh1u9oDE1NgUF44bxNob1on15TH9lNOvHjud-g4AAP__LKuCLA), will reunite after more than 400 years to join in ecumenical prayer to the care of God's creation.

Charles will also receive a formal new title and recognition at a pontifical basilica with historic ties to the Church of England. Queen [Camilla will join Charles](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGSsyAURp9GOxwuqJiC4m_S5W-3dEAucjcoDhAzvv1O9hW2_-Y7c87XY34YirSv_82Guvo07_guEWvFPLv8Wm0ytbzySWfKxQQqNWWaBRcDA85gmp2heM1967RHFChb1KBGrm5STrwNWjo7GKe49aN14C1aY8FbEDAI7xdsSX_egMMEEkZQHZ-Mug1G4gj9tKih6Tk6qil334n2GtDHK52YuyVtbdSh1qM08l8j7o24v57dx6C7TEjps2jE_Un7ypZgcsTCjmwudqQDWcTEAAYpei5FF-oW26zd8aYYqYyq6fm6GYq_mPqnNqcWPwEAAP__q0V5hg) and meet six Catholic sisters from the International Union of Superiors General, who advance female empowerment through education programs and efforts to combat human trafficking.

#
Peter, wherever you are today, remember this:
America is still the land of the free, and the home of the brave. You can still be proud of our heritage, especially when you recognize that we haven’t always lived up to the ideals and values we hold most dear.
249 years ago, we fought a war to free ourselves from tyranny. We defeated the most powerful nation in the world, at the time. We won our independence, and inspired the world.
And when July Fourth, 2026 comes around, we’re going to make sure that kings still have no place in the United States of America.

body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=2351%2E135344%2EVxCWWg)

[](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-oct25.P8-T7T&refcode=em251018&t=2&akid=2351%2E135344%2EVxCWWg)
---
Friends --
While I know I am not up for re-election this cycle, I want to take a few minutes to tell you about my decision to run for Senate in the first place, and why your support remains important to my success -- and the success of Democrats in a number of important races this election.
The truth is, we all know America is _going through something_ right now. We seem to be living from crisis to crisis. But there are certain things that should be really simple:
Like living a middle-class life in the state that invented the middle class.
Like making things in America so that we’re in control of our own economic security.
Like protecting our children from the things that are _truly_ harming them.
And preserving our rights and our democracy so that our kids can live their version of the American dream.
**I ran for Senate because I believe that we need a new generation of leaders that thinks differently, works harder, and never forgets the mission of public service.**
But my decision to run for Senate was also deeply personal to me, and it's related to what motivated me to first run for the House in 2018.
It's about my mom, Judy. She was diagnosed with stage IV ovarian cancer in 2009 — and didn't have health insurance at the time. She had let it lapse after the insurance companies had gouged her for years because she happened to have a pre-existing condition. She passed away in 2011, but that experience — of desperately trying to get her care at the same moment we were filling out bankruptcy paperwork — fueled me to run. I remember the exact moment that made me run: when the then-GOP controlled House of Representatives, the body I now serve in, voted to repeal those protections for people with pre-existing conditions. This story is still playing out today with the Big Beautiful Bill and the healthcare crisis with increasing prices this fall.
Almost a decade later, the Republican leaders, fueled by the extreme wing of the party, are continuing the march to repeal things that the average Americans want. They want to privatize Social Security and Medicare, repeal drug price protections like allowing Medicare to negotiate, then there’s the rights they’re obsessed with repealing: a woman’s right to choose, voting rights, and any possible gun safety legislation.
This next election is critical - taking back the House or Senate is the best way for Democrats to put a check on Donald Trump's power. I am one of the few members of Congress who won their election in a state or district also carried by Trump.
To be upfront: **I plan on campaigning for Democrats in tough races in Michigan and elsewhere -- like I did for Rebecca Cooke in Wisconsin a few weeks ago and Chris Deluzio in Pennsylvania last week. But that takes resources. So I am asking:**
[**Will you consider donating $24 or whatever you can to my campaign to help me hit the trail and campaign for Democrats in tough races. We can help them turn out the voters they need to win.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-oct25.P8-T7T&refcode=em251018&t=3&akid=2351%2E135344%2EVxCWWg)**
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $24](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/127?c0=ebs-em-oct25.VEj3Gn&amount=24&refcode=em251018&t=22&akid=2351%2E135344%2EVxCWWg)**

name: Team Ilhan
subject: The 1%
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1899%2E791427%2E1V7OjK)
[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-oct25.q9Ch2B&refcode=em251018-1-180&t=2&akid=1899%2E791427%2E1V7OjK)
Friend — Republicans have a magical way of thinking about the economy.
They tell us that if we line the pockets of billionaires and give huge handouts to corporations, eventually their wealth will trickle down to the working class.
But the divide between the mega-rich and the working class under their “trickle down” policies continues to turn into a chasm.
**Billionaires have added $33 trillion** to their net worth in just the last ten years. The top 1% has accumulated **a third of all the wealth** in America. Folks are working longer hours for lower wages at companies where the CEOs and investors are making millions. The cost of everything from rent to groceries is skyrocketing.
Meanwhile, Republicans in Congress do everything they can to kick Americans off their health insurance, defund food assistance, and block minimum wage increases.
The truth is, we already know how to fix the massive income inequality we see today.
We need the mega-rich to finally pay their fair share in taxes. We need to invest in the universal programs that give folks the economic security they deserve. We need to empower unions to protect workers and ensure that they share in the wealth they create on the job.
But as we have seen, there are powerful special interests who stand in the way of this working class agenda. Millions and millions are spent to defeat progressive leaders like Ilhan Omar and protect the pro-billionaire status quo.
That’s why it’s so important that regular folks chip in to campaigns like ours – whether it’s $5 or $50 – and help us take on the corporate Super PACs and billionaire donors who stand in the way of real progress.
**[If you’re ready to tackle the oligarchy and end the failed era of “trickle down economics” once and for all, chip in to Ilhan Omar’s campaign. Ilhan goes to work every day in Washington on behalf of the working class, not the billionaire class.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-oct25.q9Ch2B&refcode=em251018-1-180&t=3&akid=1899%2E791427%2E1V7OjK)

body:
This poll changes everything...
| Peter,
---
Ever since the Democrats’ government shutdown began on October 1, I placed a pause on our campaign’s fundraising.
---
With the Radical Left holding our government hostage to try and benefit illegal immigrants all at the expense of hardworking Americans like you, honestly, the last thing I wanted to do was bother my supporters with political emails and texts.
---
In fact, I believe now more than ever, the American people need to see that _YOU_ are our ONLY priority, which is why I’ve had my own salary withheld during the Democrats’ senseless shutdown.
---
**_But today, I have to at least break my silence because I just received information that will _UPEND_ the 2026 elections. _**
---
**A BRAND NEW POLL in New York just dropped, showing that once voters are aware of our positions, I would _BEAT_ Democrat governor Kathy Hochul by _1 POINT_!**
---
Hochul and the Democrats were desperately hoping that I would continue to pause my messaging during the shutdown so that they could bury this news and prevent us from seizing the momentum.
---
There’s no two ways about it; this poll is devastating for Hochul. She’s even being labeled the **MOST VULNERABLE** Democrat governor in the country.
---
_And this new poll shows us our clear path to victory._
---
_So long as we reach every last voter, so long as our message isn’t drowned out by the Democrats’ multimillion-dollar ad buys, and so long as I have YOU in my corner, we can SAVE New York!_
---
_...But all this depends on having the resources necessary to get the job done._
---
**That is why I’ve made the calls to secure a 5oo% MATCH for the next 24 hours to ensure we capitalize on this moment. **

Now that our path to save New York is clearer than ever, now that we have all the momentum, will you stand with me in our fight to FIRE Hochul?

clean_body: This poll changes everything... | Peter, Ever since the Democrats’ government shutdown began on October 1, I placed a pause on our campaign’s fundraising. With the Radical Left holding our government hostage to try and benefit illegal immigrants all at the expense of hardworking Americans like you, honestly, the last thing I wanted to do was bother my supporters with political emails and texts. In fact, I believe now more than ever, the American people need to see that YOU are our ONLY priority, which is why I’ve had my own salary withheld during the Democrats’ senseless shutdown. But today, I have to at least break my silence because I just received information that will UPEND the 2026 elections. A BRAND NEW POLL in New York just dropped, showing that once voters are aware of our positions, I would BEAT Democrat governor Kathy Hochul by 1 POINT! Hochul and the Democrats were desperately hoping that I would continue to pause my messaging during the shutdown so that they could bury this news and prevent us from seizing the momentum. There’s no two ways about it; this poll is devastating for Hochul. She’s even being labeled the MOST VULNERABLE Democrat governor in the country. And this new poll shows us our clear path to victory. So long as we reach every last voter, so long as our message isn’t drowned out by the Democrats’ multimillion-dollar ad buys, and so long as I have YOU in my corner, we can SAVE New York! ...But all this depends on having the resources necessary to get the job done. That is why I’ve made the calls to secure a 5oo% MATCH for the next 24 hours to ensure we capitalize on this moment. Now that our path to save New York is clearer than ever, now that we have all the momentum, will you stand with me in our fight to FIRE Hochul? Thank you, Rep. Elise Stefanik Chairwoman of House Republican Leadership Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC. www.elisestefanik.com PO Box 500 Glens Falls, NY 12801 |

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: Anything?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Believe me when I tell you
#

I know you’re likely getting a ton of emails from candidates and causes right now, Peter.
**But I have to ask:[Is there anything I can say to convince you to chip in $5 between Ruben Gallego and my Senate campaign in Ohio? **](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-sherrod.7OMOGL&refcode=em251019-1-90&t=1&akid=4021%2E734936%2EruksUL)
What if I told you that right after I joined this race, experts at _The Cook Political Report_ increased our odds of winning?
What if I told you that _CNN_ and _The New York Times_ report that Ohio is “in play” – but that corporate special interests are gearing up to spend millions against me?
What if I told you that misleading attack ads have already hit the airwaves – and that whether we’re able to counter these smears and reach voters with the truth depends on people like you?
**This grassroots, small-dollar donor movement is our best chance to flip Ohio’s Senate seat. But we’re facing an uphill battle, and I need folks like you by my side to win.**
[**So please, split $5 or more between Ruben and me to power our campaign forward, win in Ohio, and keep up the fight for working people.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-sherrod.7OMOGL&refcode=em251019-1-90&t=2&akid=4021%2E734936%2EruksUL)

| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GSFDWXAB9DjNtigJILt2iwQRX9nhEngIOEDFvqHijQbUZtVm5D_wFNg1gI_gpplJ148ED5pH8GqwOlExGZFx5EUYHOVD9MvnNcqm4BaF6mD9hXufj6Y967Tu2CwWd3UAooHWaMG_7iqzmlhF3uUXVzR32J6MqF8nfsplpaUxDCEH1sETkL6y1p5hhHJzwZWtGeQdvVghwMB5jSYM4bUnpKh_4-nHbLwME7JV9HDjhNY=&c=VnJpi7fSjafc_l82Cgkwljdr9NWzLVS1DlQlSX_Dkakc7esQX4LkdA==&ch=SOrHMS_nxSdWAt9yK-MfDgl0TASd6xQF8DjPcLarBOWMBqs916jvaQ==)

| Peter,
MAGA just launched a brutal political power grab reminiscent of a Game of Thrones plot.
Pennsylvania's Supreme Court retention races are usually sleepy affairs. Rare elections that happen only once every 10 years, Justices up for retention hardly ever lose, and both Democrats and Republicans have strayed from spending big in these elections.
But this November's PA Supreme Court retention race is different. Lulled into a false sense of safety assuming that the 3 Democrats on PA's Supreme Court up for retention would face no danger, Democrats let their guard down--unaware that MAGA was plotting a sinister "Red Wedding" style ambush behind their backs:
---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GSFDWXAB9DjNtigJILt2iwQRX9nhEngIOEDFvqHijQbUZtVm5D_wFNg1gI_gpplJ148ED5pH8GqwOlExGZFx5EUYHOVD9MvnNcqm4BaF6mD9hXufj6Y967Tu2CwWd3UAooHWaMG_7iqzmlhF3uUXVzR32J6MqF8nfsplpaUxDCEH1sETkL6y1p5hhHJzwZWtGeQdvVghwMB5jSYM4bUnpMm8pjkf-jwViW1ZJSEdN3E=&c=VnJpi7fSjafc_l82Cgkwljdr9NWzLVS1DlQlSX_Dkakc7esQX4LkdA==&ch=SOrHMS_nxSdWAt9yK-MfDgl0TASd6xQF8DjPcLarBOWMBqs916jvaQ==)

| | | | In the dead of the night, billionaires under MAGA's banner launched a full out assault, spending millions of dollars in advertisements to convince PA voters to boot the Democratic justices off the court.
It's all part of Trump's plot to consolidate power and name himself king.
If Trump eliminates the three Democrats off of PA's Supreme Court, he can install puppets loyal to him on the court responsible for overseeing elections in the most crucial swing state in America. This would allow him to rig the upcoming '26 and '28 elections--suppressing Democrat votes, decreeing mail-in ballots illegal, and even prevent Democrats from appearing on ballots altogether.
Having heard rumor of this plot from our "little birds" in the capital, Defend Our Courts has been rallying Democrats from across the nation to join in this battle since early summer. Having since raised over 3 million dollars, we are one of the most powerful Democrat-aligned forces in this election.
But we need reinforcements from across the realm, MAGA's numbers are overwhelming and we can't hold out for much longer. If the election were held today, MAGA would win. But with 17 days left until the election, there is still hope we can turn the tide.
[Can you rush $50, $25, or whatever you can spare to stop MAGA's plot to install Trump as King?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GSFDWXAB9DjNtigJILt2iwQRX9nhEngIOEDFvqHijQbUZtVm5D_wFNg1gI_gpplJo8sG7PClP-EC6HTZoVfbMgkj1f3NWD4FYJTQ4eJJIL69Z-zY8_iLsDvOMLk6rrxKCX1kN_I-51rVWicVW9raOusbsVp5JaofqsXgfG-Gp76k8yhGDo-Qw_YHGl57hAuggFiGMdvw_L_RoslqRcO3X9QdMqMlJiJ5U7i7ci6js6_fM5N4eI0XpQ==&c=VnJpi7fSjafc_l82Cgkwljdr9NWzLVS1DlQlSX_Dkakc7esQX4LkdA==&ch=SOrHMS_nxSdWAt9yK-MfDgl0TASd6xQF8DjPcLarBOWMBqs916jvaQ==)

clean_body: Today’s no Kings Day Protests matter because MAGA just launched a brutal political power grab reminiscent of a Game of Thrones plot. | | | | | == | Peter, MAGA just launched a brutal political power grab reminiscent of a Game of Thrones plot. Pennsylvania's Supreme Court retention races are usually sleepy affairs. Rare elections that happen only once every 10 years, Justices up for retention hardly ever lose, and both Democrats and Republicans have strayed from spending big in these elections. But this November's PA Supreme Court retention race is different. Lulled into a false sense of safety assuming that the 3 Democrats on PA's Supreme Court up for retention would face no danger, Democrats let their guard down--unaware that MAGA was plotting a sinister "Red Wedding" style ambush behind their backs: | == | | | | In the dead of the night, billionaires under MAGA's banner launched a full out assault, spending millions of dollars in advertisements to convince PA voters to boot the Democratic justices off the court. It's all part of Trump's plot to consolidate power and name himself king. If Trump eliminates the three Democrats off of PA's Supreme Court, he can install puppets loyal to him on the court responsible for overseeing elections in the most crucial swing state in America. This would allow him to rig the upcoming '26 and '28 elections--suppressing Democrat votes, decreeing mail-in ballots illegal, and even prevent Democrats from appearing on ballots altogether. Having heard rumor of this plot from our "little birds" in the capital, Defend Our Courts has been rallying Democrats from across the nation to join in this battle since early summer. Having since raised over 3 million dollars, we are one of the most powerful Democrat-aligned forces in this election. But we need reinforcements from across the realm, MAGA's numbers are overwhelming and we can't hold out for much longer. If the election were held today, MAGA would win. But with 17 days left until the election, there is still hope we can turn the tide. == | | | | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | | | | == Democrats must rally together before PA falls and Trump declares himself King. After attending SMU, he won the Super Bowl twice with the Green Bay Packers and once with the Dallas Cowboys. Fair food is set to meet its match in competitive eating champ [Joey Chestnut](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGSpCAQQL8GM6agBZGA4BKzvfRCC6FZuUOZwl7d-fsr5xc27Vf1ul__-Zg_fC55__ztN3T0neq843UUJMI2H1Tb5gs2Sj63VGsMqy8F9xkEaC4Fl-McfS6vWXXRLSJa2aGTZhDGKgmyW10fh34JCq3VErQIWmrlE9oAg1Zghi67WyaFHGUPYz8-zOh1unEEb8womRIYM9X2oBUJv_2Ryque2B6hbl1xK9HzYP0vBhOD6bqux7_zC2_IYDpzxMpguqsYTAd5QgbT34ovHlY8aP8i_p7yu5HXxN8r-OpLorwhx52wkc_7hjvxULcnUqZ83hoYLE-LSBgg8QUXyZWWwK1NkSuU1hiDVi26ay4-r1xKPgbDlPjcfC7v8-lnTz8d_A8AAP__HhuWNw) today at the Cotton Bowl. Read the full story in today's _Roundup_. If you’ve ever wished you could make a real, life-changing impact in the world—not just donate, but help someone truly heal—this story from today's sponsor, [Mercy Ships](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkMtuszAQhZ_G7ILwBZssvIiUsMuvX4qqdocGPIAlGyPbufD2FWnfoNtvNN85Op_X7grW2WX6Bx51fo2hW_CZHOaMsUs5RA8OYx7BxjEEM8zgHC4dq1h9oNWBNp0B67ZOFEb3lTnSAjVVslJHQRktZt2LoReooKeMo2yoVLJm3AiQoqbAobB6l9GKNpSzhjelaqAeByZrw0CphhJRobE5xDLPmPEFaXRbeGAsh-ALp-ec10T4ibCWsHaFmBeMpcc4bGm2aypDnN6HCQlrP26Xr_pEaU14e8--S-EeByT83P5ICZM79mjs3RN-vniw7hcO4Few00L4-X-0HuJ2W8OSQtxziqjN-rTO2SQVEdW0P74r5r8N-9DsOwAA___hWI68) will show you exactly how.

## Cold Front Serves Up Severe Weather Risk
A cold front moving across the South and Midwest is creating a [severe weather risk](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLFupDAQQL_GdF7Zhl17C4o9RVyVuyLFlWjAA7Yy2MiehOTvT-wvpJw30mje-_c6vkKkmNY_sGHPX0seEx6VkBnLWDmXDQgLLxDLkrOfAxBhGo0yV6mV1G70EOl77BrfT8rfdYO9tjdl7502ugl917pu8WqerFZ379vW2kmBu2tr3Hy1cxP785hW2unWuNZdrIPrMpvb1Ruw1mnRKfSRc7lwQMYvqAt9508slzlvDfWBea-ifQgzCDMcx3HZajp3wgyY5Ec9KQIHLMIMnPdTK-KJCcqKMkAk6WGDNaZVHjH5Kue8nQOHWOWB-I7JS85yKgjv8mOXKRcO8vmNDJnlAkTCDFDk46H__n6hN9EOeY5etC-_zr541Dcse1N6vx-RKNabFZ1aN4j0FOGf5f_szf8AAAD__zLYnBU) for the weekend in Texas, with the possibility of large hail and damaging winds in parts of the state. The cold front, meeting the warm, moist conditions at play in huge swaths of the country, will present its greatest threat from [noon to 9 p.m.](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L-OszAQBPCnMR2RvWDsFC6-hi5feyXa4CVYMjha7-XP25-CdE9w_U8zo_m6TBdMOe23_7hRkNdSpp2eNZMI8VSl8IaZWBZMvJQS5xVzpn0CDbY1ujV-ipjye-qbGK46nk1DwbhBu3NvwDRrsMZoa1FbR7MHN1jbXQcbu16jt1egJoVPmNHGmw5850_Oo11mGGwEdM4b1WuKSQqfZCWhF9Ylv8uD-DSXrclhFblX1f1TMCoYD3AMn1esxPWjFIxLYZqxyi9pKz2IqT1obZnkm3cFY8Mh3p8p51QHp3p92zDlo0n-9s8jwE8AAAD__7LpeyY) today. Weather warnings stretch from [Texas to Ohio](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDtuhDAURVdjOiN_AJvCRaSIbtJEUUr0wA-wYngj25nP7iNmC6mv7ufc78t4gRDDsX7Ajq48FhoPvOeIpWAac6G0Q8RUFghpIfLzBjHiMSqhWi4Fl3b0EOJzbCrvJuF7WaGTphOmb6SS1eZ0Ixq9aD3PFnrseyNMM8Fk-64TCvulCu4Mk0JaqZXVtjYW2mVWXesVGGMlawT6UCjVZcOCD8hLfNINUz3TXkW3lXLNTL8xNTA1wDSfBPVKp8zU8PXJ1JDxhgn5CyjzayL_O4dj5YXSAZ4w8w1C5HfEHzw8f7Vw2gKd3kLpyfQQPNPvUnWdVKaVVXL-eg8xhtwZ1oh1hxBfi8r_frw59RcAAP__bLaHig) today as storms sweep east along the cold front. On the back end of the severe weather, Texans can expect cooler temperatures to start the new week.
## Immigrant Arrested for ICE Agent Bounty
Eduardo Aguilar, a 23-year-old illegal immigrant living in Dallas, has been arrested for allegedly offering a [$10,000 bounty](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOgzAQRL_GdEa2gdgULq6hy7VXogUvwcqCI3svJH9_Ir9w3RSjN5r3cx2vECnut2_Y0PNrSeOORyFkxjwWTnkDwswLxLykFOYViHAfjTKd1EpqNwaI9B7bKvhJhV5X6LW9KNu32uhq9U1QCAiNVuA0YNerAFPTT2jsZGyLVfQnTCvtdGNc42rroFtmc-mCAWudFq3CEDnlmldkfEFZ6J2emOs5bRX5lflRRPMlzCDMcBxHvaRXe944C8IMZxRm4HjndJdT-t05YpFxRgk33LnIAERQ5AdeZR8eRySK5WJFq24bRPpM8f8EPb35CwAA__8uxXxr) via TikTok for killing ICE agents. Aguilar’s video, posted on Oct. 9, promised "10K for each ICE agent." The post contained text in Spanish translated, “I need 10 dudes in Dallas with determination (guts) who aren’t afraid to [two skull emojis]." Aguilar, a Mexican national, faces [federal charges](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGSozAQRL9GZKIkIRAbKLiEbC-9kBpLA0ytkFxobOy_v8K_sGl3dVf3-_c9fwMlyutf2NHzaylzxrMmZMZjrlyOHRIevAAdSykxbJAS5tko00utpB7nCJTes22iv6n4pRv02g3KfVltdLN52_XOWtdbozod9bJABxj63kJ30yoODfmrTCs96s6M3di6EfolmKGPBpwbtbAKI3E5Wt6Q8QV1Se_yxKMNZW-S35jvVXR_hJmEmc7zbMOtXi8uX5jpExFmuiRhpkeOJTx2zIxRRkgJqtwhSwjhUTHKWhIFYsqrfFJJmANKWIFyZUkBJdMPlx9hpubw8X5SSlQHJ6xad6D02cS_I_n05n8AAAD__2Gcipo) for transmitting a threat across state or foreign lines, with a conviction earning him a five-year jail sentence.
## Joey Chestnut v. Fair Food at Cotton Bowl
World-renowned [hot dog-eating](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLvSmzAQhZ8GOjGSuGgpVKShc9qUzFpaGSUCedDamLfP4Ff423NmzuX7c5tvGFPcHr9xJcufkOeNjpKImfa5cN5XTLRzwLiHnL1bMCXaZi11L5QUCmaPMZ1zV3t7l35UNVllBmnGTmlVL9ZBaMH0AaUBgMFA144EQcl-bNFDqKO9wpRUoFoNLTQGsA9OD73XaAyoqpPkI-e94YWYPlhCOvOb9sbltU52YX6Wqv1V6anS03EcDb48uvOyKz39Rfcvb7zQQfdKTwmZCl96plO4hQpvLxachcvrk5gEsuCFRGFkEtdxkYP49ta79c8jphTLYKpOPlaM6buCf8bubfX_AAAA___gYIVZ) champion Joey Chestnut takes center stage at the State Fair of Texas today, testing his tremendous gastro capabilities against equally renowned fair food. Chestnut will be eating a large amount of a selected fair food, chosen with [input from the public](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGSpCAQQL8GM6agBZGA4BKzvfRCC6FZuUOZwl7d-fsr5xc27Vf1ul__-Zg_fC55__ztN3T0neq843UUJMI2H1Tb5gs2Sj63VGsMqy8F9xkEaC4Fl-McfS6vWXXRLSJa2aGTZhDGKgmyW10fh34JCq3VErQIWmrlE9oAg1Zghi67WyaFHGUPYz8-zOh1unEEb8womRIYM9X2oBUJv_2Ryque2B6hbl1xK9HzYP0vBhOD6bqux7_zC2_IYDpzxMpguqsYTAd5QgbT34ovHlY8aP8i_p7yu5HXxN8r-OpLorwhx52wkc_7hjvxULcnUqZ83hoYLE-LSBgg8QUXyZWWwK1NkSuU1hiDVi26ay4-r1xKPgbDlPjcfC7v8-lnTz8d_A8AAP__HhuWNw), as the halftime entertainment for the inaugural State Fair Clásico between Dallas Trinity FC and Club América Femenil, played at the Cotton Bowl Stadium. Perhaps you had to wait a few weeks or even months... But what if there was no appointment to be found? No doctors to treat you, and no healing possible? Sadly, this is the reality for many in the world:
* Globally, 5 billion people lack access to surgical care.
* In sub-Saharan Africa, there is only one surgeon for every 200,000 people.

For 45 years, [**Mercy Ships has been meeting this need**](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkMtuszAQhZ_G7ILwBZssvIiUsMuvX4qqdocGPIAlGyPbufD2FWnfoNtvNN85Op_X7grW2WX6Bx51fo2hW_CZHOaMsUs5RA8OYx7BxjEEM8zgHC4dq1h9oNWBNp0B67ZOFEb3lTnSAjVVslJHQRktZt2LoReooKeMo2yoVLJm3AiQoqbAobB6l9GKNpSzhjelaqAeByZrw0CphhJRobE5xDLPmPEFaXRbeGAsh-ALp-ec10T4ibCWsHaFmBeMpcc4bGm2aypDnN6HCQlrP26Xr_pEaU14e8--S-EeByT83P5ICZM79mjs3RN-vniw7hcO4Few00L4-X-0HuJ2W8OSQtxziqjN-rTO2SQVEdW0P74r5r8N-9DsOwAA___hWI68). With state-of-the-art hospital ships, they provide safe surgery to children and adults living with treatable conditions—and it’s completely free of charge. One of those children is Umu, who was born with a dangerous tumor on her neck. As she grew, eating became more difficult. Her mother Yei worried that soon breathing would get harder. As Umu's family searched for help, the tumor continued to grow. Surgery felt unreachable—until hope arrived! [**Learn more about Mercy Ships and how you can help transform someone’s life**](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkMtuszAQhZ_G7ILwBZssvIiUsMuvX4qqdocGPIAlGyPbufD2FWnfoNtvNN85Op_X7grW2WX6Bx51fo2hW_CZHOaMsUs5RA8OYx7BxjEEM8zgHC4dq1h9oNWBNp0B67ZOFEb3lTnSAjVVslJHQRktZt2LoReooKeMo2yoVLJm3AiQoqbAobB6l9GKNpSzhjelaqAeByZrw0CphhJRobE5xDLPmPEFaXRbeGAsh-ALp-ec10T4ibCWsHaFmBeMpcc4bGm2aypDnN6HCQlrP26Xr_pEaU14e8--S-EeByT83P5ICZM79mjs3RN-vniw7hcO4Few00L4-X-0HuJ2W8OSQtxziqjN-rTO2SQVEdW0P74r5r8N-9DsOwAA___hWI68).

Listen to our daily 15-minute podcast while commuting, cooking, or walking the dog—your Flyover fix, anywhere. | | Cold Front Serves Up Severe Weather Risk A cold front moving across the South and Midwest is creating a for the weekend in Texas, with the possibility of large hail and damaging winds in parts of the state. The cold front, meeting the warm, moist conditions at play in huge swaths of the country, will present its greatest threat from today. Weather warnings stretch from today as storms sweep east along the cold front. On the back end of the severe weather, Texans can expect cooler temperatures to start the new week. Immigrant Arrested for ICE Agent Bounty Eduardo Aguilar, a 23-year-old illegal immigrant living in Dallas, has been arrested for allegedly offering a via TikTok for killing ICE agents. Aguilar’s video, posted on Oct. 9, promised "10K for each ICE agent." The post contained text in Spanish translated, “I need 10 dudes in Dallas with determination (guts) who aren’t afraid to [two skull emojis]." Aguilar, a Mexican national, faces for transmitting a threat across state or foreign lines, with a conviction earning him a five-year jail sentence. Joey Chestnut v. Fair Food at Cotton Bowl World-renowned champion Joey Chestnut takes center stage at the State Fair of Texas today, testing his tremendous gastro capabilities against equally renowned fair food. Chestnut will be eating a large amount of a selected fair food, chosen with , as the halftime entertainment for the inaugural State Fair Clásico between Dallas Trinity FC and Club América Femenil, played at the Cotton Bowl Stadium. On a Texas visit in September, Chestnut set a world record for downing in 10 minutes. The soccer match kicks off at 4 p.m. | When was the last time you had a doctor's appointment? Perhaps you had to wait a few weeks or even months... But what if there was no appointment to be found? No doctors to treat you, and no healing possible? Sadly, this is the reality for many in the world: Globally, 5 billion people lack access to surgical care. In sub-Saharan Africa, there is only one surgeon for every 200,000 people. For 45 years, . With state-of-the-art hospital ships, they provide safe surgery to children and adults living with treatable conditions—and it’s completely free of charge. One of those children is Umu, who was born with a dangerous tumor on her neck. As she grew, eating became more difficult. Her mother Yei worried that soon breathing would get harder. As Umu's family searched for help, the tumor continued to grow. Surgery felt unreachable—until hope arrived! . | ➤ Plano: Japanese-style Miyako Hybrid Hotel broke ground this week. The project, costing more than $100 million, is Miyako’s third in the nation and first in Texas. () ➤ San Antonio: H-E-B groceries sold out of their heavy-metal-inspired T-shirts within four minutes of release on Friday during an online-only sale. The shirts’ designer said the sell-out showed why San Antonio was once called “heavy metal city.” () ➤ Dallas: Nicole Kidman and Elle Fanning will star in a legal thriller series set in Dallas, beginning production next year. Discretion is based on a short story of the same name by Dallas native Chandler Baker. () ➤ Statewide: Google’s photo-editing feature, Ask Photos, went live for U.S. Pixel users last month, but Google confirmed, without explanation, that the feature was not released for users in Texas and Illinois. () ➤ McKinney: Renderings have been released for McKinney’s 20,000-seat Sunset Amphitheater. The outdoor live music venue will be able to host shows year-round. () ➤ Dallas: Longtime SMU executive Brad Cheves has been named president and CEO of the Dallas Regional Chamber, succeeding Dale Petroskey, who has held the post for 12 years. () Enjoy reading The Texas Flyover?mailto:?cc=editor@thetexasflyover.com&subject=My%20new%20favorite%20newsletter!&body=Hey!%0A%0AI%E2%80%99ve%20been%20reading%20a%20new%20newsletter%20every%20morning%20called%20The%20Texas%20Flyover%2C%20and%20I%20think%20you%20would%20like%20it%20a%20lot.%0A%0AIt%20covers%20a%20wide%20range%20of%20Texas%20news%2C%20and%20it%20doesn't%20have%20the%20bias%20that%20most%20media%20coverage%20is%20full%20of.%0A%0AI%20think%20you%20should%20give%20it%20a%20try.%0A%0AJust%20copy%20this%20link%20and%20paste%20it%20into%20your%20browser%3A%20https%3A%2F%2Fthetexasflyover.com%2F%3Futm%3DDL%0A%0ALet%20me%20know%20if%20you%20like%20it.%20I%20think%20you%20will! to share with your friends and family. | ➤ Baylor plays TCU in the Bluebonnet Battle to kick off college football this morning, followed by No. 4 Texas A&M against Arkansas and No. 7 Texas Tech taking on Arizona State in the afternoon. At night, the No. 21-ranked Longhorns face off against Kentucky. () ➤ The Big 12 is increasing the penalties for throwing objects onto the field, raising the $25,000 fine to $100,000 following last week’s problems at the Texas Tech-Kansas game. The change could end the Red Raiders’ longstanding tradition of “tortilla tossing” onto the field. () ➤ Cowboys wide receiver CeeDee Lamb is expected to play against the Commanders tomorrow after missing the last three contests with a high ankle sprain. () ➤ No. 2 Texas volleyball is one of just two undefeated teams remaining in the country, 14-0 on the season. The Longhorns have nine ranked wins so far, including a nation-high five top 10 victories. () ➤ The city of Dallas unveiled its Major League Volleyball franchise late this week, the Dallas Pulse. The team will play games at Comerica Center in Frisco. () ➤ Yesterday’s Results: | | | | | | Flying together with our sponsor ➤ Slip into —doctor-approved footwear with a wide toe box, zero-heel drop, and breathable, slip-resistant soles so you move more naturally, comfortably, and pain-free every day. | From facebook.com/texashumor | Flying together with our sponsor One day, Umu’s mother heard about Mercy Ships and the chance for her daughter to receive free surgery. Hoping to find help, Umu’s family traveled to the hospital ship, the Africa Mercy, and met with doctors. Realizing the severity of the young girl’s situation, they jumped into action. The tumor was removed, . She has since been able to eat more easily, and her health is improving. Today, she and her family can let go of fear and embrace a future filled with hope. . | ➤ South Padre Island will host Jake Paul’s Most Valuable Promotions tonight, headlined by Lourdes Juarez vs. Yesica Nery Plata in a women’s light flyweight title fight. () ➤ A 94-year-old Fort Worth pastor, Charles Holland, is still conducting church services in his retirement community. Holland’s preaching career spans seven decades. () ➤ Gymnastics phenom Simone Biles has revealed her completed, custom-built Texas mansion in a series of posts on social media, where she captured her lakefront swimming pool, basketball court, and in-ground trampoline. name: GIFFORDS.org
subject: Look at this picture…
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Take a look at this picture:
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-q42025.UDsFRy&refcode=em251018-1-b&t=1&akid=10970%2E3935704%2ETRA1bT)
This is Winsome Sears. Winsome is the Republican nominee for Virginia’s governor election in less than three weeks, and she is as extreme as it gets.
Just days after the school shooting in Uvalde which killed 19 children and 2 teachers, she headlined the NRA’s annual conference in the same state.
**At that conference, she blamed the mass shooting on lack of prayer in schools.**
Friend: It wasn’t a lack of prayer that killed those innocent lives. It was an AR-15-style assault rifle -- similar to the rifle she’s posing with in the picture.
But that’s not all. She cheered on Trump’s budget bill -- which takes healthcare away from millions of Americans. She’s taken money from a known Nazi sympathizer.
_And according to election experts, there’s a real possibility she could win this race._
**We are officially less than three weeks until the November 2025 election. Democrats have a huge opening to flip Virginia’s governor seat blue and take back the House of Delegates — but only if we act today.**
[**GIFFORDS PAC is working to reach voters in battleground states and stand up against extremists like Winsome Sears. If you agree with our mission, please pitch in today >>**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-q42025.UDsFRy&refcode=em251018-1-b&t=2&akid=10970%2E3935704%2ETRA1bT)

name: Chris Deluzio
subject: our healthcare system is a mess
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRIS DELUZIO FOR CONGRESS
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117522031/576761055/1895761198?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MzM3NjJlYy0yYWFjLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XN_AkDhc5V9iMhhY9Lcpuq8poYCJ2X7tpoGEgj9GHrc=&emci=c42d03e6-2aac-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=533762ec-2aac-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=13185894) Here’s the truth, Derek: our healthcare system is a mess. Healthcare costs are already too high, and it's about to get way worse. Millions of Americans are getting notices that their monthly insurance premiums are about to double. Here’s what we know about prices for people buying Pennie plans (our ACA market in Pennsylvania): In Allegheny County, premiums will jump an average of $137 a month. In Beaver County, $125. And if Congress lets the ACA tax credits expire, 267,000 of my fellow veterans will lose their health coverage. This comes at a time when we have some of the most expensive healthcare in the world with worse outcomes than many other countries, and when hardworking people are getting pounded by high costs. **Let's be clear. Republicans shut down the government and they refused to work with Democrats to clean up this healthcare mess they made.** [**The Republican government shutdown is hurting folks in Western PA and across the country. At home and down in Washington, I’m fighting back against the GOP’s failed leadership, ready to get to work to re-open the government and stop healthcare costs from skyrocketing. If you’re with me, chip in now to help me keep up this fight in the House →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117522034/576761060/981825435?refcode=email_101825_healthcare&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MzM3NjJlYy0yYWFjLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XN_AkDhc5V9iMhhY9Lcpuq8poYCJ2X7tpoGEgj9GHrc=) | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117522038/576761071/981825435?refcode=email_101825_healthcare&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MzM3NjJlYy0yYWFjLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XN_AkDhc5V9iMhhY9Lcpuq8poYCJ2X7tpoGEgj9GHrc=)

Now, because of their inaction, health insurers are jacking up premiums—anticipating that key tax credits could expire. That means even higher bills for working people. And if Republicans in Congress continue to hold up action, 4 million people could lose their health insurance.
That means people could go bankrupt trying to afford life-saving care or prescriptions they need to survive—and Americans will be sicker and worse off than before.
**And here’s the thing: the majority of Americans— _including Republicans!_ —agree those tax credits should stay. Because it’s just common sense.**
[**That’s why I’m fighting to ensure we reach a deal that protects affordable healthcare for my fellow veterans and folks across the country. clean_body: Here’s the truth, Derek: our healthcare system is a mess. Healthcare costs are already too high, and it's about to get way worse. Millions of Americans are getting notices that their monthly insurance premiums are about to double. Here’s what we know about prices for people buying Pennie plans (our ACA market in Pennsylvania): In Allegheny County, premiums will jump an average of $137 a month. In Beaver County, $125. And if Congress lets the ACA tax credits expire, 267,000 of my fellow veterans will lose their health coverage. This comes at a time when we have some of the most expensive healthcare in the world with worse outcomes than many other countries, and when hardworking people are getting pounded by high costs. Let's be clear. Republicans shut down the government and they refused to work with Democrats to clean up this healthcare mess they made. = | | = Washington Republicans managed to make our healthcare crisis worse with their Medicaid cuts and inaction on the Affordable Care Act—and they chose to shut down the government rather than work to fix the crisis that they caused. Now, because of their inaction, health insurers are jacking up premiums—anticipating that key tax credits could expire. That means even higher bills for working people. And if Republicans in Congress continue to hold up action, 4 million people could lose their health insurance. That means people could go bankrupt trying to afford life-saving care or prescriptions they need to survive—and Americans will be sicker and worse off than before. And here’s the thing: the majority of Americans— including Republicans! —agree those tax credits should stay.
