name: Adam Schiff
subject: Why I’m standing with Chris
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
Chris Pappas needs your help to win in 2026.
[](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251018_1_schiff.pTbIYW&refcode=em20251018-1&t=1&akid=2945%2E582294%2Ex-7FH9)
Hi. This is Senator Adam Schiff.
I’m reaching out to tell you why I’m supporting my friend Chris Pappas in the race for New Hampshire’s Senate seat. He’s exactly the type of leader we need right now in the Senate — and exactly the type of fighter we need right now to keep this seat blue.
[**We need to show our support for Chris. Will you chip in $5 now?**](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251018_1_schiff.pTbIYW&refcode=em20251018-1&t=2&akid=2945%2E582294%2Ex-7FH9)
**There is no path to winning the Senate without New Hampshire. Full stop.**
Republicans know that, and it’s why they’re doing everything they can to recruit high-profile candidates to defeat Chris.
They’ve already convinced one former (and failed) Senator to run against Chris. But now they’re trying to recruit yet another: **John Sununu.**
The good news? New Hampshire knows Chris. They know he’s not about talk, he’s about getting things done. They know he’s one of the hardest workers in Congress, fighting to lower costs, take on Big Pharma, and stand up for veterans.
That’s why he’s won in one of the most competitive districts in the country four times in a row — and it’s exactly why he’s going to win this Senate seat, too — with your help.
But we can’t take anything for granted. Republicans have their sights set on New Hampshire. And this mid-month fundraising deadline is a big deal.
**These coming days are setting the stage for November 2026.** What Chris raises between now and the end of the month determines the strength of this campaign and whether Chris can continue delivering for New Hampshire.
[**Can you please chip in $5 or anything you can right now to help Chris?**](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251018_1_schiff.pTbIYW&refcode=em20251018-1&t=3&akid=2945%2E582294%2Ex-7FH9)
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251018_1_schiff.pTbIYW&amount=5&refcode=em20251018-1&t=22&akid=2945%2E582294%2Ex-7FH9)**
I look forward to working alongside Chris in the U.S. Senate to deliver for all Americans.
Thank you,
Adam Schiff
U.S. Senator
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_footer?refcode=em20251018-1&t=23&refcode2=2945_582294_x-7FH9&akid=2945%2E582294%2Ex-7FH9)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_receive_fewer_emails/?t=24&akid=2945%2E582294%2Ex-7FH9)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_update_your_information/?t=25&akid=2945%2E582294%2Ex-7FH9)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.chrispappas.org/unsubscribe/cps_unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=2945%2E582294%2Ex-7FH9)

Email us: [teampappas@chrispappas.org](mailto:teampappas@chrispappas.org)
Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
Chris Pappas for Senate
PO Box 313
Manchester, NH 03105
United States

subject: Where is Florida's Attorney General?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSE JAVIER RODRIGUEZ FOR FLORIDA ATTORNEY GENERAL
body:

You've probably heard the news, Peter: Florida Power & Light (FPL) is trying to get approval for the biggest rate hike in U.S. history — nearly $10 billion over four years that would hit 12 million Floridians. State regulators are holding hearings in Tallahassee to decide whether to approve FPL's massive rate increase. Consumer advocates are fighting back. Families are wondering how they'll afford even higher electric bills. **And where is our Attorney General? Nowhere to be found.** James Uthmeier — the guy who's supposed to be Florida's top consumer advocate — is completely silent while FPL tries to pick your pocket. He won't stand up to the utility giants or fight for working families who are being crushed by rising costs. **[If you're as frustrated as I am, chip in $10 to help me defeat Uthmeier and hold FPL accountable →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117523022/576764115/-2108063729?amount=10&refcode=em_JJR_FR_FPLHike_101825&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxMjYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjBjZDM4NmMtMmJhYy1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0X3qoFqDiuuZOsD6lZt8TGmKOGW9SpiDSAbalfAzFFQ=)** In other states, Republican and Democratic attorneys general alike have intervened in rate cases to protect consumers. Even previous Florida Attorneys General like Charlie Crist and Bill McCollum stood up to utilities. But James Uthmeier? He'd rather grab headlines doing Trump's bidding than do his actual job. This is what corruption looks like, Peter. When the chips are down and Floridians need their leaders to step up, those leaders are nowhere to be found. As your next Attorney General, I'll fight for zero rate increases and take FPL to court if necessary. I've taken them on before, and I'll do it again. But I need your help to win this fight. **[Will you chip in right now to help me defeat James Uthmeier and become the People's Lawyer Florida desperately needs?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117523024/576764117/-2108063729?refcode=em_JJR_FR_FPLHike_101825&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxMjYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjBjZDM4NmMtMmJhYy1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0X3qoFqDiuuZOsD6lZt8TGmKOGW9SpiDSAbalfAzFFQ=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | **[DONATE $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117523026/576764119/-2108063729?amount=10&express_lane=true&refcode=em_JJR_FR_FPLHike_101825&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxMjYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjBjZDM4NmMtMmJhYy1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0X3qoFqDiuuZOsD6lZt8TGmKOGW9SpiDSAbalfAzFFQ=) **

clean_body: When Florida families needed him most, he was nowhere to be found. | You've probably heard the news, Peter: Florida Power & Light (FPL) is trying to get approval for the biggest rate hike in U.S. history — nearly $10 billion over four years that would hit 12 million Floridians. State regulators are holding hearings in Tallahassee to decide whether to approve FPL's massive rate increase. Consumer advocates are fighting back. Families are wondering how they'll afford even higher electric bills. And where is our Attorney General? Nowhere to be found. James Uthmeier — the guy who's supposed to be Florida's top consumer advocate — is completely silent while FPL tries to pick your pocket. He won't stand up to the utility giants or fight for working families who are being crushed by rising costs. = In other states, Republican and Democratic attorneys general alike have intervened in rate cases to protect consumers. Even previous Florida Attorneys General like Charlie Crist and Bill McCollum stood up to utilities. But James Uthmeier? He'd rather grab headlines doing Trump's bidding than do his actual job. This is what corruption looks like, Peter. When the chips are down and Floridians need their leaders to step up, those leaders are nowhere to be found. As your next Attorney General, I'll fight for zero rate increases and take FPL to court if necessary. I've taken them on before, and I'll do it again. But I need your help to win this fight. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = Let's do this! Jose Javier Rodriguez = | = = PAID FOR BY JOSE JAVIER RODRIGUEZ FOR FLORIDA ATTORNEY GENERAL Jose Javier Rodriguez for Attorney General 701 S. Howard Avenue #106-813 Tampa, FL 33606

name: John Bisognano, NDRC
subject: The GOP’s playbook is on full display
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
What’s happening in Ohio is the GOP’s cynical gerrymandering playbook on full display.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117522782/576763356/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYyNDViMWJjLTJhYWMtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=DqH-CN5ComsQuY63OQqiD-If0d-YNm1BMGucY31gJCs=&emci=f75cb681-88ab-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=6245b1bc-2aac-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter, Want to see the Republican playbook for exploiting every loophole to undermine the will of the people? Just look at Ohio. First, let’s rewind back to 2018. That was the year Ohioans overwhelmingly voted to pass a constitutional amendment that takes redistricting out of the hands of partisan politicians. Voters said overwhelmingly that the majority party shouldn’t be able to draw maps that enable them to unfairly accumulate more power. Flash forward to today, and things look very different. Republicans are currently trying to run out the clock on the process enshrined by Ohio voters so that the map redraw gets kicked to the GOP-controlled legislature. They’re doing this so they can follow Trump’s dictate to pass a new, egregiously gerrymandered map without any Democratic votes by the end of November. This is nothing but a cynical attempt to undermine democracy itself. It’s a slap in the face to voters. And it’s a sign that Republicans know they can’t win on their policies, so they have to cheat their way into power — which is why we have to stop it. **Right now, the NDRC is mobilizing in every state that’s forcing through mid-decade redraws, from Ohio to Missouri to Texas. Alongside the fair maps movement, we’re organizing volunteers, raising the alarm in the media, and working to elect Democracy Defenders in the 2025 elections.** [**Can we count on your support? Help us push back on the GOP’s playbook to consolidate power in Ohio or wherever they attempt to gerrymander next.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117522785/576763362/-80723829?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_OhioPlaybook_email_20251018-NDRC-Tier1-OhioPlaybook_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20251018-NDRC-Tier1-OhioPlaybook_&utm_campaign=OhioPlaybook&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYyNDViMWJjLTJhYWMtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=DqH-CN5ComsQuY63OQqiD-If0d-YNm1BMGucY31gJCs=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: What’s happening in Ohio is the GOP’s cynical gerrymandering playbook on full display. | Peter, Want to see the Republican playbook for exploiting every loophole to undermine the will of the people? Just look at Ohio. First, let’s rewind back to 2018. That was the year Ohioans overwhelmingly voted to pass a constitutional amendment that takes redistricting out of the hands of partisan politicians. Voters said overwhelmingly that the majority party shouldn’t be able to draw maps that enable them to unfairly accumulate more power. Flash forward to today, and things look very different. Republicans are currently trying to run out the clock on the process enshrined by Ohio voters so that the map redraw gets kicked to the GOP-controlled legislature. They’re doing this so they can follow Trump’s dictate to pass a new, egregiously gerrymandered map without any Democratic votes by the end of November. This is nothing but a cynical attempt to undermine democracy itself. It’s a slap in the face to voters. And it’s a sign that Republicans know they can’t win on their policies, so they have to cheat their way into power — which is why we have to stop it. Right now, the NDRC is mobilizing in every state that’s forcing through mid-decade redraws, from Ohio to Missouri to Texas. Alongside the fair maps movement, we’re organizing volunteers, raising the alarm in the media, and working to elect Democracy Defenders in the 2025 elections. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Thank you for sticking by us in these fights. We can’t do this work without your support. John Bisognano President, National Democratic Redistricting Committee = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NE, #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

The **Michigan Citizens Only Voting Amendment** is about protecting our elections and ensuring that **only U.S. citizens can vote in Michigan**. Every dollar you give helps us collect signatures, educate voters, and spread the word across the state.
We’re building incredible momentum but we can’t slow down now. Let’s finish this fundraising push strong and make history together!

What happens when you bring together entrepreneurs, thinkers, and everyday Americans determined to rebuild the moral and economic foundations of our country?
You get the **Seed & Roots Summit** -- a day devoted to _faith, family, and the future of work in America.**[GET YOUR TICKET TODAY!](https://substack.com/redirect/535f458a-a891-4a41-9758-438b836d3f66?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/535f458a-a891-4a41-9758-438b836d3f66?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
And because we believe in celebrating those who show up to build something lasting, every admission includes **one raffle entry** for exciting door prizes --
🏈 **55 ′′ Smart TV**
📱 **11 ′′ iPad**
🎧 **AirPods Pro**
💻 **15.6 ′′ Laptop**
🎵 **Beats Headphones**
...and more!
Winners will be announced live at the event -- because yes, doing good and having fun belong together.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/535f458a-a891-4a41-9758-438b836d3f66?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

body:
|
#
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117523917/576767718/-472699913?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGMxODU4NC0yZGFjLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KA5leTwDzNzJyUv9vk4lm4xMtejH4Grn4iNqg82_Xo8=&emci=0e83b72d-5fab-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=a4c18584-2dac-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=27257697)

Friend, Last weekend, I sent around an email asking you to [**sign on as a grassroots endorser of my re-election campaign.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117523918/576767719/-472699913?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGMxODU4NC0yZGFjLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KA5leTwDzNzJyUv9vk4lm4xMtejH4Grn4iNqg82_Xo8=&emci=0e83b72d-5fab-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=a4c18584-2dac-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=27257697) **I’m truly grateful to the hundreds of folks who've signed on already. But according to our records, we haven’t seen your signature come through just yet.** We’re building this re-election campaign from the ground up, and every signature plays a crucial part. It sends a powerful message – one that says we’re strong, ready to fight, and here to win for mid-Michiganers everywhere. **[So what do you say, friend? Will you join the fight by adding your name today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117523919/576767720/-472699913?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGMxODU4NC0yZGFjLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KA5leTwDzNzJyUv9vk4lm4xMtejH4Grn4iNqg82_Xo8=&emci=0e83b72d-5fab-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=a4c18584-2dac-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=27257697)** | | [Add your name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117523920/576767721/1894006211?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGMxODU4NC0yZGFjLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KA5leTwDzNzJyUv9vk4lm4xMtejH4Grn4iNqg82_Xo8=&emci=0e83b72d-5fab-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=a4c18584-2dac-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=27257697)
---
Thank you,
Kristen

**P.S.** I’ve attached my original message below. I look forward to receiving **[your signature soon!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117523921/576767722/-472699913?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGMxODU4NC0yZGFjLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KA5leTwDzNzJyUv9vk4lm4xMtejH4Grn4iNqg82_Xo8=&emci=0e83b72d-5fab-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=a4c18584-2dac-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=27257697)

\------ Forwarded Message ------**
From: Kristen McDonald Rivet
Date: Sun, October 12, 2025 at 9:15 AM
Subject: Small request

Hi there – this is a different type of email than I usually send.
I’m not asking for a donation. Instead, I’m asking you to personally endorse my re-election campaign for Congress. **With our race shaping up to be one of the most competitive in the country, your endorsement would send a powerful message that we’ve got the grassroots strength to win.**
[**We want to add 500 names to our list of endorsers today. It would mean a lot if you were one of them, so please add your name now.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117523922/576767723/1894006211?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGMxODU4NC0yZGFjLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KA5leTwDzNzJyUv9vk4lm4xMtejH4Grn4iNqg82_Xo8=&emci=0e83b72d-5fab-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=a4c18584-2dac-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=27257697)
| [Add your name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117523923/576767724/1894006211?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGMxODU4NC0yZGFjLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KA5leTwDzNzJyUv9vk4lm4xMtejH4Grn4iNqg82_Xo8=&emci=0e83b72d-5fab-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=a4c18584-2dac-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=27257697)
---
Adding your name is quick, and it means a lot. It’s a reminder of the strong grassroots team we’re building together – and that strength is especially important today.
Right now, MAGA Republicans are pushing an agenda that would double health care costs for working families and slash programs like Medicaid and SNAP – making it harder for millions of families to make ends meet. My job is to push back against those cuts and fight for a budget that _actually_ supports working families and ends this shutdown.
**That’s also a reminder of why this seat matters so much. **
MI-08 is one of the most competitive districts in the country. What happens here could be the deciding factor in who holds the gavel in Congress – and whether we move forward with policies that lower costs for working people or slide backward to protect the wealthy and well-connected.
I know this will be a tough fight – the million dollars in attacks have already proved that. But with a strong grassroots team, I know we can win this race and continue delivering for families across mid-Michigan.
[**So please, will you add your name to endorse my re-election campaign today? Every signature helps us show the strength of this grassroots movement.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117523924/576767725/1894006211?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGMxODU4NC0yZGFjLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KA5leTwDzNzJyUv9vk4lm4xMtejH4Grn4iNqg82_Xo8=&emci=0e83b72d-5fab-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=a4c18584-2dac-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=27257697)
| [Add your name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117523925/576767726/1894006211?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGMxODU4NC0yZGFjLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KA5leTwDzNzJyUv9vk4lm4xMtejH4Grn4iNqg82_Xo8=&emci=0e83b72d-5fab-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=a4c18584-2dac-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=27257697)
---

clean_body: | Friend, Last weekend, I sent around an email asking you to I’m truly grateful to the hundreds of folks who've signed on already. But according to our records, we haven’t seen your signature come through just yet. We’re building this re-election campaign from the ground up, and every signature plays a crucial part. It sends a powerful message – one that says we’re strong, ready to fight, and here to win for mid-Michiganers everywhere. | | Thank you, Kristen P.S. I’ve attached my original message below. I look forward to receiving \------ Forwarded Message ------ From: Kristen McDonald Rivet Date: Sun, October 12, 2025 at 9:15 AM Subject: Small request Hi there – this is a different type of email than I usually send. I’m not asking for a donation. Instead, I’m asking you to personally endorse my re-election campaign for Congress. With our race shaping up to be one of the most competitive in the country, your endorsement would send a powerful message that we’ve got the grassroots strength to win. | Adding your name is quick, and it means a lot. It’s a reminder of the strong grassroots team we’re building together – and that strength is especially important today. Right now, MAGA Republicans are pushing an agenda that would double health care costs for working families and slash programs like Medicaid and SNAP – making it harder for millions of families to make ends meet. My job is to push back against those cuts and fight for a budget that actually supports working families and ends this shutdown. That’s also a reminder of why this seat matters so much. MI-08 is one of the most competitive districts in the country. What happens here could be the deciding factor in who holds the gavel in Congress – and whether we move forward with policies that lower costs for working people or slide backward to protect the wealthy and well-connected. I know this will be a tough fight – the million dollars in attacks have already proved that. But with a strong grassroots team, I know we can win this race and continue delivering for families across mid-Michigan. | Thanks for being in this fight, Kristen | We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Thank you for supporting Kristen McDonald Rivet for Congress! Kristen for Michigan P.O. Box 854 Bay City, MI 48707 United States

name: Dan Goldman
subject: The American people will never bow down to Donald Trump.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York**
body:
|
#
---
Donald Trump thinks he’s above the law, Peter. And unfortunately, the Supreme Court agreed with him. **But in America, we have no kings. And the American people will never bow down to Donald Trump.** That’s why I’m taking to the streets today, alongside tens of thousands of my fellow New Yorkers, and millions of our fellow Americans across the country, in what looks to be one of the largest protests in our country’s history. Together, we’re going to make it clear: Donald Trump is not a king, and he never will be. **[If you agree, can you chip in to help me continue standing up to this administration today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117523962/576767934/-2144685249?refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251018_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTEzNWFiMy0yZGFjLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_vlnAupG4yeWaHhWbyDGQdpLMGjXhj0HjJ0dC9W0haQ=)** Today’s protests will be a huge show of strength for our belief in democracy and our opposition to Donald Trump’s authoritarian agenda — but Trump and his far-right allies are already setting the stage to silence and dismiss the American people. All week, they’ve tried to change the narrative by calling peaceful protestors “terrorists.” Our founders created our constitutional republic to be the opposite of the British monarchy they rebelled against. As a democracy, we’re supposed to have presidents who lead us — Republicans and Democrats — not kings who rule over us. But that’s not how Donald Trump sees it. He’s spending his time lining his own pockets and using federal law enforcement to attack his political enemies. He’s acting like the king of an authoritarian state, not the president of a democracy. **[If you’re ready to join me in fighting back, please: chip in to my grassroots campaign to help flip the House blue, win back New York for Democrats, and elect leaders who will fearlessly stand up to Trump’s agenda.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117523963/576767935/-2144685249?refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251018_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTEzNWFiMy0yZGFjLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_vlnAupG4yeWaHhWbyDGQdpLMGjXhj0HjJ0dC9W0haQ=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117523964/576767936/-2144685249?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251018_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTEzNWFiMy0yZGFjLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_vlnAupG4yeWaHhWbyDGQdpLMGjXhj0HjJ0dC9W0haQ=)

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: I know this team is not intimidated by hard work
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
We have to make each day left in this campaign count.
#

Hey friend, it’s Mark Kelly. My friend Abigail Spanberger is running for Governor in Virginia and needs our help. I hope you’ll read the message below from her, and [**rush a split donation between Abigail's campaign and mine.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-spanberger.-WPYmU&refcode=em251018-1-90&t=1&akid=6219%2E6688874%2EhSrFdA)
---
[](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-spanberger.-WPYmU&refcode=em251018-1-90&refcode2=6219.6688874.hSrFdA&t=2&akid=6219%2E6688874%2EhSrFdA)
---
Team, we have less than three weeks to go until Election Day!
I'm the only Democrat in the country who can flip a Governor's seat blue, and we're in the homestretch now. [**Before I lay out all we're doing to win the biggest race of 2025, will you consider splitting a contribution between my campaign and Mark Kelly to power our work?](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-spanberger.-WPYmU&refcode=em251018-1-90&t=3&akid=6219%2E6688874%2EhSrFdA)**
**[DONATE NOW](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-spanberger.-WPYmU&refcode=em251018-1-90&t=4&akid=6219%2E6688874%2EhSrFdA)**
Since launching this campaign, I have visited communities all across the Commonwealth — from Farmville to Fairfax, Richmond to Roanoke — to hear directly from Virginians about the challenges they face.
_And that's informed what we communicate and how we spend our resources._
My opponent, Winsome Earle-Sears, has shown she's in lockstep with Trump's agenda. She downplayed the White House laying off thousands of Virginia workers by saying, "don't fret." And she boasted that Trump's disastrous tax law does "so many great things." _We're talking about a policy that cuts $1 trillion from Medicaid and slashes resources for public schools here._
I've given voters my word: **As Governor, I will always put them first and stand up to the chaos coming out of Washington.**
That's why I have announced my plans to grow our workforce and raise the minimum wage, to reduce the cost of childcare, and to make life more affordable from health care and prescription drugs to housing costs and utility bills.
With the limited time left in this campaign, I'm counting on a surge of grassroots donations to:
✅ Visit every corner of Virginia.
✅ Reach undecided voters with ads and counter the GOP's attacks.
✅ Build the largest organizing operation our Commonwealth's ever seen.
It's a major undertaking, but I know this team is not intimidated by hard work. No matter what the National Republicans throw at us, we'll be ready to respond.
[**Everything depends on us raising what we need from grassroots donors. So, I'm asking: will you pitch in $3 or more to my campaign and Mark Kelly to help us win on November 4th and in the years ahead?**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-spanberger.-WPYmU&refcode=em251018-1-90&t=5&akid=6219%2E6688874%2EhSrFdA)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your split contribution to Mark Kelly and Abigail Spanberger instantly._
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1396?c0=mek-em-spanberger.zHJuKU&refcode=em251018-1-90&t=24&akid=6219%2E6688874%2EhSrFdA)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1397?c0=mek-em-spanberger.AAXn6b&refcode=em251018-1-90&t=25&akid=6219%2E6688874%2EhSrFdA)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1390?c0=mek-em-spanberger.4DhUWQ&refcode=em251018-1-90&t=26&akid=6219%2E6688874%2EhSrFdA)**

I'm grateful to have you on my team,
Abigail Spanberger

name: Mark Warner
subject: It’s been the greatest honor of my life to serve Virginia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:

name: Breaking:
subject: Boebert refuses to return Ponzi Scheme campaign funds
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado
body:
Despite calls from Georgia’s Republican Secretary of State Brad Raffensperger for Boebert and other recipients to return the money, Boebert’s just released FEC Q3 filings show the stolen money.
| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nVGjM8bDpRxtfmQfAsuRjQZk2pURqJW21sqcyfqHUis4vnIl4A_hfeezclYhXtibknGdi0085PvA25mlAMrmdgCZNytUUFyK9V5MaRZplqwVgQYSIsKb5-3hEPTjbyGb6hSsXLYfvnSk277SrC9sDKOvIzsfwZyvCAhzs7RzTPGYrSCBUeO892J6AJ9Qog6kGzIaviATn5Q_oFg6-LPoV6_gNKqGtX6C&c=qE-7oYeN6EMUYRMRiYSi7ajHr6te6mig4bbUTQz7qN_dytJWPmnNfA==&ch=K-XIQi4Ajhk7SkF9U8UUUoJb5xk9W860pu4R4F644aiGplCJCoKbdQ==)
---
|

Peter,
Desperation. There's no other way to describe it.
Since this Summer Congresswoman Lauren Boebert has been embroiled in the fallout of a massive ponzi scheme that stole millions from hundreds of families across the nation and pumped it into her campaign.
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nVGjM8bDpRxtfmQfAsuRjQZk2pURqJW21sqcyfqHUis4vnIl4A_hfeezclYhXtibknGdi0085PvA25mlAMrmdgCZNytUUFyK9V5MaRZplqwVgQYSIsKb5-3hEPTjbyGb6hSsXLYfvnSk277SrC9sDKOvIzsfwZyvCAhzs7RzTPGYrSCBUeO892J6AJ9Qog6kGzIaviATn5TxiSornxymlbf-F0QuNSdn&c=qE-7oYeN6EMUYRMRiYSi7ajHr6te6mig4bbUTQz7qN_dytJWPmnNfA==&ch=K-XIQi4Ajhk7SkF9U8UUUoJb5xk9W860pu4R4F644aiGplCJCoKbdQ==)
---
Brant Frost IV, a MAGA businessman from Georgia, was caught running a ponzi scheme that bilked over 300 investors out of at least $140 million. Hundreds of thousands in proceeds from this scheme were funneled to key MAGA Congressional figures like Boebert.
Despite calls from Georgia's Republican Secretary of State Brad Raffensperger for Boebert and other recipients to return the money, Boebert's just released FEC Q3 filings show that the stolen money still sits in her campaign coffers.
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nVGjM8bDpRxtfmQfAsuRjQZk2pURqJW21sqcyfqHUis4vnIl4A_hfeezclYhXtibknGdi0085PvA25mlAMrmdgCZNytUUFyK9V5MaRZplqwVgQYSIsKb5-3hEPTjbyGb6hSsXLYfvnSk277SrC9sDKOvIzsfwZyvCAhzs7RzTPGYrSCBUeO892J6AJ9Qog6kGzIaviATn5QGZ0IrqcZnuSG1Ml7WuPKS&c=qE-7oYeN6EMUYRMRiYSi7ajHr6te6mig4bbUTQz7qN_dytJWPmnNfA==&ch=K-XIQi4Ajhk7SkF9U8UUUoJb5xk9W860pu4R4F644aiGplCJCoKbdQ==)
---
Why won't she budge on returning the stolen funds? Her campaign finances give us the answer. Her campaign is nearly broke.
Roiled by scandal after scandal and in a new district where she is deeply unpopular, Boebert just recorded her lowest ever fundraising quarter with an abysmal $110,000 raised from July 1 to September 30th.
She can't afford to lose a cent even if it means making the victims of a vicious ponzi scheme whole.
Like a rotting shack, if a strong opponent can kick in the door, the whole structure will come tumbling down. Trisha Calvarese, her Democratic challenger, just outraised her 5 to 1 this past quarter. We can send her campaign crashing down but we need your support to do it.
[Can we count on you to chip in $25, $10, or even $5, to get the Trisha Calvarese campaign the firepower we are going to need to collapse Boebert's campaign and bring real leadership to Colorado's 4th congressional district?](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nVGjM8bDpRxtfmQfAsuRjQZk2pURqJW21sqcyfqHUis4vnIl4A_hfeezclYhXtibknGdi0085PvA25mlAMrmdgCZNytUUFyK9V5MaRZplqwVgQYSIsKb5-3hEPTjbyGb6hSsXLYfvnSk277SrC9sDKOvIzsfwZyvCAhzs7RzTPGYrSCBUeO892J6AJ9Qog6kGzIaviATn5QfXrfGGWHmeyjfd8sdQpoK&c=qE-7oYeN6EMUYRMRiYSi7ajHr6te6mig4bbUTQz7qN_dytJWPmnNfA==&ch=K-XIQi4Ajhk7SkF9U8UUUoJb5xk9W860pu4R4F644aiGplCJCoKbdQ==)

clean_body: Despite calls from Georgia’s Republican Secretary of State Brad Raffensperger for Boebert and other recipients to return the money, Boebert’s just released FEC Q3 filings show the stolen money. | | | | | == | Peter, Desperation. There's no other way to describe it. Since this Summer Congresswoman Lauren Boebert has been embroiled in the fallout of a massive ponzi scheme that stole millions from hundreds of families across the nation and pumped it into her campaign. | == Brant Frost IV, a MAGA businessman from Georgia, was caught running a ponzi scheme that bilked over 300 investors out of at least $140 million. Hundreds of thousands in proceeds from this scheme were funneled to key MAGA Congressional figures like Boebert. Despite calls from Georgia's Republican Secretary of State Brad Raffensperger for Boebert and other recipients to return the money, Boebert's just released FEC Q3 filings show that the stolen money still sits in her campaign coffers. | == Why won't she budge on returning the stolen funds? Her campaign finances give us the answer. Her campaign is nearly broke. Roiled by scandal after scandal and in a new district where she is deeply unpopular, Boebert just recorded her lowest ever fundraising quarter with an abysmal $110,000 raised from July 1 to September 30th. She can't afford to lose a cent even if it means making the victims of a vicious ponzi scheme whole. Like a rotting shack, if a strong opponent can kick in the door, the whole structure will come tumbling down. Trisha Calvarese, her Democratic challenger, just outraised her 5 to 1 this past quarter. We can send her campaign crashing down but we need your support to do it. == If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | == | == | == | | | == | == | == | Thank you in advance for your support. subject: 2025’s biggest race now has astronomical implications

body:
The stakes of November 4th’s Pennsylvania Supreme Court retention election were already high enough, but now with this decision looming—they’re astronomical.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QZXfss1BlQNx6a_pzsi8s6yR5Ty_Rgt5Yw6jF499PoGayImMvEJ5FJMbSoxIuYAp2awYn3nzZENve6Mv5GK_E6D0qaEfwUre97a--RsK5bzyuwqDpNaspy6skqB5fLmLbaBMOL0KgZhiqAkwNrpSogYxvSsIbsIMzOjzcN-3TB494iLWeOmnwgT8HXzpMnYHZjn8UYoCj5B1T51y-xqOkiel4hNfYsHRIIEg_5SrrM4=&c=cz_eDpOPGwNpLLqWrxmEvymVoVGe77fXxBo6HajdN8254RrQ8WQ6Zg==&ch=8wFvKxw1n0v68loBzLxE_rBWiHY-s8eiYcaKiRiMI52__aCN0lHEFw==)
---
| Peter,
Just days ago, the MAGA controlled U.S. Supreme Court signalled they would strike down a key portion of the Voting Rights Act that prevented state legislatures from drawing Congressional districts that discriminate on the basis of race.
If the U.S. Supreme Court strikes this down, it will unleash hell across America--allowing GOP controlled state legislatures to draw some of the most gerrymandered maps you could even think of, silencing the voices of minorities and giving MAGA an extreme advantage in upcoming elections.
---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QZXfss1BlQNx6a_pzsi8s6yR5Ty_Rgt5Yw6jF499PoGayImMvEJ5FJMbSoxIuYAp2awYn3nzZENve6Mv5GK_E6D0qaEfwUre97a--RsK5bzyuwqDpNaspy6skqB5fLmLbaBMOL0KgZhiqAkwNrpSogYxvSsIbsIMzOjzcN-3TB494iLWeOmnwgT8HXzpMnYHZjn8UYoCj5B1T51y-xqOkueJxcUh3rZOtDHXdzxJxX8=&c=cz_eDpOPGwNpLLqWrxmEvymVoVGe77fXxBo6HajdN8254RrQ8WQ6Zg==&ch=8wFvKxw1n0v68loBzLxE_rBWiHY-s8eiYcaKiRiMI52__aCN0lHEFw==)
---
| | | | But MAGA's gerrymandering scheme only works under one condition: that they have control over the State Supreme Courts who have the ultimate say on the constitutionality of Congressional maps -- making State Supreme Courts the last line of defense against MAGA's election rigging scheme.
The stakes of November 4th's Pennsylvania Supreme Court retention election were already high enough, but now with this decision looming--they're astronomical.
MAGA has launched an all out blitz to try and topple the Democratic majority on the court. If they seize this court and the U.S. Supreme Court strikes down the Voting Rights Act, they'll be able to gerrymander PA into oblivion, all but eliminating PA Democrats from the House of Representative and rigging the 2026 midterms so Democrats don't even have a prayer of winning back the House.
They're so hellbent on winning this race that this election is already the most expensive retention election ever, and it may even reach Presidential election spending levels.
Defend Our Courts is on the ground and on the airwaves in PA, trying to hold the line against MAGA's onslaught. With a warchest of over 3 million dollars and nearly 60,000 Democratic donors on our side, we are one of the largest Democratic organizations in this race.
But with 17 days until election day, MAGA is still outspending us 10-1. And with the stakes now higher than ever, we desperately need more Democrats to rally to our side or Democrats will lose the 2026 midterms before a single vote is cast.
[Please, will you rush a donation of $50, $25, or whatever you can spare to help Defend Our Courts stop MAGA's election rigging scheme?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QZXfss1BlQNx6a_pzsi8s6yR5Ty_Rgt5Yw6jF499PoGayImMvEJ5FJMbSoxIuYApv1aemTc6ZmSqDbRy5MnEf_Ac5cvqz7oJxw1dLu3xR4eaqaPgVKxZX4lm_MV0ex06Y2izMNhQTNaQ9iz3qmiR1BDiPb7QRoH4t18Lmc7mDRjeiTYdYtlbRnk899VMuztOnLVwKUE05p0U6-dcHAx1-vEzXVZtdm4d2TkhGomQcOIxrGqQLBJmog==&c=cz_eDpOPGwNpLLqWrxmEvymVoVGe77fXxBo6HajdN8254RrQ8WQ6Zg==&ch=8wFvKxw1n0v68loBzLxE_rBWiHY-s8eiYcaKiRiMI52__aCN0lHEFw==)

If the U.S. Supreme Court strikes this down, it will unleash hell across America--allowing GOP controlled state legislatures to draw some of the most gerrymandered maps you could even think of, silencing the voices of minorities and giving MAGA an extreme advantage in upcoming elections. | == | | | | But MAGA's gerrymandering scheme only works under one condition: that they have control over the State Supreme Courts who have the ultimate say on the constitutionality of Congressional maps -- making State Supreme Courts the last line of defense against MAGA's election rigging scheme. The stakes of November 4th's Pennsylvania Supreme Court retention election were already high enough, but now with this decision looming--they're astronomical. MAGA has launched an all out blitz to try and topple the Democratic majority on the court. If they seize this court and the U.S. Supreme Court strikes down the Voting Rights Act, they'll be able to gerrymander PA into oblivion, all but eliminating PA Democrats from the House of Representative and rigging the 2026 midterms so Democrats don't even have a prayer of winning back the House. They're so hellbent on winning this race that this election is already the most expensive retention election ever, and it may even reach Presidential election spending levels. Defend Our Courts is on the ground and on the airwaves in PA, trying to hold the line against MAGA's onslaught. With a warchest of over 3 million dollars and nearly 60,000 Democratic donors on our side, we are one of the largest Democratic organizations in this race. But with 17 days until election day, MAGA is still outspending us 10-1. And with the stakes now higher than ever, we desperately need more Democrats to rally to our side or Democrats will lose the 2026 midterms before a single vote is cast. == | | | | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | | | | == The 2026 midterms will be won or lost this November in this obscure PA Supreme Court race. Democrats must rally or it's game over. Team Defend Our Courts | | | | | | | | | | == | | | | | == | | | | Mail checks to: | | | | Defend Our CourtsP.O. subject: Can I count on you to help us stand up to Trump's attacks?

Donald Trump attacked me on Truth Social.
_I will not be rattled._

subject: 10 ways Trump is wrecking our country >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Off the Sidelines PAC
body:
|
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117525180/576771715/-530215862?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.10.18_OTS-Adam-Schiff_B1_F1_S1_C1_90AC-NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTMzZGQ2Yy0zMGFjLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QqH1zzQjxf-HwLyKOtJYxytBpv6PctaqEXuPqVQJfJo=)
Team, this is Adam Schiff. The team at Off the Sidelines said I could reach out. I’m not going to sugarcoat it: We’re up against a movement that’s determined to tear down our democracy and a man in the White House who’ll do anything to expand his power. **[_We’ve got to keep calling out the danger — that’s why I’m reaching out today to ask you to chip in to my campaign and Off the Sidelines to help me keep fighting back against Trump’s attacks on the rule of law._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117525181/576771716/313059105?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.10.18_OTS-Adam-Schiff_B1_F1_S1_C1_90AC-NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTMzZGQ2Yy0zMGFjLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QqH1zzQjxf-HwLyKOtJYxytBpv6PctaqEXuPqVQJfJo=)** | | [ DONATE NOW >> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117525182/576771717/313059105?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.10.18_OTS-Adam-Schiff_B1_F1_S1_C1_90AC-NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTMzZGQ2Yy0zMGFjLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QqH1zzQjxf-HwLyKOtJYxytBpv6PctaqEXuPqVQJfJo=)
---
Recently, on the Senate floor, I laid out **ten ways Donald Trump is wrecking this country**. Every American should know that Trump is failing us by:
**10\. Undermining American innovation:** Trump is attacking our world-class research institutions and shutting out international talent, limiting our leadership in science, technology, and medicine.
**9\. Slashing food assistance:** He’s gutting the supplemental nutrition programs that keep millions of American families healthy and ensure our kids don’t go to bed hungry.
**8\. Abandoning our allies:** Trump is weakening our international partnerships, cozying up with dictators, and making America less safe.
**7\. Sabotaging renewable energy:** He’s killing clean energy projects, ceding global renewable energy leadership to China, raising utility bills, and making us more dependent on fossil fuels.
**6\. Damaging public health:** He’s slashing funding for the National Institutes of Health (NIH) and key research programs, meaning cures will be delayed, clinical trials will end, and life-saving care will be harder to access.
**5\. Crippling essential services with DOGE cuts:** From Social Security to wildfire response to public education, Trump is making major funding cuts without worrying about the impact on families, seniors, and kids across the country who will be hurt.
**4\. Tanking the economy with tariffs:** His trade wars are driving up the costs of everyday goods like clothes and groceries while alienating our allies.
**3\. Stripping away healthcare:** Under Trump’s new budget, millions of Americans will lose healthcare coverage. Many rural clinics and hospitals will be forced to close, and all of our healthcare costs will go up.
**2\. Undermining the rule of law:** Trump has been treating the Department of Justice (DOJ) as his own personal political weapon, using it to shield his allies and target his enemies.
**1\. Threatening the very idea of America:** He’s eroding the values that built this country: self-governance, equality, and the belief that no one is above the law — not even the president.
I know this is a lot. And overcoming it will be hard, especially in the near term when they control everything. But we will take back the government and put an end to this madness.
The GOP is trying to flood the zone so that we’re too overwhelmed to act. But I also know that we’re not powerless, and that we can come together, organize, mobilize, and take our country back from Trump.
**[_If you’re with me, I hope you’ll make a contribution to me and Off the Sidelines today._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117525183/576771718/313059105?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.10.18_OTS-Adam-Schiff_B1_F1_S1_C1_90AC-NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTMzZGQ2Yy0zMGFjLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QqH1zzQjxf-HwLyKOtJYxytBpv6PctaqEXuPqVQJfJo=)**

body:
#
We know it’s the weekend, so we’ll keep it short.
Tonight at 11:59 PM is our deadline for the $25,000 goal we’ve set for this week.
**We’re still $7,500 short, but with your support we’ll be able to close the gap.**
**[Will you chip in by 11:59 PM to make sure we hit our goal?](https://act.timwalz.com/go/73?c0=em_tw_20251018.u_3Zbm&amount=5&refcode=em20251018-15&t=1&akid=15%2E34582%2ET6L51M)**

Under Governor Walz’s leadership, Minnesota is showing the world what’s possible when we come together with grit, compassion, and a shared sense of purpose.
We secured free school meals for every student, cut child poverty, passed Paid Family Leave, delivered record investments in education, and more.
**[Now we need your help to stop MAGA Republicans from dragging us backward. Pitch in $5 today to help us win this race and keep moving forward — together.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_tw_footer?refcode=em20251018-15&t=21&refcode2=15_34582_T6L51M&akid=15%2E34582%2ET6L51M)**

We’re still $7,500 short, but with your support we’ll be able to close the gap. Under Governor Walz’s leadership, Minnesota is showing the world what’s possible when we come together with grit, compassion, and a shared sense of purpose. name: Patriot Cigars
subject: NEW PATRIOT PACK with ACCESSORIES
body:
** NEW PATRIOT PACK
------------------------------------------------------------
INCLUDES: TRAVEL CASE, CUTTER & CIGARS!

The Patriot Pack — Smoke for the Bold and the Free

Stand tall and light up freedom with The Patriot Pack from Patriot Cigar Company — a powerful lineup built for true American patriots. Featuring The “Pledge” Premium Leather 3-Cigar Travel Case, the Old Glory Cigar Cutter, and three powerhouse blends — TNT, MOAB, and Sidewinder — this set is your all-American arsenal of premium, hand-rolled cigars. Crafted for quality. Fueled by liberty. Made for those who never back down.
https://mypatriotcigars.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3ea77f33fc36dd7515163e71c&id=ecabea8db4&e=fbf55fa623

**
------------------------------------------------------------

** The Patriot Pack
A Bold Salute to Liberty
------------------------------------------------------------

Raise your colors high — the Patriot Pack from Patriot Cigar Company is the ultimate tribute to freedom, made for those who stand proud. This isn’t just a cigar set; it’s a declaration, a statement, and a smoke-filled salute to the red, white, and blue.

** Included Inside the Patriot Pack
------------------------------------------------------------

**
“The Pledge” Premium Leather 3-Cigar Travel Case
------------------------------------------------------------

Carry your cigars in patriotic style. This rugged yet elegant case is crafted in premium printed leather with the pledge of allegiance, built to safeguard your Patriot Cigars while projecting staunch American pride. Designed for travel, with room for three cigars up to a 60-ring size and a secure closure, it’s more than storage—it’s armor for your freedom smoke.

** Old Glory Cigar Cutter
------------------------------------------------------------

No patriot’s toolkit is complete without a sharp edge. The Old Glory Cigar Cutter is a dual-blade instrument worthy of the name. It slices clean and precise, honoring the flag with every snip (and making sure your draw is perfect).
------------------------------------------------------------

** The Finest Blends Under the Flag
------------------------------------------------------------

** TNT
------------------------------------------------------------

Explosive in flavor and bold in character, TNT is a powerhouse medium to full blend that commands your attention. From first light to the last ember, it burns with authority.

** MOAB (Mother of All Bombs)
------------------------------------------------------------

MOAB delivers a full-bodied punch, a maduro cigar that lives up to its name. Deep, rich, and intense — this is not for the faint of heart but for the true patriot who demands maximum firepower in flavor.

** Sidewinder
------------------------------------------------------------

Sleek, swift, and sly — the Sidewinder rounds out the pack with a medium blend that strikes with finesse. Balanced, bold, and full of character, it’s the curveball every patriotic smoker needs.

The Patriot Pack doesn’t stop there, you’ll also get a Patriot-branded beverage koozie, coaster, sticker, and patch—because every smoke session deserves a touch of American pride.
------------------------------------------------------------

** Why the Patriot Pack Matters
------------------------------------------------------------

This is not merely a sampler or gift set. The Patriot Pack is your on-demand arsenal of American spirit and premium craftsmanship. It’s a perfect companion for travel, a striking gift for fellow flag-bearers, or your own daily reminder that freedom is worth celebrating — one premium puff at a time.

Light up The Patriot Pack. Puff with pride. And let the smoke carry your pledge to liberty.

** Uncompromising Quality, Made for Patriots
------------------------------------------------------------

At Patriot Cigar Company, every cigar is handcrafted in Estelí, Nicaragua, using premium-aged tobacco (aged a minimum of three years). Our blends were born from the desire to bring together the love of premium smokes and the love of our country, forging a brand built on passion and pride.

** NEW PREMIUM
8 CIGAR SAMPLER PACK
------------------------------------------------------------
USE PROMO CODE: EAGLE FOR 20% OFF CIGARS
Experience true American freedom with 8 bold, premium cigars—including the gold-wrapped MOGUL and exclusive Operation Never Tell—only available in the Patriot Cigar Company Premium Sampler Pack.

Cigars Included

1xMOAB
1xTNT
1xMARK48
1xHellfire
1xSidewinder
1xSidewinder Maduro
1x24K Gold Wrapped Mogul
1xLimited Release Unbanded Operation Never Tell

https://mypatriotcigars.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3ea77f33fc36dd7515163e71c&id=88020a03c5&e=fbf55fa623
https://mypatriotcigars.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3ea77f33fc36dd7515163e71c&id=17862865db&e=fbf55fa623

For the true American cigar patriot, this is the ultimate way to experience the full power, pride, and craftsmanship behind Patriot Cigar Company. The Premium Sampler Pack delivers 8 premium cigars that represent the heart and soul of our lineup—crafted for those who believe in freedom, hard work, and savoring every damn moment.

You’ll receive all 6 flagship blends that built our reputation for bold flavor and uncompromising quality, plus two standouts that make this sampler truly elite: the 24Kt Gold-Wrapped MOGUL, a cigar that radiates luxury and dominance with every draw, and the Limited Release Operation Never Tell—a 5.5×50 Maduro Robusto shrouded in mystery. We’re not revealing the tobaccos inside, but trust us—it’s smooth, powerful, and absolutely unforgettable. Operation Never Tell is exclusive to this pack, and once these are gone, they’re gone.

The Premium Sampler Pack doesn’t stop there. Alongside your 8 cigars, you’ll get a Patriot-branded beverage koozie, coaster, sticker, and patch—because every smoke session deserves a touch of American pride.

8 Cigars. 1 Mission. 100% Patriot.
Light up, lean back, and let freedom burn.
NEW CIGAR LIMITED RELEASE
"OPERATION NEVER TELL"

The Unbanded Limited Release Operation Never Tell—a 5.5×50 Maduro Robusto shrouded in mystery. We’re not revealing the tobaccos inside, but trust us—it’s smooth, powerful, and absolutely unforgettable. Operation Never Tell is exclusive to the Premium Sampler Pack available at MYPATRIOTCIGARS.COM (https://mypatriotcigars.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3ea77f33fc36dd7515163e71c&id=41f792bcb6&e=fbf55fa623) , and once these are gone, they’re gone.

Don't miss this cigar!

NEW CIGAR ACCESSORIES!
https://mypatriotcigars.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3ea77f33fc36dd7515163e71c&id=d65a7a4402&e=fbf55fa623
https://mypatriotcigars.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3ea77f33fc36dd7515163e71c&id=5dce4f6e44&e=fbf55fa623
https://mypatriotcigars.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3ea77f33fc36dd7515163e71c&id=d171b40411&e=fbf55fa623
https://mypatriotcigars.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3ea77f33fc36dd7515163e71c&id=ef6ad5828d&e=fbf55fa623
https://mypatriotcigars.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3ea77f33fc36dd7515163e71c&id=015cbe4ee2&e=fbf55fa623

** FREE Shipping On Orders Over $100.00
------------------------------------------------------------

name: Letitia James
subject: Trump is trying to silence me – but I won't back down
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY 2026
body:
Let's show Donald Trump that we won't back down!
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117527697/576778010/-2022258813?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk2162-su-react&refcode=jtk2162-su-react&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzY2YTcxZi0zM2FjLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Uk4DFFvIAIFcaV8UVnLw8uy__VtZJ7uU0MQNR6aDIRo=)
---
Peter, Donald Trump and his allies think they can silence me.

What they don't know is that I've never backed down from fighting for what's right – and I'm not about to start now.
They believe their baseless charges can undo the hard-won progress we've achieved for New Yorkers and for Americans across the country. But here's the truth: They wouldn't be targeting me if we weren’t successfully standing in the way of their unconstitutional agenda.
**And it’s thanks to the unwavering support of this fearless team that we’ve proven Trump liable for fraud, blocked many of his administration’s most dangerous policies, and stood up for those whose voices too often go unheard.**
**[Yes, our movement is strong because of folks like you – but this fight is just beginning. And I need to know that you're standing with me. name: Senator Maggie W. Hassan
subject: About my son, Ben:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
This is Maggie Hassan. I’m outraged.

I’ll tell you why: RFK Jr. continues to push radical conspiracy theories, dangerous anti-vaccine rhetoric, and attacks on folks with disabilities.

I got my start in public service as an advocate, helping to ensure that folks like my son, Ben — who was born with cerebral palsy — would have the same opportunities that all parents want for their children. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117528412/576780061/1734447991?amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.10.18_Ben-New_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP-NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNmEzOGMxOS0zM2FjLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MAvzbOTKvJfBbLBDJ56Hl7Z4mz2bU_1QBsYunYCrHJ0=) Now, with extremists like Donald Trump and RFK Jr. attacking key rights and protections for people with disabilities, that mission is more important than ever. They’re attempting to undo the progress we’ve made — slashing Medicaid and planning cuts to Social Security, disability grant programs, and affordable housing access.

I’m not afraid of RFK Jr. I’ll continue going head-to-head with him in the Senate, but I need your support:

name: Troy Downing
subject: When I started my first business, I prayed it would be successful... God answered.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
When I was deployed to Afghanistan, I prayed my family would be safe... God answered.

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTUwJmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MTAxOF9FRy1OQS4xMTAxMTdfdDE3MzA5NDEtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTEwMThfRUctTkEuMTEwMTE3X3QxNzMwOTQxLTI4OTkifQ/tl6whqGnVzCfm5QQri05bw)God works in mysterious ways...
When I started my first business, I prayed it would be successful... **God answered.**
When I was deployed to Afghanistan, I prayed my family would be safe... **God answered.**
When I saw career politicians turn their backs on Americans to put their pet projects before the interest of the American people, I prayed for a better outcome...
I was surprised when **_God called on ME_** to run for office.
I'm Troy Downing. You might not recognize my name, but that's okay.
I'm a combat veteran. A God-fearing Christian. A husband & a proud dad.
**[I'm also the Republican running for re-election in Congress for Montana in the biggest race in the country.](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTUwJmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MTAxOF9FRy1OQS4xMTAxMTdfdDE3MzA5NDEtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTEwMThfRUctTkEuMTEwMTE3X3QxNzMwOTQxLTI4OTkifQ/JQNT8RCJubovrUVkYV9qjg)**
I'm not in this to become a household name or for the title. I don't care about any of that.
I'm a simple man who enjoys a beer, likes to hunt and fish with my buddies & puts my family before anything else.
**__But I'm at my wits' end with two-faced politicians and DC bigwigs who say one thing to your face, only to turn around & stab hard-working folks like you & me in the back.__**
I'll always tell the truth. I'll always put America first. I'll always stand up for what's right.
The Radical Left will spread lies about me & throw me under the bus just to end my campaign before the midterms.
**[Peter, can you take a leap of faith on a simple combat vet like me to beat the Left & save our country?](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTUwJmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MTAxOF9FRy1OQS4xMTAxMTdfdDE3MzA5NDEtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTEwMThfRUctTkEuMTEwMTE3X3QxNzMwOTQxLTI4OTkifQ/s8tmsu8QdVIAm9EBzYo2NQ)**[HELP A COMBAT VET
](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTUwJmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MTAxOF9FRy1OQS4xMTAxMTdfdDE3MzA5NDEtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTEwMThfRUctTkEuMTEwMTE3X3QxNzMwOTQxLTI4OTkifQ/OogrBtmzmuZl_3_dC82Vug)I know if we win this race, we can bring the entire Democrat Machine to its knees.
Thank you & God Bless,
Troy Downing (R-MT)| |

subject: We wanted to be the first to share…
body:
---
Hi Derek, we’re reaching out this morning to share some important updates: As of this morning, over 610,000 voters have cast their ballots in Virginia, and hundreds of thousands of ballots have been cast in Pennsylvania and California. And early voting in New Jersey begins in just one week. **All this to say: Election Day is rapidly approaching, and we’re running out of time to reach voters before they cast their ballots. If you’ve been waiting for the right opportunity to make a donation to the DNC, we’re here to tell you this is it. You can use this link:** [**https://democrats.org/go/voter-outreach**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-october-2025?refcode=em_20251018_4923_fr&amount=7&refcode2=4945_22930333_sRVz1-&akid=4945%2E22930333%2EsRVz1-) Our team at the DNC knows that _every single vote matters_ , especially this year. That’s why we’re dedicating our time, our energy, and our efforts to connect with every single voter we possibly can in the crucial final weeks before Election Day. Polling shows Democrats in the lead in Virginia and New Jersey’s gubernatorial races in the final three weeks of the election cycle, and Trump’s approval rating has hit record lows. **_But the only poll that matters is at the ballot box.**_ When you donate to the DNC, you’re directly funding our work to elect Democrats nationwide like Abigail Spanberger and Mikie Sherrill this year, and helping us get a jump start on flipping Congress next year. [**Your $7 gift helps power our voter outreach work. If that’s worth $7 to you, please click here and make your contribution today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-october-2025?amount=7&refcode=em_20251018_4923_fr&refcode2=4945_22930333_sRVz1-&akid=4945%2E22930333%2EsRVz1-) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $7](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-october-2025?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=em_20251018_4923_fr&refcode2=4945_22930333_sRVz1-&akid=4945%2E22930333%2EsRVz1-)**

name: Team Ossoff
subject: Re: Georgia’s Senate race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
#

Peter, we know you probably didn't wake up this morning with the intention of chipping in to Jon Ossoff’s reelection campaign. But, we hope you’ll give us just a moment to explain why he needs your support today:

**FIRST:** Jon Ossoff’s seat was named by _The Hill_ as one of the top five most likely to flip in the midterms.

**THEN:** A Georgia Senate poll showed Jon statistically TIED with one of his MAGA opponents.

**NOW:** Far-right Super PACs are spending millions of dollars on TV and digital ads attacking Jon. _And we know these attacks will only ramp up as we move closer to Election Day..._

We know we can win and defend this seat, but we need you with us because grassroots donations to emails like this one are one of the top ways Jon funds his reelection campaign.
While he'd never expect you to donate to every email we send, we are hoping you’re able to pitch in this time around to push back against the right-wing megadonors and Super PACs swooping in to unseat Jon.
**[So please, Peter:If holding this Senate seat and keeping Jon Ossoff in the Senate is important to you, then chip in $5 to his reelection campaign today.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-oct25.ZBiurg&refcode=em251018-1-f-a&t=1&akid=945%2E5691347%2EORYIxH)

Thank you in advance for your support today. We simply cannot fund a winning campaign without people like you.
\- Team Ossoff

name: Eric Swalwell
subject: Join me this No Kings Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District.
https://ericswalwell.com [https://ericswalwell.com]
Hi friend,

October is Breast Cancer Awareness Month, a time to honor the brave fighters and survivors battling this disease across the country. Their courage is inspiring, and their fight deserves our full support.

But while we raise awareness, President Trump and his cabinet have slashed cancer research funding, putting countless lives at risk and undermining hope for breakthroughs and cures. Cutting billions from the National Cancer Institute and related programs is nothing short of a slap in the face to every person fighting cancer and their families.

Our nation should be investing in life-saving research, not focusing on bogus science to fit an agenda.

I’m committed to fighting back against these dangerous cuts and advocating for the funding necessary to accelerate cancer research and save lives.

I need your help to stay in the fight and keep Democrats in Congress to continue battling for funding for critical research. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Oct2025-FR-October?&refcode=E15710-20251017-BreastCancerAwarenessMonth-SL-GOP&amount=25]

Fight Back [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Oct2025-FR-October?&refcode=E15710-20251017-BreastCancerAwarenessMonth-SB-GOP&amount=25]

Together, we can make sure no politician’s budget decisions get in the way of hope and healing.

- Eric

The fight to keep men out of women's sports isn't over.
| | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. Dear Fellow American, Trauma. Addiction. Depression. Personality disorders.

This world is full of people who need a trusted person to guide them through their mental health issues.

Kaley Chiles is a licensed counselor and committed Christian. Many of Kaley's clients come to her because they share her Christian worldview and faith-based values.

But Colorado law bans counselors from having private conversations with young clients that could help them regain comfort with their God-given sex--rather than pushing them one step closer to dangerous gender-transition drugs and surgeries.

Kaley has already had to start censoring herself to avoid potential fines of $5,000 for each offense and even the loss of her license.

This law violates freedom of speech. The government has no business censoring conversations between clients and counselors.

We are working with Kaley and other counselors to stop this government censorship. We're excited the U.S. Supreme Court heard oral arguments for this case on October 7th.

Will you stand with Kaley?

Click this link to stand with Kaley Chiles and her constitutional right to speak with clients about their shared faith-based values.

[https://adflegal.org/support/chiles-case-statement/](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/UnFTsYJ9iL_93qRRllW64wXJY2JzoJbqr_h5Vz2kYyQzudOvG95MtFy--t-luhcInW-PhvjAeahdJ4xnmZfkYoR-yqIX-9OzHN678OJwla1SdjUCFQXDxzvbYD_-rYH1Bg5FcpiOXrucDsLM-UUHX_f3pbIoErdAQhBv7MXXA80wenYuGzewyCsEGuS305AXs1gh3eMUpPKh-5YQuBWzuDlFyaM1Zx46UEdPqhOvY4BTgdK5E8gmv-GxiwLCvZqw4BojqeoZxcsIX-wO8ct8nYYhepX2Ea43BucV0siyKDWTY1G4Tt9cmRGxOH7LRySZLSAU2IJJnAjh1PC4DVsjeT6gEKPnNIPGwLOUFsFTvE8AE6uin3GcacZDgmkaMq21U4n1OEC0dRsv49k2vLJRRIgJCFTwVuFIjMTnrI3nBNWtIcIeCwE6NtYPgPPIQ1gJqTXm86Bcu7TmFSNeZNLw-Nt9j6M7upJzk-din9FtOTb0ce__7T8JhSKAULcaVBjJlPyKYUmJI5qCrWaSmduPsDbK-80860MvFXMzirluUp-j7gkBiumqyT6rX5Hitg2EX77MG0h2RA_HHdsCSozvSd7a5PfE5E0geZU-fNEFveXBBPqecG983lwo22CzmHRK4A9tPTQcQdNILaJ_1LVA76BLhJqkI3loxbILcz3Pkj4oCznu43DhAigOstA6FBQypL7sjrkYP2499dLz5ZL15QpYLNJ3Z1DjDB3hO7LZwAC_7S5d-IrGkXlq1Rwf1SMcaVj390-0eJRsn2v_jmJZMIYQUBqjQw5Yx-6NHk43FqKjQM2gcqTFcQVUHdXDNppXshcb-7mR91M-Ijb7iqCSMK88ktAsXRPqDDIUiSwdmvELRAXVZvKKD7Knr3Yb9SDDwnnCVMxXQxqI0VLDKnbM9Btkq4fkDkQcOddNIrhTCxh3yMgbKkjN0v8fG1qrDypZJ67j1VVWjKKrv4khQREZqxoUqYZmQYtCGZn5JEY-XhXyF5OvF3kiyEMmnYl-_KCEBL3d7VTSYGp7I6ROVD2M3pmgCM65J4lz_GtXzhPuLTWFwHS6XCiFks-KkIvowZBrMJ035PeOrUQp0zDA3tqp7aSShRmrFOtScfW77geMPEUJFWnRWr6_5O-UaA_FoVVoMJnWMj04olLdOPLBWudoPyFSG6N72w8-1jiR1-o/-IgKHv0DntOi9RCkolEr2PnsW0OhA5u3/14) name: The Turning Point USA Family
subject: Charlie always believed this day would come
body:
[Unsubscribe](https://trk.conservativereboot.com/?xul=zkl8p045sz1uh88qpcsbcn9r1w7b4t9vt4g91a5hk3qbmz94vqnm5mijpv5iljv3c8rwadbmkvqs61ep0ra7f9rippl303dw32es1qt99tf9c&__stmp=t4c2xl&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
---
Please read the message below from Turning Point USA.
* * *

| | | | [](https://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4c2xl&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, Even now... it still doesn't feel real that we lost Charlie. His voice, his courage, his conviction — it shaped all of us. And his vision — **to build the most faithful and the most patriotic generation in American history** — is why Turning Point USA exists today. Friend, that's why we have an inspiring update for you... In just the first seven days since Charlie was taken from all of us, Turning Point USA has received more than 54,000 requests from students who want to start or join a chapter:
---
[](https://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4c2xl&__onlt=h)
---
**God is so good.** ✝️🙏🕊️ To give you perspective, Friend... Coming into this school year, Turning Point USA had roughly 900+ college chapters and 1,200+ high school chapters. It took us years to build those chapters... over a decade in fact... _But now?_ These students who signed up? They weren't asked to... They weren't recruited... **They felt it was their time to stand up for this country and honor Charlie.** Because of the life he lived. The faith he had. The love he showed God, his family, and others. The courage he had to speak truth. And his vision of a better America for us all.
---
[](https://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4c2xl&__onlt=h)
---
He always believed this day would come. He used to talk about it all the time — how the momentum would shift, how young people would rise up with courage, and how a Turning Point USA chapter would be in every college and high school in America. And now... _It's happening._ Faster than he could have imagined. Bigger than we thought possible. And more beautiful than we can even describe. **Again, Friend, God is so good.** Since we lost Charlie, we've also felt SO MUCH love... Prayers. Emails. Messages. Stories about how Charlie's voice changed lives... or your children's or grandchildren's lives. And so many supporters have asked, _"What can I do?"_ As you read this, our team is working around the clock to follow up with every chapter request. And we're going to need help equipping them with our activism kits. **Every new chapter receives these kits from Turning Point USA with everything they need to get started — including:** ✅ Leadership materials
✅ Pocket Constitutions
✅ Chapter training tools
✅ American flags & patriotic gear Friend, I'm sure you'd believe it when we say it... _this won't be a small task._ But we're going to do it. Whatever it takes. **_For Charlie._** _And here's how YOU can help with this..._ **Every $25 you give today helps stock another activism kit — ready to deploy into a new Turning Point USA student chapter...** How many of these activism kits can you help provide to the wave of new student chapters that are just getting started?

---

---
[ **Sponsor Activism Kits**](https://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4c2xl&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, if there was ever a more immediate way you could help make Charlie's vision a reality... **This is it****.**
---
[](https://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4c2xl&__onlt=h)
---
Also... **Here's one more powerful thing you can do:** 📩 If you have a son, daughter, grandchild, niece, nephew — or any young person in your life — who wants to get involved... who wants to join or start a chapter... **Please send them this link:** **[TPUSAStudents.com/StartaChapter](https://trk.conservativereboot.com/?xtl=1wduekwl7wu15ad68y0ooyd79wq0r9i7o6mlheqsnyrtxo9g42o48lnk0gcpjwkncebgf8n3sduzt64m2ibv67a5hq9ckqhbdikd37ykoimuwvau6bnl226brta621tf90enunw6u6c6tp93&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4c2xl&__onlt=h)** Friend, if you've already given... If you've already donated... If you've already been a voice of encouragement and strength in this painful week... If you've prayed, been praying, and continue to pray... **Thank you.** We can never say it enough. If you've read this far, we want you to know this... **You're the reason Charlie's mission and vision will grow for generations to come.** God is so good.
---
**For Charlie,** -The Turning Point USA Family **P.S.** Please know, Friend, if you can't afford to help right now, all we ask for are your prayers. Charlie would have wanted you to pray first — and if that's all you can give today, _we're grateful._ But if you're able to help... if you're overjoyed to hear that students are flocking to Charlie's message and mission... Your gift today helps sustain this wave of student inspiration and gets new student chapters off the ground floor... And ensures Charlie's vision is realized faster than we all thought possible. **Every $25 you give today helps us stock another activism kit ready to deploy to a new student chapter.**

body:
This will only take one minute

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=1113%2E49239%2EQVmkur)

[](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/7106?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=3&akid=1113%2E49239%2EQVmkur)
Hi null, it’s Haley – just thinking back on my _Made in Michigan_ tour!
I had the chance to speak with so many incredible Michiganders, and each conversation reminded me why I’m running for Senate: to fight for the hardworking people who make this state great.
But I can’t talk to everyone in person, and that’s why I’m reaching out: **[Will you take 60 seconds to fill out my October Priorities Survey?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/7106?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=4&akid=1113%2E49239%2EQVmkur)**
| | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/7106?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=5&akid=1113%2E49239%2EQVmkur)
---
From rising costs to protecting Social Security to defending Michigan’s manufacturing jobs, I’ve heard a lot about what is keeping people up at night. But I genuinely want to know:**What’s on YOUR mind, null?**
[**We’re hoping to get 60 more responses from 18326 before midnight tonight –** can I count on you to take the survey now?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/7106?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=6&akid=1113%2E49239%2EQVmkur)
Grateful you're on this team,

Haley
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/7107?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=7&akid=1113%2E49239%2EQVmkur) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/7105?t=8&akid=1113%2E49239%2EQVmkur)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley

| Dear Friend, Governor Tim Walz says he’s “bracing” for President Trump to send National Guard troops to Minnesota. He called it “not normal.” Let me be clear: what’s not normal is Tim Walz posturing for his radical left-wing base instead of getting to work for regular Minnesotans. When violent crime surges, when communities live in fear, when liberal politicians refuse to back our police, that’s when **strong leadership is needed.** While Walz worries about “optics,” I’m worried about safety. While Walz caters to radical activists, I’m standing with President Trump and with every Minnesotan who believes we deserve safe streets, strong borders, and leaders who actually enforce the law. This is what’s at stake in 2025 and beyond. If you’re tired of weak politicians like Tim Walz bowing to chaos, I need you to stand with me today.
