name: Abdul El-Sayed
subject: We proved them wrong
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abdul for U
body:
[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=em20251018-1124&t=1001&akid=1130%2E251025%2EHBwf5F ]Abdul for US Senate [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=em20251018-1124&t=1002&akid=1130%2E251025%2EHBwf5F ]Abdul for US Senate

Peter,

When we launched this campaign, a lot of folks in Washington didn’t think
a grassroots, people-powered campaign could compete with a
corporate-backed one.

But this past quarter, we proved them wrong.

Our campaign raised $1.77 million in Q3, powered by over 23,000
contributions.

95% of those donations were less than $100.

We’re the strongest progressive campaign in this race.

The only candidate who out-raised us is bankrolled by AIPAC or corporate
PACs.

That tells you everything you need to know about what we’re up against.
But it also tells us something else: We can win this.

We’ve built a movement that doesn’t answer to corporate lobbyists or
billionaire donors — it answers to working people.

And when we raise this kind of money, it allows us to reach more voters,
build our organizing program, and share our vision for a Michigan and an
America that finally work for working people.

But it also puts a huge target on our campaign.

The establishment is already preparing to throw everything they have at
us.

They see how we’re gaining ground, and they’re scared of what it means
when working people start taking their power back.

So we can’t stop for a second, especially not when our primary date could
be three months sooner than we expected.

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20251018-1-ak.NqN6ex&amount=10&refcode=em20251018-1124&t=1004&akid=1130%2E251025%2EHBwf5F ]If you’re able, please pitch in $10 or whatever feels
right today to fuel this grassroots campaign:

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20251018-1-ak.NqN6ex&amount=10&refcode=em20251018-1124&t=1023&akid=1130%2E251025%2EHBwf5F ]Donate $10 ››

We’ve shown the doubters that this campaign is the real deal. But whether
we win this primary and go on to flip this Senate seat will come down to
what we do together in moments like this.

Thank you,

Abdul

This is the end, Peter. No, I’m not being dramatic. Please read this entire message and take action! I’m locked in the BIGGEST race of 2025. Whether I win or lose this race WILL determine the future of our nation. I’m not in the business of lying to voters and supporters, so I’m going to tell you the TRUTH. Here it is:
* My Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, has taken over $550K in donations from a George Soros-backed group and a Chinese Communist Party member! She doesn’t fight for you, me, or our nation; she’s looking out for megarich liberals and literal COMMUNISTS!
* Spanberger HID a $900K trust from voters while she was in Congress, so lying isn’t anything new for her.

---

subject: dark MAGA money flooding our judicial races
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pennsylvania Democratic Party
body:
| |
---
Peter,

**_In 2023_ , a record-breaking $19.5+ million** was spent on Pennsylvania’s Supreme Court election, the most in any judicial race!

**_Earlier this year_** , the Wisconsin Supreme Court race far surpassed that record — **over $100 million** from MAGA billionaires poured into the race.

subject: Stand with “No Kings” protestors today by helping us tell their stories.
body:
From New York to Tacoma to Kalamazoo, millions will march under one message: in America, we don’t do kings, dictators, or autocrats.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117532308/576792041/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGExNjU4YjktMzhhYy1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8uni4vVSjNzIlzir-4mJrE50SxSOzVFb4qpGkTx5UMQ=&emci=0ccb88b6-37ac-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=8a1658b9-38ac-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=14016711)
Peter,
Thank you for taking a moment to read our message. Today is an important day.
From New York to Tacoma to Kalamazoo, millions will march under one message: in America, we don’t do kings, dictators, or autocrats.
In cities big and small, patriots from every walk of life will peacefully exercise their First Amendment right to dissent and speak out against Trump and MAGA’s creeping facism.
Of course, Trump and MAGA spent most of the last week smearing these protests as “un-American.”

But we know the truth. Flags will waive, families will march together, and communities will demand accountability from Trump and MAGA for their assault on our democracy.
Courier’s local newsrooms will be out capturing it all, and in the days ahead, we want to amplify our coverage to millions in the online spaces where MAGA propaganda spreads.
Friend, we’re depending on grassroots support to help us pay for this coverage and we need your help.
**We’ve had an incredible week, but as of right now, we’re still $3,000 short of our $25,000 goal. Every dollar raised today powers our coverage — videos, stories, and eyewitness reporting that show a nation standing up, peacefully and powerfully.**
[**If you haven’t yet, please chip in whatever you can before midnight to help us cross the finish line on this historic day.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117532309/576792042/-1581427288?refcode=20251018_NK3_e&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGExNjU4YjktMzhhYy1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8uni4vVSjNzIlzir-4mJrE50SxSOzVFb4qpGkTx5UMQ=)
[Fuel our Coverage](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117532310/576792043/-1581427288?refcode=20251018_NK3_e&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGExNjU4YjktMzhhYy1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8uni4vVSjNzIlzir-4mJrE50SxSOzVFb4qpGkTx5UMQ=)
Thank you for believing that journalism — and democracy — are worth showing up for.
In solidarity,
— The COURIER Team

body:
| | | Hi -- it's Adam Schiff, DSCC Vice Chair.

**In a moment, I'm going to talk to you about something deeply important, both to me personally and to the future of our nation. But first, I have to ask:[_Will you chip in $5 right now to help flip the Senate blue and take power away from the MAGA majority as they work to enact Trump's dangerous agenda?](https://go.dscc.org/go/22085?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20251018-AdamSchiff-SchiffSpecialElection-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20251018-AdamSchiff-SchiffSpecialElection-Pros-sl1&akid=21518%2E9716520%2EpCo8JN)_**

I'm going to put it plain and simple -- **Democrats have a huge opportunity to pick up Senate seats -- including in a pair of special elections on the calendar.** We've got a chance to capture seats that wouldn't have been up for years -- and in this moment, after all that we've seen from Donald Trump and his lawless administration including this shutdown, we have to fight for every opportunity to defeat them.**

As someone who has won a special election to the Senate, I cannot emphasize enough the importance of this. Democrats only need a few seats to flip the Senate majority, and with the GOP defending more seats than they were expecting, we have a real chance to catch them flat-footed.

But we can't just sit around and cross our fingers -- **we must do what we can right now to secure the resources we need to win seats like Ohio and Florida, defend blue battleground seats across the country, pick up key seats, and defeat Trump's handpicked enablers.**

**[These special elections are among a tiny handful of races that could decide the majority, so I have to ask: Will you chip in $5 to help Democrats win key elections like these and flip the Senate majority? In critical races, every dollar counts.](https://go.dscc.org/go/22085?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20251018-AdamSchiff-SchiffSpecialElection-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20251018-AdamSchiff-SchiffSpecialElection-Pros-sl1&akid=21518%2E9716520%2EpCo8JN)**

We need your help to fight for the Senate. If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Trump accuses me of “political crimes”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=9079%2E5257348%2ENmbmf9 ]Adam Schiff for Senate

I led Trump’s first impeachment. And served on the January 6 Committee.
And in the Senate, I have worked vigorously to hold the administration
accountable for its corrupt acts.

They apparently believe I am a formidable adversary, which is why he keeps
calling for me to be prosecuted.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q42025_abs_em.dd-KUe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20251018_AM1_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=9079%2E5257348%2ENmbmf9 ]Before I dive into it, will you pitch in to help me stand up to his
attacks and hold his feet to the fire?

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q42025_abs_em.dd-KUe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20251018_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=9079%2E5257348%2ENmbmf9 ]DONATE

In the last week, he attacked me on Truth Social for leading his first
impeachment trial and said prosecutors should “look into” me.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q42025_abs_em.dd-KUe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20251018_AM1_V1_S1&t=1006&akid=9079%2E5257348%2ENmbmf9 ]Trump attack on Truth Social

Days later, he attacked me by name in a White House press conference, and
said again that prosecutors should “look into” me.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q42025_abs_em.dd-KUe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20251018_AM1_V1_S1&t=1007&akid=9079%2E5257348%2ENmbmf9 ]TRump taking reporter questions at the White House

“They have committed massive political crime. I hope they’re looking at
Shifty Schiff. I hope they’re looking at all these people. I’m allowed to
find out because in theory I’m the chief law enforcement officer. But I
have a very good, talented group... I hope they’re looking at political
crime because there’s never been so much political crime against a
political opponent as what I had to go through.”

That’s right, “political crimes.” If that sounds like the language of a
20th-century dictator, that’s probably because it is.

Subtly has never been Trump’s strong suit. And
Derek, it
should come as no surprise that he’s ramping up his attacks on me — and
the rule of law.

Trump is furious that I’ve gone after him and his administration.

Pam Bondi. Kash Patel. J.D. Vance. Trump himself.

I’ve spoken out against their corruption and their attempts to dismantle
our democracy.

And they want to try to stop me and intimidate others.

But in the wake of actions against James Comey and Letitia James —
immediately following Trump’s badgering of the Justice Department — we
can’t just chalk this up to the ramblings of a mad man. We have to treat
their threats seriously.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q42025_abs_em.dd-KUe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20251018_AM1_V1_S1&t=1008&akid=9079%2E5257348%2ENmbmf9 ]That’s where I need you,
Derek. Can you pitch in to help
me stand up to Trump’s ongoing attacks?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=q42025_abs_em.aHbpL5&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20251018_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=1009&akid=9079%2E5257348%2ENmbmf9 ]EXPRESS DONATE
$10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=q42025_abs_em.aHbpL5&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20251018_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=25&t=1010&akid=9079%2E5257348%2ENmbmf9 ]EXPRESS DONATE
$25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=q42025_abs_em.aHbpL5&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20251018_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=50&t=1011&akid=9079%2E5257348%2ENmbmf9 ]EXPRESS DONATE
$50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=q42025_abs_em.aHbpL5&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20251018_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=100&t=1012&akid=9079%2E5257348%2ENmbmf9 ]EXPRESS DONATE
$100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=q42025_abs_em.aHbpL5&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20251018_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=250&t=1013&akid=9079%2E5257348%2ENmbmf9 ]EXPRESS DONATE
$250

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q42025_abs_em.dd-KUe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20251018_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1014&akid=9079%2E5257348%2ENmbmf9 ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Thanks for always having my back.

— Adam

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q42025_abs_em.dd-KUe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20251018_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1015&akid=9079%2E5257348%2ENmbmf9 ]Adam Schiff for Senate Banner; text Schiff to 724433

name: Laura Friedman
subject: The far-right’s bigotry
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117532722/576793079/-1798313451?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjBkZDk1MTctM2FhYy1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=V3F0NRpVo14LFbm6L-PmkVlVXAHxJWIFrI0A3mgkA-Y=) Friend, This week has been another gut punch to anyone with basic decency. First, _Politico_ revealed that dozens of Young Republicans – many of whom are influential consultants and local officials – repeatedly shared homophobic, antisemitic, misogynistic, and overall disgusting remarks in their group text. Pathetically, right-wing activists – including the vice president – have rallied to their defense as “boys being boys”, and demeaned anyone expressing outrage as “pearl clutching.” **At a time when record levels of hate and antisemitism are being reported across our country, these incidents cannot be normalized, especially not _in a Congress that’s sworn to uphold the rights of every American._** Los Angeles is home to over half a million Jewish-Americans, and I will continue fighting every day so we, and all other ethnic and religious groups, can exist without fear of being targeted for simply existing. Laura | ****[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117532725/576793086/-1798313451?refcode=em-10.18.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjBkZDk1MTctM2FhYy1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=V3F0NRpVo14LFbm6L-PmkVlVXAHxJWIFrI0A3mgkA-Y=)****

clean_body: | = Friend, This week has been another gut punch to anyone with basic decency. First, Politico revealed that dozens of Young Republicans – many of whom are influential consultants and local officials – repeatedly shared homophobic, antisemitic, misogynistic, and overall disgusting remarks in their group text. Pathetically, right-wing activists – including the vice president – have rallied to their defense as “boys being boys”, and demeaned anyone expressing outrage as “pearl clutching.” At a time when record levels of hate and antisemitism are being reported across our country, these incidents cannot be normalized, especially not in a Congress that’s sworn to uphold the rights of every American. Los Angeles is home to over half a million Jewish-Americans, and I will continue fighting every day so we, and all other ethnic and religious groups, can exist without fear of being targeted for simply existing. name: Jane Fonda
subject: re: one of the most polluted zip codes in America
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
Local leadership matters more than ever in this community.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117532977/576793840/1328794144?refcode=ea.6fc8f7a1-3aac-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ms=ea.6fc8f7a1-3aac-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZmYzhmN2ExLTNhYWMtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=MOWfQ35pO1EFcdFSZmLZlj1mMg2_1_HQDBrZNxRl-XQ=&emci=6cc8f7a1-3aac-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=6fc8f7a1-3aac-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=4823105)
---
I'll never forget the smell. When I visited Commerce City for the first time, the air itself told the story. Thick refinery emissions hung over neighborhoods where children play. Families breathed invisible toxins every single day. **_Commerce City is one of the most polluted zip codes in America._** Just six miles north of Denver, it’s dominated by the Suncor refinery — a major polluter that’s contaminated the air and water for decades with almost no accountability. I've toured the neighborhoods where children are suffering from asthma and respiratory illnesses. I've met with local leaders and environmental activists like Lucy Molina, who shared what life is like for her and her neighbors — stories of health issues and a community constantly enveloped by nearby industrial sites, including the Nestlé Purina pet food factory. Despite being a "blue" state, Colorado isn't a green state. The state keeps ramping up oil and gas exports, so local leadership matters more than ever. **JanePAC isn't giving up on Commerce City. We've been investing in this community's fight for environmental justice, and we're doubling down. That's why I'm proud to share that we are endorsing three fierce Commerce City leaders — including Lucy — who are running for City Council this November.** **[These are champions who will speak truth to power and fight back against the corporate polluters poisoning their community. Will you chip in a few dollars to help us support climate champions like them all across the country?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117532978/576793841/2105508926?refcode=ea.6fc8f7a1-3aac-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ms=ea.6fc8f7a1-3aac-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZmYzhmN2ExLTNhYWMtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=MOWfQ35pO1EFcdFSZmLZlj1mMg2_1_HQDBrZNxRl-XQ=)** | **Meet Our Climate Champions** **🌍 Lucy Molina is running for City Council Ward 1.** She's tired of watching her community suffer while the company racks up violations with barely a slap on the wrist. Lucy knows there are two standards in Colorado: one for corporate polluters and another for everyone else, and she's running to change that. **🌎 Renée Chacon is running for City Council Ward 3.** As Executive Director of Womxn from the Mountain and former co-chair of Colorado's Environmental Justice Action Task Force, Renée has spent years building the data and policy frameworks that prove that racism and redlining created the toxic nightmare Commerce City faces today. Now, she’s running for reelection to turn that research into real change at City Hall. **🌏 Kristi Douglas is running for reelection to her At-Large City Council seat** after proving she's willing to take on the powerful interests that have turned Commerce City into a sacrifice zone. She's repeatedly challenged pipeline companies, refineries, and storage facilities at public hearings — standing up for residents when state and federal regulators have failed them. Her constituents know she'll always choose their health over corporate profits.
---
In such a major oil-and-gas producing state, we want our JanePAC candidates to hold office up and down the ballot, from Congress to the City Council in the smallest of towns. Fossil fuel interests know exactly how high the stakes are in these low-profile local races. And so do we.
**[But with just 17 days until Election Day, we need your support right now to power our final push. Can I count on you to chip in before midnight to help us elect climate champions who refuse to let their communities become sacrifice zones?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117532979/576793842/2105508926?refcode=ea.6fc8f7a1-3aac-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ms=ea.6fc8f7a1-3aac-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZmYzhmN2ExLTNhYWMtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=MOWfQ35pO1EFcdFSZmLZlj1mMg2_1_HQDBrZNxRl-XQ=)**

clean_body: Local leadership matters more than ever in this community. | I'll never forget the smell. When I visited Commerce City for the first time, the air itself told the story. Thick refinery emissions hung over neighborhoods where children play. Families breathed invisible toxins every single day. Commerce City is one of the most polluted zip codes in America. Just six miles north of Denver, it’s dominated by the Suncor refinery — a major polluter that’s contaminated the air and water for decades with almost no accountability. I've toured the neighborhoods where children are suffering from asthma and respiratory illnesses. I've met with local leaders and environmental activists like Lucy Molina, who shared what life is like for her and her neighbors — stories of health issues and a community constantly enveloped by nearby industrial sites, including the Nestlé Purina pet food factory. Despite being a "blue" state, Colorado isn't a green state. The state keeps ramping up oil and gas exports, so local leadership matters more than ever. JanePAC isn't giving up on Commerce City. We've been investing in this community's fight for environmental justice, and we're doubling down. That's why I'm proud to share that we are endorsing three fierce Commerce City leaders — including Lucy — who are running for City Council this November. = | Meet Our Climate Champions 🌍 Lucy Molina is running for City Council Ward 1. She's tired of watching her community suffer while the company racks up violations with barely a slap on the wrist. Lucy knows there are two standards in Colorado: one for corporate polluters and another for everyone else, and she's running to change that. 🌎 Renée Chacon is running for City Council Ward 3. As Executive Director of Womxn from the Mountain and former co-chair of Colorado's Environmental Justice Action Task Force, Renée has spent years building the data and policy frameworks that prove that racism and redlining created the toxic nightmare Commerce City faces today. Now, she’s running for reelection to turn that research into real change at City Hall. 🌏 Kristi Douglas is running for reelection to her At-Large City Council seat after proving she's willing to take on the powerful interests that have turned Commerce City into a sacrifice zone. She's repeatedly challenged pipeline companies, refineries, and storage facilities at public hearings — standing up for residents when state and federal regulators have failed them. Her constituents know she'll always choose their health over corporate profits. In such a major oil-and-gas producing state, we want our JanePAC candidates to hold office up and down the ballot, from Congress to the City Council in the smallest of towns. Fossil fuel interests know exactly how high the stakes are in these low-profile local races. And so do we. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = In solidarity, xx Jane = | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football’s 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville’s time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year’s Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP’s SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul “Bear” Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? _

** [**HELP COACH TUBERVILLE**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=8e815dc8483b4b2fafb231f07bc23c97&_e=BTdaX0Y7iblpkS-Z7nNawZCMxsJbItyrqSweVdfZBOtlDRPSbNyQSb1HrKqSO948MY0GEqqpi7xtMbjji9I7YFOiNj5yiVY_gUY8XTQFXwf4Tsuz89443UFbbnmSxL7t3n1ro-9DLyt8a3Qw1mkxgcrjZvLeslF_mGMZhYOoiS0jI4kNGVqZ8y-zqpNZn362D2Xpnm1MZkWwVSSji0aKCMBYS9T_IhWByGO2iyqX-Cn1HePZPoLpyfAuIWcq5ykCoOw0QYOqaBoY3_DHcryJiEXgF16CFspoWapoH0Et2RzqvsXMSR5JKeH8-K0JhPgF779rO8flYPn6NYWviV8iaHtyH5fHwauAsjHpQSTuT7iXvdg_OlBcuXJ7uEyDbO74vNuJsO0CnVqsIiVBFeXRnj7XpXwquSG9t__eLgGiW7jTmyMVhKtFqY_6midKr-lNLAaGXL4eQ1u52miPyKUXUkJmqAqpAn8u2kXW7TfsxCRQhmd3yCmv4h1L0pUBjS8ELcsQRDgY4NJUGX0g_OmxFbuNt1yYJlvjFU4iZPYRlKKv7bCvLlzMdI1ol-beeQa3)

name: Nikki Budzinski
subject: The Republican shutdown is unacceptable – people are not political pawns.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki for Congress
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117533832/576796197/-2063340125?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDg2MzY3ZC0zYmFjLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=louVXfMcB_e2ThWldn4OInGawryg7giophaXd4762AU=)
Friend,

The government has been shut down for over _two weeks_. House Republicans haven’t been in Washington for _four weeks_ – instead, they’re sitting in their home districts refusing to work with Democrats to come to an agreement to reopen the government.

Their refusal to extend ACA tax credits could mean Illinois families pay $500 more per month for health care. That could be the difference between putting food on the table or stretching a tight budget even further, and the GOP was so against helping working families in this country that they shut down the government.

That’s unacceptable for the functioning of our democracy. It’s unacceptable for families who are already dealing with rising costs.

And it’s unacceptable for the many federal workers who are paying the price – air traffic controllers forced to continue working without pay, active duty military who have missed their last paycheck, federal workers furloughed, and everyday people who are unable to access much-needed services.

You deserve better than being treated like a pawn in a political game where no one wins. **[While I’ve spoken to many folks back home in IL-13 about how the shutdown is affecting them, I want to hear from you directly: Will you take my survey?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117533842/576796209/932829087?refcode=em-10.18.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDg2MzY3ZC0zYmFjLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=louVXfMcB_e2ThWldn4OInGawryg7giophaXd4762AU=&emci=832f5a2c-8cab-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=4086367d-3bac-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=13891387)**

name: John Fetterman
subject: what's happening with abortion access
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51612?t=1&akid=10371%2E434096%2ErUnYyL)
| | |
---
Hey Derek, I have good news and bad news:
**First, the good news:** The FDA just approved a generic version of the abortion pill mifepristone. That’s progress. 💪
**But here's the bad news:** While we move forward, the GOP’s charging backward. Every single male Republican senator (yes, every one of them) just signed a letter to Health Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. demanding new restrictions on mifepristone.
They want control. Over women’s bodies, families, choices.
**Let’s be clear: Deciding when or whether to become a mother should be between a woman and her doctor. Not politicians.** 🙅♀️ **[If you agree, help me tell extremist Republicans to shove it by pitching in $5 now.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51808?t=2&akid=10371%2E434096%2ErUnYyL)**
Since the FDA approved this generic version, RFK Jr. is now launching a so-called “safety review” of mifepristone based on a junk study from a right-wing think tank. Not peer-reviewed. Not credible. Garbage.
The facts are crystal clear: 100+ studies over 30+ years and across dozens of countries say mifepristone is safe. **This isn’t about safety – it’s about politics. RFK Jr. and extremist Republicans want to ban abortion.**
Trump lit this fuse when he stacked the Supreme Court with anti-abortion justices. His justices overturned _Roe_ , and states banned abortion – just like he wanted.
Now, women’s lives are on the line. States are threatening to prosecute doctors who care for women with high-risk pregnancies. Others are forcing women to stay pregnant against their will – even in medical emergencies.
**A woman’s right to make her own health care decisions is sacred and non-negotiable. Period. I voted NO on RFK Jr.’s confirmation, and I’ll never let junk science or political zealots dictate women’s health care.**
Democrats must do everything we can to protect this fundamental right. I believe that if you are not willing to do whatever it takes to protect abortion rights when they are on the line, then you cannot call yourself pro-choice. It’s that simple.

**[If you’re with me,](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51808?t=3&akid=10371%2E434096%2ErUnYyL)**[will you pitch in a few bucks to push back against these extremist Republicans and stand up for reproductive freedom?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51808?t=4&akid=10371%2E434096%2ErUnYyL)
Thanks, Derek,
John ❤️
| |

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-2025?refcode=jtk281-fr-fl-footer&t=5&refcode2=10371_434096_rUnYyL&akid=10371%2E434096%2ErUnYyL)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=6&akid=10371%2E434096%2ErUnYyL)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=10371%2E434096%2ErUnYyL)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Sharice Davids
subject: Republicans couldn’t beat me at the ballot box. So now they’re trying to change the rules.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC
body:
that’s exactly what’s happening right now in the Kansas legislature. Instead of lowering costs and helping families pay their bills, Republican politicians in Topeka are focused on one thing, and one thing only: Kicking me out of office — all because Donald Trump told them to.
| [](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/5860?t=1&akid=5639%2E196590%2EqQQH_X)
---
[_**This is Sharice Davids, Democrat from Kansas’ 3rd Congressional district. Extreme Republicans in the state legislature just traveled to Washington this month to speak directly with Donald Trump. His orders? Gerrymandering me out of office. Please, can you chip in a split donation between The Long Run PAC and my campaign to make sure Trump doesn’t turn Kansas into a one-party state?**_](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/5860?t=2&akid=5639%2E196590%2EqQQH_X)
| [DONATE ](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/5860?t=3&akid=5639%2E196590%2EqQQH_X)
---
There are two very different kinds of politicians in our government right now: The ones who treat elected office like a job — and the ones who treat it like an audition.

I’m proud to be part of the first category . For years, I’ve worked hard in Congress to ignore all the DC distractions and make progress on the issues that matter most.

But today, far too many politicians belong to the _other_ category. Instead of placing their constituents’ needs first, they’re more interested in proving their loyalty to Donald Trump.

And that’s exactly what’s happening right now in the Kansas legislature. Instead of lowering costs and helping families pay their bills, Republican politicians in Topeka are focused on one thing, and one thing only: Kicking me out of office — all because Donald Trump told them to.

**But I’m not going down without a fight.**

[_**I don’t care how many Republican politicians stand in my way. Whether it’s dozens of Republican politicians or the President himself, I won’t stop working to make sure Kansans’ voices are heard — but I need you by my side. Please, can you chip in a split donation before midnight to help me keep fighting back against Trump’s gerrymander?**_](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/5860?t=5&akid=5639%2E196590%2EqQQH_X)

Sharice

name: Roy Cooper
subject: Are you in it to win with me?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
You can make the difference.
#
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96771?refcode=em20251018-9593&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9593%2E614464%2EiF56XP)
I don’t mess around with something as important as representing the people of North Carolina, Peter.
Every race I’ve ever run, I’ve been in it to win — even when the odds seemed long. You’ve been there with me every time, and together, we’ve succeeded. Now, this election for the U.S. Senate may be our toughest challenge yet. **[So when I ask you to split a donation between our campaign and State Democrats Committee, it’s because your contribution could make the difference between victory and defeat.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96771?refcode=em20251018-9593&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9593%2E614464%2EiF56XP)**
**Republicans see me as the top challenger to their Senate majority.** They know that we have the team, the support, and the momentum to win. That means national attention will be on us.
I will always be straightforward about this campaign: our plans, where we stand in the polls, what we expect to come, and what we need from you.
Right now, we’re preparing for national GOP money groups to spend _hundreds of millions_ against us, and Democrats are being outraised by Republicans. Meanwhile, various polls have shown either a dead heat or us with a slight lead.
**[I am asking you to split a contribution between my campaign and State Democrats Committee today because we can’t afford to leave this race up to chance — or up to Republicans’ deep-pocketed donors and their dark-money groups. We can win this race, but ONLY if we stick together. Please, give what you can today.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96771?refcode=em20251018-9593&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9593%2E614464%2EiF56XP)**

name: Adam Schwarze
subject: This is a surprising result

Fellow Conservative,

The radical left thinks they can dismiss us, calling us**“backward,” “extreme,”** and worse. They’re attacking the Minnesota values I’ve spent a lifetime defending — faith, family, and freedom. But here’s the truth they don’t want you to know: we’re closer than ever to taking back this Senate seat.

With the election fast approaching, _**attention is turning to Minnesota’s Senate race.**_ My opponents, Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor, Peggy Flanagan, and Rep. Angie Craig, thought they had this seat locked up. But a recent poll they commissioned delivered a shock: **Flanagan leads a generic Republican by just two points, and Craig by only four points.**

For the first time since 2008, Republicans have a genuine shot at flipping this seat for Minnesota conservatives and every American on the right.

**[Would you consider contributing $2 or even $8 right now to help me build the campaign we'll need to flip this seat Republican?](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=7c151c8a96464630ac23d483d4d81f7c&_e=Xe6rotcKa6c92nSdFPl-1y5WSWob4ox3KKOOI8R_ye8e1HcUYCAKOUWOVInWsJROY29zHig0wlCUL3N6Ixy2ngu018Z64JJBiKyBBCTuXHh4FfZU1H-Y26rTFreBU8SCg-lOTuZ-R46fFM5uRgFLY13uv4FXNfsiDQC2y3-g8RjdiiGCh1wQN_ddZcLucD7pc3DlfCcKAZXSXWDP7SOZ6WqrAs87LuaQLXlnt1bL3NRorncv4g9Osi5HYab3fbubZidOcVkBRtx83mE-GTW_ettJz-2ZZWLSLEU_BjrKbjMw4sSexqMqavICVX0FfExQsf9-n63EjmgxeHtHEXEzD_XSm3la6hol093z-NZuc9aURs-TbqRDuXeje-2T6L79MjzecVbXGMBBFOUjlJiKZmWQGRKiYKveCRW7EJA-XHKUIL7R1IyDo7KjBx3zpV1F1SrW21LWCEdyOjZrpWcLnAa0YSHzAVShOgpGZowVXnZaGTVuin7w4Ct5oVOTP28cB4QkOpffNfTpR5mOjyx4NPDKnrSdvYIcRovvon6Ep5wu_8S-0CCnclhCNQQaiNWkznfYjz1-4pm0gRFEYHdIc7T6Q7WtazqP9OjDBtOgjMcpVxbgw_eXY4LvnVT1g6jrsAAnhzgbuIOfcBl3aY2O6VM9mW1fIs5AYonRL0c5BUFmXxZQ2viXMcidYcRe4pa04Ac3l7cXLJKQvYFs01P_4cvzicDbDKOSSU_lxNvRqrf0O6Fs6G_2h8dI9ovRVdlwt10-_TbKxgf0KmFcMemOsQ%3D%3D)**

I’m Adam Schwarze, a former Navy SEAL Officer and Marine Corps veteran. _**I grew up on Minnesota’s hockey rinks, enlisted after 9/11, and served in over 70 countries, leading high-stakes missions with discipline and resolve.**_ Service is my calling — to my country, my family, and now to you. I’m running for U.S. Senate to fight for the America we love, the one you’ve worked hard to build for your children and grandchildren.

The left’s agenda — pushed by Flanagan and Craig — mocks our heritage, looks back on the chaos of 2020 with rose-colored glasses, and leaves our communities to pay the price. They expect us to stay silent. I know better — and so do you.

**Your legacy is on the line.** This isn’t just an election; it’s a battle for the soul of our nation. I’m the underdog — a regular Minnesotan called to an extraordinary challenge. With your support, we can send a second Navy SEAL to the U.S. Senate to defend our values in Washington.

I’m not asking for a free pass — I’m asking for your partnership. **[Will you chip in $25, $50, $100, or more right now to help me build momentum, win the Republican primary, and defeat the radical left?](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=7c151c8a96464630ac23d483d4d81f7c&_e=Xe6rotcKa6c92nSdFPl-1y5WSWob4ox3KKOOI8R_ye8e1HcUYCAKOUWOVInWsJROY29zHig0wlCUL3N6Ixy2ngu018Z64JJBiKyBBCTuXHh4FfZU1H-Y26rTFreBU8SCg-lOTuZ-R46fFM5uRgFLY13uv4FXNfsiDQC2y3-g8RjdiiGCh1wQN_ddZcLucD7pc3DlfCcKAZXSXWDP7SOZ6WqrAs87LuaQLXlnt1bL3NRorncv4g9Osi5HYab3fbubZidOcVkBRtx83mE-GTW_eiSDwjXBAPAzZ2xBeM7bQVBySG9a0Kahm_lMjng_Xw9wbgXmbAMR8LpFpHGmnMzJjQtWWJPo9Hc4U9_hRDYouVMpC2lhxoQq15GeflsWdCYkhCW_6Jk4CpipAQ9bhZGRxJaGM6G1btqdtPUDPtEtGIeflGNX--8T7WLV-eOUUb3_gVprgAC6nspCyABYb-vtcD6-zwl5Ww3x127n7Iwj1CtT806kIZWKUWPGo0IvMvBLqpci3l10as7hglHrAaMWQVcKSaDtCgkGdx8OAujlvNR6prDnaOm3lbkbXWUiwj-vN4p9yjtxxutM5hRfY_yiwlaNdD7X8OhnN3d3TGkulH-aBJnW2tvgG9vdLNrKkbU9yWhlOBZhqilz5HzqgwGRissj9UBpwhmClCYwHjJrS06QAWCWA5EWiXsKHGddVjLwHPdcXqVMsPblNm4v32N49j5h35LsCxnBVDclC1Sxj172vFDzCKBBL5UyAMg908uUsKwX34pxvKCt0DJMuIpBnA%3D%3D)** Every dollar fuels our fight to share my message with voters across Minnesota.

Throughout my career, I have faced myriad challenges, but it’s clear to me that my greatest challenge will be earning your trust as I work to win a Senate seat in Minnesota. The left’s attacks won’t stop, and we need resources to fight back with the strength you expect from a Navy SEAL.

**Together, we can prove them wrong and show Minnesota — and America — that our values still matter.**

With deep gratitude
Adam Schwarze
Proud Marine Veteran
Retired Navy SEAL
Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate – Minnesota _**

name: The Blue Dogs
subject: The map that will decide Congress
body:

name: Graham Platner
subject: Susan Collins, Chuck Schumer, and AIPAC are trying to bury us before we even get started
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-platner?refcode=101825_1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-platner?refcode=101825_1]
Peter,
Janet Mills just entered the race against Susan Collins. So you’re about to get a million fundraising texts and emails from Mills and her campaign (if you haven’t already).
I’m new to this whole politics thing, but I’ve begun to learn how this works: After you donate to any establishment Democrat, Chuck Schumer and the DNC turn around and use your email address and phone number to put their thumbs on the scale – propping up their choice, even when that person is not the strongest candidate in the race.
It’s all part of the corrupt system in Washington. Corporations buy candidates through corporate PAC checks. Special interest groups like AIPAC pour millions into Super PACs. And Chuck Schumer and the DNC buy loyalty by sending millions of texts and emails to funnel money to milquetoast candidates, even when they don’t have the best chance to win.
I’m not the choice of corporations, AIPAC, Chuck Schumer, or the DNC. And that’s exactly why I’m the Democrat who is finally going to actually defeat Susan Collins and turn Maine blue.
Susan Collins is the most vulnerable Republican senator in the country. We have an opportunity to replace her with a Democrat who will actually support Medicare for All and call what’s happened in Gaza a genocide.
But I’m going up against Susan Collins, AIPAC, and the entire DC establishment. If I’m going to be able to defeat Susan Collins and flip this Senate seat blue, I am counting on folks like you to chip in now to our campaign.
Please, will you split a donation right now between my campaign and The Real Texas PAC to help me defeat Susan Collins, flip Maine blue, and take back the Senate for Democrats? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-platner?refcode=101825_1]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Graham Platner and The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately:
DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-platner?express_lane=true&refcode=101825_1&amount=5]
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-platner?express_lane=true&refcode=101825_1&amount=10]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-platner?express_lane=true&refcode=101825_1&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-platner?express_lane=true&refcode=101825_1&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-platner?express_lane=true&refcode=101825_1&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-platner?refcode=101825_1&amount=25]
This is a pretty pivotal moment in our campaign, so no amount you can afford is too small. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-platner?refcode=101825_1]
In solidarity,
Graham Platner

| I want to take a moment to thank you for being part of this grassroots team. I know you hear from me a lot, so I appreciate you taking the time to read these messages.

Every voice and every dollar makes a difference in this fight, and I couldn’t do this without you.

But I also need to be honest with you: Republicans have FIVE times more cash on hand than Democrats. They’re pushing their extremist agenda and trying to silence our voices. **Taking back the House majority is the way we can push back against Republican dysfunction and get things done.**

While we can’t compete with their dark money, we can show the strength of our grassroots movement. We can show them that West Michigan isn’t for sale.

That’s right, my Democrat opponent’s support is pouring in from liberal Hollywood celebrities like Busy Phillips, Bradley Whitford, Don Henley, Ken Jeong, Dean Felber, Mark Bryan, and a bunch of out-of-state donors. | Fellow American, Can you guess who is behind my opponent's $2.8 million fundraising number? Here’s a hint... they’re Hollywood elites. That's right, my Democrat opponent's support is pouring in from liberal Hollywood celebrities like Busy Phillips, Bradley Whitford, Don Henley, Ken Jeong, Dean Felber, Mark Bryan, and a bunch of out-of-state donors. This is troublesome because... Liberals want to take our Senate majority, and they are gaining momentum because they continue to outraise Republican candidates across the country -- including me last quarter! Liberals will continue to funnel millions more into South Carolina. Liberals want to take down President Trump and halt the progress we've made. ** I'm asking you to fight back against the Liberal Elites and out-of-touch Democrats. | We will secure victory in South Carolina, but only with your help in combating the millions of liberal dollars from Hollywood and across the U.S. that my opponent is receiving. name: The Turning Point USA Family
subject: God is moving
body:
[unsubscribe](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xul=1nmc5a54x67zfmd5fi2bt1ih19m2fsxlro88sqrfyule73z3y6rmq2vs8zvpaqzp53c9h85lf8hgtojbbzb7g7ypf9gh37luygmryz9e0kkankzhxh10&__stmp=t4c5kh&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
---
Please read the message below from Turning Point USA.

Steve Thompson, Editor

* * *

| | | | [](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4c5kh&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, Even now... it still doesn't feel real that we lost Charlie. His voice, his courage, his conviction — it shaped all of us. And his vision — **to build the most faithful and the most patriotic generation in American history** — is why Turning Point USA exists today. Friend, that's why we have an inspiring update for you... In just the first seven days since Charlie was taken from all of us, Turning Point USA has received more than 54,000 requests from students who want to start or join a chapter:
---
[](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4c5kh&__onlt=h)
---
**God is so good.** ✝️🙏🕊️ To give you perspective, Friend... Coming into this school year, Turning Point USA had roughly 900+ college chapters and 1,200+ high school chapters. It took us years to build those chapters... over a decade in fact... _But now?_ These students who signed up? They weren't asked to... They weren't recruited... **They felt it was their time to stand up for this country and honor Charlie.** Because of the life he lived. The faith he had. The love he showed God, his family, and others. The courage he had to speak truth. And his vision of a better America for us all.
---
[](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4c5kh&__onlt=h)
---
He always believed this day would come. He used to talk about it all the time — how the momentum would shift, how young people would rise up with courage, and how a Turning Point USA chapter would be in every college and high school in America. And now... _It's happening._ Faster than he could have imagined. Bigger than we thought possible. And more beautiful than we can even describe. **Again, Friend, God is so good.** Since we lost Charlie, we've also felt SO MUCH love... Prayers. Emails. Messages. Stories about how Charlie's voice changed lives... or your children's or grandchildren's lives. And so many supporters have asked, _"What can I do?"_ As you read this, our team is working around the clock to follow up with every chapter request. And we're going to need help equipping them with our activism kits. **Every new chapter receives these kits from Turning Point USA with everything they need to get started — including:** ✅ Leadership materials
✅ Pocket Constitutions
✅ Chapter training tools
✅ American flags & patriotic gear Friend, I'm sure you'd believe it when we say it... _this won't be a small task._ But we're going to do it. Whatever it takes. **_For Charlie._** _And here's how YOU can help with this..._ **Every $25 you give today helps stock another activism kit — ready to deploy into a new Turning Point USA student chapter...** How many of these activism kits can you help provide to the wave of new student chapters that are just getting started?
---
[ **1 KIT = $25**](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4c5kh&__onlt=h)
---
[ **2 KITS = $50**](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4c5kh&__onlt=h)
---
[ **10 KITS = $250**](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4c5kh&__onlt=h)
---
[ **100 KITS = $2,500**](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4c5kh&__onlt=h)
---
[ **1,000 KITS = $25,000**](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4c5kh&__onlt=h)
---
[ **Sponsor Activism Kits**](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4c5kh&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, if there was ever a more immediate way you could help make Charlie's vision a reality... **This is it****.**
---
[](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4c5kh&__onlt=h)
---
Also... **Here's one more powerful thing you can do:** 📩 If you have a son, daughter, grandchild, niece, nephew — or any young person in your life — who wants to get involved... who wants to join or start a chapter... **Please send them this link:** **[TPUSAStudents.com/StartaChapter](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=34017q10ityviu1303cymhmhaumd7rq3cqhv7cpgoi1pc3e1mafy6emdbujw7dtit15phfxbg9osa1dika44i2mlbfn9s1dp10odeof6o4uj69r686i2bk30e3bavu4c56t8kub4fdt14sadj18c5c&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4c5kh&__onlt=h)** Friend, if you've already given... If you've already donated... If you've already been a voice of encouragement and strength in this painful week... If you've prayed, been praying, and continue to pray... **Thank you.** We can never say it enough. If you've read this far, we want you to know this... **You're the reason Charlie's mission and vision will grow for generations to come.** God is so good.
---
**For Charlie,** -The Turning Point USA Family **P.S.** Please know, Friend, if you can't afford to help right now, all we ask for are your prayers. Charlie would have wanted you to pray first — and if that's all you can give today, _we're grateful._ But if you're able to help... if you're overjoyed to hear that students are flocking to Charlie's message and mission... Your gift today helps sustain this wave of student inspiration and gets new student chapters off the ground floor... And ensures Charlie's vision is realized faster than we all thought possible. **Every $25 you give today helps us stock another activism kit ready to deploy to a new student chapter.**
---
[ **Sponsor an Activism Kit**
**Make Your Gift Here**](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4c5kh&__onlt=h)
---
Thank you for your help and for your prayers, Friend. **God is so good.** 🙏
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

[Privacy Policy](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=o40io4oxrs08l6bos66hmaoe7t3i4ftms7v7katd5vtar1ux8ksv5gvt9gwjbauq4ikzae42biog4uw8949qwlcsnvs5zbo8ef9v5uwgesy9j0avp7v0n9dkpujo179t01wutrqd1rhxj65hsvrmhlhrxuismg1kxr&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4c5kh&__onlt=h) / [Advertise with us](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=64luld8ccj95co1abbhd6vis7o8pasqnnra2occ23zomhqb9absv8kwfjj0a5jgff1812atmix4so7a3vligjmmj48lx2tu5z31247xw266p806l5lae1wfaedgstztd5bjtvaoglietm2ssyxjrgbxzmef7&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4c5kh&__onlt=h)

Every new chapter receives these kits from Turning Point USA with everything they need to get started — including: ✅ Leadership materials ✅ Pocket Constitutions ✅ Chapter training tools ✅ American flags & patriotic gear Friend, I'm sure you'd believe it when we say it... this won't be a small task. But we're going to do it. Whatever it takes. For Charlie. And here's how YOU can help with this... Every $25 you give today helps stock another activism kit — ready to deploy into a new Turning Point USA student chapter... How many of these activism kits can you help provide to the wave of new student chapters that are just getting started? Friend, if there was ever a more immediate way you could help make Charlie's vision a reality... This is it**. Also... Here's one more powerful thing you can do: 📩 If you have a son, daughter, grandchild, niece, nephew — or any young person in your life — who wants to get involved... who wants to join or start a chapter... Please send them this link: Friend, if you've already given... If you've already donated... If you've already been a voice of encouragement and strength in this painful week... If you've prayed, been praying, and continue to pray... Thank you. We can never say it enough. If you've read this far, we want you to know this... You're the reason Charlie's mission and vision will grow for generations to come. God is so good. For Charlie, -The Turning Point USA Family P.S. Please know, Friend, if you can't afford to help right now, all we ask for are your prayers. Charlie would have wanted you to pray first — and if that's all you can give today, we're grateful. But if you're able to help... if you're overjoyed to hear that students are flocking to Charlie's message and mission... Your gift today helps sustain this wave of student inspiration and gets new student chapters off the ground floor... And ensures Charlie's vision is realized faster than we all thought possible. Every $25 you give today helps us stock another activism kit ready to deploy to a new student chapter. Thank you for your help and for your prayers, Friend. God is so good. 🙏 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044 / AFFILIATE RELATIONSHIP NOTICE: The sender of this communication likely has a financial or material connection to the companies or individuals mentioned and may receive commissions from purchases you make through related sites. name: Chris Taylor HQ
subject: 10 years
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Taylor for Justice
body:
# [](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/18?refcode=em20251018-718&t=1&akid=722%2E294397%2E7prlXF)
10 years, folks.
That’s how long a Wisconsin Supreme Court Justice serves. That’s more than **_87,000 hours_** shaping the future of our state.
Ten years deciding whether our freedoms are defended or stripped away.
Ten years of rulings that could decide the fate of reproductive healthcare access, fair legislative maps, and democracy itself.
When you think about it like that, this election feels even more urgent.
Because this isn’t just about the next few months — it’s about the next decade of Wisconsin’s future.
**Our opponent, Maria Lazar, would spend those 87,000 hours siding with right-wing special interests.**
Judge Chris Taylor, on the other hand, believes in upholding fairness, protecting freedoms, and making sure our state’s highest court works for the people, not the powerful.
But it’s up to us to make sure Judge Chris Taylor defeats Lazar and is elected to the Wisconsin Supreme Court next April.
[**Pitch in $10 today to support Judge Chris Taylor and help us protect the next decade of Wisconsin’s future:**](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20251018_1_ak.TAAmap&amount=10&refcode=em20251018-718&t=2&akid=722%2E294397%2E7prlXF)
**[Donate $10 ››](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20251018_1_ak.TAAmap&amount=10&refcode=em20251018-718&t=21&akid=722%2E294397%2E7prlXF)**
Thank you,
Team Taylor
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_jct_footer?refcode=em20251018-718&t=22&refcode2=722_294397_7prlXF&akid=722%2E294397%2E7prlXF)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=722%2E294397%2E7prlXF)

Email us: [info@chrisforjustice.com](info@chrisforjustice.com)

Madison, WI 53701

name: No Kings via Our Revolution
subject: TODAY is No Kings Day: Are you with us?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ]Our Revolution Logo

Peter Willis,

The day we've been building toward is finally here and the energy is
electric: **TODAY is No Kings Day** – the biggest, boldest, most
grassroots show of resistance yet.

Across cities, small towns, college campuses, and street corners, over
2,500 No Kings events are happening today to send Trump a clear message:
he is NOT King – and the power belongs to the people.

It's shaping up to be the biggest single day of protest in history. But we
need EVERYONE to turnout. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34339?t=1011&akid=9700%2E5885482%2EwAI7Jk ]Find an event near you and hit the streets
with us today.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34339?t=1012&akid=9700%2E5885482%2EwAI7Jk ]Find An Event

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34339?t=1013&akid=9700%2E5885482%2EwAI7Jk ]Map of No Kings Protests

In June, over 5 million of us came together at more than 2,000 No Kings
Day actions. Trump has only gotten more dangerous — sending armed forces
into our cities, declaring “war” on the left, and coming after anyone who
dares to stand up to his authoritarianism.

TODAY, we will come together in record-breaking numbers to show him that
the more he tries to scare us, the more the people rise up. From Key West,
FL to Port Angeles, WA, events are planned in every corner of the country.
Millions are mobilizing – and [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34339?t=1014&akid=9700%2E5885482%2EwAI7Jk ]we hope you'll join us.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/31294?source=email-20251018&t=1015&akid=9700%2E5885482%2EwAI7Jk ]If you can't join today, it's not too late to rush a donation to help
Our Revolution make sure our organizers and volunteers get the resources
and support they need to make today a success.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/31294?source=email-20251018&t=1016&akid=9700%2E5885482%2EwAI7Jk ]DONATE

No Kings Day is just the beginning. We're building a wall of resistance
stronger than any one man – one built from the energy, courage, and hope
you bring. Thank you for all that you do – and see you in the streets, or
standing strong with us in spirit!

When we organize, we win,

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26879?c0=email-20251018.tI_DcK&t=1007&akid=9700%2E5885482%2EwAI7Jk ]Our membership swag

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26880?c0=email-20251018.yxEskP&t=1008&akid=9700%2E5885482%2EwAI7Jk ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to be a Movement Builder with a recurring

name: James Talarico
subject: My story in photos
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Talarico for Texas
body:
#
Peter —
Before I was a politician, I was a public school teacher. I taught sixth grade Language Arts at Rhodes Middle School on the westside of San Antonio.
The westside is a beautiful, historic Mexican-American neighborhood. It’s also one of the poorest zip codes in Texas. Every day, my students struggled heroically to overcome poverty and systems designed to hold them back.
[](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em251018-1-ak&t=1&akid=123%2E1347274%2EDupt3C)
Growing up, I saw that same fight in my mother — a preacher’s daughter from Laredo who left home at 19 and met my birth father, whose drinking problem sometimes led to violence.
One night, he became abusive again, but that night, my mother’s love rose to meet it. She packed all our stuff into her little Ford Escort and took me to the hotel where she worked. The manager let us stay in one of the rooms until we found a small apartment of our own in East Austin.
[](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em251018-1-ak&t=2&akid=123%2E1347274%2EDupt3C)
Like my students, my mom was a fighter. And she passed that fighting spirit along to me.
I first ran for the Texas House in 2018 to fight for my constituents — people like my mom and my students. It was a district no one thought we could win, but together we flipped a district Donald Trump had won just two years earlier.
As a legislator, I’ve passed major legislation to fund our neighborhood schools, expand job opportunities for young adults, and lower the cost of child care, housing, and prescription drugs.
[](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em251018-1-ak&t=3&akid=123%2E1347274%2EDupt3C)
I’ve led the fight against the billionaire mega-donors that have rigged the system against working Texas families. And I’m the only member of the Texas Legislature who has never taken corporate PAC money.
Now, as those same billionaire mega-donors take over the federal government, we need more fighters in Washington who will take power back for working people.
I’ve fought for working people — and won. Now, I’m running to take our fight to the U.S. Senate.
[**If you believe we need a fighter for the people in the U.S. Senate, will you consider making a contribution to our campaign today? This fight requires all of us.**](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em251018-1-ak&t=4&akid=123%2E1347274%2EDupt3C)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._

name: The Turning Point USA Family
subject: God is moving
body:
Please read the message below from Turning Point USA.

* * *
| | | | [](https://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4c5zf&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, Even now... it still doesn't feel real that we lost Charlie. His voice, his courage, his conviction — it shaped all of us. And his vision — **to build the most faithful and the most patriotic generation in American history** — is why Turning Point USA exists today. Friend, that's why we have an inspiring update for you... In just the first seven days since Charlie was taken from all of us, Turning Point USA has received more than 54,000 requests from students who want to start or join a chapter:
---
[](https://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4c5zf&__onlt=h)
---
**God is so good.** ✝️🙏🕊️ To give you perspective, Friend... Coming into this school year, Turning Point USA had roughly 900+ college chapters and 1,200+ high school chapters. It took us years to build those chapters... over a decade in fact... _But now?_ These students who signed up? They weren't asked to... They weren't recruited... **They felt it was their time to stand up for this country and honor Charlie.** Because of the life he lived. The faith he had. The love he showed God, his family, and others. The courage he had to speak truth. And his vision of a better America for us all.
---
[](https://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4c5zf&__onlt=h)
---
He always believed this day would come. He used to talk about it all the time — how the momentum would shift, how young people would rise up with courage, and how a Turning Point USA chapter would be in every college and high school in America. And now... _It's happening._ Faster than he could have imagined. Bigger than we thought possible. And more beautiful than we can even describe. **Again, Friend, God is so good.** Since we lost Charlie, we've also felt SO MUCH love... Prayers. Emails. Messages. Stories about how Charlie's voice changed lives... or your children's or grandchildren's lives. And so many supporters have asked, _"What can I do?"_ As you read this, our team is working around the clock to follow up with every chapter request. And we're going to need help equipping them with our activism kits. **Every new chapter receives these kits from Turning Point USA with everything they need to get started — including:** ✅ Leadership materials
✅ Pocket Constitutions
✅ Chapter training tools
✅ American flags & patriotic gear Friend, I'm sure you'd believe it when we say it... _this won't be a small task._ But we're going to do it. Whatever it takes. **_For Charlie._** _And here's how YOU can help with this..._ **Every $25 you give today helps stock another activism kit — ready to deploy into a new Turning Point USA student chapter...** How many of these activism kits can you help provide to the wave of new student chapters that are just getting started?
---
[ **1 KIT = $25**](https://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4c5zf&__onlt=h)
---
[ **2 KITS = $50**](https://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4c5zf&__onlt=h)
---
[ **10 KITS = $250**](https://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4c5zf&__onlt=h)
---
[ **100 KITS = $2,500**](https://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4c5zf&__onlt=h)
---
[ **1,000 KITS = $25,000**](https://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4c5zf&__onlt=h)
---
[ **Sponsor Activism Kits**](https://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4c5zf&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, if there was ever a more immediate way you could help make Charlie's vision a reality... **This is it****.**
---
[](https://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4c5zf&__onlt=h)
---
Also... **Here's one more powerful thing you can do:** 📩 If you have a son, daughter, grandchild, niece, nephew — or any young person in your life — who wants to get involved... who wants to join or start a chapter... **Please send them this link:** **[TPUSAStudents.com/StartaChapter](https://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=2vytyz4021zmcaqgyfhhkmg71y56uqg2l7cztvjfa5izcuwdjl83ozmj0qr7zks1i34mh6fort9tjfs0o25tkd0jmg2h13xnqlgq0045141khfruls0dfh3rcvuvebr67wsmorkat9x&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4c5zf&__onlt=h)** Friend, if you've already given... If you've already donated... If you've already been a voice of encouragement and strength in this painful week... If you've prayed, been praying, and continue to pray... **Thank you.** We can never say it enough. If you've read this far, we want you to know this... **You're the reason Charlie's mission and vision will grow for generations to come.** God is so good.
---
**For Charlie,** -The Turning Point USA Family **P.S.** Please know, Friend, if you can't afford to help right now, all we ask for are your prayers. Charlie would have wanted you to pray first — and if that's all you can give today, _we're grateful._ But if you're able to help... if you're overjoyed to hear that students are flocking to Charlie's message and mission... Your gift today helps sustain this wave of student inspiration and gets new student chapters off the ground floor... And ensures Charlie's vision is realized faster than we all thought possible. **Every $25 you give today helps us stock another activism kit ready to deploy to a new student chapter.**
---
[ **Sponsor an Activism Kit**
**Make Your Gift Here**](https://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4c5zf&__onlt=h)
---
Thank you for your help and for your prayers, Friend. **God is so good.** 🙏
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

[Unsubscribe](https://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xul=2qq8ny3595o85h60939os39vgtj6o2m3ita3njbpxwx18u051mw3myqck8h106zibmoy5eqe3vny35o5kkxs55wnpsh0ugu4r7kce965j&__stmp=t4c5zf&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh) / [Privacy Policy](https://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=2vytyz4021zmcaqgyfhhkmg71y56uqg2l7cztvjfa5izzy9lxzws5h7ut7o6fii05lyq0hp03e87wteob7ykd8y0tbahj7dzhce2o0yma86xrx4d231vlwme52u5utmga385iezinjp&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4c5zf&__onlt=h) / [Contact us](https://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=4zp2igrzkq7niairjuzsrtkpv0ajm7uz6iwv3bykd5iz85o543e0jqsi279e523o75lw1zi640usq4ufb5n6wps05gyazsih35tvdp7iynam03cdun2qjpc9r8rv88pi&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4c5zf&__onlt=h)

name: Defcon 1
subject: 2025’s biggest race now has astronomical implications
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEFEND OUR COURTS, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE
body:
The stakes of November 4th’s Pennsylvania Supreme Court retention election were already high enough, but now with this decision looming—they’re astronomical.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GydGWOhUHSXia3AjBOviGk0AgM2mdEcdIbIvH3KnwFyrVCLDoTtaRaNDZaYDAtRYoERdrE1rkcODo33dOxGBYxRW2DfTGzgCeWxmx0P9I-nnl0KGzo5HBJ6HZtCS38dvP3ZDLKzUHc1aMwJDMm0SWUqtwWotbV6SkEsnDi40CemWCP6S3dPVXoBanGlbAReA0g_lZ1OEWH6bOI3mn8FxonyKKzFqbcrQYcKPevrQjAZ8uyG8eMFnhQ==&c=IHyGi_9OF9AUkf25GRAdPG6xZSdsAulkqLpa-aMsTRx4wHjXZq26WQ==&ch=AKPy0F0WDe6YLxmOANql0xiZOQ5V2YUut3gBly1cGqGydM4sr-2BjQ==)
---
| Peter,
Just days ago, the MAGA controlled U.S. Supreme Court signalled they would strike down a key portion of the Voting Rights Act that prevented state legislatures from drawing Congressional districts that discriminate on the basis of race.
If the U.S. Supreme Court strikes this down, it will unleash hell across America--allowing GOP controlled state legislatures to draw some of the most gerrymandered maps you could even think of, silencing the voices of minorities and giving MAGA an extreme advantage in upcoming elections.
---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GydGWOhUHSXia3AjBOviGk0AgM2mdEcdIbIvH3KnwFyrVCLDoTtaRaNDZaYDAtRYoERdrE1rkcODo33dOxGBYxRW2DfTGzgCeWxmx0P9I-nnl0KGzo5HBJ6HZtCS38dvP3ZDLKzUHc1aMwJDMm0SWUqtwWotbV6SkEsnDi40CemWCP6S3dPVXoBanGlbAReA0g_lZ1OEWH6bOI3mn8FxonyKKzFqbcrQpeV3gvTLIY6sIxHxJDE2gw==&c=IHyGi_9OF9AUkf25GRAdPG6xZSdsAulkqLpa-aMsTRx4wHjXZq26WQ==&ch=AKPy0F0WDe6YLxmOANql0xiZOQ5V2YUut3gBly1cGqGydM4sr-2BjQ==)
---
| | | | But MAGA's gerrymandering scheme only works under one condition: that they have control over the State Supreme Courts who have the ultimate say on the constitutionality of Congressional maps -- making State Supreme Courts the last line of defense against MAGA's election rigging scheme.
The stakes of November 4th's Pennsylvania Supreme Court retention election were already high enough, but now with this decision looming--they're astronomical.
MAGA has launched an all out blitz to try and topple the Democratic majority on the court. If they seize this court and the U.S. Supreme Court strikes down the Voting Rights Act, they'll be able to gerrymander PA into oblivion, all but eliminating PA Democrats from the House of Representative and rigging the 2026 midterms so Democrats don't even have a prayer of winning back the House.
They're so hellbent on winning this race that this election is already the most expensive retention election ever, and it may even reach Presidential election spending levels.
Defend Our Courts is on the ground and on the airwaves in PA, trying to hold the line against MAGA's onslaught. With a warchest of over 3 million dollars and nearly 60,000 Democratic donors on our side, we are one of the largest Democratic organizations in this race.
But with 17 days until election day, MAGA is still outspending us 10-1. And with the stakes now higher than ever, we desperately need more Democrats to rally to our side or Democrats will lose the 2026 midterms before a single vote is cast.
[Please, will you rush a donation of $50, $25, or whatever you can spare to help Defend Our Courts stop MAGA's election rigging scheme?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GydGWOhUHSXia3AjBOviGk0AgM2mdEcdIbIvH3KnwFyrVCLDoTtaRaNDZaYDAtRY4Da2D7ad0XQF6MmpkDTlVq5c7JM9eDFXl3R5AuE0VWAQbZ1QQsKP-bHLcVHIut_V12JwroUghNrRSqhScz6FwSWPSkqkfMHKViIqvIZPHruRUfSJKMLgart_a9h66q66NI8g6LV4unCzoslm7F0HrQzQavbemd6IQx4FXsViJPKIgzP0nGCQSNRSu-cCxQQU&c=IHyGi_9OF9AUkf25GRAdPG6xZSdsAulkqLpa-aMsTRx4wHjXZq26WQ==&ch=AKPy0F0WDe6YLxmOANql0xiZOQ5V2YUut3gBly1cGqGydM4sr-2BjQ==)

clean_body: The stakes of November 4th’s Pennsylvania Supreme Court retention election were already high enough, but now with this decision looming—they’re astronomical. | | | | | == | Peter, Just days ago, the MAGA controlled U.S. Supreme Court signalled they would strike down a key portion of the Voting Rights Act that prevented state legislatures from drawing Congressional districts that discriminate on the basis of race. If the U.S. Supreme Court strikes this down, it will unleash hell across America--allowing GOP controlled state legislatures to draw some of the most gerrymandered maps you could even think of, silencing the voices of minorities and giving MAGA an extreme advantage in upcoming elections. | == | | | | But MAGA's gerrymandering scheme only works under one condition: that they have control over the State Supreme Courts who have the ultimate say on the constitutionality of Congressional maps -- making State Supreme Courts the last line of defense against MAGA's election rigging scheme. The stakes of November 4th's Pennsylvania Supreme Court retention election were already high enough, but now with this decision looming--they're astronomical. MAGA has launched an all out blitz to try and topple the Democratic majority on the court. If they seize this court and the U.S. Supreme Court strikes down the Voting Rights Act, they'll be able to gerrymander PA into oblivion, all but eliminating PA Democrats from the House of Representative and rigging the 2026 midterms so Democrats don't even have a prayer of winning back the House. They're so hellbent on winning this race that this election is already the most expensive retention election ever, and it may even reach Presidential election spending levels. Defend Our Courts is on the ground and on the airwaves in PA, trying to hold the line against MAGA's onslaught. With a warchest of over 3 million dollars and nearly 60,000 Democratic donors on our side, we are one of the largest Democratic organizations in this race. But with 17 days until election day, MAGA is still outspending us 10-1. And with the stakes now higher than ever, we desperately need more Democrats to rally to our side or Democrats will lose the 2026 midterms before a single vote is cast. == | | | | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | | | | == The 2026 midterms will be won or lost this November in this obscure PA Supreme Court race. Democrats must rally or it's game over. Team Defend Our Courts | | | | | | | | | | == | | | | | == | | | | Mail checks to: | | | | Defend Our CourtsP.O.
