name: Justin
subject: I just made a risky decision
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HICKENLOOPER FOR COLORADO
body:
-

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117540772/576819832/1435897075?refcode=email_101825_risky&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjJhZDBmNC00Y2FjLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1N7K8ayL3DpyeEBBYoMb0358HH0tSP8IDAgalyaqRms=&emci=6275e1bd-c6aa-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=622ad0f4-4cac-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=7280715) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117540773/576819833/1531865432?refcode=email_101825_risky&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjJhZDBmNC00Y2FjLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1N7K8ayL3DpyeEBBYoMb0358HH0tSP8IDAgalyaqRms=) I just made a bit of a risky decision. Let me explain... Donald Trump and MAGA Republicans are going to do (and spend) anything they can to hold onto their Senate majority next year and continue plowing ahead with their Project 2025 agenda. I saw them spend $48 MILLION trying to defeat John Hickenlooper in 2020, so when I tell you they’re willing to spend a fortune here, _I seriously mean it._ We need to spread John’s message across the state as early as possible and build grassroots momentum from Cortez to Campo to Fort Collins and everywhere in between. **So I gave the go-ahead to launch more digital ads, even though the money for them wasn’t originally in our budget.** It wasn’t an easy decision, but it was a necessary one. We’re facing unprecedented threats to our democracy and need to scale up our operation earlier than usual if we’re going to pull off a win here in Colorado. **[I took a leap of faith because I knew this grassroots team has never let us down before when we’ve called on you for help – and that’s exactly what I told John too. What do you say: can we count on your help? Please make a contribution to John Hickenlooper’s campaign here:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117540774/576819834/1531865432?amount=15&refcode=email_101825_risky&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjJhZDBmNC00Y2FjLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1N7K8ayL3DpyeEBBYoMb0358HH0tSP8IDAgalyaqRms=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117540775/576819835/1531865432?express_lane=true&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&amount=5&refcode=email_101825_risky&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjJhZDBmNC00Y2FjLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1N7K8ayL3DpyeEBBYoMb0358HH0tSP8IDAgalyaqRms=)

name: Tobias Read
subject: Add your name: Trump can’t have our voter registration data
body:
Private data belongs to Oregonians, not Donald Trump. | | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117541038/576820734/-569431239?refcode=251018-collab-pet-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3M2E0ZWU3Yy00ZWFjLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w1WPY8acnC5g2XKDsmV1_BS-JGOD2-qmU4PBmNidAKA=)
---
| | Hi, it’s Oregon Secretary of State, Tobias Read.
When President Trump’s Department of Justice demanded Oregon’s complete voter-registration data, including driver’s license numbers and parts of Social Security numbers. **I had one response:****No way! **
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117541039/576820735/-1348697765?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3M2E0ZWU3Yy00ZWFjLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w1WPY8acnC5g2XKDsmV1_BS-JGOD2-qmU4PBmNidAKA=&emci=6dc4d2fa-45ac-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=73a4ee7c-4eac-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=30662126)
---
Oregon already provides the public voter information that’s required by law. **But private data belongs to Oregonians, not President Trump. Not to any President! ** My job is to protect both your right to vote and your right to privacy. So for me, this isn’t about politics — _it’s about principle. _ If we allow sensitive voter information to be handed over once, we open the door to misuse and distrust in our elections. **That’s not how Oregon does things.** **[Now I need to know where you stand: Do you support Oregon’s decision to protect voter privacy and reject federal overreach?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117541040/576820736/-1348697765?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3M2E0ZWU3Yy00ZWFjLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w1WPY8acnC5g2XKDsmV1_BS-JGOD2-qmU4PBmNidAKA=&emci=6dc4d2fa-45ac-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=73a4ee7c-4eac-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=30662126)**
---
[ **ADD YOUR NAME** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117541041/576820737/-1348697765?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3M2E0ZWU3Yy00ZWFjLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w1WPY8acnC5g2XKDsmV1_BS-JGOD2-qmU4PBmNidAKA=&emci=6dc4d2fa-45ac-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=73a4ee7c-4eac-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=30662126)
---

clean_body: Private data belongs to Oregonians, not Donald Trump. | | | = | | Hi, it’s Oregon Secretary of State, Tobias Read. When President Trump’s Department of Justice demanded Oregon’s complete voter-registration data, including driver’s license numbers and parts of Social Security numbers. I had one response:No way! Oregon already provides the public voter information that’s required by law. But private data belongs to Oregonians, not President Trump. Not to any President! My job is to protect both your right to vote and your right to privacy. So for me, this isn’t about politics — it’s about principle. If we allow sensitive voter information to be handed over once, we open the door to misuse and distrust in our elections. That’s not how Oregon does things. We’ve built one of the most secure and transparent election systems in the country by earning voters’ trust. Let’s keep it that way. Thank you, Tobias Read Secretary of State, Oregon = | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- Friends of Tobias Read (5208) PO Box 42307 Portland, OR 97242 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: The Turning Point USA Family
subject: Charlie always believed this day would come
body:
[](http://trk.2025battleground.com/?xtl=1apjtn1vd0n86658v5cc8f3djqd7ym3tty9haehxh42osve697geabuhw4byly3qobbsz0g9urddpwfier61azujgo1c3nbdlooxrerdwdo76l4xo88lg5n&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4cawe&__onlt=h) [Mark as Spam](http://trk.2025battleground.com/?xul=t2p76x2ul3l184ws2kiv1kps6r6z50yq4mhcdrmvkc86j4zhtispzx0mlb60973qxkhtzvnzdiwx4mcs4rqpc22lh5y86ykepvrvjvqk5f&__stmp=t4cawe&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh) | [Unsubscribe](http://trk.2025battleground.com/?xul=t2p76x2ul3l184ws2kiv1kps6r6z50yq4mhcdrmvkc86j4zhtispzx0mlb60973qxkhtzvnzdiwx4mcs4rqpc22lh5y86ykepvrvjvqk5f&__stmp=t4cawe&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
---
Please read the message below from Turning Point USA.
* * *

| | | | [](http://trk.2025battleground.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4cawe&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, Even now... it still doesn't feel real that we lost Charlie. His voice, his courage, his conviction — it shaped all of us. And his vision — **to build the most faithful and the most patriotic generation in American history** — is why Turning Point USA exists today. Friend, that's why we have an inspiring update for you... In just the first seven days since Charlie was taken from all of us, Turning Point USA has received more than 54,000 requests from students who want to start or join a chapter:
---
[](http://trk.2025battleground.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4cawe&__onlt=h)
---
**God is so good.** ✝️🙏🕊️ To give you perspective, Friend... Coming into this school year, Turning Point USA had roughly 900+ college chapters and 1,200+ high school chapters. It took us years to build those chapters... over a decade in fact... _But now?_ These students who signed up? They weren't asked to... They weren't recruited... **They felt it was their time to stand up for this country and honor Charlie.** Because of the life he lived. The faith he had. The love he showed God, his family, and others. The courage he had to speak truth. And his vision of a better America for us all.
---
[](http://trk.2025battleground.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4cawe&__onlt=h)
---
He always believed this day would come. He used to talk about it all the time — how the momentum would shift, how young people would rise up with courage, and how a Turning Point USA chapter would be in every college and high school in America. And now... _It's happening._ Faster than he could have imagined. Bigger than we thought possible. And more beautiful than we can even describe. **Again, Friend, God is so good.** Since we lost Charlie, we've also felt SO MUCH love... Prayers. Emails. Messages. Stories about how Charlie's voice changed lives... or your children's or grandchildren's lives. And so many supporters have asked, _"What can I do?"_ As you read this, our team is working around the clock to follow up with every chapter request. And we're going to need help equipping them with our activism kits. **Every new chapter receives these kits from Turning Point USA with everything they need to get started — including:** ✅ Leadership materials
✅ Pocket Constitutions
✅ Chapter training tools
✅ American flags & patriotic gear Friend, I'm sure you'd believe it when we say it... _this won't be a small task._ But we're going to do it. Whatever it takes. **_For Charlie._** _And here's how YOU can help with this..._ **Every $25 you give today helps stock another activism kit — ready to deploy into a new Turning Point USA student chapter...** How many of these activism kits can you help provide to the wave of new student chapters that are just getting started?
---
[ **1 KIT = $25**](http://trk.2025battleground.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4cawe&__onlt=h)
---
[ **2 KITS = $50**](http://trk.2025battleground.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4cawe&__onlt=h)
---
[ **10 KITS = $250**](http://trk.2025battleground.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4cawe&__onlt=h)
---
[ **100 KITS = $2,500**](http://trk.2025battleground.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4cawe&__onlt=h)
---
[ **1,000 KITS = $25,000**](http://trk.2025battleground.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4cawe&__onlt=h)
---
[ **Sponsor Activism Kits**](http://trk.2025battleground.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4cawe&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, if there was ever a more immediate way you could help make Charlie's vision a reality... **This is it****.**
---
[](http://trk.2025battleground.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4cawe&__onlt=h)
---
Also... **Here's one more powerful thing you can do:** 📩 If you have a son, daughter, grandchild, niece, nephew — or any young person in your life — who wants to get involved... who wants to join or start a chapter... **Please send them this link:** **[TPUSAStudents.com/StartaChapter](http://trk.2025battleground.com/?xtl=u3vjmpooycjvh9127nwgbhnnxge3398p1m8slod7ahsxywxgullalqtve87ukzhxethsorfkspdkmnrg5hcfoejubmqqb7z8oajcm4wl34ni7tl6aettp1xow0hmmgj2lxkphya031bg&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4cawe&__onlt=h)** Friend, if you've already given... If you've already donated... If you've already been a voice of encouragement and strength in this painful week... If you've prayed, been praying, and continue to pray... **Thank you.** We can never say it enough. If you've read this far, we want you to know this... **You're the reason Charlie's mission and vision will grow for generations to come.** God is so good.
---
**For Charlie,** -The Turning Point USA Family **P.S.** Please know, Friend, if you can't afford to help right now, all we ask for are your prayers. Charlie would have wanted you to pray first — and if that's all you can give today, _we're grateful._ But if you're able to help... if you're overjoyed to hear that students are flocking to Charlie's message and mission... Your gift today helps sustain this wave of student inspiration and gets new student chapters off the ground floor... And ensures Charlie's vision is realized faster than we all thought possible. **Every $25 you give today helps us stock another activism kit ready to deploy to a new student chapter.**
---
[ **Sponsor an Activism Kit**
**Make Your Gift Here**](http://trk.2025battleground.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4cawe&__onlt=h)
---
Thank you for your help and for your prayers, Friend. **God is so good.** 🙏
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

[Unsubscribe](http://trk.2025battleground.com/?xul=t2p76x2ul3l184ws2kiv1kps6r6z50yq4mhcdrmvkc86j4zhtispzx0mlb60973qxkhtzvnzdiwx4mcs4rqpc22lh5y86ykepvrvjvqk5f&__stmp=t4cawe&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh) / [Privacy Policy](http://trk.2025battleground.com/?xtl=3wb9abchffduxm87va2omrkauvqhbl5zsb4e8dqbuahau0yeebg8vjp6058qoou744erv3taielqq1nbralass0e6zw3mhxz915cja3475mosysl0ynvdoslcrmo4fuvory1zzwg2zfwpg&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4cawe&__onlt=h) / [Contact us](http://trk.2025battleground.com/?xtl=6v37a3v8epg0vgcnbnhupnsntpwe5i9si2u6jj0doppxoyzevvi6cf2ljzebttkxc58sbx4sr7zzonoveanjqvpcuuhunhtjzrzb6nbvef8d0eqrir45xezmrw3wvu5vq53&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4cawe&__onlt=h)

And now... It's happening. Faster than he could have imagined. Bigger than we thought possible. And more beautiful than we can even describe. Again, Friend, God is so good. Since we lost Charlie, we've also felt SO MUCH love... Prayers. Emails. Messages. Stories about how Charlie's voice changed lives... or your children's or grandchildren's lives. And so many supporters have asked, "What can I do?" As you read this, our team is working around the clock to follow up with every chapter request. And we're going to need help equipping them with our activism kits. Every new chapter receives these kits from Turning Point USA with everything they need to get started — including: ✅ Leadership materials ✅ Pocket Constitutions ✅ Chapter training tools ✅ American flags & patriotic gear Friend, I'm sure you'd believe it when we say it... this won't be a small task. But we're going to do it. Whatever it takes. For Charlie. And here's how YOU can help with this... Every $25 you give today helps stock another activism kit — ready to deploy into a new Turning Point USA student chapter... How many of these activism kits can you help provide to the wave of new student chapters that are just getting started? Friend, if there was ever a more immediate way you could help make Charlie's vision a reality... This is it**. Also... Here's one more powerful thing you can do: 📩 If you have a son, daughter, grandchild, niece, nephew — or any young person in your life — who wants to get involved... who wants to join or start a chapter... Please send them this link: Friend, if you've already given... If you've already donated... If you've already been a voice of encouragement and strength in this painful week... If you've prayed, been praying, and continue to pray... Thank you. We can never say it enough. If you've read this far, we want you to know this... You're the reason Charlie's mission and vision will grow for generations to come. God is so good. For Charlie, -The Turning Point USA Family P.S. Please know, Friend, if you can't afford to help right now, all we ask for are your prayers. Charlie would have wanted you to pray first — and if that's all you can give today, we're grateful. But if you're able to help... if you're overjoyed to hear that students are flocking to Charlie's message and mission... Your gift today helps sustain this wave of student inspiration and gets new student chapters off the ground floor... And ensures Charlie's vision is realized faster than we all thought possible. Every $25 you give today helps us stock another activism kit ready to deploy to a new student chapter. Thank you for your help and for your prayers, Friend. God is so good. 🙏 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044 / / DISCLOSURE OF MATERIAL CONNECTION: Assume the sender of this email maintains an affiliate partnership or other material tie with entities or individuals referenced herein and may earn compensation from purchases made via linked websites. **High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter.** **Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained.** At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts. **By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch.** She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground.Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina. Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks. **She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history.** Nancy is fighting to:
* Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast
* Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency
* Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free
* Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate
* Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think
* Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST

Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front. **South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started.**

And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front. South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started. | | PAID FOR BY NANCY MACE FOR GOVERNOR | | 295 Seven Farms Drive, Suite C-186Charleston, SC 29492 |

name: The Turning Point USA Family
subject: God is so good
body:
[Mark as Spam](http://trk.americanmediawatchdog.com/?xul=6zs1j7t5dhe4avz97uxx7mw1pc6ekvvldfuyykqgl6pi76df14nwu8elowbzy0ulug27c1hhgvhijirbehw5x06cqyapuxkw8374k0a2kis7m7kn10&__stmp=t4cb2m&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh) | [Unsubscribe](http://trk.americanmediawatchdog.com/?xul=6zs1j7t5dhe4avz97uxx7mw1pc6ekvvldfuyykqgl6pi76df14nwu8elowbzy0ulug27c1hhgvhijirbehw5x06cqyapuxkw8374k0a2kis7m7kn10&__stmp=t4cb2m&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
---
Please read the message below from Turning Point USA.
* * *
| | | | [](http://trk.americanmediawatchdog.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4cb2m&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, Even now... it still doesn't feel real that we lost Charlie. His voice, his courage, his conviction — it shaped all of us. And his vision — **to build the most faithful and the most patriotic generation in American history** — is why Turning Point USA exists today. Friend, that's why we have an inspiring update for you... In just the first seven days since Charlie was taken from all of us, Turning Point USA has received more than 54,000 requests from students who want to start or join a chapter:
---
[](http://trk.americanmediawatchdog.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4cb2m&__onlt=h)
---
**God is so good.** ✝️🙏🕊️ To give you perspective, Friend... Coming into this school year, Turning Point USA had roughly 900+ college chapters and 1,200+ high school chapters. It took us years to build those chapters... over a decade in fact... _But now?_ These students who signed up? They weren't asked to... They weren't recruited... **They felt it was their time to stand up for this country and honor Charlie.** Because of the life he lived. The faith he had. The love he showed God, his family, and others. The courage he had to speak truth. And his vision of a better America for us all.
---
[](http://trk.americanmediawatchdog.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4cb2m&__onlt=h)
---
He always believed this day would come. He used to talk about it all the time — how the momentum would shift, how young people would rise up with courage, and how a Turning Point USA chapter would be in every college and high school in America. And now... _It's happening._ Faster than he could have imagined. Bigger than we thought possible. And more beautiful than we can even describe. **Again, Friend, God is so good.** Since we lost Charlie, we've also felt SO MUCH love... Prayers. Emails. Messages. Stories about how Charlie's voice changed lives... or your children's or grandchildren's lives. And so many supporters have asked, _"What can I do?"_ As you read this, our team is working around the clock to follow up with every chapter request. And we're going to need help equipping them with our activism kits. **Every new chapter receives these kits from Turning Point USA with everything they need to get started — including:** ✅ Leadership materials
✅ Pocket Constitutions
✅ Chapter training tools
✅ American flags & patriotic gear Friend, I'm sure you'd believe it when we say it... _this won't be a small task._ But we're going to do it. Whatever it takes. **_For Charlie._** _And here's how YOU can help with this..._ **Every $25 you give today helps stock another activism kit — ready to deploy into a new Turning Point USA student chapter...** How many of these activism kits can you help provide to the wave of new student chapters that are just getting started?
---
[ **1 KIT = $25**](http://trk.americanmediawatchdog.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4cb2m&__onlt=h)
---
[ **2 KITS = $50**](http://trk.americanmediawatchdog.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4cb2m&__onlt=h)
---
[ **10 KITS = $250**](http://trk.americanmediawatchdog.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4cb2m&__onlt=h)
---
[ **100 KITS = $2,500**](http://trk.americanmediawatchdog.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4cb2m&__onlt=h)
---
[ **1,000 KITS = $25,000**](http://trk.americanmediawatchdog.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4cb2m&__onlt=h)
---
[ **Sponsor Activism Kits**](http://trk.americanmediawatchdog.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4cb2m&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, if there was ever a more immediate way you could help make Charlie's vision a reality... **This is it****.**
---
[](http://trk.americanmediawatchdog.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4cb2m&__onlt=h)
---
Also... **Here's one more powerful thing you can do:** 📩 If you have a son, daughter, grandchild, niece, nephew — or any young person in your life — who wants to get involved... who wants to join or start a chapter... **Please send them this link:** **[TPUSAStudents.com/StartaChapter](http://trk.americanmediawatchdog.com/?xtl=71kqox8yyg2bnvoo47jh2zi1t28l32eu2zny57ev36b5qznyvapby98anbw44tzuzmxjn09i3eikslhfxe3eww86pyjt1ru124agbecj8fw979gi6vywd6uzxozc7pub44myk81zhu0gusm8f4pi&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4cb2m&__onlt=h)** Friend, if you've already given... If you've already donated... If you've already been a voice of encouragement and strength in this painful week... If you've prayed, been praying, and continue to pray... **Thank you.** We can never say it enough. If you've read this far, we want you to know this... **You're the reason Charlie's mission and vision will grow for generations to come.** God is so good.
---
**For Charlie,** -The Turning Point USA Family **P.S.** Please know, Friend, if you can't afford to help right now, all we ask for are your prayers. Charlie would have wanted you to pray first — and if that's all you can give today, _we're grateful._ But if you're able to help... if you're overjoyed to hear that students are flocking to Charlie's message and mission... Your gift today helps sustain this wave of student inspiration and gets new student chapters off the ground floor... And ensures Charlie's vision is realized faster than we all thought possible. **Every $25 you give today helps us stock another activism kit ready to deploy to a new student chapter.**
---
[ **Sponsor an Activism Kit**
**Make Your Gift Here**](http://trk.americanmediawatchdog.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4cb2m&__onlt=h)
---
Thank you for your help and for your prayers, Friend. **God is so good.** 🙏
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

[Unsubscribe](http://trk.americanmediawatchdog.com/?xul=6zs1j7t5dhe4avz97uxx7mw1pc6ekvvldfuyykqgl6pi76df14nwu8elowbzy0ulug27c1hhgvhijirbehw5x06cqyapuxkw8374k0a2kis7m7kn10&__stmp=t4cb2m&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh) / [Privacy Policy](http://trk.americanmediawatchdog.com/?xtl=dszevxp2qwtund58yj77bd7a5hmvqal7n7b7pyd52d8s4stkgviqve5y0bgnb7pefvtzat192w4ii4bja8dmxn3bmoh3zipkuleqytxnuffi9a8erkpa3yiyzbvzwv20gqu2gh94ac28elq1p034n4iyzdqp759b&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4cb2m&__onlt=h) / [Contact us](http://trk.americanmediawatchdog.com/?xtl=9iblichpa4uy1mv0m2dnu0sksd9mbd6u6pi9wbw9fbw13oxt1ccnfzzcnxxxhgisujotpe6xr2j3tkravefxw4empenam9v6alznsh611si2tzju14jv7k20y3twfeoper9m6j8mjp57xjj4u8xxp9y&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4cb2m&__onlt=h)

Hello, I’m emailing to ask you to give $1 before midnight tonight to help me defeat Susan Collins. And no, that’s not a mistake. I’m really asking for just $1. Our campaign needs to raise $50,000 before midnight tonight, but we’re still really short of what we need to take on the corporations & the billionaires and defeat Susan Collins. A single dollar probably feels like too little to make a difference – but it’s not. When your $1 is combined with thousands of other folks chipping in their $1, the impact is enormous. Your $1 is how we hire staff, build out a team, and open field offices all across Maine. Your $1 is how we fill up the tank to drive around the state and hold town halls to meet with voters ready to send Susan Collins into retirement. Your $1 is how we run TV ads holding Susan Collins accountable, pay for yard signs, and everything else a campaign needs to win. And your $1 is how we’ll protect our democracy by flipping this seat blue and taking back the Senate for Democrats in 2026. If you and everyone else who gets this email chips in just $1 now, we will crush our goal and defeat Susan Collins once and for all next November. But I’m counting on you to give now if we’re going to win and flip Maine blue: [_**Please, will you split $1 right now between our campaign and Martin Heinrich – more if you can! – to help me defeat Susan Collins, flip Maine blue, and take back the Senate for Democrats? clean_body: Hello, I’m emailing to ask you to give $1 before midnight tonight to help me defeat Susan Collins. And no, that’s not a mistake. I’m really asking for just $1. Our campaign needs to raise $50,000 before midnight tonight, but we’re still really short of what we need to take on the corporations & the billionaires and defeat Susan Collins. A single dollar probably feels like too little to make a difference – but it’s not. When your $1 is combined with thousands of other folks chipping in their $1, the impact is enormous. Your $1 is how we hire staff, build out a team, and open field offices all across Maine. Your $1 is how we fill up the tank to drive around the state and hold town halls to meet with voters ready to send Susan Collins into retirement. Your $1 is how we run TV ads holding Susan Collins accountable, pay for yard signs, and everything else a campaign needs to win. And your $1 is how we’ll protect our democracy by flipping this seat blue and taking back the Senate for Democrats in 2026. If you and everyone else who gets this email chips in just $1 now, we will crush our goal and defeat Susan Collins once and for all next November. But I’m counting on you to give now if we’re going to win and flip Maine blue: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Graham Platner and Martin Heinrich will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = We can defeat Susan Collins and protect our democracy from fascists trying to destroy it – but we can only do it if folks like you chip in what you can afford to today. Here’s something I’m proud of, Peter:

**My team crunched the numbers, and they told me that our average online donation in the third quarter was just $20.88.**

This is a testament to the power of our grassroots movement. An average donation of around $20 shows that we’re supported by folks chipping in a few dollars when they can, not relying on special interests to stay afloat.

I was one of a small handful of Democrats who flipped Republican-controlled seats in last year’s election. Since then, I’ve been laser-focused on delivering results back to CA-27 despite the Republican majority in Congress and chaos from the White House.

And while I’m focusing on Antelope, San Fernando, and Santa Clarita Valleys, the national GOP is focused on tearing our campaign down because they know CA-27 is key for House control in 2026. It’s why I’m already facing targeted attack ads and outside spending.

**[Whether it’s $1, $20.88, or any amount, every donation boosts our on-the-ground voter outreach efforts to keep this seat blue. And while I’m focusing on Antelope, San Fernando, and Santa Clarita Valleys, the national GOP is focused on tearing our campaign down because they know CA-27 is key for House control in 2026. It’s why I’m already facing targeted attack ads and outside spending. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **= | = ---|--- = | = = | =** Thank you, George | = = = George has spent his career solving problems. Now, he’s ready to deliver for the people of California's 27th Congressional District. = To learn more about George and his commitment to working families, please visit: = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . George Whitesides for Congress P.O. Box 221776 Newhall, CA 91322 United States

name: Breaking:
subject: Defend Our Courts pulls off coup in 2025 PA Supreme Court Race
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEFEND OUR COURTS, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE
body:
Utilizing insider information leaked to us by a source within the Pennsylvania conservative printing industry, we just spent $150,000 to send a counter-mailer to 210,000 to dems
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ALTSLtojZFxnkPe7TK_IxN9cUyqdB-4UhQAtPENycmpOhreJgoHHM3oKQS83CXeZPSjAf3kBncTu6DETe_duaK58jRDXw4enzKZ1o6UG9eNwJOjFDsLPbDehLVxjBDnrvraiVznEtv4QxqLpPvVkSbmYiGICXCx2JMJ83Bl88uYYc0V8KjYAAXhZMyrvc_fZ0qNx7o1XBs9AFGaH8h6_ee8bHutKcopOrhj-izYq6bk=&c=XEwcEZm7TTk4vh8VlzYdRahK8Q2md_myQOZ8Fqdpdt-MpBgjX7KE7w==&ch=nFDtuBiP4hgtGIQrshbY3_AA_4cixVGdAznfDSCBAlX566ISNjyrgQ==)
---
|
Peter,
Over the past few weeks, the November 4th Pennsylvania Supreme Court election has gone thermonuclear and become the most important race in the nation.
The stakes of this race are unimaginably high. If Democrats lose here, MAGA can ensure we never win Pennsylvania and its 19 electoral college votes for the next decade and beyond.
Over the past few weeks Pennsylvania voters have been flooded with messaging pushed by organizations supported by ultra-MAGA billionaire Jeff Yass, the richest man in PA, that use progressive messaging (protect democracy, protect women, vote for term limits) and encourages them to vote no which is the GOP's ballot choice.
This has been the defining story of this race and polling has shown that this is confusing Democratic and Independent voters and leading some to inadvertently vote for MAGA.
---
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ALTSLtojZFxnkPe7TK_IxN9cUyqdB-4UhQAtPENycmpOhreJgoHHM3oKQS83CXeZPSjAf3kBncTu6DETe_duaK58jRDXw4enzKZ1o6UG9eNwJOjFDsLPbDehLVxjBDnrvraiVznEtv4QxqLpPvVkSbmYiGICXCx2JMJ83Bl88uYYc0V8KjYAAXhZMyrvc_fZ0qNx7o1XBs9AFGaH8h6_eUIKnwg30VtLlO-yQ8ZNrzk=&c=XEwcEZm7TTk4vh8VlzYdRahK8Q2md_myQOZ8Fqdpdt-MpBgjX7KE7w==&ch=nFDtuBiP4hgtGIQrshbY3_AA_4cixVGdAznfDSCBAlX566ISNjyrgQ==)
---
Some of the deceptive ads and mailings that MAGA is using to confuse Democrats into supporting the MAGA ballot choice.
---
Today Defend Our Courts just pulled off nothing short of a coup and strategically disrupted MAGA's plans, fundamentally altering the trajectory of this race.
Utilizing insider information leaked to us by a source within the Pennsylvania conservative printing industry, we just spent $150,000 to send a counter-mailer to 210,000 of the Democratic and Independent households who were targeted with MAGA's disinformation mailers.
Our message counters MAGA's deceptions by making it abundantly clear that the only way to protect abortion in Pennsylvania, a stance deeply popular amongst Democrats and Independents alike, is to vote yes (the Democratic ballot choice) on November 4th.
---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ALTSLtojZFxnkPe7TK_IxN9cUyqdB-4UhQAtPENycmpOhreJgoHHM3oKQS83CXeZPSjAf3kBncTu6DETe_duaK58jRDXw4enzKZ1o6UG9eNwJOjFDsLPbDehLVxjBDnrvraiVznEtv4QxqLpPvVkSbmYiGICXCx2JMJ83Bl88uYYc0V8KjYAAXhZMyrvc_fZ0qNx7o1XBs9AFGaH8h6_eY4kSbaMQO_mUb5T_Ct9rOY=&c=XEwcEZm7TTk4vh8VlzYdRahK8Q2md_myQOZ8Fqdpdt-MpBgjX7KE7w==&ch=nFDtuBiP4hgtGIQrshbY3_AA_4cixVGdAznfDSCBAlX566ISNjyrgQ==)
---
The Defend Our Courts counter-mailer being sent to every Democrat targeted by deceptive MAGA mailers. Your grassroots contributions made this possible.

The stakes of this race are unimaginably high. If Democrats lose here, MAGA can ensure we never win Pennsylvania and its 19 electoral college votes for the next decade and beyond. Over the past few weeks Pennsylvania voters have been flooded with messaging pushed by organizations supported by ultra-MAGA billionaire Jeff Yass, the richest man in PA, that use progressive messaging (protect democracy, protect women, vote for term limits) and encourages them to vote no which is the GOP's ballot choice. This has been the defining story of this race and polling has shown that this is confusing Democratic and Independent voters and leading some to inadvertently vote for MAGA. | | | | | == Some of the deceptive ads and mailings that MAGA is using to confuse Democrats into supporting the MAGA ballot choice. body:
Social media users are reporting these signs along with vote-no operatives pretending to be No Kings attendees across the state. We can't let them get away with this.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rc_4Dk4MMPgUfua_FM83TJMmzSYYluz8cBMST2BLV-oMuobkyEHiJ7psAtGFMp3bgapTYbYf8-734MWhNcwU03wsDxP_urETdNqgrxI7708Gtl-qyZKxOaQt8nAXT2eOtbOV1OYeSRutq4H53n7mzo1J1oGfzzeDc7cfX7drkpLvQQqC71531Lva7Lb7RWlfGBbL0NeGKxMIGf1LtzMBk6-GP7PEtsBLJwGd38pFCc8=&c=Ly3iZtHS6I4CLIYRRaz3XoGiYhM-0CQe04ZPaRi4fXin4l4LsDjT3w==&ch=hA-mIOxOtJzjl8gKmAxBY1DImms2rmSsSq6mqccuJBGlXBlt51aMIA==)

|
Peter,
In over 33,000 cities across the United States, millions of Americans are participating in No Kings rallies in defiance of the Trump administration.
These protests carry an added weight in Pennsylvania where voters are 17 days out from the November 4th, 2025, Pennsylvania Supreme Court Retention election.
On the line is control of elections in the keystone state, the backbone of the Democratic party's blue wall strategy for winning Presidential elections since 2008.
MAGA is dead set on winning this election no matter the cost, investing millions into ads and mailers aimed at deceiving Democratic voters into voting no on retention--the GOP choice on the ballot (the ballots do not show the judge's partisan affiliation).
Now they've opened up a new front, deceptive false flag canvassing and signage at No Kings rallies across Pennsylvania:
---
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rc_4Dk4MMPgUfua_FM83TJMmzSYYluz8cBMST2BLV-oMuobkyEHiJ7psAtGFMp3bgapTYbYf8-734MWhNcwU03wsDxP_urETdNqgrxI7708Gtl-qyZKxOaQt8nAXT2eOtbOV1OYeSRutq4H53n7mzo1J1oGfzzeDc7cfX7drkpLvQQqC71531Lva7Lb7RWlfGBbL0NeGKxMIGf1LtzMBk8efEsxfpHD2bG74uXN-D6I=&c=Ly3iZtHS6I4CLIYRRaz3XoGiYhM-0CQe04ZPaRi4fXin4l4LsDjT3w==&ch=hA-mIOxOtJzjl8gKmAxBY1DImms2rmSsSq6mqccuJBGlXBlt51aMIA==)
---
On the left is Scott Pressler, the GOP operative leading MAGA's covert push, with a deceptive sign placed at a No Kings Rally in Philadelphia. Social media users are reporting these signs along with vote-no operatives pretending to be No Kings attendees at rallies across the state.
Early Vote Action, the group responsible for this, is funded by Elon Musk and accused human trafficker Tristan Tate, the brother of masculinity influencer Andrew Tate.
The GOP's strategy of deception is working. Recent polling shows that Democratic and Independent voters alike are confused on whether or not to vote yes or vote no.
Democrats are hanging on by a thread here and if the election were held today, there is a real chance we would lose. We can't let them get away with this.
Defend our Courts is holding the line and pushing back against MAGA's insidious disinformation campaign. name: Marlene [Democrat for AZ-01]
subject: Say NO to Trump’s reign of terror
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARLENE FOR CONGRESS
body:
Congress needs to pass the No Kings Act.

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117542791/576827019/-1882479441?refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2025.10.18_No-Kings_B1_F1_S1_C1_AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDVmM2Y1Y2ItNTlhYy1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=9ir1LYaIupGu6UyJAH-MEntUNmc5fBU6HcYF715-DW8=)
---
Folks — Donald Trump believes he’s a king.
* He has broken the law time and time again, incited a violent insurrection, and covered up his ties to Epstein.
* He has repeatedly abused his power, from pardoning January 6th insurrectionists to appointing an unelected billionaire to run a fake government agency.
* He has stacked the Supreme Court with far-right extremists who will prop up his corrupt agenda.
* He has defunded public media and attempted to eliminate the freedom of the press.

_The list could go on and on. I’ve had enough of Trump’s reign of terror._ That’s why I’m standing with Arizonans to send a clear message: **power belongs to the PEOPLE** , not this corrupt administration. It’s time to put a check on Trump’s power — and the _No Kings Act_ will do just that. **[_If you agree there are NO kings in the United States, will you be one of the 7,000 signatures I need to show overwhelming public support for Congress to pass the _No Kings Act_?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117542792/576827020/-288024811?refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2025.10.18_No-Kings_B1_F1_S1_C1_AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDVmM2Y1Y2ItNTlhYy1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=9ir1LYaIupGu6UyJAH-MEntUNmc5fBU6HcYF715-DW8=&emci=fc7aa511-07aa-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=05f3f5cb-59ac-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=626985)** | | [ ADD MY NAME >> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117542793/576827021/-288024811?refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2025.10.18_No-Kings_B1_F1_S1_C1_AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDVmM2Y1Y2ItNTlhYy1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=9ir1LYaIupGu6UyJAH-MEntUNmc5fBU6HcYF715-DW8=&emci=fc7aa511-07aa-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=05f3f5cb-59ac-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=626985)

clean_body: Congress needs to pass the No Kings Act. | | = Folks — Donald Trump believes he’s a king. He has broken the law time and time again, incited a violent insurrection, and covered up his ties to Epstein. He has repeatedly abused his power, from pardoning January 6th insurrectionists to appointing an unelected billionaire to run a fake government agency. He has stacked the Supreme Court with far-right extremists who will prop up his corrupt agenda. He has defunded public media and attempted to eliminate the freedom of the press. The list could go on and on. I’ve had enough of Trump’s reign of terror. That’s why I’m standing with Arizonans to send a clear message: power belongs to the PEOPLE , not this corrupt administration. It’s time to put a check on Trump’s power — and the No Kings Act will do just that. | | Thank you for taking a stand, Marlene Galán-Woods | To learn more about Marlene, visit: We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to PAID FOR BY MARLENE FOR CONGRESS Marlene for Congress 7904 E. Chaparral Road, Suite A110-472 Scottsdale, AZ 85250 United States

body:
I’m out of options...
| **__A Note from Rep. Elise Stefanik__**
---
Peter,
---
Kathy Hochul is raising millions of dollars to BUY New York.
---
**Meanwhile, we’re struggling to raise the final $18,020 we need to reach our critical fundraising benchmark with only hours to go until the mid-month cutoff at 11:59 P.M. TONIGHT! **
---
At this late hour, I’m out of options. We don’t have any campaign checks left to cash, or any emergency funds we can draw from...

...My only hope of reaching our goal is this one final note to all of my _TOP_ grassroots supporters.

Meanwhile, we’re struggling to raise the final $18,020 we need to reach our critical fundraising benchmark with only hours to go until the mid-month cutoff at 11:59 P.M. TONIGHT! At this late hour, I’m out of options. We don’t have any campaign checks left to cash, or any emergency funds we can draw from... ...My only hope of reaching our goal is this one final note to all of my TOP grassroots supporters. As always: If you’ve given all that you can, or can’t afford to contribute right now, please simply disregard what I’m about to ask. But if you can spare even just $5 to help us reach this goal, I could urgently use the support. Thank you, Rep. subject: Peter, your MAGA record has been flagged for review.
body:
Peter, our system just flagged your MAGA file, and I'm not happy about it.
You're showing up as UNVERIFIED on some of the most critical issues facing our nation, AND our records indicate YOU'RE a supporter of D.C. statehood - which would be a TOTAL disaster.[ | ⚠️ ALERT for Peter We've detected **3 MAJOR ISSUES** in your MAGA Profile:
---

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Pam Bondi told me she would fire me if she could
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
The Department of Justice should be pursuing accountability, cracking down on corruption, and defending the Constitution. But under this administration, the DOJ is a tool for attacking enemies and covering up wrongdoing.
| | | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T38bad177-7fb0-4eb2-8541-43d874f6eb20/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Peter – Attorney General Pam Bondi appeared at her first oversight hearing after nine months of her stewardship of the Justice Department. It was urgent — after all, hundreds of career prosecutors have quit because of the politicization of the Justice Department and the fear that they might have to take unethical actions at the direction of Trump and Bondi. We’ve seen the DOJ cover up the corruption of the administration and its friends — like the WH Border Czar taking $50,000 in cash from undercover FBI agents. Or the corruption case against the Mayor of NYC. Or the Epstein files. And we’ve seen the department prosecute the president’s enemies at the president’s urging — like James Comey — even though career prosecutors said the case lacked evidence. Peter, it’s safe to say Pam Bondi was not too pleased with my line of questioning. Don’t just take it from me, look at some of the headlines from the hearing: [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta6e99013-3d96-45d8-94e1-1ab43c45d485/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Peter, the Department of Justice has become Trump’s personal sword to go after his ever-growing list of political enemies, including me. And his shield to cover up corruption and hide wrongdoing. And Pam Bondi has enabled this behavior. Instead of going after Tom Homan, Trump’s border czar, for taking the 50 thousand in cash, the DOJ shut down the investigation. When I asked Attorney General Bondi about this, she deflected responsibility. Said she didn’t know or wouldn’t comment about the case. She said that I should be fired. Peter, she even said I should apologize to Donald Trump for leading his first impeachment trial. Not gonna happen. The Department of Justice should be pursuing accountability, cracking down on corruption, and defending the Constitution. But under this administration, the DOJ is a tool for attacking enemies and covering up wrongdoing. I will continue to use my position on the Judiciary Committee to conduct hard oversight and demand concrete answers. I will call out corruption and speak out against any and every attempt to weaponize our legal system against Trump’s political opponents. I will not give in, and not back down. [Please, help me and Blue Amp Action stand up to this corruption — pitch in to our work demanding accountability.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T93a9c510-448a-49c4-bf05-d74f8a7c9d53/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE $25](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7ee63acf-040e-4f63-9213-a71ba30bc43e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE $50](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8ae3e496-b2f0-46d6-8ee4-2424b139c1e4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE MORE](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td954ba7a-f55b-4404-801c-240868baf513/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Thank you, Adam
---
|

---

PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/loc_em_fr_20251018_schiff-bondi_b1_f1_s1_c1_warmup_n-t1?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T387ef672-b331-45ce-b21e-cc7376ae1790/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Wes Moore
subject: Old Bay on ice cream
body:
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=774%2E1086043%2E2a9Rr4)
Hey, Peter.
Recently, I sat down with my team to answer some of the most searched questions about me. **[Before we get started, will you pitch in $5 to my campaign today?](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251018-1.-lPK7K&refcode=em-20251018-1&t=4&akid=774%2E1086043%2E2a9Rr4)**
Let’s get into it.
To be honest, you guys search about _everything_ I could imagine. From whether I’m left-handed, to my middle name(s), to what we’ve accomplished here in Maryland -- there’s no shortage of things to Google.
So here’s the basics about me:
* I’m 47 years old (as of three days ago!) and am happily married with two wonderful kids.
* My parents gave me two middle names: “Watende” and “Omari,” meaning my full name is Westley Watende Omari Moore.
* I’m ambidextrous... I think I was born left-handed, but my parents thought it was weird so they tried to put everything in my right hand.
* I will toss Old Bay on _anything_ , even my ice cream, it’s that good.

Now, what many of you also are wondering: **What have we accomplished together in Maryland so far?**
* We’ve created **historic job growth** , and Maryland has one of the lowest unemployment rates in the country.
* We’ve seen one of the **fastest drops in violent crime** anywhere in the United States.
* We’re raising the minimum wage and implemented the largest mass pardons in U.S. history to **give great opportunities for Marylanders to grow.**

And that’s just the start. **Everything we do is to make sure that we Leave No One Behind.**
Now, it’s my turn to ask you a question: **[Will you chip in $5 or whatever you can today to help out my reelection campaign? Every dollar donated will help us continue our record of fighting for Maryland.](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251018-1.-lPK7K&refcode=em-20251018-1&t=5&akid=774%2E1086043%2E2a9Rr4)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251018-1.-lPK7K&amount=5&refcode=em-20251018-1&t=24&akid=774%2E1086043%2E2a9Rr4)**
If you’ve got more questions, keep them coming. I’ll answer more in a future email.
Elevate,
Wes
[](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251018-1.-lPK7K&refcode=em-20251018-1&t=25&akid=774%2E1086043%2E2a9Rr4)

* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-footer?refcode=em-20251018-1&t=26&refcode2=774_1086043_2a9Rr4&akid=774%2E1086043%2E2a9Rr4)**

clean_body: Hey, Peter. Recently, I sat down with my team to answer some of the most searched questions about me. Let’s get into it. To be honest, you guys search about everything I could imagine. From whether I’m left-handed, to my middle name(s), to what we’ve accomplished here in Maryland -- there’s no shortage of things to Google. So here’s the basics about me: I’m 47 years old (as of three days ago!) and am happily married with two wonderful kids. My parents gave me two middle names: “Watende” and “Omari,” meaning my full name is Westley Watende Omari Moore. I’m ambidextrous... I think I was born left-handed, but my parents thought it was weird so they tried to put everything in my right hand. I will toss Old Bay on anything , even my ice cream, it’s that good. Now, what many of you also are wondering: What have we accomplished together in Maryland so far? We’ve created historic job growth , and Maryland has one of the lowest unemployment rates in the country. We’ve seen one of the fastest drops in violent crime anywhere in the United States. We’re raising the minimum wage and implemented the largest mass pardons in U.S. history to give great opportunities for Marylanders to grow. And that’s just the start. Everything we do is to make sure that we Leave No One Behind. Now, it’s my turn to ask you a question: If you’ve got more questions, keep them coming. I’ll answer more in a future email. Elevate, Wes

body:
Kansas GOP leadership is spending nearly half a million dollars in YOUR money to gerrymander our state’s maps

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117542993/576827772/-240735101?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYTcyOGM3OC01Y2FjLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rq6N9lxfdz1MD5JwfL76ej91JDnMzxU3ZzVU9J0xkLM=) I’ll get right to the point: Kansas GOP leadership just approved spending an extra **$460,000** in taxpayer money in next year’s budget. How will those resources — _your_ tax dollars — be spent? Not more teachers in Kansas’ classrooms. Not more equipment for first responders. Not targeted tax relief from Trump’s cost-of-living crisis. Nope — Kansas GOP leadership is spending nearly half a million dollars in YOUR money to gerrymander our state’s maps and give National Republicans even more power over our day-to-day lives. They expect all of us to go along with it... to sit quietly as they spend taxpayer dollars to enrich _themselves_ with more political power. Well, I’m not interested in staying quiet — and I hope you aren’t either. But the truth is, we have our work cut out for us in this fight. That’s why I need to ask: [_**If you’re still with me, and you’re able to contribute, I’d be so, so grateful if you could pitch in a grassroots donation before midnight. The GOP’s special session is coming up in less than a month, so we’re _really_ running low on time to put the pressure on Kansas Republicans.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117542994/576827773/-1213029538?refcode=email_101825_money&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYTcyOGM3OC01Y2FjLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rq6N9lxfdz1MD5JwfL76ej91JDnMzxU3ZzVU9J0xkLM=) | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117542995/576827774/-1213029538?refcode=email_101825_money&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYTcyOGM3OC01Y2FjLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rq6N9lxfdz1MD5JwfL76ej91JDnMzxU3ZzVU9J0xkLM=)

There is a path out of this authoritarian doom loop — but it’s narrow, and it’s going to take all of us working together. As a movement of grassroots activists, we must demand that pro-voter lawmakers in Congress take specific steps to secure free and fair elections:
1. Pass pro-democracy legislation like the Freedom to Vote Act and the John R. Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act to ban partisan gerrymandering, require nonpartisan redistricting, and protect Americans from restrictive laws passed in states after the Supreme Court weakened the Voting Rights Act.
2. Launch hearings and investigations into gerrymandered maps around the country to expose how minority voters are being silenced and build the case for reform.
3. Reform and hold the Supreme Court accountable — enforcing transparency, setting ethical standards, and considering structural reforms — to ensure the Supreme Court serves the Constitution rather than entrenched power.

name: Elise Stefanik
subject: Comrade Kathy Hochul has endorsed Zohran Mamdani
body:
The worst governor in America just bent the knee to the radical left.

| | | | |
---
Friend, this is a major development.
Governor Kathy Hochul, the WORST governor in America, just bent the knee to the radical left by officially endorsing communist extremist Zohran Mamdani for mayor of New York City.

[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/blQd/?__vbtrk=MzI3NDg4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzI3NDg4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
This is not politics as usual. Zohran Mamdani isn’t just another Democrat. Zohran is a proud communist sympathizer, an anti-law enforcement activist, and an anti-Israel radical who wants to**_defund the police_** ,**_abolish prisons_** ,**_decriminalize prostitution_** , and**_dismantle capitalism_** from the inside.
Kathy Hochul just gave her blessing to this extremism and co-signed some of the most dangerous policies in American history.
By bending the knee to unrepentant leftist radicals she has officially turned her back on suburban families, Americans workers, Jewish communities, and law enforcement.
_**[This is a line in the sand in the fight to save our country. We cannot let them win NY and we need you in this fight with us](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/blQd/?__vbtrk=MzI3NDg4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzI3NDg4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**_**.**

[HELP ELISE SAVE NEW YORK](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/blQd/?__vbtrk=MzI3NDg4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzI3NDg4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
If you think that Kathy Hochul and Zohran Mamdani allowing their criminals to run wild in New York won’t spill over into neighboring states, and states all across the entire country, you’re mistaken.
Zohran Mamdani's extremism and Kathy Hochul’s support of it will lead to devastation in every corner of our country.
This is about keeping our communities safe, protecting American values, and stopping a full-blown political and cultural collapse before it’s too late.
**_[Your contribution today will directly fund the movement to resist this agenda. Every dollar helps build a political operation that will expose the truth and organize voters](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/blQd/?__vbtrk=MzI3NDg4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzI3NDg4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**
Please, chip in whatever you can to help us resist their leftist agenda.
Patriot, this is a major test of the America First movement and I am counting on you to help me defend the freedom and values that have made America the greatest nation on earth.

_Your fellow patriot,_
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/blQd/?__vbtrk=MzI3NDg4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzI3NDg4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
**Elise Stefanik**
Proud New Yorker
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/blQd/?__vbtrk=MzI3NDg4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzI3NDg4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

body:
# [](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1&akid=2964%2E582294%2Em-DTvg)
This is not the message I wanted to be sending.
**Right now we’re behind where we need to be in fundraising for the month of October.**
New polling shows us neck-and-neck with Republican John Sununu, who could put his hat in the ring any day now. _This is not the time for us to be losing ground._
I have to ask this grassroots team again: [**Will you chip in any amount to turn things around and help send me to the Senate to fight for New Hampshire?**](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251018_2_behind.jT_HJD&refcode=em20251018-2&t=2&akid=2964%2E582294%2Em-DTvg)
National Republicans know that flipping New Hampshire will stop Democrats’ chances of controlling the Senate — so they’re going to do whatever it takes to defeat us.
I’ve been fighting for New Hampshire in Congress, and I’m ready to do the same in the Senate. But this will be one of the most competitive races in the country. To beat back Republicans and their corporate PAC funding, I’ll need your help.
[**If everyone reading this pitches in even just $5 today, we’d be back on track. Together we can keep New Hampshire blue. Will you donate today?**](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251018_2_behind.jT_HJD&refcode=em20251018-2&t=3&akid=2964%2E582294%2Em-DTvg)
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251018_2_behind.jT_HJD&amount=5&refcode=em20251018-2&t=22&akid=2964%2E582294%2Em-DTvg)**
I’m so grateful to have you with us.
Thank you,
Chris Pappas
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_footer?refcode=em20251018-2&t=23&refcode2=2964_582294_m-DTvg&akid=2964%2E582294%2Em-DTvg)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_receive_fewer_emails/?t=24&akid=2964%2E582294%2Em-DTvg)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_update_your_information/?t=25&akid=2964%2E582294%2Em-DTvg)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.chrispappas.org/unsubscribe/cps_unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=2964%2E582294%2Em-DTvg)

Email us: [teampappas@chrispappas.org](mailto:teampappas@chrispappas.org)

name: Marsha Blackburn
subject: I owe you big time, Peter!
body:
| | | | Peter, it’s Marsha Blackburn!
I know my team and I have been reaching out a lot lately, but your support truly means more than you know. To show just how much it means to me, I am coming just to you with an exciting opportunity today.
My team has been hard at work creating a brand-new merch item to celebrate our great nation, show our patriotism off with pride, stand strong for FAITH and FREEDOM, and show the Left that we are “ONE NATION UNDER GOD.”
[As a small token of my appreciation, I have put the very first one on hold for you in our Merch Store and attached your confirmation below:](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn.-9t7FyAZoqsFMgftQ)MERCH STORE ITEM HOLD CONFIRMATION
Hold Status: ConfirmedID Code: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn.)-25-908Offer Expires: Monday, 10/20/2025[CLAIM YOUR EXCLUSIVE ITEM NOW >>
](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn.)I don’t expect you to read your email every second of every day, especially on a weekend, so I’m giving you a window to see this and claim your item.
Your hold reservation expires at 11:59 PM on Monday, October 20th.
But, Peter, I wouldn’t wait too long to claim your exclusive item. We are going to open these up to the rest of our file very soon, and I have a feeling they will go quickly!
Thank you again for all of your support and for EVERYTHING you do!
\- Marsha Blackburn| | |

name: Katie Porter
subject: What it means to live the promise of California
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
California should be a place where you can get a great education, find a good job, and afford to stay through retirement.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=40283%2E3422442%2ELqyWjX)
Peter,
I’m running for governor because California needs bold leadership from someone who knows what it means to _live_ the promise of California.
I came to California for job opportunities, for a place to raise my family, and for a state where my kids could thrive. But that promise is slipping away for too many families.
The cost of living keeps rising and the housing crisis has only gotten worse. As governor, I will be focused on making sure California continues to be what it was for my family and what I want it to be for my kids:
_A place where you can get a great education, find a good job, and afford to stay through retirement._
That won’t happen through business-as-usual politics. It requires leaders who are not afraid to challenge the status quo. That’s what I did in Congress—holding Wall Street, Big Oil, and Trump’s cronies accountable in public hearings.
I’m running for governor to take that experience to Sacramento and fight for families like my own. But to help the Californians being squeezed the hardest, we need serious resources.
**[Can you donate $5 today to help us build a statewide campaign focused on lowering costs, tackling the housing crisis, and keeping California a place working families can call home?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251018_1_ak.mAEUCh&refcode=em20251018-40283&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=40283%2E3422442%2ELqyWjX)**
[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251018_1_ak.mAEUCh&refcode=em20251018-40283&t=22&akid=40283%2E3422442%2ELqyWjX)
Thank you,
Katie

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20251018-40283&amounts=&t=23&refcode2=40283_3422442_LqyWjX&akid=40283%2E3422442%2ELqyWjX)**

name: Jocelyn Benson
subject: Lessons from my parents’ classroom
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR
body:
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=844%2E181023%2Ek80eSL)
Team — Growing up, my parents taught me that everyone deserves to get a fair shot in life.
[](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q42025.hprbVa&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251018_PM1_V1_S1&t=2&akid=844%2E181023%2Ek80eSL)
They were public school teachers working in special education, and I loved joining them.
Sitting with them in the back of their classrooms, I learned the importance of serving others.
I’ve carried the lessons they taught me every step of my life — from my time as a voting rights lawyer, to leading Wayne State Law School, to serving as Secretary of State.
I’ve never given up the fight to give everyone a fair chance. I’m running for Governor of Michigan to continue that work and make sure that every Michigan family has that fair shot. **[If you’re with me, will you pitch in a donation of any amount today?](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q42025.hprbVa&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251018_PM1_V1_S1&t=3&akid=844%2E181023%2Ek80eSL)**
[](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q42025.hprbVa&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251018_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=844%2E181023%2Ek80eSL)
I’ve investigated radical extremist groups and taught civil rights and voting rights law. I ran for Secretary of State to make sure our state’s government is efficient and transparent, that every voice is heard, and that every legitimate vote is counted.
I’ve spent my life standing up to powerful interests, and I’ll keep standing up to any bullies or billionaires who try to deceive us, divide us, take away our rights, or deprive us of our opportunities.
**Now, I’m ready to continue this fight as Michigan’s next Governor to make Michigan the best place to be a kid, raise a kid, stay, and call home.[Will you join me by making a donation today?](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/854?c0=jmb-em-q42025.hVxyII&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251018_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=844%2E181023%2Ek80eSL)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: Team — Growing up, my parents taught me that everyone deserves to get a fair shot in life. They were public school teachers working in special education, and I loved joining them. Sitting with them in the back of their classrooms, I learned the importance of serving others. I’ve carried the lessons they taught me every step of my life — from my time as a voting rights lawyer, to leading Wayne State Law School, to serving as Secretary of State. I’ve never given up the fight to give everyone a fair chance. I’m running for Governor of Michigan to continue that work and make sure that every Michigan family has that fair shot. I’ve investigated radical extremist groups and taught civil rights and voting rights law. I ran for Secretary of State to make sure our state’s government is efficient and transparent, that every voice is heard, and that every legitimate vote is counted. I’ve spent my life standing up to powerful interests, and I’ll keep standing up to any bullies or billionaires who try to deceive us, divide us, take away our rights, or deprive us of our opportunities. Now, I’m ready to continue this fight as Michigan’s next Governor to make Michigan the best place to be a kid, raise a kid, stay, and call home. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | Thanks for being part of this, and thanks for taking the time to read this message. — Jocelyn

name: Mazie Hirono
subject: Priorities
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii**
body:
|
#
---
My priority for you is clear, Peter: Lower your costs so you and your family can afford health care. But Republicans? Their priority is to make the richest people in the country even richer — **even if that means raising your health care costs so they can hand out massive tax breaks to billionaires.** Republicans could end the government shutdown _today_ if they agreed to protect Americans’ health care, but they refuse to come to the table and fix the crisis they created. Believe me, Peter: while Republicans continue to choose billionaires over working families, I’m going to keep fighting to fund the government and make health care more affordable. **[So if you can, please pitch in today to stand with me and my Senate Democratic colleagues to help us keep the pressure on Republicans until they reopen the government and lower health care costs:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117543781/576830478/-459997209?refcode=AU_MKH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251018_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTU1NjEzMC02MGFjLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JAMH2SPNQ8V_NbJBaNBtkfFgjIpbzgAhsChBNEHxDmU=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117543782/576830479/-459997209?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_MKH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251018_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTU1NjEzMC02MGFjLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JAMH2SPNQ8V_NbJBaNBtkfFgjIpbzgAhsChBNEHxDmU=)

name: Hector Mujica
subject: I’m running for U.S. Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Floridians deserve a Senator who will build ladders so families can rise — just like mine did.
| Friend,

When my family came to South Florida from Venezuela, we didn’t have much – just faith, hard work, and the belief that a better future was possible.

Our home was small, but it was always open. My parents welcomed new arrivals, families in crisis, and people experiencing homelessness. We always made room at the table because we believe that our community grows stronger when we lift each other up.

Those values shaped who I am, and why I’m running for the U.S. Senate. [**If you’re with me, chip in any amount to my campaign and the Voter Protection Project today.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94943?t=6&akid=21529%2E878179%2Eau9W86)

**Friend, Floridians deserve a Senator who will build ladders so families can rise just like mine did.**

As a father, I feel the urgency to build a better future for my son and for every family in Florida.

That means good jobs, affordable healthcare, child care, and the safety nets that allow parents to be parents.

I’ve seen what happens when our leaders lose sight of our shared humanity. Too many cruel and inhumane policies — from separating families to detaining people without due process — have stripped away our basic dignity.

That has to stop.

**If elected, I’ll fight to shut down facilities like Alligator Alcatraz and others that deny people their humanity.** Because no matter where we come from or how we got here, every person deserves to be treated with respect.

Now, I’m running to bring that perspective to Washington, but I can’t do this alone.

[**If you believe Florida deserves leadership focused on people — not parties or special interests — contribute any amount to split between our campaign and the Voter Protection Project:**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94943?t=7&akid=21529%2E878179%2Eau9W86) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Hector Mujica and Voter Protection Project will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94944?t=8&akid=21529%2E878179%2Eau9W86)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94945?t=9&akid=21529%2E878179%2Eau9W86)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94946?t=10&akid=21529%2E878179%2Eau9W86)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94947?t=11&akid=21529%2E878179%2Eau9W86)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94948?t=12&akid=21529%2E878179%2Eau9W86)
Our opponent, Ashley Moody, was handpicked by Ron DeSantis – not by Florida voters – to carry out the MAGA agenda. She’s supported lawsuits to dismantle the Affordable Care Act, fought to overturn the results of the 2020 election, and continues to ignore the real issues impacting families throughout Florida.

That’s not leadership. That’s extremism.

We have a different vision for Florida: One rooted in service, decency, and common sense.

**And we have the power to win this race — but only if we reach enough Floridians to tell them who we are and what we stand for.**

This is one of the most winnable Senate races in the country, but it’ll take all of us to get across the finish line.

That’s why I’m asking one last time: [**Will you split a donation between our campaign and the Voter Protection Project to help us reach voters, build momentum, and flip this seat?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94943?t=13&akid=21529%2E878179%2Eau9W86)

De corazón,

Hector Mujica
[](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94943?t=14&akid=21529%2E878179%2Eau9W86)
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=21529%2E878179%2Eau9W86). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=21529%2E878179%2Eau9W86).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=21529%2E878179%2Eau9W86) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=15&akid=21529%2E878179%2Eau9W86). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=21529%2E878179%2Eau9W86)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=21529%2E878179%2Eau9W86)

name: Lt. Col. David Flippo
subject: Congresswoman Lauren Boebert is coming to our Campaign Kick-off!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by David Flippo for Nevada]( "Paid for by David Flippo for Nevada")
body:
Our Campaign Kick-Off Celebration will be a blast! Will you be there? | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/d51dce9a42d4/welcome-to-team-flippo-10340953?e=273c9a71fb)
---
| | [ ](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=92106442d1&e=273c9a71fb)
---
| | Friend,

I have big news to share. **Congressman Lauren Boebert** will join me at my official campaign launch event on **Saturday, October 25th, at Fervent Cavalry Chapel** in Las Vegas.

I’m truly humbled that **Congressman Lauren Boebert, Matt Gaetz, and Chairman Michael J. McDonald** are all joining together to help us flip it red!

This campaign is about taking back our country, restoring conservative leadership, and **flipping Nevada’s 4th District** from Steven Horsford and the radical left. For too long, Horsford has voted with radical Democrats and the Washington insiders, pushing policies that have hurt Nevada families and weakened our nation. It’s time for that to change.

Congresswoman Boebert knows what it takes to stand up to radical Democrats who fight the “America First” agenda every chance they get! She has fought alongside President Trump against radical left politicians like Beto O’Rourke and Steven Horsford and won! **I am honored to have her support and to welcome her as a speaker at my Campaign Kick-Off!**
---
| [ ](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=fb1c9b1854&e=273c9a71fb)
---
| Our movement is about service before self, faith before fear, and country before politics. As a combat veteran and retired Air Force Lt. Colonel, I’ve spent my life defending America’s values — and I’m not done yet. The fight we face now is for the heart and soul of our nation. I can’t do it without you. I need your support from day one to build the momentum we need to win. Join us for an evening of energy, patriotism, and purpose as we send a message loud and clear: **Nevada’s 4th District is ready for change.**
---
| [JOIN ME AND CONGRESSWOMAN BOEBERT!](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=c0a5ed31c2&e=273c9a71fb "JOIN ME AND CONGRESSWOMAN BOEBERT!")
---
| If you can’t make it, you can still make a powerful impact by contributing today. Your support helps us reach more voters, share our message, and defeat Steven Horsford and the failed liberal agenda.
---
| [ DONATE TO FLIP NEVADA RED](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=930dffffb8&e=273c9a71fb " DONATE TO FLIP NEVADA RED")
---
| This election is our moment to take back Nevada and take back America. Let’s stand shoulder to shoulder and fight for our country’s future.
See you **on October 25th,**
---
| For God and Country,
Lt. Col. David Flippo (Ret.)
_Republican Candidate for U.S. Congress_
Nevada’s 4th Congressional District
