She has fought alongside President Trump against radical left politicians like Beto O’Rourke and Steven Horsford and won! I am honored to have her support and to welcome her as a speaker at my Campaign Kick-Off! | | Our movement is about service before self, faith before fear, and country before politics. As a combat veteran and retired Air Force Lt. Colonel, I’ve spent my life defending America’s values — and I’m not done yet. The fight we face now is for the heart and soul of our nation. I can’t do it without you. I need your support from day one to build the momentum we need to win. Join us for an evening of energy, patriotism, and purpose as we send a message loud and clear: Nevada’s 4th District is ready for change. | "JOIN ME AND CONGRESSWOMAN BOEBERT!" | If you can’t make it, you can still make a powerful impact by contributing today. Your support helps us reach more voters, share our message, and defeat Steven Horsford and the failed liberal agenda. | " DONATE TO FLIP NEVADA RED" | This election is our moment to take back Nevada and take back America. Let’s stand shoulder to shoulder and fight for our country’s future. See you on October 25th, | For God and Country, Lt. Col. David Flippo (Ret.) Republican Candidate for U.S. Congress Nevada’s 4th Congressional District | | | | | | | | | | | | | | "Paid for by David Flippo for Nevada" | Copyright © 2025 Flippo for Nevada, All rights reserved.

| | Hi, This is Brigadier General James Emory Mace, U.S. Army (Retired). _**Today, I write to you not as a soldier... _but as a father._**_ I'm a **Purple Heart** veteran, and I’ve seen battle. I’ve worn the uniform. I’ve buried friends who never made it home. **And I’ve felt the sting of a Nation that sometimes forgets what our sacrifices were for.** _**[But my daughter—Congresswoman Nancy Mace—never forgot.](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/fj-rS9PZ0ogeNkvQm3k0N5rcxo3luLxezbwBWrTYdmpPF8LUhc6rOCNnvgLpsZFdOFdPVoWS753nfqKFCc5BzOPZmOuIJY4cH4rhuCbW6DiJW_JuBwfj0GWlxea5DBe8W8fmtCNT8fRPJlVzfc1xDm032Ko5_V4pIPIa9LKDX-Zhjq7OHCVe8UtC3rIuRfLx9BjLssGgwNujYXHRMoph_WbKEg4P1QF_QueQjBLzYh6trYqfZo6ySJHf114Od49T1k6PZXATy8MusweXe7EEj2cglqajxAW-XPuvOf2bw2FAQ-h-ZqtCdziSWOijBe-M1me_OiCSVFVdNO4JluUOJPu38NBsKLgNaCKUeSfs0W020bIUvSA0HwDQYqwbdp39o-qZDI2tmeQVk4mTdumGtHiOO7sARQOuBtDxZ349HmyK58eLiwKPm-xhHAKOQxYx50oTE8HGg-QasoQR38MW0bv5ngOIhLmoYKbJ0m88an27E7nhTCUh5izE1Azmydfhfnj7Ub15DqiRuHMaDOV1wHYw-sCsHh-YfICTlo0HGxBSwn55yx_TwrFKIQ_6_CArF4c00AWdYxBS8CGnExCOYIDZHHOjzY7V65xnVpkeLWEKi6aU6jbOsmz5c7_pafjk6qFpg9UOsJI5Sbji1gzUgV_O6LcRkk5QmnJDBr0CtqJgj_0mx1HuPO3Lj6wuu-QKXDACNrvEKV-z3Giab6rn2dZmGUfN2rWiycwFD9t3CMHw-5AUkvmuTUWetTFWbHFxNMt2KoCFgUYnc-XtsYoJmeGMOISNBeAQVXfhQDZNPnOgmbah840lJosWzhqPsfUQ_bCW-uRL81WQokxo8kH1xowOmzvWOVyu1eKKD-QbKTOfV-nm0cUEH13dQAlZ9nv_HNJE/0Oa5ImqK60o1ak-AeW2ecTTCxYkBnq-P/14)**_ Nancy was raised in the shadow of the flag. When Nancy was 17, she dropped out of high school. Most kids in that situation fall apart. But not Nancy.**She picked herself up, took a job at Waffle House, and fought her way back.** **By 21, she became the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s Military College. A place I knew well.**

**Nancy then made it to Congress, where _she represented the people of South Carolina’s First District._** She’s been fighting her whole life; for herself, for her kids, for the truth, and now...for her state. **[Today, Nancy is running for Governor of South Carolina. And just like she did at The Citadel, she’s marching headfirst into a battle.](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/fQd3Cu7Ei8O3K2JegvPVNtGAqLCkK4Gos8Ms4zsSl7_ILKiZyVY7dRZsMN27nT9CFurG7GikYexy3FIn7h4wp5yDJ_vAwdHKEx0vmCYCU98BGltp9tHVa7K5rgbhvrq4OKJ6nJyY9yigVMhJoSl8CiLcGWB-hdqKhOEjU3sOutW6nnC71P_tGIhkPUq6q-xV--OeJpsRxdlknaDaKxyIZUw_Fo5XdVYN160NofeNU67Ng5jMavEKbM2UuDi20ixcILrm3HgC0_kUegbK0DTqYDYQlEvJ97mfF9f1oNgw6FKRSgLOBbXKKepQxTF-sEccwlttfeTWMaBENsnfeILqs-4MY43qTLlmMJxBcnhQpF6AQOoK9dtETmVrq2RQO7E85MPZazr2V1xbYg067jwUcZLNfl5lHCovvyGVP3IgLgvcav8V1nk7EhgseQGI6rWIrjWEzPX4XtYyv_QzuhKP206N2NCvWa8qoFFbT7s3ld9an_cUULsAKa7ZgD2t9CCVJYWLfKO3D3DYOrrOqFvR83cjMuS8cVtZd1C25e1ECSt4OBPEgc9pqJbaGSF7zmxNxutNvpg2DcNQraPYeOcvOucxjbzWR3ZNxX230hWcjL9KkCQsxfQMciCzsleuK0ye-m5CPhOT5iV_kX4fiNizWSAr62tGpJ7a8mvmW99dxkw3AwPlARa8tWgabqjblicRMVhA_L3wmMdp8IdWDSqa3cbmNiq4_a673jSY9bG_MPHoAdQRaN1s_fM7xC40UuU1_Tg3FmlrtmpYmT0Cn0MX3ghWKjo0-xocoRUdPx9yaZAKYUQVxDet-gx1ockow50mGLD-VINKECp7I0PhruqFkKJUbmDxMtpp3Q2HnleS3nQaPKEml1u4xoUW3MKg-sNOS6bW/rKygA08wY3jPuNfiH3JyZrCtCVkVHrhb/14)** It’s hard sitting back as a father and hearing the terrible things the media and the establishment say about her. **High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter.** **Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained.** At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts. **By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch.** She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground.Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina. Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks. **She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history.** Nancy is fighting to:
* Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast
* Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency
* Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free
* Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate
* Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think
* Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST

Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front. **South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started.**
---

I'm a Purple Heart veteran, and I’ve seen battle. I’ve worn the uniform. I’ve buried friends who never made it home. And I’ve felt the sting of a Nation that sometimes forgets what our sacrifices were for. Nancy was raised in the shadow of the flag. She saw the uniform. She lived with the deployments. She knew the cost. And instead of running from it, she ran toward it. When Nancy was 17, she dropped out of high school. Most kids in that situation fall apart. But not Nancy.She picked herself up, took a job at Waffle House, and fought her way back. By 21, she became the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s Military College. A place I knew well. Nancy then made it to Congress, where she represented the people of South Carolina’s First District. She’s been fighting her whole life; for herself, for her kids, for the truth, and now...for her state. It’s hard sitting back as a father and hearing the terrible things the media and the establishment say about her. I want to ask you something from one parent, one patriot, to another: She’s up against a machine that wants to erase the values of faith-based, service-minded Americans who believe in truth, family, and country. MSNBC: Mike Johnson's plan to keep the House closed is backfiring **_MSNBC:_ Mike Johnson's plan to keep the House closed is backfiring **

_"It’s difficult to argue that he is serious about swiftly reopening the government when his caucus is spread out around the country."_ Peter,

Mike Johnson wants you to believe this shutdown is some kind of political game that Democrats wanted to get back at Trump. But here's the truth: **this shutdown was orchestrated by Republicans. Just take a look at what GOP “leadership” really looks like right now:**

1️⃣ **Trump wanted this shutdown.** He said he wanted to make it hurt for people—and that's exactly what's happening. Families are missing paychecks, services and vital programs are frozen, and communities are paying the price for his chaos.

2️⃣ **Mike Johnson and House Republicans haven't shown up for work since September 19th.** They control the House, yet they’ve kept it in recess and blocked Democrats from working to fix the mess the GOP created.

3️⃣ **They're so obsessed with holding onto power that they refuse to swear in a duly elected Democrat from Arizona.** They're literally keeping a seat empty just to cling to their slim majority.

And while Republicans play politics, millions of Americans are left vulnerable and waiting with no end in sight. That means federal workers continue to go without pay, parents lose out on nutrition programs, seniors see delays, and small businesses struggle to stay afloat.

Make no mistake, Peter: **This shutdown is GOP-created and GOP-maintained.** Kim is fighting every day to show up, do the work, and put people first, but she needs you to stand with her at this moment.

clean_body: MSNBC: Mike Johnson's plan to keep the House closed is backfiring MSNBC: Mike Johnson's plan to keep the House closed is backfiring "It’s difficult to argue that he is serious about swiftly reopening the government when his caucus is spread out around the country." Peter, Mike Johnson wants you to believe this shutdown is some kind of political game that Democrats wanted to get back at Trump. But here's the truth: this shutdown was orchestrated by Republicans. Just take a look at what GOP “leadership” really looks like right now: 1️⃣ Trump wanted this shutdown. He said he wanted to make it hurt for people—and that's exactly what's happening. Families are missing paychecks, services and vital programs are frozen, and communities are paying the price for his chaos. 2️⃣ Mike Johnson and House Republicans haven't shown up for work since September 19th. They control the House, yet they’ve kept it in recess and blocked Democrats from working to fix the mess the GOP created. 3️⃣ They're so obsessed with holding onto power that they refuse to swear in a duly elected Democrat from Arizona. They're literally keeping a seat empty just to cling to their slim majority. And while Republicans play politics, millions of Americans are left vulnerable and waiting with no end in sight. That means federal workers continue to go without pay, parents lose out on nutrition programs, seniors see delays, and small businesses struggle to stay afloat. Make no mistake, Peter: This shutdown is GOP-created and GOP-maintained. Kim is fighting every day to show up, do the work, and put people first, but she needs you to stand with her at this moment. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you, Schrier HQ Rep. This year, three of the Pennsylvania Supreme Court Justices are up for re-election. They are the center of our fights for voting rights, redistricting, elections, and more. All three of the Justices currently up for reelection are Democrats. Extremist Republicans are attempting to replace these justices with ones who will do any bidding the Trump Administration asks. name: Pennsylvania Democratic Party
subject: we must protect this Court on Nov 4
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pennsylvania Democratic Party
body:
| |
---
Peter,

On November 4th, three justices face their PA Supreme Court retention elections — and the outcome will shape Pennsylvanians’ rights for generations to come.

Peter, the MAGA machine is targeting this Court because **our justices refused to let them wreck our democracy**. These three justices were essential in securing our right to vote in free and fair elections.

# _Opinion:_
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4d01533d-1e03-4c9f-9023-abcf159fdafc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---

[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..rNwU0QyRlTjYL7-7939NunNovkVisn886jE0KRIt5QI?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=176513967)
* * *
### There has been a lot of chatter about Antifa since Trump and his DOJ declared them a domestic terrorist group, and the left continues to claim that Antifa doesn't exist.
I embedded with Antifa and their allies during the so-called "Summer of Love." Chronicled in my book, **[RIOT DIET](https://substack.com/redirect/a2d51600-38f7-440a-b30b-d4839e034e1e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , I mostly refer to them as the "Umbrella Gang," classified as anyone who was wearing black bloc to conceal their identities and carrying an umbrella or a shield to thwart law enforcement's non-lethal munitions. Here's the thing: If I walk up to someone in the streets and ask, "Hey, bro, are you Antifa?" Most especially if they are actually an active member of the group, their answer will be, "no" likely followed by some unpleasant names like "fascist" or "nazi", which in a big crowd could easily earn me a punch to the head.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f451503a-31fd-4280-bc34-a9c61ddf5f8a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Source: Richie McGinniss, Portland BLM riots 2020
And for those who claim Antifa can't possibly exist because it doesn't have a leader my answer is simple: Antifa is decentralized and incognito by design.
Antifa's members converse in encrypted chat networks and their twitter accounts hide behind anonymous banners. A dynamic leader is not required because their marching orders have not changed since the beginning: Trump is Hitler and Americans must do everything possible, including acts of violence, to keep him and his Nazi sympathizers from fulfilling their agenda. I have received death threats from members of this group. I have been punched by them. And I can confirm that Antifa-contrary to what Democrat Congressman Jerry Nadler claimed-is not a "myth."
When covering protests, occasionally I will spot Antifa flags or patches. They are displayed by newbies or posers who can't help but proudly display the logo of the organization that is most effective when it remains anonymously hidden behind a black mask and an umbrella or shield.
**A message from our sponsor (piece continues below)**

* * *
_**(Piece continues)**_
Much like shell corporations, secret societies, 4Chan boards, and yes, radical Islamist terror cells, Antifa's actual members and contributors are obscured behind a web of nonprofits and front groups. They show up to much larger protests and use these demonstrations as staging areas to achieve their goals.
The overwhelming majority of those who attend these forward-facing protests are normies who simply see the flyer on social media and want to pick up a free sign then feel part of something bigger: the "resistance" or the never-Trump tribe. But with the increased police presence comes an opportunity for a small group of well-organized and scurrilous agitators. Their aim is to antagonize police and create a spectacle of violence. If anyone within the protest appears to align with Trump, or asks a question that they deem to be slightly "faschy", or even films something unsavory on a public street, they will be surrounded and harassed... or worse.
These individuals come well prepared. I've seen them utilize tools like leaf blowers (to blow away tear gas) metal saws (to cut through nonscalable fencing) and molotov cocktails (to firebomb police). They employ advanced tactics: heat resistant gloves to throw tear gas back at the cops, turtled shields that would be the envy of any Roman Legionnaire, lasers to blind cops, even trumpets to communicate orders of retreat and attack, as if on the battlefield during the Revolutionary War. Their allies in the media have parroted the idea that Trump and his ilk are all fascists, so they believe their cause is just as righteous as those of George Washington, Lincoln, or General Patton fighting Hitler in WWII.
Do these people pledge allegiance or go through a rigorous initiation process? No. Are they part of a complex network of safe houses, regional cells, and clandestine group chats where they plan the next clash? Yes.
If and when the police crack down, or when counter protesters fight back, then they are able to say, "look at Trump and his fascist friends!" During 2020, this played out like clockwork in hotspots such as Minneapolis, Portland, Seattle, Chicago, New York, DC, etc. Now it's happening in many of those same places today. Back then it was Black Lives Matter. But now that BLM has been proven to be an abjectly corrupt nonprofit, they have pivoted to new monikers, new catch phrases. Yet the same old playbook remains.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/265961ce-71c8-4edc-9b14-0bc82ab702f9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Source: Richie McGinniss, Portland BLM riots 2020
Take the example of the No Kings protests that are taking place nationwide today. Since the start of Trump 2.0, "No Kings" has staged bi-monthly protests in thousands of towns and cities across all fifty states. The fundamental building blocks for this scale of demonstrations include but are not limited to printed signs, permits, transportation, social media campaigns, media outreach the list goes on. **All of this stuff requires money.** "No Kings" is primarily funded by "Indivisible", which has received over $7.6 million from George Soros' Open Society Foundation since 2017. So while the "No Kings" movement claims to be grassroots, its primary donor is a billionaire who made his money through the same capitalistic practices that the most extreme elements of these protests claim to oppose.
It may not come as a surprise to the reader that Soros' Open Society Foundation bankrolled the bail funds that ensured rioters would be let back onto the streets within hours of committing violent crimes against police. Soros was also the primary funder of progressive prosecutors' campaigns in liberal urban enclaves throughout the United States. Many of those prosecutors are still doling out sweetheart sentences to violent rioters today.
So as the protests unfold over the course of Trump's second term don't forget:
Antifa is very real. The protests are primarily funded by billionaires who want to control the narrative. These protests are used as cover for rioters to agitate violence and sow the seeds of unrest. And the next time someone tells you that Antifa is just an idea, feel free to send them my way: @richiemcginniss.

clean_body: I have been punched by them. And I can confirm that Antifa is not a "myth"... | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? I have been punched by them. And I can confirm that Antifa is not a "myth"... | | | Oct 18 | | | | | | | | | | | | Opinion: | | ---|---|--- Thank you for reading and supporting PolitiBrawl. Continue to support independent journalism by becoming a paying subscriber on Substack today: There has been a lot of chatter about Antifa since Trump and his DOJ declared them a domestic terrorist group, and the left continues to claim that Antifa doesn't exist. I embedded with Antifa and their allies during the so-called "Summer of Love." Chronicled in my book, , I mostly refer to them as the "Umbrella Gang," classified as anyone who was wearing black bloc to conceal their identities and carrying an umbrella or a shield to thwart law enforcement's non-lethal munitions. Here's the thing: If I walk up to someone in the streets and ask, "Hey, bro, are you Antifa?" Most especially if they are actually an active member of the group, their answer will be, "no" likely followed by some unpleasant names like "fascist" or "nazi", which in a big crowd could easily earn me a punch to the head. | | ---|---|--- Source: Richie McGinniss, Portland BLM riots 2020 And for those who claim Antifa can't possibly exist because it doesn't have a leader my answer is simple: Antifa is decentralized and incognito by design. Antifa's members converse in encrypted chat networks and their twitter accounts hide behind anonymous banners. A dynamic leader is not required because their marching orders have not changed since the beginning: Trump is Hitler and Americans must do everything possible, including acts of violence, to keep him and his Nazi sympathizers from fulfilling their agenda. I have received death threats from members of this group. I have been punched by them. And I can confirm that Antifa-contrary to what Democrat Congressman Jerry Nadler claimed-is not a "myth." When covering protests, occasionally I will spot Antifa flags or patches. They are displayed by newbies or posers who can't help but proudly display the logo of the organization that is most effective when it remains anonymously hidden behind a black mask and an umbrella or shield. A message from our sponsor (piece continues below) Your Complimentary 90-Day AMAC Membership America is at a crossroads -- and your voice matters. That's why we're inviting you to try | | ---|---|--- When you activate your complimentary membership, you'll receive immediate access to: Exclusive Savings on travel, insurance, healthcare, and more Trusted Resources on Medicare, retirement, and Social Security A Voice in Washington through AMAC Action, our powerful grassroots advocacy arm Community & Fun with the AMAC Magazine, book club, sweepstakes, and more No cost. No credit card needed. No obligation. Just 90 days of everything AMAC has to offer -- so you can experience the difference for yourself. [[Activate Your Free 90-Day Membership]]() Join today and stand with millions of like-minded Americans fighting to protect faith, family, and freedom. P.S. You'll also start receiving AMAC Magazine , the trusted publication conservatives rely on for news and insight you won't find anywhere else. (Piece continues) Much like shell corporations, secret societies, 4Chan boards, and yes, radical Islamist terror cells, Antifa's actual members and contributors are obscured behind a web of nonprofits and front groups. They show up to much larger protests and use these demonstrations as staging areas to achieve their goals. The overwhelming majority of those who attend these forward-facing protests are normies who simply see the flyer on social media and want to pick up a free sign then feel part of something bigger: the "resistance" or the never-Trump tribe. But with the increased police presence comes an opportunity for a small group of well-organized and scurrilous agitators. Their aim is to antagonize police and create a spectacle of violence. If anyone within the protest appears to align with Trump, or asks a question that they deem to be slightly "faschy", or even films something unsavory on a public street, they will be surrounded and harassed... or worse. These individuals come well prepared. I've seen them utilize tools like leaf blowers (to blow away tear gas) metal saws (to cut through nonscalable fencing) and molotov cocktails (to firebomb police). They employ advanced tactics: heat resistant gloves to throw tear gas back at the cops, turtled shields that would be the envy of any Roman Legionnaire, lasers to blind cops, even trumpets to communicate orders of retreat and attack, as if on the battlefield during the Revolutionary War. Their allies in the media have parroted the idea that Trump and his ilk are all fascists, so they believe their cause is just as righteous as those of George Washington, Lincoln, or General Patton fighting Hitler in WWII. Do these people pledge allegiance or go through a rigorous initiation process? No. Are they part of a complex network of safe houses, regional cells, and clandestine group chats where they plan the next clash? Yes. If and when the police crack down, or when counter protesters fight back, then they are able to say, "look at Trump and his fascist friends!" During 2020, this played out like clockwork in hotspots such as Minneapolis, Portland, Seattle, Chicago, New York, DC, etc. Now it's happening in many of those same places today. Back then it was Black Lives Matter. But now that BLM has been proven to be an abjectly corrupt nonprofit, they have pivoted to new monikers, new catch phrases. Yet the same old playbook remains. | | ---|---|--- Source: Richie McGinniss, Portland BLM riots 2020 Take the example of the No Kings protests that are taking place nationwide today. Since the start of Trump 2.0, "No Kings" has staged bi-monthly protests in thousands of towns and cities across all fifty states. The fundamental building blocks for this scale of demonstrations include but are not limited to printed signs, permits, transportation, social media campaigns, media outreach the list goes on. All of this stuff requires money. "No Kings" is primarily funded by "Indivisible", which has received over $7.6 million from George Soros' Open Society Foundation since 2017. So while the "No Kings" movement claims to be grassroots, its primary donor is a billionaire who made his money through the same capitalistic practices that the most extreme elements of these protests claim to oppose. It may not come as a surprise to the reader that Soros' Open Society Foundation bankrolled the bail funds that ensured rioters would be let back onto the streets within hours of committing violent crimes against police. Soros was also the primary funder of progressive prosecutors' campaigns in liberal urban enclaves throughout the United States. Many of those prosecutors are still doling out sweetheart sentences to violent rioters today. So as the protests unfold over the course of Trump's second term don't forget: Antifa is very real. The protests are primarily funded by billionaires who want to control the narrative. These protests are used as cover for rioters to agitate violence and sow the seeds of unrest. And the next time someone tells you that Antifa is just an idea, feel free to send them my way: @richiemcginniss. One Man's Radical Ride Through America in Chaos from his direct experience as a reporter in the streets. The media insisted they were "peaceful protests" as America's cities burned to the ground. Learn the truth and set the record straight ... | | ---|---|--- * You're currently a free subscriber to . body:
We were founded to ensure every voice — the voices of everyday people — can be heard in the halls of power.
|
---

Peter,
Gerrymandering effectively means that only a few powerful people get their voices heard. All On The Line was founded to ensure every voice — the voices of everyday people — can be heard in the halls of power.
As we write this, extremist politicians across the country are forcing through mid-decade map redraws in order to consolidate their own power. They’re afraid of facing the will of the people, so they’re rewriting the rules of the game so they can’t lose. And in the process, they’re silencing the voices of their own voters.
[**When you donate to All On The Line, you’re helping ensure that real people’s voices can’t be ignored. You’re funding our work to mobilize grassroots organizers in Indiana, Ohio, Kansas, and across the country to reject these power grabs.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117544444/576833106/2109033857?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_HelpVoicesHeard_email_20251018-AOTL-Tier1-HelpVoicesHeard_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20251018-AOTL-Tier1-HelpVoicesHeard_&utm_campaign=HelpVoicesHeard&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY1N2IwZGIwLTY1YWMtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=CHVNl2i24uQmsiWkGSksf0OxMC1OBhxbLIMQqQ1LrAo=)

All On The Line was founded to ensure every voice — the voices of everyday people — can be heard in the halls of power. As we write this, extremist politicians across the country are forcing through mid-decade map redraws in order to consolidate their own power. They’re afraid of facing the will of the people, so they’re rewriting the rules of the game so they can’t lose. name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: SCOTUS is back in session
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| This could impact our country for generations to come.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=5052%2E35263%2EvDMQsE)
Peter — Trump’s hyper-partisan Supreme Court is back in session, with a load of cases that put our rights and our democracy in even more jeopardy. From LGBTQ+ rights and ballot box access to clean air and water to giving Trump even more power, their rulings this term could have an impact on our lives for generations to come. **This Supreme Court has already demonstrated their willingness to enact Trump and the GOP's far-right agenda and overturn landmark decisions.** We need Democratic leaders who will fight to protect our rights — not take them away. I’m working hard to support my Democratic colleagues and flip the Senate blue next year. That’s a crucial step in restoring our democracy and limiting Trump’s power. **[Flipping the Senate blue is the best way to do that. If you can, will you make a contribution of $10 or more right away to help us win back the Senate for Democrats in 2026?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=stb-em-oct25.unVopK&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251018_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=5052%2E35263%2EvDMQsE)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3664?c0=stb-em-oct25.tWYgV0&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251018_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=5052%2E35263%2EvDMQsE)

A respected PUP Research survey shows that in a contested general election for governor: I am leading with**35%** of likely Michigan voters, ahead of Democrats at **31%** and the independent candidate at **12%.** **I’m leading the Republican primary by over 35 points. **

A respected PUP Research survey shows that in a contested general election for governor: I am leading with35% of likely Michigan voters, ahead of Democrats at 31% and the independent candidate at 12%. Michigan voters are seeing the contrast between our conservative vision and years of failed Democrat leadership. But to turn this polling lead into victory, we must act now. Our filing deadline is approaching fast, and without your help, we risk losing momentum. name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Pass the Tax Excessive CEO Pay Act
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Isn’t it outrageous that the CEOs of America’s largest companies make 290
TIMES MORE than their average workers?

Justice Democrats in Congress agree. That’s why Representative Rashida
Tlaib joined Senator Bernie Sanders to reintroduce the Tax Excessive CEO
Pay Act.

This bill would raise taxes on corporations that pay their executives more
than 50 times more than their workers’ wages. Massive corporations would
have to pay employees fairly, or face penalties for their greed — no more
short-changing workers while CEOs hoard millions.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140955?c0=jd-em-20251018.RX-ulE&source=em20251018-37120&t=1002&akid=37120%2E1203867%2ET1hqA4 ]A post from Rep. Rashida Tlaib (@RashidaTlaib) on X reads: “Corporate
greed is out of control. It’s time the corporations pay their fair share.
#TaxtheRich.” Attached is a quote post from journalist Steve Neavling
(@MCmuckraker), which reads: “U.S. Rep. @RashidaTlaib and Bernie Sanders
introduce a bill to rein in what they call the ‘obscene salaries of
America’s top executives.’”

Rashida is right: corporate greed is out of control. And unlike do-nothing
Democrats who take campaign checks from corporations and super PACs to
look the other way, Justice Democrats are fighting for legislation that
would take power back from the billionaires and put it in the hands of
working people.

But passing transformative legislation like this won’t happen overnight —
it’ll take a powerful coalition that Congress can’t ignore. That’s what
we’re building at Justice Democrats, but we need your help.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140955?c0=jd-em-20251018.RX-ulE&source=em20251018-37120&t=1003&akid=37120%2E1203867%2ET1hqA4 ]Will you add your name to demand that Congress pass the Tax Excessive
CEO Pay Act? We need you on our side to build an economy that puts working
people first.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140955?c0=jd-em-20251018.RX-ulE&source=em20251018-37120&t=1004&akid=37120%2E1203867%2ET1hqA4 ]Add Your Name

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20251018-37120-footer&t=1005&refcode2=37120_1203867_T1hqA4&akid=37120%2E1203867%2ET1hqA4

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1006&akid=37120%2E1203867%2ET1hqA4

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

As I see it, our campaign has become a beacon of hope, an opportunity to chart the path out of this dark chapter in our country's history. There is no other candidate running to flip a Governor's office from red to blue in 2025.
And can I be honest? _That places a lot of weight on my shoulders._

As I see it, our campaign has become a beacon of hope, an opportunity to chart the path out of this dark chapter in our country's history. There is no other candidate running to flip a Governor's office from red to blue in 2025. And can I be honest? That places a lot of weight on my shoulders. But I'm ready to seize the moment. And with you by my side over these next 17 days — giving $25 or whatever you can to emails like this one — we won't just win this November. name: Team Cooper
subject: Yet more GOP redistricting in North Carolina
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
All to appease Donald Trump. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117544610/576833678/823540626?refcode=ea.0b7e556a-6bac-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ms=ea.0b7e556a-6bac-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjdlNTU2YS02YmFjLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Dd7oI_JGYofYQFI362HaG6VmolTsJLn1pNvW5xr4lQE=&emci=0edbc7a4-7eab-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=0b7e556a-6bac-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=17205535)
Peter, Roy Cooper and Democratic partners in North Carolina have spent years fighting anti-democratic redistricting efforts designed to consolidate GOP power. Republican gerrymandering has long been blatantly partisan. North Carolina is a 50-50 state, but Republicans have succeeded at securing _ten_ congressional seats to four for Democrats. **And now, GOP leaders in Raleigh are at it again — all to appease President Trump.** These same lawmakers have refused to do their jobs to pass a budget for our state — refusing to raise pay for teachers and law enforcement officers, failing to secure funding for NC's Medicaid system, and ignoring their duty to their constituents. Peter, Republican legislators have control in Raleigh. They could pass a budget _today_. Instead, they're spending their time on political machinations designed to disenfranchise voters, all at Donald Trump’s request. **[Republicans are not doing their duty to this state, our country, or the people they represent. These same lawmakers have refused to do their jobs to pass a budget for our state — refusing to raise pay for teachers and law enforcement officers, failing to secure funding for NC's Medicaid system, and ignoring their duty to their constituents. clean_body: | Peter - I've been in some tough situations before, but this could be the hardest mountain I'll have to climb... While I was barred from accepting any campaign donations during Virginia's legislative session, my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, was RAKING IN hundreds of thousands of dollars! I'm not kidding - a liberal group gave Spanberger $500K all in one go, Peter! This is a BAD situation that will only get worse if folks like you don't step up to the plate! I'm coming to you with a plea from the bottom of my heart; I'm doing everything I can to win this race, make history, and keep logging conservative wins. But I know I can't do this all on my own; it's going to take all of us, and I really mean all of us , to win. If you can't afford to send in even just $17, I'll understand. That's right - all I 'm asking is that you send in $17 or more to help me catch up with my Democrat opponent's LUDICROUS fundraising numbers! Look, this race is tied. The ONLY thing holding me and my team back from winning right now is my liberal opponent's crazy cash advantage. I know we can close the gap and win this race together, but we need to get to work RIGHT NOW! Thank you for being a critical part of my team, Peter. I can't tell you how much I appreciate your support. -Winsome Earle-Sears Mother Marine Lt. Governor of Virginia I’m Winsome Earle-Sears, Republican candidate running for Governor of Virginia. I broke records as the first black female Lieutenant Governor in Virginia, but my mission isn’t over yet! It’s going to take all of us conservatives working together to win. ** | Paid for by Winsome for Governor Neither military info nor photographs of Winsome Earle-Sears in uniform imply endorsement of Winsome Earle-Sears by the Department of Defense or its particular military departments. name: Tyler Bowyer, Turning Point Action
subject: When I first met Charlie — I knew.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TURNING POINT ACTION (TPACTION
body:
Please read the following message from our sponsor.
-------------------------

[Turning Point Action]
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/82a89da3b54c4d049226a437ba8ccd11-0bf27891754448288aeeb41dbbb610c4/63]

Friend,

When I heard of Charlie Kirk, he wasn’t famous.

He wasn’t filling arenas. He wasn’t a household name.

A few people told me, _“You’ve gotta meet this guy — he’s
doing something big out in Illinois.”_

So I went.

Charlie was running Turning Point from a modest office in the Chicago
suburbs — surviving on coffee and pure belief that America was still
worth saving.

[The Original Turning Point Office]
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/82a89da3b54c4d049226a437ba8ccd11-0bf27891754448288aeeb41dbbb610c4/63]

_ABOVE: The original Turning Point HQ in Lemont, Illinois. This is
where it all began — just Charlie, a vision, and a mission that
changed everything. _

Back then, we were both organizing young conservatives, both dreaming
about how to win back the culture.

But when I first sat down with Charlie... _I knew._

Charlie was the visionary. He had the plan. And I HAD to be part of
it.

I jumped in and never looked back. From that moment on, I was there
for all of it.

The early conferences and campuses. The road trips. The rallies. The
fights.

In those days, our team didn’t have much. But what we had was
conviction — and that was more than enough.

Because we believed in something BIG. Something real. Something
urgent.

FAITH, FAMILY, FREEDOM — and the absolute grit to go build something
that could save this country.

And Charlie? _He did it._

He didn’t just build a brand... _He built a machine._

First, Charlie built a movement that changed the hearts and minds of
an entire generation — a seismic shift that flipped the narrative
that young people belonged to the Left.

Then, he built Turning Point Action to become the grassroots force the
Left never saw coming... and beat them at their own game.

And, I hitched my wagon to it _from the start._

Charlie and I weren’t just friends...

We were brothers in the fight. We did everything together.

[Tyler Bowyer and Charlie]
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/82a89da3b54c4d049226a437ba8ccd11-0bf27891754448288aeeb41dbbb610c4/63]

We strategized over midnight texts... battled together through COVID,
the 2020 Election, and every crisis they threw at us...

We created AmericaFest from scratch... launched Turning Point Action
to go on offense — in the very states the GOP had given up on.

AND WE RALLIED A GRASSROOTS ARMY THAT PUT PRESIDENT DONALD J. TRUMP
BACK IN THE WHITE HOUSE IN 2024.

We didn’t just talk about chasing ballots...

Turning Point Action built the first full-scale, professional
ballot-chasing operation on the Right — _and it delivered real
results._

10 for 10.

IN EVERY SINGLE STATE WE OPERATED IN... TRUMP WON.

In Arizona _alone,_ we chased over 205,000 low-propensity conservative
votes — well beyond the margin of victory.

_In Wisconsin?_ 60,000+.

_In Nevada?_ 6,000+ — and we won back a district we hadn’t carried
in 20 years.

_In Michigan?_ 14,000+ votes helped us flip a U.S. House seat and take
the state house majority.

We didn’t just make noise... _We made history. _

[Strategizing during Trumps win]
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/82a89da3b54c4d049226a437ba8ccd11-0bf27891754448288aeeb41dbbb610c4/63]

_ABOVE: Election Night 2024. Our biggest win yet. That’s me on the
left — still fighting beside Charlie, just like we always did. _

Friend, I watched Charlie pour everything into this mission.

He lived on the road 300+ days a year.

We never stopped. _Because Charlie never stopped. _

He didn’t build all of this for clout or clicks... Instead, he did
it for this country. For all of us.

For every parent who feels like they’re losing their kid to the
Left...

For every student who’s afraid to speak up...

For every American who still believes in this country...

Charlie built this movement and this machine for them. For you.

And now? After he gave everything for that mission?

WE HAVE TO CARRY THE TORCH. WE HAVE TO KEEP THE MACHINE RUNNING —
_AND MAKE IT STRONGER THAN EVER._

Everything we’ve felt since the day we lost Charlie — _we must
turn it into action._

He used to ask me (and everyone else at Turning Point) all the time:
_“What are we building next?”_

WELL, FRIEND, HERE’S THE ANSWER: WE’RE BUILDING THE NEXT
GENERATION OF GRASSROOTS POWER — ONE VOTER, ONE PRECINCT, ONE ACT OF
COURAGE AT A TIME.

[Winning the Next Generation]
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/82a89da3b54c4d049226a437ba8ccd11-0bf27891754448288aeeb41dbbb610c4/63]

BUT IT DOESN’T HAPPEN WITHOUT YOU.

_So, here’s my ask..._

Go to church for Charlie.

Start a family for Charlie.

Join a chapter or coalition for Charlie.

Register to vote for Charlie.

Chase votes for Charlie.

Run for office for Charlie.

Commit to WIN. Commit to FIGHT. Commit to FINISH what he started.

That’s what Charlie would’ve wanted.

I’m not stopping until we save our country. I’m all in — and if
you’re reading this, I’m betting that you are, too.

If so, I’m honored to fight alongside you. And if you’ve already
been with us for a while — thank you.

Now, let’s get to work.

FOR CHARLIE.

GOD BLESS,

TYLER BOWYER
Chief Operating Officer
Turning Point Action

[Tyler Bowyer]
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/82a89da3b54c4d049226a437ba8ccd11-0bf27891754448288aeeb41dbbb610c4/63]

SUPPORT TURNING POINT ACTION
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/82a89da3b54c4d049226a437ba8ccd11-0bf27891754448288aeeb41dbbb610c4/63]

P.S. I would give anything to have Charlie back.

But he left us with something powerful — a machine that works... a
machine that’s proven and battle-tested.

Now it’s time to run it — _and run it like never before._

Bigger. Bolder. More battlegrounds. More victories.

BECAUSE RIGHT NOW, THANKS TO A GENEROUS SUPPORTER OF TURNING POINT
ACTION, YOUR GIFT WILL BE MATCHED DOLLAR-FOR-DOLLAR — UP TO
$500,000, THROUGH OCTOBER 31.

That means, with your gift today:

✅ 2X the activists trained
✅ 2X the voters registered
✅ 2X the pressure on weak-kneed politicians
✅ 2X the ballot-chasing operations
✅ 2X the grassroots strength the Left can’t stop

We don’t need to reinvent anything. Charlie already drew the
blueprint and turned the key.

So, if you’ve been wondering how to help... If you’ve been asking
_“what now?”_

THEN, FRIEND, THIS IS YOUR MOMENT TO STEP IN, FUEL THE FIGHT, AND TAKE
CHARLIE’S VISION TO THE NEXT LEVEL.

Let’s turn this energy — this momentum — into action.

LET’S DELIVER AMERICA FIRST VICTORIES IN EVERY CORNER OF THIS
COUNTRY. AND MANY MORE FOR YEARS TO COME. MAKE YOUR GIFT TO TURNING
POINT ACTION TODAY AND IMMEDIATELY DOUBLE YOUR IMPACT.
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/82a89da3b54c4d049226a437ba8ccd11-0bf27891754448288aeeb41dbbb610c4/63]

SUPPORT TURNING POINT ACTION
& DOUBLE YOUR IMPACT

PAID FOR BY TURNING POINT ACTION (TPACTION.COM) AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY
ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE

4930 East Beverly Road

Phoenix, Arizona 85044

DCDailyJournal.com

Click Here to Unsubscribe Or Report as Spam
[https://paramountcomm.app.optipub.com/messages/opt-outs/82a89da3b54c4d049226a437ba8ccd11?op-notrack]

This email was directed to dpwillis67@gmail.com only | Our Privacy Policy can be
found by clicking here
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/82a89da3b54c4d049226a437ba8ccd11-f0c8456845ab4d45a5b4af1c953fa073/63].

525-K East Market Street # 114
City: Leesburg
State: Virginia
Zip Code: 20176

| | | | | |
# _Join Us For An Early Voting Rally_
# _with Special Guests!_
---
|
---
| |
Friend,
Join the **Gloucester County GOP** next **Saturday, October 25th from 9:00–11:00 AM** at the **Pfeiffer Community Center (301 Blue Bell Rd, Williamstown, NJ 08094)** for our **Early Voting Rally** in support of your **Column A Republican Team!** 🇺🇸
This **free event** will feature **snacks and drinks** , plus the **first 50 attendees** will receive a **free “Make New Jersey Great Again” T-shirt!**
Come meet your Republican candidates for **State Assembly** and **County Commissioner** , and hear from our special guest speakers **Rich Zeoli** and **Matt Rooney!**
🗳️ **October 25th is the FIRST DAY of Early Voting** — make your plan to **Vote Column A** and help us take New Jersey back!
We’ll see you there!
**Gloucester County GOP**

name: Raul (personal)
subject: I won’t stay quiet
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE
body:
While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/dAfRehWDrkq5GdVTndjWgA2?unsubscribedata=gW27x1jeJWje6eSI9gq8PoqtULiwL15aUc5ObCn27vD1QRUFJoc91GFprWvMwxHcuhNtE1icnCsAJLczREmPhOTA40icnp1pq5wvgF0URcJP7vx4I4J8E0Q6a%2FwqCxKdocCIpPxhK1qeinmyF5fItjHaP%2FS5LxwR754jpTx3qAc8OfvH5sr0IfXTjyubzkp%2FmC%2BiY7srYlUR7DOXV6ldSjKsT2ukBkv2hy2eYSL3XEnJNqNUlA5K59Yw2ZrIsF5nJx4%2FSxF7jRIqcNyE523CU3k%2FyIyHT3KH20EIGsmejVcNM1eZ24y%2FOxMcP0vAsKXCDSKIpCxEAk1InVnlPSkGA1j7nO6lWZVps0hAWvU%2BlUFH3v9hlEdgwaH1Qj4DCyAwDhg3qdgdil3UapppX5mKyS1j0cV0SCOlRGCh1M%2B1GtyfysrTJOMh4uypK1UcUDIH]

# [#]
It's Raul.

The midterms are just a year away, and I want to level with you.

If CA25 flips, there is no chance that the Democrats will secure the majority in the House in 2026. That means more chaos, more shutdowns, and more destruction to our economy and healthcare system.

We’ve seen the damage that MAGA Republicans in the House have caused in the past 10 months; we cannot hand over the power for two more years.

Our digital fundraising has fallen behind our projections for the rest of the year. If you can, will you chip in $10 before midnight to help us close the gap? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-oct25?amount=10]

In this fight together,

Raul
https://www.facebook.com/DrRaulRuiz/ [https://www.facebook.com/DrRaulRuiz/] https://www.instagram.com/doctorraulruiz [https://www.instagram.com/doctorraulruiz] https://twitter.com/Dr_RaulRuiz [https://twitter.com/Dr_RaulRuiz]

The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress.

# [Young Republicans & Congressman Hate Being Called Nazis; So...Don't Do Nazi Stuff?](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3722532&post_id=176504637&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc2NTA0NjM3LCJpYXQiOjE3NjA4MjUzMzksImV4cCI6MTc2MzQxNzMzOSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTM3MjI1MzIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.1R_i9SmeciPURNQX28_TIxa8rsSKjRM7mVgXV5b92jo)
### Young Republicans, Congress Members, Trump. For Those Who Share Nazi Beliefs, Slogans & Symbolism, They Sure Are Prickly About The Label
| | [Cliff Schecter](https://substack.com/@cliffsedge)
---
| Oct 18
---
| [](https://substack.com/@cliffsedge)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3722532&post_id=176504637&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc2NTA0NjM3LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc2MDgyNTMzOSwiZXhwIjoxNzYzNDE3MzM5LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMzcyMjUzMiIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.7IUnnablTUQIkh3h8_E7W_0WwOBh9M6w10BX8P5Ig5A&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

#### **🔥[We're At No Kings Day Today To Fight & Bring You Video/Images. Support Our Activism & Reporting With A Paid Subscription!](https://substack.com/redirect/091a2f7b-d42a-458e-aa98-08ddb80d3a82?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)🔥**
[Fight For Us On No Kings Day!](https://substack.com/redirect/091a2f7b-d42a-458e-aa98-08ddb80d3a82?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/091a2f7b-d42a-458e-aa98-08ddb80d3a82?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
I have this crazy idea.
Perhaps if Republicans don't wish to be called Nazis, they should stop hanging with, quoting, publicly praising and hee-hawing in group chats about Nazis?
Also, maybe don't decorate your congressional office like Hitler's Airbnb?
Let's start with the "Young Republicans."
These geniuses got busted praising Hitler in their totally exclusive, velvet-roped group chats. I mean, look at this picture, and I dare you to tell me when you heard about these guys that you didn't have this exact mental image of them?
I dare you.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7447dda5-7ca9-481b-8702-4bf24ad262ee?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
These guys are like the human embodiment of "no one ever swiped right." Master Race? Did they misread that as Master Bates?
Shockingly--and by that I mean _not surprising in the slightest_ --"young" in MAGALand seems to mean til you're like 40 or so. Yes, there were "young" Republicans in these chats well into an age range where minoxidil and stock portfolios are a thing.
[Hell, they probably had their first crypto scams outta college over a decade ago!](https://substack.com/redirect/da0e1bd4-bb50-43a0-a8a5-5e9bdb1f56f4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) They grow up so fast, don't they?
This one sure did:
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/091a2f7b-d42a-458e-aa98-08ddb80d3a82?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Look, who am I to criticize who they want in their little secret, SS group?
But c'mon boys, marketing matters! If you'd named it "Mom's Basement Republicans" or "The 40-Year Old Virgins" just think of the membership explosion!
Even just an "I too have a Goring poster on my wall" Facebook group could've done wonders.
Ok, let's look at what they said and what that says about our society. These tighty-whities-clad chodes chuckled at a cornucopia of creative and keen observations. (That may be the most alliteration I've ever fit into one sentence! Ok, we move on).
Real laugh lines like "I love Hitler," and mass rape is "epic" and "I'd go to the zoo if I wanted to watch monkey ]sic] play ball." I mean, genius material, any way you slice it.
It makes you hope that perhaps in their future there's a potential _Turner Diaries 2: Electric Boogaloo Boys_.
Oh and I know this will surprise you, but a likeminded goober who was birthed by the same primordial Himmler soup,[ JD Vance, is defending them.](https://substack.com/redirect/516e2184-7bd6-44f0-a7a2-2c5127d7933b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.TmnOlE5-tZQxHRAAdZnb4WXVg_bvWG8BhSL22BpKqm8?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=176504637)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/516e2184-7bd6-44f0-a7a2-2c5127d7933b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
I can't wait til this guy's half-Indian kids reach the age where they realize their power-humping dad literally made it more likely they'd suffer from a hate crime with his every action since becoming a politician. You must be so proud, sport-o.
Ok, only slightly off topic--just a quick question for those self-described "reasonable" Republicans among us.
Where do you think the Nazism of the Young Republicans came from? After whom do you think these castrato modeled their behavior?
Remember when there was no question, we all just hated Nazis? Why one of the highest grossing movies of its time and all time, _Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade_ could just have Harrison Ford saying this:
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/091a2f7b-d42a-458e-aa98-08ddb80d3a82?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
"Nazis. I hate these guys"
No controversy there. They were evil. We beat them. End of story.
Yet, for some reason you all thought the turkey-necked, goosestepper who said "there are good people on both sides," wouldn't reject a David Duke endorsement and talked about "sh*thole countries" would just be a blip.
Meanwhile, any high school senior studying cultural transmission could've told you the guy with the biggest mic, who never shuts the f*k up and has a cult following could change the very character of much of our nation.
You know, the guy who literally ran on slogan from the Nazi-supporting American party in the 1940's?
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.TmnOlE5-tZQxHRAAdZnb4WXVg_bvWG8BhSL22BpKqm8?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=176504637)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7447dda5-7ca9-481b-8702-4bf24ad262ee?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Well done, f*king snapperheads.
And look, [it's not like he needed a second term for anyone to see Trump was making Nazism an acceptable, even dominant force on The Right](https://substack.com/redirect/7447dda5-7ca9-481b-8702-4bf24ad262ee?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Remember this guy, prominent among the January 6th traitors? He wasn't rejected by them, he was one of the gang! And then Trump went ahead and pardoned him.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7447dda5-7ca9-481b-8702-4bf24ad262ee?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[Meanwhile, only one day before the Jan 6th fascists stormed the Capitol,](https://substack.com/redirect/88ad0bbd-515c-4667-85f7-f106058443b0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) there was a member of the GOP House delegation, Rep. Mary Miller, with this nice little bundle o' inspiration:
> Each generation has the responsibility to teach the next generation. You know, if we win a few elections we're still going to be losing unless we win the hearts of our children. It's the battle. Hitler was right on one thing that whoever has the youth has the future. Our children are being propagandized
Congrats, Mary! If Young Republican chat rooms age 18-67 are reperesentative, you seem you've sure won the hearts and minds of the children. And kudos on suffering zero consequences for saying any of this, because your party ~~supports free speech~~ loves Hitler.
I could provide more examples, but it's a nice day outside. So why not give you one from, oh... _yesterday_ , then take a break and go and go to my local No Kings rally.
Especially the day after a power left over from the days of kings--pardons--let Trump do that to former GOP Congressman and serial criminal (yeah, redundant) George Santos. Who, btw, claimed he was Jewish (nope), a descendant of Holocaust survivors (nope) and made Hitler jokes on Facebook (yup).
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/88ad0bbd-515c-4667-85f7-f106058443b0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[Fight For Us On No Kings Day!](https://substack.com/redirect/7145dca9-f0a8-446a-82a5-16fe8400a42b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
So speaking of Congress, the The latest entry in the "We Swear We Totally Never Did Invasion of Paris Reenactments" sweepstakes (_btw, 1940, just like America First --what a coincidence!_) comes from GOP Rep. Dave Taylor. A man who sullies my state of Ohio with his generally crab louse-infested thoughts on the daily.
But he stepped it up recently, when he and/or his staff decided to fly a Swastika'd Amercian flag in his D.C. office. He claimed it was a "ruse." But, and I know I'm spitballing here, I gotta say this looks rather un-ruse like.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/da0e1bd4-bb50-43a0-a8a5-5e9bdb1f56f4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Though, I do agree with Congressman _I Have A Nazi Flag On My Wall_ that it's gotta be some kind of ruse that anyone without cerebral colitis would support him or his party.
So they can go flying Nazi flags in their offices. But I digress.
It's like a recent episode of _Peacemaker_ where Agent Emilia Harcourt (Jennifer Holland) and Peacemaker (John Cena) end up in a Nazi-controlled America in a parallel universe and it goes like this:
**H: I can 't believe you didn't realize
we're in Nazi world.
P: Come on. How was I supposed
to notice that?
H: Because of the copies
of Mein Kampf on every desk?
P: Think I'd be this buff
if I looked at books?
H: Or the giant
fucking mural of Hitler?
P: Oh, fuck. How'd I miss that?**
Ring any bells, Taylor? Or, are you seriously going with it's a ruse and I somehow didn't see that _**Huge**_ _**Nazi Flag On My Wall**_?
Could someone have played a trick on you? Sure. But how did you or someone not see the Swastika, numb nuts? [Do you suffer from some form of Swastika blindness?](https://substack.com/redirect/b113f479-38e3-4f20-946d-270cdd06e373?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
It's ok, Dave. I know, you're only 54, you're ~~too old to be this much of a cockeyed brain-tart~~ a Young Republican! Yo probably missed the flag because you were too busy chatting with other "young" Republicans about the legendary Trail of Tears.
Look, folks, joking aside, these people, _the_ _young dweebs for one sexual experience ever with another human present_ , the swastika-adjacent Congressmen, Rep. Hitler Youth, they're so far past dog-whistling.
At this point they're driving around the block in their lowriders, blaring Wagner via a megaphone while quoting Nietzsche's The Genealogy of Morals. They're Nazis.
They repeat Nazi slogans, surround themselves with Nazi regalia, believe in Nazi philosophy.
We beat their asses once before, and we'll do it again.
But to solve a problem, any problem, you must be willing to publicly diagnose it. Republicans are lousy with Nazis, fascists, totalitarians and criminals.
So let's stop the hedging and call them what they are.
They've more than earned it.

| | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---

Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him. Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others.
