name: Deb Haaland
subject: Let’s tackle education together
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
I went to 13 public schools before I graduated from Highland High School in Albuquerque.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=5110%2E400544%2ELNR-LD)
**I went to 13 public schools before I graduated from Highland High School in Albuquerque.** And I can tell you that when school feels relevant — when kids have real options — it makes all the difference.
Right now, New Mexico ranks near the bottom in education — and every family knows our kids deserve better. Across all 33 counties, I hear the same things: students don’t feel prepared for the real world, and employers can’t find enough skilled workers to fill good-paying jobs.
I want to tackle this: Together — students, parents, teachers, businesses, and unions — let’s move New Mexico’s schools and economy forward by better engaging our children.**But I need your help to make this a possibility.** **[Will you chip in $5 to my campaign right now so we can build the future every New Mexico student and family deserves?](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/807?c0=em_ms_dh_20251018_2_education.gGdMuA&amount=5&refcode=em20251018-5110&t=2&akid=5110%2E400544%2ELNR-LD)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/807?c0=em_ms_dh_20251018_2_education.gGdMuA&amount=5&refcode=em20251018-5110&t=21&akid=5110%2E400544%2ELNR-LD)**
Across our state, parents, teachers, and employers all want the same thing: for our kids to have a real shot at success right here in New Mexico. Here’s how we can make that happen:
* Let’s create career and trade pathways that start in middle school and carry students through graduation into living-wage, high-demand careers in New Mexico.

* Let’s make learning exciting again, so curiosity in our students can soar: to keep kids engaged in reading and math, we can couple them with hands-on courses that excite their imaginations and keep them learning.

* Let’s give every high school student a launchpad — whether they’re headed to college or a high-paying career. By expanding career pathway programs, we can help students graduate with real-world skills, credentials, and even hands-on working hours. Let’s make sure every diploma opens doors to opportunity in New Mexico.

* Let’s seize the moment. Our state is on the verge of a boom in renewable energy, film, aerospace, and high-speed internet. But for every ten workers retiring, only one is ready to take their place. Let’s invest in career pathways now — so students in every community can step into these jobs, fuel our economy, and lead New Mexico into the future.

The solution is clear: we must invest in career pathways now — so kids in rural, Tribal, and urban communities can be part of New Mexico’s future.
New Mexico’s businesses and unions know what’s at stake — and they’re ready to be part of the solution. Pre-apprenticeship programs are already training electricians, plumbers, lineworkers, film crews, and more — connecting students to safe, high-paying, in-demand careers.
When we all work together, we don’t just build a stronger workforce — we build a brighter future for our kids.
The payoff? A new generation of New Mexicans ready to fill good-paying jobs, break cycles of poverty, and help our state lead the way in innovation and opportunity. As your next governor, I’m ready to work side by side with teachers, families, unions, businesses, and education professionals to make this a cornerstone of how we improve education and strengthen our economy.
**[But I can’t do it alone. I need your help — will you chip in $5 to my campaign today to help us build this future for New Mexico’s kids and communities?](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/807?c0=em_ms_dh_20251018_2_education.gGdMuA&amount=5&refcode=em20251018-5110&t=22&akid=5110%2E400544%2ELNR-LD)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/807?c0=em_ms_dh_20251018_2_education.gGdMuA&amount=5&refcode=em20251018-5110&t=23&akid=5110%2E400544%2ELNR-LD)**
Be fierce.
— Deb 💛
**P.S.** I recently shared my education plan in an op-ed for the Albuquerque Journal — focused on preparing New Mexico students for life beyond the classroom, starting in middle school. If you want to dive deeper into the plan, **[you can read more here](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/892?t=24&akid=5110%2E400544%2ELNR-LD).**
---
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20251018-2&t=25&refcode2=5110_400544_LNR-LD&akid=5110%2E400544%2ELNR-LD)**
[](https://deb4gov.us/text-me)

* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?t=26&akid=5110%2E400544%2ELNR-LD)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?t=27&akid=5110%2E400544%2ELNR-LD)

Email us: [info@debhaaland.com](mailto:info@debhaaland.com)

body:
Voters are deciding RIGHT NOW — your support matters. | | https://us5.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id;=124975ee95&e;=77eef70c61 | Is this email not displaying correctly?

---
| | Friends,

Ballots have been mailed out to voters across King County this weekend -- and that means voting in this election starts now.

We don't want this race to be close. **Please return your ballot right away!**

I'm proud of what we've achieved -- fighting for taxpayers, cutting waste, supporting our law enforcement heroes, and earning the endorsement of The Seattle Times, every mayor in District 9, and local police and firefighters. **But none of it matters if we don 't get our message out during these final critical weeks.**

_Please take a moment to do two things today:_
☐ Vote early -- fill out your ballot and return it right away.
☐ [Chip in $25 or $50](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=d98a8398ff&e=77eef70c61) to help us reach more voters before they cast their ballots.

Thank you for being part of this fight for a better King County.

-- Reagan Dunn
King County Councilmember

Please take a moment to do two things today: ☐ Vote early -- fill out your ballot and return it right away. ☐ to help us reach more voters before they cast their ballots. Thank you for being part of this fight for a better King County. -- Reagan Dunn King County Councilmember | | | | Paid for by Friends of Reagan Dunn P.O. Box 40417 Bellevue, WA 98015 Email: mailto:info@reagandunn.com | |

name: Michael Bennet
subject: Trump needs to touch grass
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Governor
body:
36% of Colorado is public land – and I need your help to protect all 24 million acres for the next generation.
| | |
---
If you know me, friend, you know hiking is my favorite way to get outdoors.↘︎
|
---
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117545110/576835414/851209409?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk948-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMmI4YmUxMC03NGFjLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-MqoDaP20kEdAu5jkgjaNq_vyk4px5YVS_p8qv2E8k0=)
---
| And with an outdoors as great as Colorado's, there's no better place to do it when we have:
---
**• 17,000-plus hiking trails**
**• 13 national parks and monuments**
**• 13 national forests and grasslands**
**• 58 fourteener peaks** right here in our backyards
After years of meeting folks from all over our state on the trail, I'm so glad that other Coloradans care just as deeply as I do about protecting these majestic wild spaces for ourselves and for future generations.
**_[But with so much at stake under the Trump administration, I need your help to _keep_ Colorado's outdoors great – so I'm counting on you to chip in to my campaign right away.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117545111/576835415/851209409?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk948-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMmI4YmUxMC03NGFjLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-MqoDaP20kEdAu5jkgjaNq_vyk4px5YVS_p8qv2E8k0=)_**
| | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117545112/576835416/851209409?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk948-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMmI4YmUxMC03NGFjLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-MqoDaP20kEdAu5jkgjaNq_vyk4px5YVS_p8qv2E8k0=)
---
The problem is not just that President Trump and D.C. Republicans don't share our values – it's that their agenda poses an existential threat to Colorado's outdoors, our economy and our way of life.
Because after Trump gutted the already understaffed U.S. Forest Service and Bureau of Land Management in the spring, local nonprofits have had to fill the gaps – _from clearing trees off roadways to cleaning bathrooms_ –**** at Colorado's national forest areas.
And remember when Republicans tried to sneak the sale of nearly 3.3 million acres of protected public lands into Trump’s _“Big Beautiful Bill?” It was all so the Trump administration could auction off our land to fossil fuel companies and real estate developers to help pay for their tax giveaways to the ultra-wealthy._
Then just the other day, Trump used the shutdown as an excuse to target Colorado's energy transition _by illegally axing over**$600 MILLION** for 38 clean energy projects and thousands of new jobs in our state._
But I believe it's our shared responsibility to build a brighter future for our state and the generations who inherit it from us.
**So as governor, I will never waver in my commitment to protecting Colorado's great outdoors. And together, I know we can and will make Colorado lead the way in expanding protections for our natural spaces. Our kids and grandkids deserve nothing less.**
But since I'm running a 100% grassroots-powered race, I can't make any of that happen without a tidal wave of support from folks like you –**_[so please, will you help me keep up the fight for the future of Colorado's outdoor wonders by donating $5 or more today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117545113/576835417/851209409?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk948-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMmI4YmUxMC03NGFjLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-MqoDaP20kEdAu5jkgjaNq_vyk4px5YVS_p8qv2E8k0=)_**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Donate $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117545114/576835418/851209409?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=jtk948-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMmI4YmUxMC03NGFjLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-MqoDaP20kEdAu5jkgjaNq_vyk4px5YVS_p8qv2E8k0=)

body:

**SHOCKING REPORT:** **CHINA ATTACKS U.S. WATER SUPPLY** [](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e7243468/VaHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazE1LmNvbS9jbGljaw/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTEwMTg/LbmNsQjc2dXFnbA/qP3RydmlkPTE0MTMyJkFGSUQ9MTA5NSZhZmZfc3ViPVVXRi1GTE8tMjAxOC0yMDI1MTAxOCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249VVdGLUZMTy0yMDE4LTIwMjUxMDE4/gaPQanQ/s0q705de7ea) **_FBI's Urgent Warning Has Been All Over The News_** Chinese hackers are coming for the water supply in your hometown. Attacking city water systems, biding their time and waiting for China's signal to strike. Experts warn that Russia and Iran are also targeting attacks on our city water systems. Overflowing, damaging and poisoning the lifegiving systems that we trust to keep us safe. Like it or not, your local tap water may be our country's weakest link. Deteriorating infrastructure. Systems years beyond their expiration dates. Negligent corporations. And God-knows-what in the water we drink. We're up against arsenic, plastics, chlorine, forever chemicals, hormone-altering drug residue and a host of other contaminants. Listen, I'm not trying to be the messenger of doom... **But protecting the water supply in your home is more important than ever.** If you don't take steps to be prepared, you and your family could end up vulnerable. Forced to choose between drinking poisoned, toxic or dirty water, or going without water altogether. It sounds harsh... But the truth is that even good people with good intentions can make serious mistakes. Mistakes like... **Getting filters that claim to purify your water, but don't prove it.** If a company doesn't have certifications from a third-party lab, show lab tests or reveal how many gallons were tested... that's a bad sign. After a couple gallons, most water filters on the market stop working for scary contaminants and start passing them into your water. **Getting bottled water with a 2-year shelf life and risking plastic leaching into your supply.** Not to mention all the money you'll waste, and the work required to carry cases of water. Plus with bottled water, you never really know what's been filtered out. **Or simply using a pitcher in the fridge... with slapshot filtration power and limited capacity.** Most pitchers hold a couple cups of water at a time. Not nearly enough to drink, cook and clean in an emergency. You'll run out in no time, just when your life depends on it. Well we have great news to share... Folks have been calling... Folks have been emailing... Folks have been leaving Facebook messages asking about our just-released... **NEW AND IMPROVED...** [**NEW Ultra-Fast MegaFlow Ultimate Water Filtration System!**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e7243468/VaHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazE1LmNvbS9jbGljaw/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTEwMTg/LbmNsQjc2dXFnbA/qP3RydmlkPTE0MTMyJkFGSUQ9MTA5NSZhZmZfc3ViPVVXRi1GTE8tMjAxOC0yMDI1MTAxOCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249VVdGLUZMTy0yMDE4LTIwMjUxMDE4/gaPQanQ/s0q705de7ea) **4X Faster Flow Rate for Perfect, Delicious Drinking Water** [](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e7243468/VaHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazE1LmNvbS9jbGljaw/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTEwMTg/LbmNsQjc2dXFnbA/qP3RydmlkPTE0MTMyJkFGSUQ9MTA5NSZhZmZfc3ViPVVXRi1GTE8tMjAxOC0yMDI1MTAxOCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249VVdGLUZMTy0yMDE4LTIwMjUxMDE4/gaPQanQ/s0q705de7ea) **But hurry – we have limited stock, and this MegaFlow Ultimate Water Filtration System is first-come first-served. We only have a small number of units to go around.** [**Get Your MegaFlow Ultimate Water Filtration System Rushed To You At This Special Pricing Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e7243468/VaHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazE1LmNvbS9jbGljaw/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTEwMTg/LbmNsQjc2dXFnbA/qP3RydmlkPTE0MTMyJkFGSUQ9MTA5NSZhZmZfc3ViPVVXRi1GTE8tMjAxOC0yMDI1MTAxOCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249VVdGLUZMTy0yMDE4LTIwMjUxMDE4/gaPQanQ/s0q705de7ea) The best part is... **_This advanced filtration technology filters the nastiest, filthiest, bacteria-riddled and parasite infested water using no chemicals, no electricity and no moving parts!_** It's powered by the same technology that the U.S. Military and NASA trust to filter their water. But now available for you in your home. You're among the first to get access to these advanced, carbon-block water filters designed to filter water on your countertop at a sub-micron level without power or water hookup. **So you can reduce...** Harmful Bacteria – up to 99.9999%
Life-Threatening Viruses – up to 99.99%
Disease-Carrying Cysts – up to 99.9% Plus, this table-top unit targets 140+ dangerous contaminants from your tap water, including bacteria, viruses, toxic chemicals, arsenic, heavy metals, pharmaceuticals, VOCs and more. All in the same, best-selling system thousands of Americans trust in their homes. **The NEW & improved Filtration System may look the same...** But on the inside, these proprietary filters pack an even bigger punch than before. They're MORE reliable and easier to replace, too. So you get safer, cleaner water for you and your family. **But we have very limited stock, and we've been sold out of this filtration powerhouse for a while.** In fact, it's been a very long while. Months and months, actually. [**Now we've just got a fresh batch in.**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e7243468/VaHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazE1LmNvbS9jbGljaw/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTEwMTg/LbmNsQjc2dXFnbA/qP3RydmlkPTE0MTMyJkFGSUQ9MTA5NSZhZmZfc3ViPVVXRi1GTE8tMjAxOC0yMDI1MTAxOCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249VVdGLUZMTy0yMDE4LTIwMjUxMDE4/gaPQanQ/s0q705de7ea) And if you need to take it with you? No problem. You're not tied to it like a whole-house filtration system. That kind of thing won't do you any good if you need to bug out. **And YES there's an interest-FREE payment plan!** Yes, right now, you can get your MegaFlow Ultimate Water Filtration System on a convenient, no-credit-check, interest-FREE payment plan. We know you're good for it. You'll have the **peace of mind** knowing that you're doing everything you can to keep your family safer, by securing your MegaFlow Ultimate Water Filtration System today for fresher, cleaner water for years to come. [**Get Your MegaFlow Ultimate Water Filtration System Rushed To You At This Special Pricing Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e7243468/VaHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazE1LmNvbS9jbGljaw/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTEwMTg/LbmNsQjc2dXFnbA/qP3RydmlkPTE0MTMyJkFGSUQ9MTA5NSZhZmZfc3ViPVVXRi1GTE8tMjAxOC0yMDI1MTAxOCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249VVdGLUZMTy0yMDE4LTIwMjUxMDE4/gaPQanQ/s0q705de7ea) To your survival, Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters P.S. Derrick loves the convenience of his MegaFlow Ultimate Water Filtration System: _"It was so easy to install. Within minutes we had water that tasted so good, we couldn't believe it. We don't like the chlorine in tap water and we got tired of lugging around cases of bottled water."_ **Customers Love Their Ultimate
Water Filtration System!** [](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e7243468/VaHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazE1LmNvbS9jbGljaw/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTEwMTg/LbmNsQjc2dXFnbA/qP3RydmlkPTE0MTMyJkFGSUQ9MTA5NSZhZmZfc3ViPVVXRi1GTE8tMjAxOC0yMDI1MTAxOCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249VVdGLUZMTy0yMDE4LTIwMjUxMDE4/gaPQanQ/s0q705de7ea) **_Cyndi L._**_
"No question... beats the competition. After reviewing several other companies and seeing that I was not the only one thinking this way, as everyone was sold out of products, I decided to go with 4Patriots. They seem to be good people who are very helpful and their products seemed above average to others."_ _**Michael B.**
"Saves me a ton of money and grocery-store headaches. During the pandemic, water wasn't always available. Not so with the Purifier. We love it and I have 5 gallons of water on hand all the time."_ _**Faith P.**
"Water you can actually trust. This is so much better than storing gallons and gallons of bottled water. This enables us to make existing, natural water sources drinkable. I feel really good knowing that in an emergency situation, we'd be able to filter our water."_ _**Carol B.**
"Stop worrying about what's in the water! We use our system for drinking and cooking but you can use it almost anywhere. It's easy to use and it doesn't take long to filter. The water tastes pure and delicious."_ _**Rick O.**
"Easiest way to upgrade your drinking water. We chose this one because it handles everything and it's affordable. You never know when things will go out on you."_ _**Thomas P.**
"Finally, I don't have to keep refilling my pitcher all day. I'm very happy with my water filter. Not only does our water now taste good (it tasted dirty from the tap) but the large capacity tank means I'm not refilling small pitchers repeatedly during the day."_ [**Get Your MegaFlow Ultimate Water Filtration System Rushed To You At This Special Pricing Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e7243468/VaHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazE1LmNvbS9jbGljaw/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTEwMTg/LbmNsQjc2dXFnbA/qP3RydmlkPTE0MTMyJkFGSUQ9MTA5NSZhZmZfc3ViPVVXRi1GTE8tMjAxOC0yMDI1MTAxOCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249VVdGLUZMTy0yMDE4LTIwMjUxMDE4/gaPQanQ/s0q705de7ea)

I’ll be blunt.
[First,](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117545183/576835580/1694059021?amount=15&refcode=20251018_em_fr_b2_np4c_main&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGJlMGU1Yy03M2FjLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o1Tdam0J9LYaCTkOssa3kP6BC6RgyIsV09prS6I668Y=) Trump and Republicans GERRYMANDERED congressional maps, tried to BAN mail-in voting that our overseas troops use to vote, and sent ARMED TROOPS into the streets of American cities. It’s shameful.
[Then,](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117545184/576835581/1694059021?amount=15&refcode=20251018_em_fr_b2_np4c_main&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGJlMGU1Yy03M2FjLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o1Tdam0J9LYaCTkOssa3kP6BC6RgyIsV09prS6I668Y=) Trump hosted a massive $1 MILLION-PER-PERSON fundraiser at Mar-a-Lago last night to try to buy another Republican House Majority.
[Now,](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117545185/576835582/1694059021?amount=15&refcode=20251018_em_fr_b2_np4c_main&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGJlMGU1Yy03M2FjLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o1Tdam0J9LYaCTkOssa3kP6BC6RgyIsV09prS6I668Y=) we’re SPEAKING OUT to show Trump that America will NEVER have a KING – and set our plan in motion to defeat him in the midterms!
[We’re done watching Republicans get away with their attacks on our Democracy.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117545186/576835583/1694059021?amount=15&refcode=20251018_em_fr_b2_np4c_main&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGJlMGU1Yy03M2FjLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o1Tdam0J9LYaCTkOssa3kP6BC6RgyIsV09prS6I668Y=)
[_So here’s the plan: For just 6 more hours, I’m giving grassroots Democrats one more opportunity to become a Democratic Member. clean_body: | Peter, If you watched the news today, it’s been hard to miss the millions of Americans who came out to stand up for our rights, against authoritarianism, and for freedom for every person in our country. In Indiana, we’ve seen thousands of people out in communities large and small across our state. Thousands of Hoosiers came out to the Statehouse today, and hundreds more in Corydon, Muncie, Valparaiso, Jeffersonville, Warsaw, Plainfield, Lebanon, and dozens of other cities and towns. = = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = In these trying times, it’s so refreshing to see Hoosiers taking to the streets demanding that our state and federal government focus on the issues that really matter: lowering costs, healthcare, and childcare, not just partisan power grabs. = Thanks, Chair Karen Tallian [content goes here] 101 W Washington St., Suite #1110 E Indianapolis, IN 46204 Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www.indems.org. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

body:
| | Saludos, it’s Gabe. We’re just hours away from our mid-month fundraising deadline, and here’s the truth: Republicans are hoping we fall short tonight. National Republicans are backing candidates who will push Donald Trump’s agenda, push further cuts to healthcare, and continue this reckless government shutdown — no matter the cost to working families. But we have the chance to stop them in 2026. If we hold this seat, we can continue to fight for affordable healthcare, stand up for New Mexico’s working families, and flip the House in 2026 to stop the MAGA chaos. **But that starts with what we do right now.** Will you chip in $10 before the deadline to help us close the gap? The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. name: GOTV PAC
subject: A new low for Trump (and it’s good)
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09042025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09042025&amount=25]
Peter ,
While you may have been out at today’s No Kings protest, we wanted to make sure you didn’t miss this:
📉 Trump’s approval rating on the economy just cratered.
A new survey shows Trump’s economic approval is now the lowest of either term. A majority of Americans now blame Trump and congressional Republicans for the shutdown, inflation, and rising costs.
When voters start turning on Trump over the economy, the one thing he’s always bragged about, it means the tide is shifting.
Now it’s on us to turn that frustration into action.
GOTV PAC is already mobilizing in key 2025 swing states, making sure today’s energy from the streets carries straight into the ballot box. Can you chip in right now to help us keep the momentum going? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email10162025]
Chip in $25 to power GOTV PAC → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email10162025]
-Team GOTV PAC
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09212025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09212025&amount=25]
Get Out the Vote PAC mobilizes voters often overlooked by mainstream campaigns to help Democratic candidates win in the most competitive districts.
Our professional phone bankers specialize in long- and short-term GOTV campaigns, event registration, voting assistance in heavily gerrymandered states, fundraising, and call time management. Our mission is to flip red districts blue, any elected position from dog walker to Congress member.
Learn more at: gotv.vote [https://www.gotv.vote/]

GOTV PAC
712 H St NE
PMB 96591
Washington, DC 20002
United States
Get Out the Vote PAC is registered with the Federal Election Commission as a hybrid Political Action Committee (PAC) with FEC ID C00839407. Our mission is to Flip the House by supporting targeted Congressional districts and down-ballot races within those districts. Our internal research evidences that the impact of a Dollar invested in this manner amplifies the top and bottom of the ticket.

A new survey shows Trump’s economic approval is now the lowest of either term. A majority of Americans now blame Trump and congressional Republicans for the shutdown, inflation, and rising costs. When voters start turning on Trump over the economy, the one thing he’s always bragged about, it means the tide is shifting. Now it’s on us to turn that frustration into action. GOTV PAC is already mobilizing in key 2025 swing states, making sure today’s energy from the streets carries straight into the ballot box. Can you chip in right now to help us keep the momentum going? [] Chip in $25 to power GOTV PAC → [] -Team GOTV PAC [] Get Out the Vote PAC mobilizes voters often overlooked by mainstream campaigns to help Democratic candidates win in the most competitive districts. Our professional phone bankers specialize in long- and short-term GOTV campaigns, event registration, voting assistance in heavily gerrymandered states, fundraising, and call time management. Our mission is to flip red districts blue, any elected position from dog walker to Congress member. Learn more at: gotv.vote [] PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE GOTV PAC 712 H St NE PMB 96591 Washington, DC 20002 United States Get Out the Vote PAC is registered with the Federal Election Commission as a hybrid Political Action Committee (PAC) with FEC ID C00839407. Our mission is to Flip the House by supporting targeted Congressional districts and down-ballot races within those districts. Our internal research evidences that the impact of a Dollar invested in this manner amplifies the top and bottom of the ticket.
